A bayan tawayen matasa, wani hankali mai rawar jiki da buri marar ƙarewa sun yi ta tafasa, a cikinsu wani zurfin fahimtar ƙaddara ya motsa shi zuwa filayen yaƙi, nesa da jin daɗinsa na asali zuwa tsakiyar rikici. Tun daga lokacin, wata fahimtar duhu mai zuwa ta kama shi, kuma wani mummunan zato na manyan gwaje-gwaje da za su buƙaci jajircewarsa ta musamman da ƙarfinsa ya mamaye shi.

Farkon ƙarni na 20 ya kasance kamar wani labyrinth na tsoffin ra'ayoyi da sabbin abubuwa masu ban mamaki, lokacin da dawakai da tankuna har yanzu suke gasa kuma tsoffin koyarwa ke riƙe da ragamar mulki da ƙarfi. Amma Churchill, a matsayin mai rushe gumaka, ya shiga cikin waɗannan raƙuman ruwa masu juyawa da himmar annabci, yana rungumar gaba. Ya hau dawakai a filayen yaƙi masu nisa, yana isar da labarai a cikin wuta, kuma ya kammala karatunsa a cikin tukunyar rikici, yana shanye mummunan gaskiyar yaƙin zamani da kallon da ba ya girgiza wanda ya saba wa asalin gatan sa. Hawansa na siyasa ya kasance kamar ambaliyar ruwa na sanarwa masu ƙarfin hali da saurin canza jam'iyya. A cikin rawa mai ƙarfin hali da ke adawa da tsohuwar ra'ayin mazan jiya na abokan aikinsa, ya ba da shawarar sabunta Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Sarauta kuma ya yi tunanin manyan 'jiragen ruwa na ƙasa' waɗanda za su ratsa laka na Yammacin Gabas. Amma tukunyar yaƙi kuma ta haifar da babban farkon shan kashinsa, yakin Gallipoli. Wani mummunan kuskure ya sa aka kore shi daga manyan ofisoshin mulki, kuma ya fuskanci wani lokaci mai zurfi na gudun hijira na siyasa, inda ɗacin zargin jama'a ya ƙarfafa marmarin samun ceto mai zafi, kamar yadda wata tsuntsu mai suna phoenix ke jiran tashinsa mai girma.

Lokacin babban gwaji ya zo, an lulluɓe shi a cikin duhun labulen 1940. Inuwa ta Nazism ta miƙe tsayi a kan nahiyar da ke miƙa wuya ga zalunci, kuma Birtaniya ta tsaya ita kaɗai, kamar wani sansani da abokin gaba da ba za a iya cin nasara ba ya kewaye shi. A lokacin ne Winston Churchill, wanda aka ƙarfafa a cikin wutar gazawar da ta gabata, ya riƙe ragamar ƙasar da ke cikin haɗari. Muryarsa ta zama kukan al'umma mai 'yanci, kamar babban gangar juriya, yana mai da kalmomi makamai a kan yanke kauna, kuma ya saƙa wani zane mai ban mamaki na ruhu marar girgiza wanda ya riƙe tsibirin da ƙarfi a cikin hare-haren sama marasa tsayawa da barazanar mamayewa. Amma a bayan kamanninsa na bulldog da maganganunsa masu ba da kwarin gwiwa, akwai wani mutum da ke fama da kadaici mai kusan ba za a iya jurewa ba. Kowace rana yana fama da 'baƙar kare' na baƙin ciki, yana ɗaukar babban nauyin alhakin duniya, kuma yana yanke shawara da ke ƙayyade makomar miliyoyin mutane da zuciya mai nauyi da hankali mai gajiya. Babban wahalar jiki da ta hankali ba ta da iyaka, ya kasance yaƙi marar tsayawa da shakka da tsoro, da kuma dare marar barci na shugaba da ke ɗaukar kowane zaɓi wanda zai iya nufin ceto ko halakar wayewar da ya rantse zai kare.

Ko da yake ƙarnuka za su buɗe zanen lokacinsu, babban inuwar da Winston Churchill ya jefa za ta ci gaba. Ya kasance fitila mai jajircewa wanda ya ratsa cikin duhun dare na tarihin ɗan adam, gado wanda aka zana zurfi a cikin ƙwaƙwalwar gama kai, ba a cikin dutse ko doka ba. Shi babban mutum ne wanda ya ɗauki nauyin duniya da aka ceto, wani kuka marar girgiza a kan duhun mulkin kama-karya mai zuwa, yana koya wa ɗan adam babban kuma madawwamin ikon kalmomi lokacin da aka yi amfani da su da tabbaci marar girgiza da bayyananniyar ɗabi'a. Rayuwarsa babban labari ne mai cike da rudani na juriya da ceto, yana tsaye a matsayin shaida ta har abada ga ikon ban mamaki na mutum ɗaya don canza tafarkin ƙaddara, don zaburar da mutanen da ke cikin matsala su tattara mafi zurfin ƙarfinsu kuma su ƙi miƙa wuya a ƙarƙashin takalmin zalunci. Don haka, ya wuce tarihin ɗan siyasa kawai, ya zama alama ta har abada ta ruhun ɗan adam wanda, lokacin da ya fuskanci matsaloli masu yawa, ya zaɓi kada ya miƙa wuya amma ya yi yaƙi, ya jure, kuma a ƙarshe ya yi nasara.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaba mai jajircewa wanda aka haifa cikin gata, ya fuskanci lokuta masu cike da rudani, kuma ya jagoranci Birtaniya zuwa nasara a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na II.
key_achievements: Ya ba da shawarar sabunta Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Sarauta kuma ya yi tunanin tanki.
Ya jagoranci Birtaniya a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na II kuma ya yi adawa da Nazism.
Ya haɗa kan al'umma kuma ya ba su kwarin gwiwa da kalmomi a cikin yanke kauna.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ta har abada wanda ya ceci ɗan adam da jajircewa marar girgiza da ikon kalmomi a cikin matsaloli masu yawa.

parsed.narrative:
A shekara ta 259 K.Z., a cikin rudanin lokacin Jihohin Yaƙi na Sin, aka haifi Ying Zheng, wanda daga baya ya zama Qin Shi Huang. Rayuwarsa ta yara, a matsayin ɗan garkuwa da aka haifa a ƙasar waje, ta kasance lokaci mai cike da wahala, inda ya girma a cikin barazanar rayuwa da raini. Amma a cikin zuciyar yaron nan Ying Zheng, wata babbar buri ta ci gaba da ci, na kashe wutar yaƙe-yaƙe da suka daɗe shekaru ɗarurruwa, da kuma haɗa kan dukkan duniya. Tun yana ɗan shekara 13, ya zama sarkin Qin, ya karɓi iko, kuma ya shirya don hawan daular haɗin kai mafi girma kuma mafi tsanani a tarihin ɗan adam.

Babban ci gaban Qin Shi Huang shi ne 'haɗin kai na farko da daidaitawar Sin'. Ya halaka jihohi shida ɗaya bayan ɗaya, ya haɗa kan yankin tsakiya zuwa ɗaya, kuma shi ne na farko da ya yi amfani da taken 'Sarki'. Bai tsaya kawai ga haɗa yankuna ba, har ma ya daidaita ma'auni, kuɗi, da rubutu, don kafa tushen babbar daular. Ya gina Babban Katangar Sin don kare kai daga baƙi, kuma ya kafa tsarin gwamnati mai ƙarfi a tsakiya bisa ga falsafar Legalism. Shi ne mahaliccin wani zamani, wanda ya tsara asalin babbar ƙasar Sin da za ta daɗe shekaru dubbai.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, ya nemi maganin tsawon rai, yana mafarkin rayuwa ta har abada, amma wannan sha'awar tasa ta bar inuwar zalunci mai tsanani da kuma ƙona littattafai da binne malamai. Ya rayu tsawon rayuwarsa a cikin barazanar kisan kai, a matsayin sarki mai kaɗaici wanda bai amince da kowa ba. Ƙudurinsa na ci gaba da zama sarki ko bayan mutuwarsa, ta hanyar gina babbar daular ƙasa ta Terracotta Army, ya nuna iyakar burin wani babban mutum. Ya kasance wani babban mutum wanda ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya wajen ƙirƙirar duniya ɗaya mai suna Sin.

Gadon da Qin Shi Huang ya bari yana haskawa a yau a matsayin tushen wayewar Sin da alamar jagoranci mai ƙarfi. Ya canza tafarkin tarihi da imani mai ƙarfi cewa "ikon mutum ɗaya ne ya kamata ya mallaki dukkan duniya." Rayuwar Qin Shi Huang ta kasance wani babban labari na haɗin kai da aka ƙirƙira da ƙarfe da jini, yana koyar da cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shi ne wanda ke kafa tsari mai ƙarfi, ko da kuwa dole ne ya jure zargi don kawo ƙarshen rudani. An rubuta sunansa har abada a matsayin Shi Huangdi, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke neman haɗa kan duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mutumin da ya haɗa kan kasar Sin a lokacin rikicin jihohin yaƙi, ya zama Sarkin Farko na Sin, kuma ya gina daular da ke da iko mai ƙarfi a tsakiya.
key_achievements: Kawo ƙarshen rikicin jihohin yaƙi da haɗa kan Sin.
Daidaita ma'auni, kuɗi, da rubutu.
Gina Babban Katangar Sin da ƙarfafa ikon gwamnatin tsakiya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin tushen wayewar Sin ta zamani da alamar jagoranci mai ƙarfi, wanda ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga haɗin kai da kafa tsari.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin shekara ta 63 K.Z., a cikin wani gida mai sauƙi a birnin Roma, aka haifi Octavian, wanda daga baya zai zama Augustus mai girma. Yarintarsa ta kasance lokaci ne na rauni da rashin lafiya, inda bai samu wani babban fata daga mutane ba. Amma kawunsa, Julius Caesar, ya hango kaifin basira da babban buri da ke ɓoye a cikin idanun wannan yaro. Lokacin da aka kashe Caesar, matashin mai shekaru 18, duk da rauninsa, ya karɓi kaddararsa kuma ya shirya wani babban tsalle mai ban mamaki don hawa kan kololuwar mulkin Roma.

Babban tsallen Augustus mafi girma shi ne farkon 'Zaman Lafiya na Roma (Pax Romana)'. Ya murƙushe Antony da Cleopatra, ya kawo ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe na cikin gida masu zubar da jini, kuma ya dawo da zaman lafiya mai ɗorewa ga Roma. Ba kamar Caesar ba, ya kasance mai hikima da dabara, babban ɗan siyasa wanda ya yi amfani da taken 'Ɗan Kasa na Farko (Princeps)' kuma ya kafa tushen daular gaskiya yayin da yake kiyaye kamannin jamhuriya. Ya kammala Roma a matsayin babban daula mai girma ta hanyar gyara hanyoyi, sake fasalin tsarin haraji, da haɓaka al'adu. Bai kasance mai cin nasara kawai ba, amma mai kawo zaman lafiya na wani zamani wanda ya tsara zaman lafiya da tsari.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, ya furta wata magana mai cike da alfahari: 'Na tarar da Roma birni na tubali, na bar ta birni na marmara.' A lokacin mulkinsa mai tsawo na sama da shekaru 40, ya mai da Roma cibiyar duniya, mai haskakawa. Ya rayu dukan rayuwarsa cikin daidaito mai tsanani da lissafi mai kyau, yana ba da fifiko ga zaman lafiya da wadata na jihar fiye da abubuwan da yake ji na kansa. Ya shawo kan rauninsa na jiki da ƙarfin hankali mai ban mamaki, kuma ya tsaya tsayin daka a matsayin babban mai kare wayewar Roma mai girma.

Gadon da Augustus ya bari yana haskakawa a yau a matsayin tushen dukkan tsarin siyasa da tsarin birane na wayewar Yamma. Kafin mutuwarsa, ya bar wa abokansa wata koyarwa mai zurfi: 'Idan kun ji daɗin wasan kwaikwayo na rayuwata, ku tafa.' Rayuwar Augustus ta kasance babban labari na zaman lafiya wanda aka ƙirƙira da haƙuri da hikima mai zurfi, yana koyar da cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda ke daidaita duniya ba da ƙarfi ba, amma da tsarin da aka tsara da basira mai kaifi. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin mai daraja da girma, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga dukkan shugabannin da ke mafarkin nasara mai dorewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban ɗan siyasa wanda, daga matashi mai rauni, ya zama Augustus, sarki na farko na Roma, ya buɗe Pax Romana, kuma ya kammala babban Daular Roma.
key_achievements: Kawo ƙarshen Yaƙin Basasa na Roma da fara Pax Romana
Kafa tushen daular a ƙarƙashin kamannin jamhuriya
Kammala babban Daular Roma da haɓaka al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Zama tushen tsarin siyasa da tsarin birane na wayewar Yamma, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga shugabannin da ke mafarkin nasara mai dorewa.

parsed.narrative:
Yarima Otto Eduard Leopold von Bismarck-Schönhausen (1815-1898) ya kasance fitaccen jami'in diflomasiyya kuma ɗan siyasa mai hazaka wanda ya jagoranci Prussia a cikin rudanin Tarayyar Jamus da ta rabu gida biyu a tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, ya kuma cimma haɗewar Jamus. An haife shi a ranar 1 ga Afrilu, 1815, a Schönhausen, Prussia, a cikin wani dangi mai daraja na Junker (masu mallakar filaye masu daraja), ya nuna ƙarfin hali da halin zaman kansa tun yana yaro. Ko da yake ya yi rayuwar matasa mai ban sha'awa yayin da yake karatun shari'a a Jami'ar Göttingen da sauran wurare, har ma ya sami laƙabin 'Bismarck Mahaukaci', wannan ya zama tushen fahimtarsa ta gaskiya da kuma jajircewarsa a nan gaba. Bayan ya yi aiki a gwamnati na ɗan lokaci sannan ya koma kula da gonakin danginsa, a hankali ya haɓaka ƙwarewarsa ta siyasa a matsayin wakili a Majalisar Prussia da Majalisar Tarayya ta Frankfurt, inda ya ɗauki babban burin haɗa kan Jamus da ta rabu zuwa ƙasa ɗaya mai ƙarfi. A wannan lokacin, ya yi nazarin yanayin siyasar Turai mai sarkakiya da kaifi, ya kuma ƙarfafa imaninsa cewa Prussia ce ya kamata ta zama jagorar haɗewar Jamus. Tafiyarsa ta siyasa ta fara shiga turbar gaske lokacin da aka naɗa shi Firayim Minista na Prussia a shekarar 1862.

Babban juyin juya halin siyasa na Bismarck ya zo ne a shekarar 1862 lokacin da Sarki Wilhelm I na Prussia ya naɗa shi Firayim Minista. Nan da nan bayan hawansa mulki, ya ayyana shahararriyar 'Manufar Ƙarfe da Jini', yana mai cewa "muhimman matsalolin zamanin ba za a warware su ta hanyar jawabi ko kuri'un rinjaye ba, sai dai ta hanyar ƙarfe da jini," kuma ya tura gaba da ƙarfi wajen ƙarfafa sojoji. Wannan ya nuna jigon Realpolitik, falsafar siyasar da ta ba da fifiko ga bukatun ƙasa fiye da ɗabi'un ra'ayin mazan jiya ko akidu. Bisa ga wannan manufar, Bismarck ya yi yaƙe-yaƙe uku don haɗewar Jamus. Da farko, ya ci nasara a Yaƙin Denmark a 1864, ya warware matsalar Schleswig da Holstein. Daga nan, ya murƙushe Austria a Yaƙin Prussia da Austria a 1866, ya kafa rinjayen Prussia a cikin Tarayyar Jamus. A ƙarshe, ya samu nasara mai girma a Yaƙin Prussia da Faransa a 1870, ya samar da wani muhimmin mataki na haɗa kan jihohin Kudancin Jamus a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Prussia. Waɗannan jerin yaƙe-yaƙe sun kasance tsarin gina tushen haɗewar Jamus ta hanyar dabaru na diflomasiyya masu zurfi da ƙarfin sojoji na Bismarck.

A ranar 18 ga Janairu, 1871, Bismarck ya ayyana Daular Jamus a Fadar Versailles, ya naɗa Wilhelm I a matsayin Sarkin Farko, kuma ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Daular. Bayan haɗewar, aikinsa shi ne tabbatar da zaman lafiya da wadata ga sabuwar daular. A cikin gida, ya gudanar da Kulturkampf (yaƙin al'adu) don iyakance tasirin Cocin Katolika, kuma ya kafa dokokin murkushe masu ra'ayin gurguzu don danne ƙungiyoyin gurguzu. A lokaci guda, don rage rashin gamsuwa na ma'aikata da ƙarfafa haɗin kan ƙasa, ya gabatar da tsarin inshorar zamantakewa na zamani na farko a duniya – wato, inshorar rashin lafiya, inshorar haɗari, da tsarin fansho na tsufa – ya kafa harsashin jihar jin daɗin jama'a ta zamani. A waje, ya gina tsarin kawance mai sarkakiya da inganci, kamar Ƙawancen Sarakuna Uku da Ƙawancen Ƙasashe Uku, don ware Faransa da kuma kiyaye daidaiton iko a Turai, wanda ya sa ya sami laƙabin 'Mai wasan kwaikwayo na Turai'. Duk da haka, yanayin ya canza lokacin da Wilhelm II ya hau mulki a 1888. Sarki matashi mai buri ya nuna rashin gamsuwa da manufofin Bismarck na ra'ayin mazan jiya da kuma yadda yake amfani da iko na musamman, kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 18 ga Maris, 1890, Bismarck dole ne ya sauka daga muƙamin Firayim Minista saboda rikici da sarki.

Bayan ya sauka daga muƙamin Firayim Minista, Bismarck ya koma garinsu don ciyar da sauran rayuwarsa, amma tasirinsa na siyasa ya kasance mai ƙarfi a ciki da wajen Jamus. Har zuwa rasuwarsa a ranar 30 ga Yuli, 1898, ya nuna zurfin fahimta game da makomar Jamus, har ma ya yi gargaɗi game da haɗarin yaƙin duniya mai zuwa. Gadon Otto von Bismarck yana da girma sosai. Ya kasance 'Uban Haɗewar Jamus' wanda ya haɗa kan Jamus da ta rabu ya gina daula mai ƙarfi, kuma fitaccen jami'in diflomasiyya ne wanda ya sake tsara tsarin Turai ta hanyar Realpolitik mai sanyi da dabaru na diflomasiyya masu zurfi. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar gabatar da tsarin inshorar zamantakewa na farko a duniya, ya kafa harsashin jihar jin daɗin jama'a ta zamani, yana gabatar da sabon tsari inda ƙasa ke shiga cikin rayuwar jama'a. Shahararriyar maganarsa "Siyasa fasahar yiwuwa ce" har yau tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga yawancin 'yan siyasa. Ana tunawa da rayuwarsa a matsayin wani babban labari wanda ya buɗe makomar ƙasa ta hanyar iko da basira, kuma yana ci gaba da yin tasiri kan dabarun diflomasiyya na ƙasashe na zamani, manufofin zamantakewa, da kuma gudanar da ƙasa gaba ɗaya. Gadonsa na diflomasiyya ya bar darussa masu muhimmanci ga sauran 'yan siyasa waɗanda suka yi mafarkin haɗewar Turai a nan gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Otto von Bismarck ya kasance ɗan siyasa na Jamus a ƙarni na 19 wanda ya haɗa kan Jamus kuma ya gina daula ta hanyar Manufar Ƙarfe da Jini.
key_achievements: Haɗewar Jamus ta hanyar Manufar Ƙarfe da Jini
Ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Daular Jamus
Gabatar da tsarin inshorar zamantakewa na farko a duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa harsashin dabarun diflomasiyya na zamani da tsarin jin daɗin jama'a, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai kan gudanar da ƙasa.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin ƙasar arewa mai tsananin sanyi da faɗi, zurfin fadar Moscow, idanun yaron nan Peter the Great sun haskaka kamar ƙanƙara mai sanyi. A tsakanin gwagwarmayar iko na boyars da inuwar ɗan'uwansa Ivan, dole ne ya ci gaba da tabbatar da wanzuwarsa. A tsakanin sarƙoƙin tsoffin al'adu da hayaniyar fadar da ke taɓarɓarewa, zuciyar matashin Tsar ta yi mafarkin tekun yamma mai shuɗi da biranen tashar jiragen ruwa masu cunkoso. Iskar da ke ratsa ta cikin bishiyoyi marasa ganye ta raɗa masa raunin Rasha a kunnensa, kuma nauyin sarautar da ke wucewa ya danne kafadunsa kamar yana riƙe da babban guduma. Cikin shiru, ya fara sassaƙa gaba, kuma wannan sassaƙa ba ƙiyayya ce makanta ba, sai dai fatan gaggawa.

Matashin Tsar, yana gumi a cikin jiragen ruwa na Holland, yana yanke ta cikin feshin ruwa mai sanyi, yatsunsa suna jin laushin itace marar sani, yana neman makomar Rasha. Maimakon nauyin ninkayen tsoffin rigunan siliki, yana sha'awar jin daɗin rigunan soja na Turai masu tsauri, yana neman tsarkake ruhin Rasha. Aske gemu, watsar da tsoffin kalandari, da gabatar da sabbin haruffa ba kawai canjin sutura bane. Wasa ne da ya sadaukar da komai, don cire harsashin rashin ƙarfi da daji da suka samo asali daga zurfin ƙasar da ta daɗe shekaru ɗari. Ko da a cikin tsananin sanyi na hunturu, a gaban wutar da ke ci, yana gina tsarin sabuwar Rasha a kan tarkacen tsohon tsari.

Sha'awar da ba ta gushewa ga Tekun Baltic ta ja shi cikin guguwar yaƙi mai jini. A gaban garkuwar ƙarfe ta Sweden, sojojin Rasha sun faɗi kuma sun faɗi, amma idanun Tsar ba su girgiza ba. Ya ci gaba da tafiya ta cikin fadama mai daskarewa da dazuzzuka masu dusar ƙanƙara, kuma a gefensa akwai sabuwar runduna, ba a ɗaure ta da tsoffin al'adu ba. Yana fuskantar raƙuman ruwa masu tsauri na Gulf of Finland, ya fara gina sabuwar babban birni a tsakiyar filin yaƙi mai ƙura. Manyan gine-ginen St. Petersburg, birnin da ake kira 'taga zuwa Turai,' sun kasance abubuwan tunawa da nasara da aka ƙirƙira ta hanyar nufin Tsar mai kaɗaici, kuma wannan nasara ta kasance mummunan hari ne ga tsohuwar duniya.

A cikin ƙasar arewa mai sanyi, wadda ƙafafun babban bear ba su taɓa kaiwa ba, ya kunna wutar wayewa. Gyaransa wani lokaci yana da tsauri kamar guguwa, wani lokaci kuma mai sanyi kamar ƙanƙara, amma Rasha ba ta kasance dabba da aka kama a cikin tsohon daji ba. Ya sa zuciyar daular da ke raguwa ta sake bugawa, kuma hannunsa ya faɗaɗa sararin Rasha daga yamma zuwa gabas. Yanzu, bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru, a kan hanyar da ya shimfiɗa, har yanzu muna jin numfashinsa. Burinsa ba labari ne na da ba, kuma gadonsa yana gudana kamar babban kogi, yana tsara halin yanzu na Rasha kuma yana ci gaba zuwa gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Peter the Great ya canza Rasha zuwa ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta zamani ta hanyar Westernization kuma ya buɗe hanyar zuwa Tekun Baltic.
key_achievements: Ya koyi fasaha a jiragen ruwa na Holland kuma ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare irin na Yamma.
Ya sami nasarar shiga Tekun Baltic ta hanyar cin nasara a yaƙin da Sweden.
Ya gina St. Petersburg, 'taga zuwa Turai'.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya jagoranci Rasha ta zama ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta zamani kuma ya gabatar da wayewar Yamma, yana da tasiri sosai ga asalin Rasha da ci gabanta har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Catherine the Great (1729-1796), wadda ta yi sarauta a matsayin Sarauniyar Daular Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, ta kasance sarki ta takwas daga zuriyar Romanov, kuma wata mai mulkin kama-karya mai haske, wadda ta ɗaga daular zuwa matsayin babbar ƙasa mai girma a nahiyar Turai, kamar tauraro mai haske a sararin samaniya. An haife ta a matsayin Gimbiya Sophie Auguste Frederike von Anhalt-Zerbst, wata yar gidan sarauta Bajamushiya daga Stettin, Prussia, wadda tun daga haihuwarta aka yi mata alamar girma. A shekarar 1745, tana da shekaru goma sha shida kacal, ta ratsa ƙasashe, ta bar mahaifarta, don shiga cikin wani aure na siyasa da Peter Ulrich, magajin gadon sarautar Rasha, wanda daga baya ya zama Peter III, kamar yadda kaddara ta tsara mata. A matsayinta na baƙuwa a ƙasa mai nisa, ta rungumi sabon addini, Cocin Orthodox na Rasha, ta karɓi sunan 'Ekaterina Alekseyevna' mai daraja, kuma ta nutsu cikin koyon harshen Rasha da al'adunta, kamar yadda ruhi mai ƙarfi ke neman tushe. Amma duk da haka, rayuwar aurenta ta kasance cike da baƙin ciki, domin mijinta, Peter III, ya kasance mai rauni da canza hali, bai sami goyon baya ba daga kowa, kamar ganye da iska ke kadawa. A cikin wannan yanayi mai cike da rudani, Catherine ta fara gina matsayinta a hankali a tsakanin manyan Rasha da sojojin gadi, tana shimfiɗa tushen siyasa a ɓoye don makomar da ke tafe, kamar yadda tushen itace ke zurfafa a ƙasa. Rayuwarta ta farko ta kasance wani lokaci na haƙuri mai girma, koyo mai zurfi, da kuma gina buri mai ɓoye a cikin yanayi mai ban mamaki, kamar yadda tsaba ke girma a cikin duhu kafin su fito fili.

Bayan Peter III ya hau gadon sarauta a shekarar 1762, mulkinsa na rashin iya aiki da kama-karya ya haifar da wani guguwar rashin gamsuwa a cikin dukkanin al'ummar Rasha, kamar yadda iska mai ƙarfi ke kaɗa ganye. Duk da nasarar da Rasha ta samu a Yaƙin Shekaru Bakwai, ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya mai wulakanci da Prussia, kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin kwace dukiyar coci mai tsarki, don haka ya rasa goyon bayan manyan mutane, Cocin Orthodox mai daraja, da kuma sojoji masu ƙarfi, kamar yadda sarki ke rasa kambi. Wannan yanayi mai cike da rudani ya buɗe wa Catherine wata kofa ta zinariya, wata dama ta musamman don karɓar ragamar mulki, kamar yadda kaddara ke kira. A watan Yulin 1762, Catherine, da goyon bayan sojojin gadi masu ƙarfi, ta yi juyin mulki mai ban mamaki, ta hambarar da mijinta Peter III daga gadon sarauta, kuma ta hau kanta da kanta a matsayin Sarauniyar Daular Rasha, wato Tsarina, kamar yadda zakiya ke karɓar mulki. Wannan lamari ya kasance mafi girman canji a rayuwarta, wanda ya nuna basirarta ta siyasa da jajircewarta, kamar yadda hasken rana ke bayyana duhu. Juyin mulkin ya gudana cikin sauri da nasara mai ban mamaki, kuma Daular Rasha ta faɗa ƙarƙashin mulkin sabuwar Sarauniya, kamar yadda sabon alfijiri ke fitowa. Hawanta gadon sarauta ba kawai canjin mulki ba ne, amma farkon wani babban canji ne wanda zai tantance makomar Rasha, kamar yadda kaddara ke buɗe sabon shafi.

Mulkin Catherine the Great (1762-1796) ya kasance wani zamanin zinariya mai haske ga Daular Rasha, wanda aka rubuta da haruffan zinariya a cikin littafin tarihi. Ta yi hulɗa da masana falsafar Faransa na Haskakawa, ta kira kanta 'mai mulkin kama-karya mai haske', kuma ta nemi hangen nesa don gyara ta hanyar musayar wasiƙu da manyan masana na zamaninta, kamar Voltaire da Diderot, kamar yadda sarki ke neman hikima. Ta inganta zamantakewa a cikin al'umma ta hanyar fitar da 'Nakaz' mai girma, wani jagora don tsara dokoki don gyaran shari'a, kuma ta kafa Cibiyar Smolny, wata cibiyar ilimi mai haske ga mata, ta hanyar gyaran ilimi, kamar yadda haske ke haskaka duhu. Bugu da ƙari, ta goyi bayan fasaha da al'adu da hannu biyu, ta haɓaka Gidan Tarihi na Hermitage a St. Petersburg zuwa matsayin duniya, wanda ya zama abin alfahari. Amma duk da haka, mulkinta bai rasa gwaji ba, kamar yadda kowane sarki ke fuskantar kalubale. Daga 1773 zuwa 1775, babban tawayen manoma da aka sani da 'Tawayen Pugachev', wanda Yemelyan Pugachev ya jagoranta, ya kasance babban kalubale ga ikonta, kamar guguwa mai ƙarfi, amma ta shawo kansa da ƙarfi da hikima, ta dawo da zaman lafiya. Bayan Juyin Juya Halin Faransa, ta ɗauki matsayi mai ra'ayin mazan jiya game da manufofin gyara, amma burinta na farko na gyara ya yi tasiri mai zurfi ga al'ummar Rasha, kamar yadda ruwa ke shiga cikin ƙasa.

Ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorin Catherine the Great, wanda ya haskaka kamar tauraro, shine faɗaɗa yankin Daular Rasha sosai, yana mai da ita babbar ƙasa mai girma a nahiyar Turai, kamar yadda sarki ke faɗaɗa mulkinsa. Ta hanyar yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi da Daular Ottoman, ta haɗa Crimea mai daraja kuma ta sami bakin tekun Black Sea, kuma ta shiga cikin raba Poland don faɗaɗa iyakokin yamma, kamar yadda zakiya ke faɗaɗa yankinta. Waɗannan faɗaɗa yankuna sun ƙara fa'idodin tattalin arziki da dabaru na Rasha sosai, kamar yadda ruwa ke ƙara ƙarfin kogi. A ƙarƙashin mulkinta mai girma, Rasha ta zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan ƙasashe a Turai ta fuskar yawan jama'a da girman tattalin arziki, kuma ta ji daɗin wadata ta al'adu da ilimi wadda ba a taɓa gani ba, kamar yadda lambu ke furewa. Catherine the Great ana ɗaukarta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin sarakuna mafi ƙarfi a tarihin Rasha, wadda ta bar sawun tarihi, kuma gyare-gyarenta da faɗaɗa yankunanta sun yi tasiri mai zurfi ga asalin Rasha da matsayinta na siyasa a yau, kamar yadda dutse ke tsayawa. Mulkinta mai girma ana kwatanta shi da manufofin gyara na sauran sarakuna masu wayewa na zamaninta a Turai, kamar Frederick the Great na Prussia ko Maria Theresa na Austria, kuma yana ƙawata wani muhimmin babi a tarihin Turai na zamani, kamar yadda lu'u-lu'u ke ƙawata kambi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Catherine the Great ta kasance Sarauniyar Daular Rasha a ƙarni na 18, wadda ta faɗaɗa yankin daular kuma ta haɓaka al'adunta ta hanyar mulkin kama-karya mai wayewa.
key_achievements: Hawan gadon sarauta ta hanyar juyin mulki a 1762
Inganta gyare-gyare bisa ga ra'ayoyin Haskakawa
Faɗaɗa yankin Crimea da Poland
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinta ya mai da Rasha babbar ƙasa a Turai kuma ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na al'adu, yana da tasiri mai girma har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Simón Bolívar (1783-1830) ya kasance soja kuma ɗan siyasa ɗan ƙasar Venezuela wanda ya jagoranci 'yancin kai na Kudancin Amurka daga mulkin mallaka na Spain a farkon ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, a lokacin da tunanin wayewa na Turai ke yaɗuwa zuwa Sabuwar Duniya, yana haɓaka sha'awar 'yanci da cin gashin kai, a cikin wani dangi mai daraja na Creole a Caracas, Venezuela. Ko da yake ya rasa iyayensa tun yana ƙarami, ya gaji dukiya mai yawa wanda ya ba shi damar samun ilimi mai zurfi a Turai. Musamman ma, malaminsa, Simón Rodríguez, ya dasa masa ra'ayoyin 'yanci da jamhuriya ta hanyar ayyukan masu tunani na wayewa kamar Rousseau da Voltaire. A shekara ta 1805, ya rantse a kan tudun Aventine na Roma cewa ba zai huta ba har sai ya 'yantar da ƙasarsa daga zaluncin Spain, yana buɗe shafin farko na babban yaƙin 'yanci wanda zai sadaukar da rayuwarsa gare shi. Wannan rantsuwa ta zama alamar ƙarfin hali wanda zai canza makomar dukan nahiyar Kudancin Amurka.

Da yake ɗauke da gogewar Turai da tunanin wayewa, Simón Bolívar ya dawo Kudancin Amurka a kusan shekara ta 1810 kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai. Shi ne mutumin da ya 'yantar da ƙasashe shida na yanzu – Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador, Panama, Peru, da Bolivia – daga mulkin mallaka na Spain, inda ya samu laƙabin 'El Libertador' (Mai 'Yanci). Wannan yana nuna cewa ba kawai mai nasara ne a fagen yaƙi ba, amma alama ce ta wanda ya kawo 'yanci ga al'ummar da aka zalunta. Bolívar yana da babban hangen nesa na haɗa Kudancin Amurka da ta rabu zuwa babban ƙasa mai tarayya guda ɗaya, wanda ya bayyana a matsayin Gran Colombia. Gran Colombia ta yi niyyar zama babbar jamhuriya mai haɗa Colombia, Ecuador, Panama, da Venezuela na yanzu. Ya yi nasarar gudanar da ayyukan soja masu wuya kamar ketare tsaunin Andes, kuma ya jagoranci yaƙe-yaƙe masu yawa zuwa nasara, kamar Yaƙin Boyacá (1819), Yaƙin Carabobo (1821), Yaƙin Pichincha (1822), da Yaƙin Ayacucho (1824), yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen korar sojojin mulkin mallaka na Spain.

Amma duk da haka, manufofin Simón Bolívar sun fuskanci manyan ƙalubale bayan samun 'yancin kai, inda suka ci karo da gaskiyar lamarin. Ya nemi haɗa ƙasashen da aka 'yantar zuwa gwamnati mai ƙarfi ta tsakiya, amma Gran Colombia ta fara rabuwa sannu a hankali saboda son kai na yanki, gwagwarmayar iko, da kuma adawa tsakanin shugabannin yaƙi. Salon mulkinsa wani lokaci ana sukar sa a matsayin mai kama-karya, wanda ya zurfafa rata tsakanin hangen nesansa na haɗin kan Kudancin Amurka da gaskiyar lamarin. Daga ƙarshe, tun daga kusan shekara ta 1826, Gran Colombia ta fara rabuwa zuwa Venezuela, Ecuador, da Nueva Granada (Colombia da Panama na yanzu), kuma Simón Bolívar ya ga tarayyar da ya gina tana rugujewa. A shekara ta 1830, ya yi murabus daga dukkan muƙaman gwamnati, yana barin kuka mai cike da yanke kauna: "Na noma teku." Wannan magana tana nuna yadda ya ji cewa duk ƙoƙarinsa na rayuwa ya zama banza. Ya mutu saboda rashin lafiya a Santa Marta, Colombia, a ranar 17 ga Disamba na wannan shekara, yana kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da tashin hankali.

Bayan mutuwar Simón Bolívar, burinsa na haɗin kan Kudancin Amurka bai cika ba, amma gadonsa ya ci gaba da kasancewa mai zurfi a cikin asali da ruhin ƙasashen Latin Amurka har zuwa yau. Ana tuna shi har abada a matsayin alamar 'yanci da 'yancin kai, wani gunki na juriya ga mulkin mallaka na Spain. Tunanin Bolívar da nasarorinsa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan siyasa, al'umma, da al'adun Latin Amurka gabaɗaya, kuma an rubuta sunansa har abada a cikin sunan ƙasar Bolivia. Bugu da ƙari, hangen nesansa na haɗin kai yana zama tushen ruhaniya ga ƙungiyoyin haɗin kan Latin Amurka na yau. Rayuwarsa ta kasance wani babban labari na wani babban mutum wanda, da imani marar girgiza a gaban shingayen gaskiya, ya nemi canza makomar nahiyar. Rayuwarsa da manufofinsa ana kwatanta su da na mutane kamar George Washington, wanda ya jagoranci 'yancin kai a Arewacin Amurka a lokaci guda, yana ƙara nuna muhimmancinsu a cikin babban tafarkin 'yancin kai da gina ƙasa a Sabuwar Duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Simón Bolívar ya kasance soja kuma ɗan siyasa na Kudancin Amurka a farkon ƙarni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci 'yancin kai na ƙasashe shida daga Spain.
key_achievements: Jagorancin 'yancin kai na ƙasashe shida ciki har da Venezuela
Ƙoƙarin gina tarayyar Gran Colombia
An girmama shi a matsayin 'Mai 'Yanci (El Libertador)'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhinsa na 'yancin kai da manufarsa ta haɗin kai sun kasance a cikin asalin ƙasashen Latin Amurka har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
John Davison Rockefeller Sr. (1839-1937) ya kasance wani jarumin ɗan kasuwa wanda ya jagoranci zamanin zinare na masana'antu a Amurka daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, kuma shi ne ya kafa tushen ayyukan agaji na zamani. An haife shi a Richford, New York, a shekara ta 1839, ya girma tsakanin mahaifinsa mai halin zamba da kuma mahaifiyarsa mai bin addinin Baptist da gaske. Iyalinsa sun yi ta ƙaura sau da yawa, daga ƙarshe suka zauna a Cleveland, Ohio. Tun yana yaro, ya haɓaka halaye na ƙwazo, tanadi, da kuma basirar kasuwanci, kuma ya fara aikin rayuwarsa yana ɗan shekara 16 a matsayin mataimakin akawu a wani kamfani a Cleveland. A wannan lokacin, ya fahimci ƙa'idodin lissafi da mahimmancin ingantaccen gudanarwa, yana kafa tushen gina daular kasuwanci mai girma a nan gaba. Tun yana ɗan shekara 20, ya fara shiga cikin haɗin gwiwar kasuwanci daban-daban, musamman ma ya mai da hankali kan kasuwancin tace mai, wanda ya zama mafi mahimmancin canji a rayuwarsa. A wancan lokacin, Amurka tana cikin tsaka mai wuya na juyin juya halin masana'antu, kuma mai yana da damar da ba ta da iyaka a matsayin sabon tushen makamashi. Rockefeller ya ɗauki burin kawo tsari da inganci a cikin wannan kasuwa mai rudani. 

Babban ci gaban Rockefeller ya fara ne a shekara ta 1870 lokacin da ya kafa Kamfanin Standard Oil. Manufar Standard Oil ita ce haɗa kai da inganta masana'antar mai da ke da rudani da gasa mai tsanani a wancan lokacin. Ya mamaye kasuwar mai ta hanyar sayen kamfanoni da haɗe-haɗe masu ƙarfi, tattaunawar kwangilar sufuri da kamfanonin jirgin ƙasa, da kuma haɗin gwiwar tsaye na matakan tace mai da rarrabawa. Standard Oil ba kawai kamfani ba ne, amma ya kasance majagaba wanda ya kafa tsarin 'Trust' na zamani. Tsarin 'Trust' hanya ce ta haɗa hannun jari na kamfanoni da yawa a cikin nau'in amana don gudanar da su kamar kamfani ɗaya mai girma, kuma Rockefeller ya yi amfani da wannan don ƙara rinjaye a kasuwa. Hanyar gudanarwarsa ta kawo tasiri mai kyau, kamar rage farashin kananzir sosai don samar da haske mai araha ga jama'a, amma kuma an soke shi saboda kawar da abokan hamayya ba tare da tausayi ba da kuma kafa mallaka guda ɗaya. Ya gudanar da Standard Oil kai tsaye har zuwa 1897, kuma bayan haka, ya ci gaba da yin tasiri mai girma a matsayin babban mai hannun jari. 

Amma fa, faɗaɗa kasuwancin Rockefeller ba tare da tausayi ba ya fuskanci babban ƙalubale na sukar jama'a da tsarin gwamnati. Daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, rashin amincewa da hanyar gudanarwarsa ta mallaka guda ɗaya ya karu a cikin al'ummar Amurka, wanda ya haifar da ƙungiyar yaƙi da mallaka guda ɗaya. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1911, Kotun Koli ta Amurka ta yanke hukuncin cewa Standard Oil ta keta Dokar Sherman Antitrust kuma ta ba da umarnin raba kamfanin zuwa kamfanoni 34 masu zaman kansu. Wannan ya kasance babban rauni ga daular kasuwancin Rockefeller, amma ya yi amfani da wannan ƙalubale a matsayin mafari na sabuwar rayuwa. Bayan ya yi ritaya, ya sadaukar da dukiyarsa mai yawa ga ayyukan agaji, yana kafa tushen ayyukan agaji na zamani. Ya kafa Gidauniyar Rockefeller kuma ya ba da kuɗaɗe masu yawa ga binciken likitanci, ilimi, da kiwon lafiyar jama'a. Musamman ma, ya tallafa wa kafa Jami'ar Chicago, kuma ya ba da kuɗi don yaƙi da zazzabin cizon sauro da cutar tsutsar ciki, yana ba da gudummawa sosai ga inganta kiwon lafiya a duniya. Ayyukan agajinsa ba kawai ba da gudummawa ba ne, amma ƙoƙari ne na inganta rayuwar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya ta hanyar tsari mai tsari da kimiyya. 

Gadon da John D. Rockefeller ya bari har yanzu yana rayuwa a yau a matsayin ƙa'idodin gudanar da kasuwanci na zamani da kuma misali na manyan ayyukan agaji. Rayuwarsa ta nuna yadda ingantaccen rarraba albarkatu da tsarin gudanarwa mai tsari zai iya haifar da dukiya mai girma, kuma a lokaci guda, ta tabbatar da yadda za a iya amfani da wannan dukiya don jin daɗin ɗan adam. Ya rayu tsawon rayuwarsa cikin kamun kai da imani, kuma ayyukan agajinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban ilimi, kimiyya, da magani a duniya. Gidauniyar Rockefeller har yanzu tana ci gaba da ruhinsa ta hanyar tallafawa bincike da ayyuka don magance ƙalubalen ɗan adam. Ana tuna sunansa a matsayin alama ce ta jari-hujja kuma a lokaci guda a matsayin majagaba na ayyukan agaji masu tsari, kuma rayuwarsa, tare da sauran manyan mutane na zamaninsa kamar Andrew Carnegie, sun gabatar da misali na jari-hujja na zamani da ayyukan agaji.

fact_box.one_line_summary: John D. Rockefeller ya kasance ɗan kasuwa kuma mai agaji na Amurka a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya kafa Standard Oil, ya mamaye masana'antar mai, kuma ya kafa tushen ayyukan agaji na zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa Kamfanin Standard Oil (1870)
Mallaka da inganta masana'antar mai ta Amurka
Kafa Gidauniyar Rockefeller da manyan ayyukan agaji
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafar gudanarwarsa da ayyukan agajinsa masu tsari sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kamfanoni na zamani da jin daɗin jama'a.

parsed.narrative:
Theodore Roosevelt (1858-1919) ya kasance wani babban ɗan siyasa kuma shugaban ƙasa na 26 na Amurka, wanda ya jagoranci ƙasar a lokacin tashin hankali daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20. An haife shi a shekara ta 1858 a cikin dangi mai wadata a New York, amma tun yana yaro ya sha wahala daga asma da raunin jiki. Duk da haka, ya yi gwagwarmaya ba tare da gajiyawa ba don shawo kan waɗannan iyakokin jiki, yana gina ruhu mai ƙarfi da jiki mai juriya ta hanyar karatu, binciken yanayi, da kuma motsa jiki mai tsanani. A wancan lokacin, Amurka tana jin daɗin ci gaban tattalin arziki mai sauri bayan Yaƙin Basasa, tare da haɓakar masana'antu da faɗaɗa zuwa Yamma, amma a lokaci guda kuma, matsalolin zamantakewa sun fara bayyana, kamar zaluncin kamfanoni masu zaman kansu (trusts) da kuma ƙaruwar gibin arziki. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Roosevelt ya kammala karatunsa daga Jami'ar Harvard kuma ya shiga Makarantar Shari'a ta Columbia, amma ya nuna sha'awa ga siyasa da hidimar jama'a fiye da karatun shari'a, kuma ya fara tafiya a kan hanyar zama ɗan siyasa mai kawo sauyi tun yana saurayi. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta cika da ƙarfin hali na shawo kan matsalolin kansa don shiga fagen hidimar jama'a.

Tafiyar siyasar Roosevelt ta ci gaba ba tare da tangarɗa ba, tun daga zama ɗan majalisar dokokin jihar New York. Ya yi aiki a matsayin Kwamishinan 'Yan Sanda na Birnin New York da Mataimakin Sakataren Sojan Ruwa, inda ya ba da gudummawa wajen yaƙar cin hanci da rashawa da kuma inganta ingancin gudanarwa. Musamman ma, a lokacin da yake Mataimakin Sakataren Sojan Ruwa, ya himmatu wajen ƙarfafa sojan ruwa don shirye-shiryen Yaƙin Spain da Amurka. Lokacin da Yaƙin Spain da Amurka ya barke a shekara ta 1898, ya yi murabus daga muƙaminsa na Mataimakin Sakataren Sojan Ruwa kuma ya kafa Rundunar Sojojin Sa-kai ta Amurka ta Farko, wacce aka fi sani da "Rough Riders," inda ya shiga yaƙin Cuba. A cikin wannan yaƙin, ya nuna jagoranci mai jaruntaka, inda ya jagoranci yaƙin Dutsen San Juan zuwa nasara, kuma ya zama gwarzo na ƙasa, yana samun shahara a tsakanin jama'a. Wannan gogewa ta zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya ƙarfafa matsayinsa na siyasa. Bisa ga shahararsa a matsayin gwarzon yaƙi, an zaɓe shi Gwamnan New York, kuma a shekara ta 1900, an zaɓe shi Mataimakin Shugaban Ƙasa a matsayin abokin takarar Shugaba William McKinley. Amma a watan Satumba na 1901, bayan an kashe Shugaba McKinley, Roosevelt ya fuskanci wani juyi na kaddara wanda ba a zata ba, inda ya zama shugaban ƙasa mafi ƙarancin shekaru a tarihin Amurka yana da shekaru 42.

Bayan ya zama shugaban ƙasa, Theodore Roosevelt ya fara aiwatar da sauye-sauye a duk faɗin al'umma, yana gabatar da manufar cikin gida da ake kira 'Square Deal'. 'Square Deal' manufa ce da ke ɗauke da falsafarsa ta samar da dama daidai ga babban jari, ma'aikata, da kuma jama'a gaba ɗaya, kuma ya mai da hankali musamman kan 'Trust Busting', wato daidaita zaluncin kamfanoni masu zaman kansu. Ya ƙarfafa ikon gwamnati na daidaitawa ta hanyar rusa manyan kamfanoni masu zaman kansu kamar Northern Securities Company, wanda ya kasance muhimmin gwagwarmaya a kan ayyukan kamfanoni marasa adalci da suka yadu a wancan lokacin. Bugu da ƙari, ya nuna sha'awa mai girma wajen kare dukiyar yanayi ta Amurka, yana faɗaɗa wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa, gandun daji na ƙasa, da wuraren kiyaye namun daji sosai, don haka ya kafa harsashin motsin kiyaye muhalli na zamani. A cikin manufofin harkokin waje, ya yi amfani da diflomasiyyar 'Big Stick', yana amfani da tasirin diflomasiyya bisa ga ƙarfin soji. Musamman ma, ya jagoranci gina Canal na Panama, yana tabbatar da wani muhimmin wuri don jigilar ruwa da ke haɗa Tekun Atlantika da Tekun Pasifik, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga zaman lafiya na duniya ta hanyar yin nasarar shiga tsakani a Yaƙin Rasha da Japan a shekara ta 1905, inda ya lashe Kyautar Zaman Lafiya ta Nobel. Waɗannan manufofin sun nuna jagorancinsa mai ƙarfi da kuma jajircewarsa ga sauyi.

Lokacin mulkin Shugaba Roosevelt ana kallonsa a matsayin lokacin da Amurka ta zama babbar ƙasa a duniya kuma ta kafa harsashin sauye-sauyen ci gaba a cikin gida. Ko bayan ya bar mulki, ya ci gaba da kasancewa mai tasiri a siyasa, yana shiga cikin ayyukan jama'a ba tare da tsayawa ba, har ma ya sake tsayawa takarar shugaban ƙasa a shekara ta 1912 a matsayin ɗan takarar Jam'iyyar Progressive (wanda aka fi sani da 'Bull Moose Party'). Gadonsa yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi a kan al'ummar Amurka har zuwa yau. Musamman ma, manufofin kiyaye muhalli sun zama muhimmin farkon motsin muhalli na zamani, kuma ƙoƙarinsa na daidaita kamfanoni masu zaman kansu da kare masu amfani ya ba da gudummawa wajen tabbatar da halaccin shigar gwamnati cikin kasuwa da manufofin jin daɗin jama'a. Bugu da ƙari, ana yaba masa da cewa ya gabatar da tsarin shugabancin Amurka na zamani, yana mai jaddada rawar da gwamnati mai ƙarfi ke takawa da kuma jagorancin shugaban ƙasa. Ruhunsa na sauyi da jagorancinsa mai ci gaba ana iya ganin tasirinsa a kan wasu shugabannin ƙasa masu ci gaba na zamaninsa kamar Woodrow Wilson da kuma Franklin Roosevelt daga baya. Theodore Roosevelt ba kawai shugaba ne da ya jagoranci wani zamani ba, amma ana tunawa da shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya sake tsara alkiblar al'ummar Amurka kuma ya dasa muhimman dabi'u don nan gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Theodore Roosevelt ya kasance shugaban ƙasa na 26 na Amurka a farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci sauye-sauyen ci gaba, kiyaye muhalli, da diflomasiyyar ƙasa mai ƙarfi.
key_achievements: Sauye-sauyen zamantakewa ta hanyar manufar 'Square Deal'
Jagorancin gina Canal na Panama da ƙarfafa diflomasiyya
Faɗaɗa wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa ta hanyar manufofin kiyaye muhalli
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙoƙarinsa na sauye-sauyen ci gaba da kiyaye muhalli sun yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan al'ummar Amurka ta zamani da rawar da gwamnati ke takawa.

parsed.narrative:
Annelies Marie "Anne" Frank (an haife ta a 1929) wata yarinya ce Bayahudiya 'yar asalin Jamus, 'yar ƙasar Holland, kuma marubuciyar littafin rubutu wacce ta yi rayuwa mai cike da gwagwarmaya a ƙarƙashin inuwar mulkin Nazi Jamus. An haifi Anne a ranar 12 ga Yuni, 1929, a Frankfurt am Main, Jamus, kuma ta tsinci kanta a cikin wani zamani mai cike da rudani da tashin hankali, inda zaluncin Yahudawa ya kai kololuwa. A shekarar 1933, lokacin da Adolf Hitler ya hau mulki kuma jam'iyyar Nazi ta mamaye Jamus, nuna bambanci da tashin hankali ga Yahudawa ya zama wani al'amari na yau da kullum, kamar wata annoba mai cinye rayuka. Saboda haka, iyalin Anne sun yi hijira zuwa Amsterdam, Netherlands, a shekarar 1933 don guje wa tsanantawa, inda suka fara sabuwar rayuwa, suna fatan samun mafaka daga guguwar bala'i. Amma zaman lafiya bai daɗe ba, kamar yadda gajimare baƙi suka sake rufe sararin sama. A watan Mayu na 1940, lokacin da Nazi Jamus ta mamaye Netherlands, Yahudawan Amsterdam ma sun fuskanci tsanantawa mai tsanani, wanda ya yi kama da wutar jahannama da ta cinye ƙasarsu. An kwace musu 'yancin ɗan ƙasa, an ƙwace musu dukiya, kuma an tilasta musu aiki, an tsare su a cikin ghettos, kuma a ƙarshe an kai su sansanonin hallaka, wanda ya zama makoma mai ban tausayi, wacce ta zama alamar ƙarshen zamaninsu. Iyalin Anne ba su da wani zaɓi illa su yi wani zaɓi na rayuwa mai cike da haɗari, kamar yadda jirgin ruwa ke neman mafaka a cikin guguwa.

A ranar 6 ga Yuli, 1942, iyalin Anne sun shiga cikin wani ɓoyayyen wuri mai zurfi, kamar yadda kifi ke neman mafaka a cikin ruwa mai zurfi, wato 'Achterhuis' (Gidan Baya), wanda aka shirya a bayan ginin kamfanin mahaifinta, Otto Frank, a Prinsengracht 263, Amsterdam, don guje wa tsanantawar Nazi mai zafi. Wannan wuri ne da dole ne su rayu a ciki a asirce, gaba ɗaya a ware daga duniya mai cike da haɗari, kamar yadda taurari ke ɓoye a bayan gajimare, inda Anne da iyalinta, da kuma wasu Yahudawa huɗu suka buya tare. Littafin rubutu da aka ba Anne a ranar haihuwarta ta 13, kafin su shiga ɓoyayyen wuri, ya zama abokinta na kusa, wanda ya riƙe sirrinta, kuma kayan aiki mai daraja, kamar wata madubi mai nuna duniyar ciki. Ta ba wa littafin rubutun nan suna 'Kitty', kuma a ciki ta rubuta a fili kuma a sarari, kamar yadda ruwa ke gudana a cikin kogi, game da sha'awarta ga duniya ta waje mai faɗi, matsalolin yarinya mai tasowa, rikice-rikice da iyalinta da sauran waɗanda suke zaune tare, da kuma burinta mai girma na zama marubuciya ko 'yar jarida bayan yaƙin ya ƙare, duk da cunkoson wuri mai kama da kurkuku. Littafin rubutunta ya wuce rubutu na sirri kawai, ya zama shaida mai ɗauke da ƙarfin hali da bege, kamar wata fitila mai haskaka duhu, na yarinya da ke ƙoƙarin kiyaye ɗan adam a cikin matsanancin hali, inda duhu ya mamaye komai.

Rayuwar ɓoye na fiye da shekaru biyu a cikin Achterhuis ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya da jarabawa marar iyaka, kamar yadda ruwa ke gwagwarmaya da dutse, ga Anne. Warewa daga duniya ta waje, tsoron da ke tattare da yiwuwar gano su, da kuma matsin lamba na tunani na rayuwa tare da mutane da yawa a cikin ƙaramin wuri, duk sun kasance azaba mai wuya, wacce ta yi kama da nauyin dutse a kan ƙaramin kafada, ga yarinya ƙarama. Amma Anne, duk da waɗannan matsaloli, ta horar da kanta kuma ta girma, kamar yadda fure ke buɗe a cikin hamada, ta hanyar rubutu. A cikin littafin rubutunta, ta bincika zurfin motsin zuciyarta, ta lura da mutanen da ke kewaye da ita, kuma ta haɓaka fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam, kamar wata mai hikima da ke gano sirrin rayuwa. Musamman ma, ta saita burin buga littafin rubutunta bayan yaƙin ya ƙare, kuma ta fara gyara da inganta abubuwan da ke ciki, kamar wata mai zane da ke gyara zanenta, bayan ta sami kwarin gwiwa daga buƙatar gwamnatin Netherlands na tattara bayanan yaƙi da ta ji a rediyo. Wannan ya nuna cewa tana da burin zama marubuciya ta gaskiya, fiye da mai rubuta littafin rubutu kawai, kamar yadda ƙaramin kogi ke burin zama babban teku. Amma a ranar 4 ga Agusta, 1944, an gano ɓoyayyen wuri saboda wani cin amana mai duhu da ba a sani ba, kamar yadda duhu ke cinye haske, kuma Gestapo ta kama Anne da waɗanda suke zaune tare da ita, aka kai su sansanin Westerbork na ɗan lokaci, sannan zuwa sansanin taro na Auschwitz. Daga baya, an kai Anne da 'yar uwarta Margot zuwa sansanin taro na Bergen-Belsen, kuma a kusan ranar 1 ga Fabrairu, 1945, ta mutu tana da shekaru 15 saboda cutar typhus, ta kawo ƙarshen rayuwarta mai gajarta, kamar yadda fure ke faɗuwa kafin lokacinsa.

Bayan mutuwar Anne Frank mai ban tausayi, littafin rubutunta ya zama ɗaya daga cikin shaidu mafi ƙarfi, wanda ya yi kama da dutse mai tsayi a cikin teku na tarihi, a tarihin ɗan adam. Mahaifinta, Otto Frank, wanda shi kaɗai ya tsira daga Achterhuis, ya gano littafin rubutun Anne bayan yaƙin ya ƙare, kuma don cika burin 'yarsa mai daraja, wanda ya yi kama da hasken tauraro mai nisa, ya buga shi a shekarar 1947 a ƙarƙashin taken 'Het Achterhuis' (Gidan Baya). Wannan littafi nan da nan ya haifar da martani a duniya, an fassara shi zuwa harsuna sama da 70 a ƙarƙashin sunan 'Littafin Rubutun Anne Frank', kuma miliyoyin masu karatu sun karanta shi, kamar yadda ruwa ke gudana zuwa teku. Littafin rubutun Anne ya isar da zaluncin Holocaust da kuma ƙarfin ruhin ɗan adam da ya fito a cikinsa a sarari, kuma ya zama alama mai ƙarfi, kamar wata garkuwa mai kare gaskiya, na adawa da kyamar Yahudawa da duk wani nau'i na nuna bambanci. Saƙonta cewa "Duk da haka, na yi imani cewa yanayin ɗan adam yana da kyau" ya ba da ƙarfin hali don kada a rasa bege a cikin yanke kauna, kuma har zuwa yau yana aiki a matsayin fitila mai haskaka hanya, wacce ke tunatar da mahimmancin haƙƙin ɗan adam da zaman lafiya, a cikin duhun jahilci. Labarinta, tare da shaidu marasa adadi na sauran Yahudawa waɗanda suka rayu a lokaci guda, yana ci gaba da tunatar da ɗan adam, kamar yadda ƙararrawa ke tunatar da lokaci, kada su manta da bala'in da ya gabata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Anne Frank wata yarinya ce Bayahudiya 'yar ƙasar Holland a lokacin mulkin Nazi Jamus, wacce littafin rubutunta ya ba da labarin bala'in Holocaust kuma ya shafi duniya baki ɗaya.
key_achievements: Rubuta rayuwar ɓoye a cikin tsanantawar Nazi
Shaidar Holocaust ta hanyar 'Littafin Rubutun Anne Frank'
Isar da saƙon mutunci da bege na ɗan adam
fact_box.legacy_statement: Littafin rubutunta za a tuna da shi har abada a matsayin alamar haƙƙin ɗan adam da zaman lafiya a kan kyamar Yahudawa da nuna bambanci.

parsed.narrative:
Frederick Douglass (an haife shi a shekara ta 1818) ya kasance wani jarumi mai fafutukar kawar da bauta, mai gyara al'umma, mai jawabi mai zafi, kuma marubuci a ƙarni na 19 a Amurka. A farkon ƙarni na 19, lokacin da aka haife shi, Amurka ta kasance cikin wani zamanin duhu inda bauta ta zama ginshiƙin tattalin arzikin Kudancin ƙasar, kuma an hana baƙaƙen fata haƙƙoƙinsu na asali. An haife shi a matsayin bawa a wani gona a Talbot County, Maryland, an raba shi da mahaifiyarsa tun yana yaro kuma kakarsa ce ta rene shi. A matsayinsa na bawa mai jini biyu, wanda aka haifa daga farin uba da baƙar uwa, ya mallaki wata asali mai rikitarwa. Kusan yana ɗan shekara takwas, an tura shi Baltimore don yin aiki a gidan Hugh Auld, inda Mrs. Auld ta fara koya masa karatu. Amma saboda koyon karatu haramun ne ga bayi, mijin Mrs. Auld ya hana shi sosai. Douglass ya fahimci cewa ilimi shine mabudin 'yanci, don haka ya ci gaba da neman ilimi ta hanyar koyar da kansa, yana ɓoye yana koyon karatu tare da yaran farar fata. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fuskanta tun yana yaro sun sanya masa zurfin fahimtar ƙarfin ilimi da rashin adalcin bauta.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Frederick Douglass ya faru ne a ranar 3 ga Satumba, 1838, lokacin da yake ɗan shekara ashirin, ya tsere daga bauta don neman 'yanci a Arewa. Ya yi nasarar tserewa zuwa New York ta hanyar jirgin ƙasa da jirgin ruwa, yana sanye da kayan ma'aikacin jirgi. Daga baya ya zauna a New Bedford, Massachusetts, inda ya karɓi sabon suna: Frederick Douglass. A shekara ta 1841, a wani taron masu fafutukar kawar da bauta a Nantucket, ya sami damar yin jawabi ba zato ba tsammani. Ya burge masu sauraro da jawabi mai daɗi da motsa rai, wanda ya dogara ne akan abubuwan da ya fuskanta a matsayin bawa, kuma hakan ya jawo hankalin William Lloyd Garrison, wani shahararren mai fafutukar kawar da bauta. Wannan haɗuwa ta sa Douglass ya zama mai jawabi ga Ƙungiyar Kawar da Bauta ta Amurka, yana zagaya ƙasar baki ɗaya. A shekara ta 1845, ya buga littafin tarihin rayuwarsa mai suna “Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass, an American Slave.” Wannan littafi ya bayyana mummunan gaskiyar bauta a fili, kuma ya tabbatar da cewa bayi suna da basirar hankali daidai da farar fata, wanda ya girgiza al'ummar lokacin.

Bayan ya shahara saboda littafin tarihin rayuwarsa, Frederick Douglass ya fuskanci haɗarin sake kama shi saboda an bayyana matsayinsa na bawa. Don haka, daga 1845 zuwa 1847, ya zagaya Ireland da Ingila, yana neman goyon bayan duniya don kawar da bauta. A wannan lokacin, masu goyon bayansa na Birtaniya sun sayi 'yancinsa bisa doka, kuma a ƙarshe ya zama cikakken mutum mai 'yanci. Bayan ya dawo Amurka a 1847, ya kafa jaridarsa mai suna “The North Star” (Tauraron Arewa) don ƙara yaɗa muryar fafutukar kawar da bauta. Douglass bai yi kira ga 'yantar da bayi kawai ba, har ma ya yi gwagwarmaya don haɓaka dukkan nau'ikan haƙƙin ɗan adam, yana goyon bayan motsin mata na neman 'yancin zaɓe kuma ya halarci taron Seneca Falls na 1848. Bayan barkewar Yaƙin Basasa, ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga Shugaba Abraham Lincoln, yana mai matuƙar kira ga sojojin baƙaƙen fata su yi aikin soja da inganta yanayin su, kuma ya yi tasiri a kan sanarwar 'yantar da bayi. Ya rayu dukan rayuwarsa da imani cewa “Ba tare da gwagwarmaya ba, babu ci gaba,” yana yaƙi da nuna bambancin launin fata da son zuciya na al'umma.

Ko da bayan Yaƙin Basasa, Frederick Douglass bai daina gwagwarmaya don samun cikakken haƙƙin ɗan ƙasa ga baƙaƙen fata ba. Ya riƙe muƙamai daban-daban na gwamnati, kamar shugaban bankin ajiyar 'yantattun bayi, Marshal na Gundumar Columbia, da Ministan Amurka a Haiti, yana aiki don haɓaka haƙƙoƙi da dogaro da kai na al'ummar baƙaƙen fata. Rayuwarsa labari ne mai ban mamaki na nasara, inda ya tsere daga bauta ya zama ɗaya daga cikin muryoyin da suka fi tasiri a cikin al'ummar Amurka, kuma rikodin babban gwagwarmaya da rashin adalci na al'umma ta hanyar ƙarfin ilimi da jawabi. Douglass ya jaddada mahimmancin ilimi, yana barin koyarwar cewa “Ilimi yana sa mutum ya kasa zama bawa.” Gadonsa har yau yana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga motsin haƙƙin ɗan adam na Amurka da gwagwarmayar haƙƙin ɗan adam a duk faɗin duniya, yana kasancewa alamar bege ga 'yanci da daidaito ga duk waɗanda ake zalunta. Rayuwarsa tana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar mutane irin su Susan B. Anthony, mai fafutukar neman 'yancin zaɓe na mata a zamaninsa, da Martin Luther King Jr., majagaba na motsin haƙƙin ɗan adam na baƙaƙen fata, yana nuna tafiya mara yankewa zuwa ga ƙimar ɗan adam ta duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Frederick Douglass ya kasance mai fafutukar kawar da bauta a ƙarni na 19 a Amurka, wanda ya ba da gudummawa ga 'yantar da bayi ta hanyar tarihin rayuwarsa da jawabansa.
key_achievements: Ya tsere daga bauta kuma ya sami 'yanci
Ya bayyana ainihin halin bauta ta hanyar buga tarihin rayuwarsa
Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai jawabi a motsin kawar da bauta
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rayuwarsa da ra'ayoyinsa suna ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga gwagwarmayar haƙƙin ɗan adam da daidaito har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Harriet Tubman (an haife ta a kusan 1822) wata Ba'amurkiya ce mai fafutukar 'yantar da bayi kuma mai fafutukar kare hakkin bil'adama wacce ta yi yaki da bauta a Amurka a karni na 19. Ta fara rayuwarta a matsayin bawa a wani gona a Dorchester County, Maryland, da sunan Araminta Ross. Tun tana karama, ta sha wahalar aiki mai tsanani da zalunci, musamman ma lokacin da wani mai kula da ita ya jefa mata wani nauyi na karfe a kai tun tana matashiya, wanda ya haifar mata da matsalolin jijiyoyi kamar narcolepsy, ciwon kai, da hallucinations da suka addabe ta har tsawon rayuwarta. Duk da wannan wahala, ta gina zurfin imani na ruhaniya kuma ta yi niyyar 'yantar da kanta da 'yan uwanta daga sarƙoƙin zalunci wata rana. A lokacin, bauta ita ce ginshiƙin tattalin arziki da zamantakewa a Kudancin Amurka, kuma bayi suna rayuwa ba tare da 'yanci da mutunci ba, ana ɗaukar su ƙasa da mutane. Yarantakar Tubman ta kasance shaida ce ta wannan duhun zamani.

Wani muhimmin canji a rayuwar Tubman ya zo a shekara ta 1849. Ta yi ƙoƙarin tserewa tare da 'yan uwanta maza biyu, amma lokacin da suka yi watsi da shirin, ta ci gaba da tafiya mai haɗari zuwa Arewa ita kaɗai. A ƙarshe ta isa Pennsylvania kuma ta sami 'yanci, amma ba ta gamsu da 'yancinta na kashin kai ba. Maimakon haka, ta yanke shawarar komawa Kudu don ceto danginta da abokanta da ke cikin bauta. Wannan shawarar ta sanya ta zama wani muhimmin mutum a cikin 'Underground Railroad'. Underground Railroad wata hanyar sadarwa ce ta sirri da ke taimaka wa bayi su tsere zuwa jihohin 'yanci, wanda ya ƙunshi gidaje masu aminci da hanyoyi na sirri. Tubman, a matsayinta na 'conductor' na wannan Underground Railroad, ta zama fitilar bege ga bayi. Ta jagoranci bayi da dabaru masu ƙarfin hali da hankali, tana tafiya da daddare kawai, tana amfani da ɓoyewa da yaudara don guje wa masu bin ta, kuma wani lokaci tana amfani da maganin barci don kwantar da jarirai masu kuka.

Yakin Tubman na neman 'yanci ya kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje da haɗari marasa iyaka. A cikin shekarun 1850s, ta koma Kudu kusan sau 13 kuma ta ceto bayi kusan 70 da kanta, ciki har da danginta da abokanta. Ta yi aiki da shiri mai tsanani da jaruntaka, har ta yi alfahari da cewa "Ban taɓa rasa fasinja ko ɗaya ba a cikin jirgina." Saboda jaruntakarta da nasarar ayyukan cetonta, an ba ta laƙabin 'Black Moses'. Lokacin da Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka (1861-1865) ya barke, Tubman ta yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikaciyar jinya, mai dafa abinci, kuma muhimmiyar mai leƙen asiri ga Sojojin Arewa. Musamman ma a shekara ta 1863, ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen jagorantar Harin Kogin Combahee, inda ta 'yantar da bayi sama da 700. An rubuta wannan a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin ayyukan soja na farko da wata mace ta jagoranta a tarihin Amurka. Ko a lokacin yaƙin, ta sadaukar da rayuwarta ga babban dalilin 'yantar da bayi.

Bayan Yaƙin Basasa, Harriet Tubman ba ta daina ayyukanta na zamantakewa ba. Ta shiga cikin ƙungiyar kare haƙƙin mata na zaɓe, kuma ta sadaukar da rayuwarta ga marasa galihu, tana mai da gidanta mafaka ga tsofaffin Ba'amurke masu fama da talauci da rashin lafiya. Duk da gagarumar gudunmawarta, ta rayu cikin matsalolin kuɗi a duk rayuwarta saboda ba ta sami isasshen fansho ko diyya daga gwamnati ba, amma ruhinta bai taɓa karyewa ba. A ranar 10 ga Maris, 1913, ta rasu cikin kwanciyar hankali a Auburn, New York. Gadon da Harriet Tubman ta bari yana haskawa a yau a matsayin alamar jaruntaka da sadaukarwa wajen adawa da kowane nau'i na zalunci. Rayuwarta ta nuna jajircewar da ba ta karyewa ga 'yanci da adalci, kuma tana tunatar da mu menene jagoranci na gaskiya. Rayuwarta, tare da gwagwarmayar mutane irin su Frederick Douglass waɗanda suka sadaukar da kansu don kawar da bauta a lokaci guda, tana nuna tafiyar ɗan adam marar yankewa zuwa 'yanci da daidaito.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Harriet Tubman wata mai fafutukar 'yantar da bayi ce a Amurka a karni na 19, wacce ta ceto bayi da yawa ta hanyar Underground Railroad kuma ta yi yaki don 'yanci a Yaƙin Basasa.
key_achievements: Ceto bayi kusan 70 da kanta a matsayin 'conductor' na Underground Railroad.
Yi aiki a matsayin mai leƙen asiri da ma'aikaciyar jinya ga Sojojin Arewa a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa.
Jagoranci Harin Kogin Combahee, inda aka 'yantar da bayi sama da 700.
Shiga cikin ƙungiyar kare haƙƙin mata na zaɓe da sadaukar da kai ga kula da tsofaffi.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tana wakiltar 'yanci, jaruntaka, da ruhin da ba ya karyewa na adawa da zalunci, kuma ta kasance abin koyi na har abada a fannin kare hakkin bil'adama.

parsed.narrative:
Florence Nightingale, mai gyaran zamantakewa na Biritaniya, masanin kididdiga, kuma wanda ya kafa aikin jinya na zamani, ta yi aiki a tsakiyar karni na 19. Ko da yake Biritaniya a zamanin Victoria ta ji daɗin wadata daga juyin juya halin masana'antu, tsarin kiwon lafiya, musamman aikin jinya, har yanzu bai balaga ba kuma ba shi da tsari. A lokacin, mata marasa ilimi ko ƙungiyoyin addini ne ke yin aikin jinya, kuma saboda ƙarancin fahimtar jama'a da rashin tsafta, yanayin ya kasance mai wahala ga marasa lafiya. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, duk da cewa an haifi Nightingale a cikin dangi masu arziki, ta bar rayuwa mai daɗi kuma ta bi kiran taimakon waɗanda ke shan wahala. Ta kafa aikin jinya a matsayin sana'a ta musamman bisa ka'idodin kimiyya da horo mai tsari, fiye da kulawa kawai, ta kafa harsashin aikin jinya na zamani kamar yadda muka sani a yau. Wannan ya kasance mataki na juyin juya hali wanda ya karya ra'ayoyin al'umma na lokacin kuma ya faɗaɗa rawar mata. Ayyukanta na farko sun fara ne daga zurfin fahimtar rashin ƙwarewar aikin jinya da yanayin da ba shi da kyau.

Babban juyi a rayuwar Nightingale shine Yaƙin Crimea, wanda ya gudana daga 1853 zuwa 1856. Lokacin da labari ya zo cewa sojojin Biritaniya suna mutuwa daga cututtuka fiye da yaƙi saboda rashin tsafta da yanayin kiwon lafiya mara kyau, ta jagoranci ma'aikatan jinya 38 zuwa asibitin sojojin Biritaniya da ke Scutari (Constantinople) a Daular Ottoman. A lokacin, asibitin ya cika da sojoji masu rauni, kuma saboda yanayin rashin tsafta, ƙarancin kayan aikin likita, da rashin tsari, yawan mace-mace ya yi yawa sosai. A nan, Nightingale ta shirya tsarin jinya mai tsari ga sojoji masu rauni a matsayin mai kula da horar da ma'aikatan jinya. Ta zagaya dakunan marasa lafiya dare da rana, tana kula da kuma ta'azantar da marasa lafiya, kuma hotonta na zagayawa dakunan da fitila a hannunta ya burge sojoji sosai, wanda ya sa ta sami laƙabin 'Mace Mai Fitila'. Sadaukarwarta a wannan lokacin ta zama dalilin da ya sa aka san ta sosai ga jama'a, kuma ta zama sako mai ƙarfi da ke nuna muhimmancin aikin jinya.

Kwarewar Nightingale a Yaƙin Crimea ta nuna mata a sarari ainihin aikin jinya da matsalolin gudanar da asibiti. Ta mai da hankali kan inganta tsafta da yanayin rayuwa a cikin asibitin, fiye da kulawa da marasa lafiya kawai. Ganin cewa ruwa da abinci marasa tsafta, dakunan marasa lafiya marasa iska, da rashin kiyaye tsafta sune manyan abubuwan da ke haifar da yaduwar cututtuka, ta aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu tsauri. Ta yi amfani da ka'idodin tsafta na asali sosai, kamar samar da gado mai tsabta da tufafi, kashe ƙwayoyin cuta a dakunan marasa lafiya akai-akai, da shigar da iska mai kyau. Bugu da ƙari, ta nuna iyawarta a matsayin masanin kididdiga don tabbatar da tasirin waɗannan ayyukan ingantawa akan yawan mace-mace ta hanyar lambobi. Godiya ga ƙoƙarinta, yawan mace-mace a asibitin Scutari ya ragu sosai, kuma wannan ya zama hujja mai ƙarfi da ke nuna yadda aikin jinya da tsafta ke da muhimmanci ga rayuwar marasa lafiya. Wannan tsarin kimiyya na Nightingale ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ɗaukaka aikin jinya daga aikin agaji kawai zuwa fannin kimiyya da ke buƙatar ilimi da fasaha na musamman.

Ayyukan Florence Nightingale a Yaƙin Crimea sun sanya ta zama jaruma ta zamanin Victoria kuma alamar al'adu. Ta canza fahimtar jama'a game da aikin jinya zuwa ga mai kyau kuma ta buɗe sabuwar hanya ga mata don ba da gudummawa ga al'umma a matsayin ƙwararru. A matsayinta na wanda ya kafa aikin jinya na zamani, ta kafa ka'idodin ilimin jinya kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a fannin tsarin asibiti da kiwon lafiyar jama'a. Gadon Nightingale har yanzu yana raye a cikin ka'idodin ɗabi'a da ƙwarewar da ma'aikatan jinya a duk faɗin duniya ke bi a yau. Ana tuna sunanta a matsayin alamar sadaukarwa da ƙirƙira, kuma tana tunatar da ruhun hidima ga waɗanda ke shan wahala. Rayuwarta ta kasance ci gaba da manyan nasarori waɗanda suka inganta ingancin rayuwar ɗan adam ta hanyar inganta tsarin da amfani da hanyoyin kimiyya, fiye da kulawa da marasa lafiya kawai. Wannan sabon tsarin Nightingale, tare da ƙoƙarin wasu mutane waɗanda suka jagoranci gyaran zamantakewa a lokaci guda, ya kafa muhimmiyar alama a ci gaban jin kai na al'ummar Yamma a ƙarshen karni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Florence Nightingale ta kasance mai gyaran zamantakewa na Biritaniya kuma ma'aikaciyar jinya a zamanin Victoria a tsakiyar karni na 19, wacce ta kafa aikin jinya na zamani kuma ta ɗaukaka matsayin aikin jinya.
key_achievements: Kafa tsarin jinya ga sojoji masu rauni a lokacin Yaƙin Crimea
Rage yawan mace-mace sosai ta hanyar inganta tsafta
Kafa aikin jinya na zamani bisa kididdiga
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarta da tsarin kimiyya sun ɗaukaka aikin jinya zuwa sana'a ta musamman, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a tsarin kiwon lafiya na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Yu Gwan-sun (柳寬順, Disamba 16, 1902 – Satumba 28, 1920) wata mai fafutukar neman 'yancin kai ce a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan, jarumar al'umma wacce ta sadaukar da rayuwarta don 'yancin kai na kasarta. Shekarar 1902, lokacin da aka haife ta, wani lokaci ne mai ban tausayi inda Daular Koriya ke rasa ikon mallakarta a karkashin mamayar mulkin mallaka na Japan. An haifi Yu Gwan-sun a Yongdu-ri, Idong-myeon, Cheonan-gun, Chungcheongnam-do (yanzu Yongdu-ri, Byeongcheon-myeon, Dongnam-gu, Cheonan-si) a matsayin 'ya ta biyu a cikin 'yan'uwa biyar a cikin iyali mai tsananin addinin Kirista, kuma ta girma tana samun ilimi bisa ga ruhun Kiristanci tun tana karama. Musamman, tare da taimakon masu wa'azi a ƙasashen waje, ta shiga makarantar Ewha Haktang a Seoul, inda ta sami sabon ilimi kuma ta fahimci gaskiyar al'ummarta sosai. Ewha Haktang wata cibiyar ilimi ce da ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da damar ilimin zamani ga mata a lokacin da kuma bunkasa wayewar kai ta kasa, kuma a nan Yu Gwan-sun ta fahimci darajar 'yanci, daidaito, da 'yancin kai na kasa, kuma ta yi hulɗa da abokan gwagwarmaya da ke raba zafin al'umma, ta kafa harsashin zama mai fafutukar neman 'yancin kai. A cikin zuciyarta, wata sha'awa mai zafi ta tashi don dawo da kasar da aka kwace da kuma dawo da mutuncin al'umma.

A ranar 1 ga Maris, 1919, motsin 3.1 wanda ya fara a Seoul, wani motsi ne na neman 'yancin kai na kasa baki daya wanda ya yi adawa da mulkin kama-karya na Japan, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Yu Gwan-sun. Yu Gwan-sun, wata daliba a Ewha Haktang, ta shiga cikin zanga-zangar 'Manse' a Tapgol Park a Seoul kuma ta fuskanci kiran 'yanci kai tsaye. Amma, lokacin da makarantar ta rufe na ɗan lokaci saboda danniya daga Japan, ta koma garinsu Cheonan. Da ta yanke shawarar kunna wutar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai a garinsu, Yu Gwan-sun ta shawo kan iyalinta da mutanen kauye, ciki har da ɗan'uwanta Yu U-seok da kawunta Yu Jung-mu, don shirya motsin 'Manse'. Musamman, ta yanke shawarar jagorantar wata babbar zanga-zangar 'Manse' ta hanyar amfani da kasuwar Aunae a Byeongcheon-myeon a ranar 1 ga Afrilu (ranar 1 ga Maris a kalandar wata), inda dubban mazauna ke taruwa. Wannan ya wuce zanga-zanga kawai, ya zama wani muhimmin lamari da ya bayyana niyyar al'umma ta yin adawa da mulkin mallaka na Japan a cikin gida da waje. Yu Gwan-sun ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a motsin 'Manse' na kasuwar Aunae, inda ta yi tutar Taeguk da kanta kuma ta raba wa mutane, tana karfafa su su yi kiran "Long live Korean independence!"

Motsin 'Manse' na kasuwar Aunae, wanda ya tashi da zafi tare da halartar jama'a da yawa a karkashin jagorancin Yu Gwan-sun, ya fuskanci danniya mara tausayi daga Japan. 'Yan sandan soja na Japan da sojojin tsaro sun bude wuta kan masu zanga-zangar, kuma a cikin wannan tsari, wani bala'i ya faru inda mazauna da yawa, ciki har da iyayen Yu Gwan-sun, Yu Jung-gwon da Madam Yi So-je, suka mutu a wurin. An kama Yu Gwan-sun a wurin kuma aka kai ta ofishin 'yan sandan soja na Cheonan, sannan daga baya aka tura ta ofishin mai gabatar da kara na Gongju inda aka azabtar da ita sosai. An yanke mata hukuncin daurin shekaru 7 a gidan yari a kotun Gongju District Court, amma ta daukaka kara zuwa kotun Gyeongseong Appellate Court. A kotun daukaka kara ma, Yu Gwan-sun ta nuna halin ko-in-kula, tana kiran "Babu dalilin da zan yi shari'a a karkashin dokokin Japan. Ni mutumin Koriya ce!" kuma ta ki amincewa da shari'ar Japan. A karshe, an yanke mata hukuncin daurin shekaru 3 a gidan yari kuma aka tsare ta a gidan yarin Seodaemun. Ko a gidan yarin Seodaemun, ta jagoranci motsin 'Manse' a cikin kurkuku kuma ba ta ja da baya ba a kan niyyarta ta neman 'yancin kai, kuma a matsayin ramuwar gayya, Japan ta yi mata azabtarwa mafi muni. A karkashin azabtarwa mai tsanani da yanayi mara kyau, Yu Gwan-sun ta mutu a gidan yarin Seodaemun a ranar 28 ga Satumba, 1920, tana da shekaru 17.

Mutuwar Yu Gwan-sun ta bar wata babbar alama da ba za a iya gogewa ba a tarihin motsin neman 'yancin kai na kasa a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan. Rayuwarta gajera amma mai karfi ta nuna sadaukarwa ga kasarta da ruhun adawa mara yankewa, kuma ta ba da babbar karfin gwiwa da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fafutukar neman 'yancin kai na gaba. Ko da bayan mutuwarta, ba a tattara gawarta yadda ya kamata ba, amma a shekarar 1962, gwamnatin Jamhuriyar Koriya ta amince da sadaukarwarta mai girma ta hanyar ba ta lambar yabo ta Order of Merit for National Foundation, Independence Medal. A yau, ana tuna Yu Gwan-sun a matsayin alamar kishin kasa da ruhun kasa ga Koriya, kuma ruhunta yana ci gaba da wucewa ga tsararraki masu zuwa ta hanyar gidajen tarihi da yawa, mutum-mutumi, da littattafan karatu. Musamman, rawar da ta taka wajen ci gaba da ruhun motsin 3.1 ana daraja ta sosai. Rayuwar Yu Gwan-sun ta wuce sadaukarwar mutum guda, tana wakiltar burin dukkan al'ummar da suka yi yaki da mulkin mallaka na Japan, kuma ruhunta mai girma yana ci gaba har zuwa yau tare da sawun masu kishin kasa da yawa waɗanda suka sadaukar da kansu don 'yancin kai na kasarsu a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Yu Gwan-sun wata mai fafutukar neman 'yancin kai ce a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan, wacce ta jagoranci motsin 3.1 'Manse' kuma ta sadaukar da kanta ga 'yancin kai na kasarta.
key_achievements: Halartar motsin 3.1 da jagorantar motsin 'Manse' na kasuwar Aunae
Gwagwarmaya a gidan yarin Seodaemun da mutuwa a kurkuku
Ana girmama ta a matsayin alamar ruhun 'yancin kai na Jamhuriyar Koriya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhunta na kishin kasa mara yankewa ya kasance alama ce da ke tada ruhun kasa na Koriya har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
A farkon karni na 19, Faransa tana neman sabbin sauye-sauye na zamantakewa a kan gadon wayewa, amma fahimtar nakasassu da tallafi a gare su har yanzu ba su da yawa. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, **Louis Braille (1809-1852)** ana tuna shi a matsayin malamin Faransa kuma wanda ya kirkiro rubutun makafi, daya daga cikin abubuwan kirkire-kirkire mafi juyin juya hali a tarihin dan Adam. An haife shi a ranar 4 ga Janairu, 1809, a wani karamin kauye mai suna Coupvray, Faransa. Yarantakarsa ta fara ne da wani hatsari mai ban tausayi. Yana dan shekara uku, ya ji rauni a ido daya yayin da yake wasa da allura a wurin aikin fatar mahaifinsa, kuma wannan kamuwa da cuta ya yadu zuwa dayan idon, wanda hakan ya sa ya rasa ganinsa gaba daya. Duk da cewa ya rasa hasken duniya tun yana karami, bai rasa sha'awar ilimi ba. A shekarar 1819, yana dan shekara 10, ya shiga Makarantar Royal Institution for Blind Youth a Paris, inda ya fara binciken sabbin damammaki na rayuwa. A nan ne ya rungumi burin rayuwarsa na neman wata hanya mai mahimmanci ga makafi don sadarwa da duniya da kuma samun ilimi.

A Makarantar Royal Institution for Blind Youth, Louis Braille ya fuskanci hanyoyi daban-daban na karatu ga makafi a lokacin, amma duk suna da iyakoki bayyanannu. Musamman, tsarin haruffan Latin da Valentin Haüy ya kirkira yana da girma, yana da wuyar shiryawa, kuma ba shi da inganci don karantawa da yatsun hannu. Sai a shekarar 1821, ya fuskanci tsarin 'rubutun dare' wanda Charles Barbier, wani jami'in sojan Faransa, ya kirkira don sadarwa da dare. Wannan tsari ne na lambobi da aka yi da dige-dige 12, wanda ke da amfanin cewa ana iya karanta shi da yatsun hannu ko da a cikin duhu, amma ba shi da inganci saboda ba zai iya bayyana alamomin rubutu ko alamomin kiɗa ba, kuma ana iya karanta harafi daya kawai a lokaci guda. Braille ya fahimci damar wannan tsarin amma kuma ya gane buƙatar inganta rikitarwarsa da iyakokinsa. A shekarar 1824, yana dan shekara 15 kacal, ya kirkiro **tsarin rubutun makafi mai dige-dige 6**, wanda ya saukaka tsarin dige-dige 12 na Barbier sosai. Wannan **rubutun makafi (braille)** tsari ne na rubutu wanda aka tsara don makafi su karanta da rubutawa ta amfani da taɓawa da yatsun hannu, yana ba da damar haɗa dige-dige shida masu tasowa don bayyana dukkan haruffa, lambobi, alamomin rubutu, har ma da alamomin kiɗa.

Duk da cewa tsarin rubutun makafi mai dige-dige 6 na Braille ya fi inganci kuma ya fi sauƙin koyo fiye da hanyoyin da suka gabata, ba a karɓi kirkirarsa nan da nan ba. Wasu malamai a makarantar makafi da kuma masu rike da madafun iko sun yi adawa, suna masu cewa gabatar da sabon tsarin zai haifar da rudani, kuma ba su so su bar tsarin da aka riga aka saka jari a ciki. Amma Braille bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba a kan imaninsa. Ya fara koyar da tsarin rubutun makafinsa ga ɗalibai tun daga 1826 a matsayin malami a makarantar makafi, kuma a hankali ingancin rubutun makafin ya fara tabbata a tsakanin ɗalibai. Ya ci gaba da inganta tsarin rubutun makafi, yana haɓaka rubutun makafi na kiɗa da na lissafi, yana faɗaɗa iyakokin amfani da shi. Amma lafiyarsa ta ci gaba da tabarbarewa, kuma ya sha wahala daga tarin fuka wanda ya addabe shi tsawon rayuwarsa. Bai ga rubutun makafinsa ya sami karbuwa sosai ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, kuma ya rasu a ranar 6 ga Janairu, 1852, yana da shekaru 43. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, an jinkirta amincewa da rubutun makafi a hukumance, amma ya fara yaduwa a hankali ta hanyar sadaukarwar ɗalibansa da magoya bayansa.

Bayan mutuwar Louis Braille, tsarin rubutun makafinsa ya fara samun karbuwa a duniya a hankali. Farawa da amincewar gwamnatin Faransa a hukumance a shekarar 1854, a farkon karni na 20, ya zama daidaitaccen tsarin rubutu ga makafi a yawancin kasashe na duniya. A yau, ana amfani da tsarin rubutun makafi mai dige-dige 6 nasa kusan ba tare da canji ba, kuma ya buɗe kofofin ilimi, samun bayanai, da shiga cikin al'umma ga makafi. Kirkirarsa ba wai kawai ta haifar da haruffa ba ne, amma ta inganta ingancin rayuwa sosai ta hanyar ba da 'yancin kai da mutunci ga mutane marasa adadi. Louis Braille ya kasance majagaba wanda ya kare haƙƙin nakasassu na sadarwa da duniya da kuma neman ilimi, kuma gadonsa yana ba da babban kwarin gwiwa ga ƙoƙarin al'ummar zamani na samar da daidaitaccen damar shiga ga kowa da kowa. Rayuwarsa, tare da nasarorin wasu mutane masu shawo kan nakasa kamar Helen Keller, ya kasance shaida mai haske na jajircewar ruhin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Louis Braille malami ne kuma mai kirkire-kirkire na Faransa a karni na 19, wanda ya kirkiro tsarin rubutun makafi mai juyin juya hali ga makafi.
key_achievements: Kirkirar tsarin rubutun makafi mai dige-dige 6 (1824)
Juyin Juya Hali a Ilimin Makafi
Haɓaka rubutun makafi na kiɗa da na lissafi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin rubutun makafinsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga karatu da rubutu da kuma 'yancin kai na makafi a duk duniya kuma ana amfani da shi har yau.

parsed.narrative:
Joan of Arc an haife ta a shekara ta 1412 a Domrémy, wani ƙaramin ƙauye a Faransa, a matsayin 'yar wani manomi talaka. Yarintarta ta kasance lokacin da take girma tana jin kukan ƙasarta da ke shan wahala a cikin harshen wuta na Yaƙin Shekaru Dari. Wata rana tana da shekaru 13, ta ji muryar Allah tana umartarta da ta ceci Faransa kuma ta naɗa Charles VII a matsayin sarki. A cikin zuciyar wannan yarinya mai zaman karkara wadda ba ta iya karatu ba, wani babban buri na ceton ƙasarta da ke cikin yanke kauna ya zauna.

Babban ci gaban Joan of Arc shine 'ƙarfin hali da imani ya yi mata makami'. Ta sanya tufafin maza, ta je wurin sarki, kuma ta shawo kansa ya ba ta damar jagorantar sojoji. Ga sojojin Faransa da ke cikin yanke kauna na shan kashi, ta zama alamar nasara. A shekara ta 1429, ta kawo ƙarshen Yaƙin Orléans a cikin 'yan kwanaki kaɗan, ta juya yanayin yaƙin, kuma ta zama jarumar ƙasarta. Ba kawai soja ba ce, ta kasance mu'ujizar zamaninta da ta nuna yadda imanin yarinya ɗaya zai iya motsa babban sojoji da canza tarihi.

A kololuwar rayuwarta, ta jagoranci naɗin sarautar Charles VII, amma ta fuskanci gwaji na kama ta da sojojin Ingila, abokan gaba. An zarge ta da bidi'a a shari'ar addini kuma ta fuskanci ƙarshe mai ban tausayi na ƙonewa a kan gungume tana da shekaru 19. Ko a cikin harshen wuta mai zafi, ba ta taɓa barin imaninta ba har zuwa ƙarshe. Mutuwarta ta zama abin da ya haifar da fashewar kishin ƙasa a tsakanin Faransawa, kuma a ƙarshe Faransa ta ci nasara a yaƙin. Ta zama alamar ƙarfin hali mafi girma a tarihin ɗan adam, wadda ta rayu kamar wutar lantarki mai gajeren lokaci amma mai ƙarfi.

Gadon Joan of Arc har yau yana zama tushen ilhami ga duk waɗanda ke ƙoƙarin shawo kan iyakokinsu. Ta bar koyarwar cewa: "Ba na jin tsoro. Domin an haife ni don wannan." Rayuwar Joan of Arc ta kasance babban labari na sadaukarwa da aka gina da imani, kuma ta koya mana cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda ke kiyaye aikinsa har zuwa ƙarshe, ko da a gaban izgili na duniya da tsoron mutuwa. Sunanta an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin Budurwar Orléans, tana ba da ƙarfin hali ga duk waɗanda ke neman haske a cikin duhu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alamar ƙarfin hali wadda ta ceci Faransa ta hanyar wahayin Allah a lokacin Yaƙin Shekaru Dari kuma ta jagoranci naɗin sarautar sarki, amma ta fuskanci ƙarshe mai ban tausayi bayan an zarge ta da bidi'a.
key_achievements: Juya yanayin yaƙin ta hanyar cin nasara a Yaƙin Orléans
Nasarar jagorantar naɗin sarautar Charles VII
Gabatar da alamar nasara ga sojojin Faransa da ke cikin yanke kauna
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta kasance alama ce ta ilhami da ƙarfin hali na har abada ga waɗanda ke ƙoƙarin shawo kan iyakokinsu da kuma kiyaye imaninsu.

parsed.narrative:
A farkon karni na 19, Amurka ta kasance lokacin da masana'antu da fadada yanki ke ci gaba da sauri, amma a lokaci guda kuma tana fuskantar babban rikici na ɗabi'a na bauta. A Arewa, muryoyin da ke kira ga kawar da bauta sun fara ƙaruwa, yayin da a Kudu, matsayin da ke goyon bayan bauta ya kasance mai ƙarfi don kiyaye tushen tattalin arziƙi. A cikin wannan zamani mai cike da rudani, Harriet Beecher Stowe, wadda aka haifa a ranar 14 ga Yuni, 1811, a Litchfield, Connecticut, ta kasance mai fafutukar kawar da bauta kuma marubuciyar gaskiya ta Amurka. Ita ce 'yar Lyman Beecher, wani fitaccen fasto na Calvinist kuma malami, kuma ta girma a cikin yanayi mai ilimi da addini tun tana ƙarama. Iyalinta suna da ƙwaƙƙwaran sha'awar gyaran zamantakewa, kuma sun nuna sha'awa ta musamman ga batun bauta. Wannan yanayin ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka Stowe a matsayin marubuciyar da za ta yi yaƙi da rashin adalci na zamantakewa daga baya. Ta sami ilimi a makarantar ɗan'uwanta wanda ya jaddada mahimmancin ilimin mata, inda ta haɓaka basirar adabi da tunani mai zurfi, wanda ya zama muhimmin tushe ga duniyar ayyukanta.

Stowe ta ƙara ganin gaskiyar bauta a fili lokacin da ta koma Cincinnati, Ohio, a shekara ta 1832. Cincinnati tana kan iyaka da Kentucky, jihar bauta, inda bayi masu gudu da masu fafutukar kawar da bauta ke aiki tuƙuru. A nan, ta ji kuma ta rubuta shaidu masu rai game da rayuwar bayi masu wahala da kuma tsarin tserewarsu, tana haɓaka fushi mai zurfi da tausayi game da rashin ɗan adam na bauta. Ko da yake ta rayu a matsayin uwar gida mai renon yara bakwai bayan ta auri Calvin Ellis Stowe, farfesa na tauhidi, a shekara ta 1836, a cikin zuciyarta akwai manufar adabi don kawar da bauta. Musamman, Dokar Bawan Gudu (Fugitive Slave Act) da aka kafa a shekara ta 1850 ta haramta taimakon bayi masu gudu har ma a Arewa, wanda ya ƙara rura wutar yaƙin adawa da bauta, kuma ya zama babban dalilin rubuce-rubuce ga Stowe. Wannan doka ta haifar da fushin masu fafutukar kawar da bauta, kuma a matsayin martani ga wannan doka, ta fara rubuta littafin "Uncle Tom's Cabin". Wannan aikin ya nuna wahalar bayi da rugujewar iyali cikin motsin rai, yana isar da saƙo mai ƙarfi ga al'ummar Amurka a lokacin, yana fallasa zaluncin bauta.

"Uncle Tom's Cabin" ya haifar da babban tasiri nan da nan bayan fitowar sa a shekara ta 1852, kuma ya zama littafi mafi sayarwa. Fiye da kwafi 300,000 na wannan littafi aka sayar a Amurka a cikin shekarar farko ta fitowar sa kaɗai, kuma an fassara shi zuwa miliyoyin kwafi a duk faɗin duniya, ya zama alama mafi ƙarfi na yaƙin kawar da bauta. Wannan aikin bai wuce nasarar adabi kawai ba, amma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen canza fahimtar bauta a cikin al'ummar Amurka. Labarin da ke cewa Shugaba Abraham Lincoln ya ce wa Stowe lokacin da ya sadu da ita a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa, "Wannan ƙaramar mace ce ta fara wannan babban yaƙi," yana nuna tasirin da wannan littafi ya yi a tarihi. Duk da wannan nasarar, Stowe ta fuskanci tsananin suka da hare-hare daga masu goyon bayan bauta a Kudu. Sun yi iƙirarin cewa abubuwan da ke cikin littafin sun wuce gona da iri ko kuma ba gaskiya ba ne, kuma sun soki ta sosai. A martani, Stowe ta buga "A Key to Uncle Tom's Cabin" a shekara ta 1853, tana kare aikinta ta hanyar tabbatar da cewa abubuwan da suka faru da haruffa a cikin littafin sun dogara ne akan shaidu na gaske da bayanai. Daga baya, ta ci gaba da bayyana ra'ayoyinta game da haƙƙin mata, ilimi, da adalci na zamantakewa ta hanyar littattafai da kasidu daban-daban.

Harriet Beecher Stowe ta rasu a ranar 1 ga Yuli, 1896, tana da shekaru 85, amma gadon da ta bari yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai ƙarfi har zuwa yau. Babban aikinta, "Uncle Tom's Cabin," ba littafi ne kawai ba, amma ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin aikin tarihi wanda ke nuna yadda adabi zai iya yaƙi da rashin adalci na zamantakewa da kuma tada lamirin jama'a. Wannan littafi bai kawai rura wutar yaƙin kawar da bauta ba kuma ya yi tasiri kai tsaye ga barkewar Yaƙin Basasa, amma kuma ya kafa muhimmiyar misali ga rawar adabi a cikin yaƙin kare haƙƙin ɗan adam da gyaran zamantakewa. Stowe, a matsayin marubuciyar da ta haifar da babban canjin zamantakewa ta hanyar ikon alkalami, ta tabbatar da cewa adabi ba kawai nishaɗi ba ne, amma zai iya zama lamirin zamani da kayan aikin canji. Rayuwarta da ayyukanta suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga yaƙi don adalci, kuma har yau suna tunatar da mu mahimmancin adabi wajen wakiltar muryoyin waɗanda aka ware a cikin al'umma. Ayyukanta sun cancanci a tuna da su tare da ƙoƙarin sauran majagaba waɗanda suka sadaukar da kansu ga haƙƙin mata da ilimi a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Harriet Beecher Stowe ta kasance mai fafutukar kawar da bauta kuma marubuciya ta Amurka a karni na 19, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai ga yaƙin kawar da bauta ta hanyar littafinta "Uncle Tom's Cabin".
key_achievements: Rubutawa da buga "Uncle Tom's Cabin"
Taka rawa a matsayin babban mai rura wutar yaƙin kawar da bauta
Juriya ta adabi ga Dokar Bawan Gudu
