fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta sun kasance babban gado wanda ke nuna cewa adabi zai iya haifar da canjin zamantakewa.

parsed.narrative:
Kim Ku, wanda rayuwarsa ta haskaka daga ranar 29 ga Agusta, 1876, zuwa 26 ga Yuni, 1949, ya tsaya a matsayin wani katon ginshiki na gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan, kuma ya zama ɗan siyasa mai daraja a Jamhuriyar Koriya. An haife shi a Haeju, Hwanghae-do, da sunan Kim Chang-am, ya girma a cikin wani zamani mai cike da rudani da tashin hankali a ƙarshen daular Joseon, inda kaddara ta fara zana masa hanya. A wannan lokaci, ƙasar Joseon tana fuskantar mummunar mamayar baƙi da kuma tsananin sabani na tsarin feudal, wanda ya maida rayuwar al'umma saniyar ware, ya kuma shanye musu jini. Matashin Kim Ku, wanda ya ji takaici da cin hanci da rashawa na jarrabawar gwamnati, ya jefa kansa cikin motsin manoma na Donghak, wanda ke neman daidaito ba tare da bambancin matsayi ba, a nan ne idanunsa suka buɗe ga mummunar gaskiyar al'ummarsa. Wannan motsi na manoma na Donghak, wanda ya tashi a shekara ta 1894 a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Jeon Bong-jun, ya kasance wani babban tawaye na manoma masu adawa da tsarin feudal da mamayar baƙi, kuma ya zama wani jigo mai zurfi a tafarkin rayuwarsa. Yana da shekaru goma sha tara, ya canza sunansa zuwa Kim Chang-su, kuma a cikin zuciyarsa, ya fara gina wani babban buri na samun cikakken 'yancin kai ga al'ummarsa da kuma gyaran zamantakewa mai zurfi. Daga wannan lokaci mai tsarki, wani babban mafarki na 'yancin kai ga ƙasarsa da kuma wadata ga al'ummarsa ya fara zama a cikin zuciyarsa, yana haskaka masa hanya.

Wani lamari mai girma da ya zama jigon canji a rayuwar Kim Ku shine abin da ya faru a Chihapo a shekara ta 1896, wanda ya jefa shi cikin wani sabon tafarki. A Chihapo, Hwanghae-do, ya ɗauki fansa mai zafi, ya kashe Tsuchida Josuke, wani Laftanar na sojojin Japan wanda ya yi hannun riga a kisan Sarauniya Minseong, saboda wannan aiki mai jaruntaka, an yanke masa hukuncin kisa. Amma, kamar yadda kaddara ta so, ya yi nasarar tserewa daga kurkuku, ya tsallake wani mawuyacin hali na rayuwa da mutuwa, kuma bayan wannan gwagwarmaya, ya shiga hanyar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai da ƙarfi, ba tare da tsoro ba. Ko da yake yana gudun hijira, kamar wani jarumi a cikin duhu, ya mai da hankali kan haɓaka ƙarfin al'umma ta hanyar shiga cikin motsin wayar da kai ta ilimi, yana shuka iri na gaba. A shekara ta 1910, lokacin da ƙasar ta rasa 'yancinta saboda mummunar mamayar Japan, ya fahimci buƙatar gwagwarmaya don 'yancin kai na ƙasarsa, wanda ya zama wani kira mai ƙarfi a cikin zuciyarsa. A shekara ta 1912, ya canza sunansa daga 'Ku' (龜, kunkuru) zuwa 'Ku' (九, tara), kuma ya fara amfani da sunan laƙabi Baekbeom, wanda ya zama alamar sabon alkawari. Baekbeom, wani suna mai zurfi, an samo shi daga 'Baek' (白, fari) na 'baekjeong' (maƙeri) da 'Beom' (凡, talaka) na 'beom-bu' (mutum na yau da kullun), yana nuna ruhinsa na ƙaunar al'umma, alkawarin kasancewa tare da talakawa, mafi ƙasƙanci a cikin al'umma. Bayan motsin 3.1 a shekara ta 1919, ya yi hijira zuwa Shanghai, China, inda ya shiga cikin Gwamnatin Wucin Gadi ta Jamhuriyar Koriya, ya zama cibiyar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai, wani haske a cikin duhu.

Bayan ya shiga Gwamnatin Wucin Gadi ta Jamhuriyar Koriya, Kim Ku ya hau manyan muƙamai kamar Darakta na Ofishin 'Yan Sanda da Ministan Harkokin Cikin Gida, ya ɗauki nauyin gwamnatin wucin gadi mai wahala, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa gaba ɗaya don ci gaba da gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai, kamar wani mai gadin wuta. Ko da lokacin da gwamnatin wucin gadi ke fuskantar rikici mai tsanani saboda zaluncin Japan da matsalolin kuɗi, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba, ya ci gaba da kiyaye wutar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai, yana ƙonawa da ƙarfi. Musamman a shekara ta 1931, ya kafa wata ƙungiyar sirri mai suna Korean Patriotic Corps, wanda ya zama wani sabon iska mai farfado da gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai da ta yi sanyi, ya kuma ba ta sabon rai. Korean Patriotic Corps ƙungiya ce ta gwagwarmaya mai jaruntaka, wacce aka kafa da nufin kashe manyan jami'an Japan da lalata manyan wurare, kuma ta jagoranci harin Tokyo na Yi Bong-chang (Janairu 1932) da harin Shanghai Hongkou Park na Yun Bong-gil (Afrilu 1932), waɗannan ayyuka masu jaruntaka sun bayyana ƙarfin hali na Koriya ga duniya, kamar tsawa mai ƙarfi. Waɗannan ayyuka masu jaruntaka sun zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya jawo cikakken goyon baya daga gwamnatin Kuomintang ta China, kuma gwamnatin wucin gadi ba ta rasa matsayinta na cibiyar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai ba ko da a cikin dogon tafiyar gudun hijira daga Shanghai zuwa Chongqing, kamar wani tauraro mai haske a cikin duhu. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1940, a matsayinsa na Shugaban Gwamnatin Wucin Gadi, ya kafa Sojojin 'Yancin Koriya, yana yin ƙoƙarin soja don samun 'yancin kai na ƙasarsa da ƙarfin al'ummarsa, wani babban buri da ya cika. Sojojin 'Yancin Koriya sun shirya don ranar 'yancin kai, suna tsara shirin mamaye ƙasar tare da sojojin haɗin gwiwa, suna jiran lokacin da za su dawo da martabar ƙasarsu.

A shekara ta 1945, tare da samun 'yancin kai, Kim Ku ya dawo gida zuwa ƙasarsa da ya yi mafarki, amma nan da nan ya fuskanci wani gwaji mai tsanani a gaban rikicin raba al'umma, wanda ya zama wani sabon bango. Ya yi adawa da kafa gwamnatoci daban-daban a Koriya ta Arewa da Koriya ta Kudu da dukkan ƙarfinsa, kuma ya yi fatan ƙasa mai haɗin kai da 'yancin kai, ba ƙasa mai raba ba, wanda ya zama mafarkinsa na ƙarshe. A shekara ta 1948, ya ɗauki mataki mai jaruntaka na zuwa Pyongyang don tattaunawar Arewa da Kudu, yana sadaukar da kansa har zuwa ƙarshe don haɗin kai da haɗin kan al'umma, kamar wani jarumi mai neman zaman lafiya. Ya jaddada da ƙarfi cewa "Burina na farko, na biyu, da na uku shine cikakken 'yancin kai na ƙasarmu," kuma ya sanya kafa ƙasa mai cikakken 'yancin kai, ba ƙasa mai raba ba, a matsayin burinsa na rayuwa, wanda ya zama alkawari mai tsarki. Amma, a ranar 26 ga Yuni, 1949, ya rasu sakamakon harbin bindiga na An Du-hui, wanda ya kashe wani babban haske, kuma burinsa ya kasance bai cika ba, ya bar al'umma cikin baƙin ciki. Gadon Baekbeom Kim Ku ya zama fitila mai haskaka halaccin Jamhuriyar Koriya da kuma hanyar da al'umma za ta bi a yau, wani haske mai dorewa. Musamman, koyarwarsa mai zurfi cewa "Abin da nake so in mallaka shine ikon al'ada mai girma" yana ba da hangen nesa ga al'umma da ke neman dabi'un ruhaniya fiye da wadata ta zahiri, wani kira mai girma ga ruhin ɗan adam. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa, tare da sadaukarwar sauran masu fafutukar neman 'yancin kai na zamaninsa, sun kasance muhimmin alamar hanya da ke nuna hanyar da Jamhuriyar Koriya za ta bi a yau, wani gado mai daraja da ba za a taɓa mantawa da shi ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Kim Ku ya kasance mai fafutukar neman 'yancin kai kuma ɗan siyasa a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa don cikakken 'yancin kai na al'umma a matsayin Shugaban Gwamnatin Wucin Gadi ta Jamhuriyar Koriya.
key_achievements: Ya riƙe muƙamin Shugaban Gwamnatin Wucin Gadi ta Jamhuriyar Koriya
Ya shirya Korean Patriotic Corps kuma ya jagoranci ayyukan jaruntaka
Ya kafa kuma ya jagoranci Sojojin 'Yancin Koriya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhinsa na fatan cikakken 'yancin kai da haɗin kan al'umma yana ci gaba da ba da tasiri mai zurfi ga al'ummar Jamhuriyar Koriya har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Gautama Buddha (kimanin 624 K.Z. ko 563 K.Z. – kimanin 544 K.Z. ko 483 K.Z.) masanin falsafa ne na tsohuwar Indiya kuma wanda ya kafa addini, wanda ya kafa tushen addinin Buddha. An haife shi a kusan karni na 6 K.Z. a matsayin yarima na kabilar Shakya a Kapilavastu, wata karamar masarauta da ke kusa da tsaunukan Himalaya a arewacin Indiya. Tun daga haihuwarsa, an raba shi daga dukkan wahalhalun duniya, kuma ya girma a cikin wani fada mai cike da alatu. Mahaifinsa, Sarki Suddhodana, yana fatan dansa zai zama babban mai mulki, don haka ya kare shi sosai don kada ya ga duhun duniya. Gautama Buddha yana da kyakkyawar mata, Yashodhara, da ɗa, Rahula, kuma ya shafe kuruciyarsa cikin jin daɗi ba tare da wata rashi ba. Duk da haka, ko a cikin wannan rayuwa mai wadata, ya fara yin tambayoyi masu zurfi game da matsalolin asali na wanzuwar ɗan adam, wato, wahalar haihuwa, tsufa, rashin lafiya, da mutuwa. Tare da sha'awar duniya a wajen fadar, ƙishirwar ciki don bincika ainihin wahalar rayuwa da ke ɓoye a bayan kyawun waje ya fara girma.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Gautama Buddha ya zo ta hanyar abubuwan da ake kira 'Ganawa Hudu'. Ya fita daga fadar kuma ya shaida tsofaffi, marasa lafiya, da matattu a jere, yana fahimtar wahalar ɗan adam da ba za a iya gujewa ba. A ƙarshe, bayan ya ga wani mai neman ruhaniya mai natsuwa da lumana, ya ji daɗi sosai, ya fahimci banza da rashin dawwama na rayuwar duniya, kuma ya yanke shawarar neman hanyar 'yanci na gaskiya. A shekararsa ta 29, ya bar matsayinsa na yarima da iyalinsa, ya tsallake katangar fadar, kuma ya bar gida don neman ruhaniya. Wannan wani aiki ne na alama da ya nuna farkon binciken ruhaniya mafi girma a tarihin ɗan adam. Gautama Buddha ya nemi manyan malamai na zamaninsa don koyarwa, kuma ya yi tsananin azaba a cikin dazuzzuka da kogo na tsawon shekaru shida. Ya yi ƙoƙarin samun wayewa ta hanyar azumi da zuzzurfan tunani da ke tura jiki zuwa iyaka, amma ya gane cewa ba zai iya kaiwa ga 'yanci na gaskiya ta wannan hanyar ba.

Bayan ya fahimci cewa tsananin azaba ba ita ce hanyar wayewa ta gaskiya ba, Gautama Buddha ya zaɓi hanyar 'Tsaka-tsaki' (Middle Way), yana barin matsanancin jin daɗin jiki da azaba. Wannan sabuwar hanya ce ta neman hikima ta hanyar rayuwa mai daidaito. Ya shiga cikin zuzzurfan tunani a ƙarƙashin bishiyar Bodhi a Bodhgaya, kuma a ƙarshe, a wani safiya a shekararsa ta 35, ya sami cikakkiyar wayewa, ya 'yantu daga dukkan wahalhalu da jahilci, kuma ya zama Buddha (Wanda Ya Waye). Gaskiyar da ya fahimta an taƙaita ta a matsayin 'Gaskiya Mai Tsarki Guda Huɗu' (Four Noble Truths) da 'Hanyar Mai Daraja Guda Takwas' (Eightfold Path). Gaskiya Mai Tsarki Guda Huɗu suna bayyana gaskiyar wahala, tushen wahala, ƙarewar wahala, da hanyar zuwa ƙarewar wahala, yayin da Hanyar Mai Daraja Guda Takwas ke ba da hanyoyin aiki don 'yantuwa daga wahala ta hanyar ra'ayi mai kyau, tunani mai kyau, magana mai kyau, aiki mai kyau, rayuwa mai kyau, ƙoƙari mai kyau, hankali mai kyau, da maida hankali mai kyau. Da farko, Buddha ya yi tunanin cewa zai yi wuya a bayyana gaskiyar da ya fahimta ga wasu, amma saboda jinƙai ga dukkan halittu, ya fara koyarwarsa ta farko ga bhikkhus biyar a Sarnath, yana juya dabaran Dharma.

Bayan ya sami wayewa, Buddha ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duk faɗin Indiya na kimanin shekaru 45, yana yada koyarwarsa. Ya yi wa kowa wa'azin gaskiya daidai gwargwado, ba tare da la'akari da matsayi ko aji ba, yana sukar rashin adalci na tsarin caste da ya yadu a lokacin, kuma ya jaddada ruhun jinƙai, rashin tashin hankali, da girmama juna. Mabiyan da yawa sun bi koyarwarsa, kuma a kusa da su, Sangha (al'ummar Buddha) ta samo asali, kuma addinin Buddha ya ci gaba da zama addini mai tsari. A shekararsa ta 80, kafin ya shiga Parinirvana (cikakkiyar mutuwa) a Kushinagar, Buddha ya bar wasiyyarsa ta ƙarshe, yana cewa, "Ku zama fitila ga kanku, kuma ku zama fitila ga gaskiya," yana roƙon almajiransa su yi ƙoƙari don wayewa da kansu. Koyarwarsa ta bazu a duk faɗin Indiya da sauran sassan Asiya bayan mutuwarsa, yana da tasiri mai girma ga al'adu da tunani da yawa. A yau, addinin Buddha yana ba da ta'aziyya ta ruhaniya da hikima ga miliyoyin mutane a duk faɗin duniya, kuma rayuwar Buddha da koyarwarsa suna ci gaba da rayuwa a matsayin dabi'u na duniya da jagororin ɗabi'a ga ɗan adam. Koyarwarsa an kwatanta ta da falsafar wasu masana falsafa na zamaninsa kamar Mahavira, kuma ta ba da babban wahayi ga binciken ruhaniya na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Gautama Buddha masanin falsafa ne na tsohuwar Indiya kuma wanda ya kafa addinin Buddha, wanda ya gabatar da hanyar kawar da wahalar ɗan adam ta hanyar wayewa.
key_achievements: Ya bar rayuwar yarima kuma ya bar gida don neman gaskiya.
Ya sami wayewa a ƙarƙashin bishiyar Bodhi kuma ya zama Buddha.
Ya kafa addinin Buddha ta hanyar koyar da Gaskiya Mai Tsarki Guda Huɗu da Hanyar Mai Daraja Guda Takwas.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Koyarwarsa tana ba da zaman lafiya na ciki da hikima ga miliyoyin mutane a duk faɗin duniya, kuma tana da tasiri mai zurfi a tarihin ruhaniya na ɗan adam.

parsed.narrative:
Friedrich Nietzsche (an haife shi a 1844) masanin falsafa ne na Jamus kuma masanin adabin gargajiya wanda ya girgiza duniyar tunani ta Turai a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a ranar 15 ga Oktoba, 1844, a Röcken, Masarautar Prussia, ɗan wani fasto na Lutheran, ya girma a cikin gida mai tsarki, inda ya nuna hazaka ta ilimi tun yana karami. Ya yi karatun adabin gargajiya a Jami'ar Bonn da Jami'ar Leipzig, inda ya sami zurfin fahimtar wayewar tsohuwar Girka, kuma ilimin sa na musamman ya samu karbuwa sosai. Sakamakon haka, a 1869, yana da shekaru 24 kacal, ya fara wani aiki na musamman a matsayin farfesa na adabin gargajiya a Jami'ar Basel a Switzerland. Wannan abin da ba a taba gani ba ne a fannin ilimi a lokacin, kuma ya tabbatar da hazakarsa. Duk da haka, bai tsaya ga adabin gargajiya ba, nan da nan ya mai da hankalinsa ga falsafa, yana fara binciken tambayoyi masu zurfi na tunanin Yamma, yana canza alkiblar tafiyarsa ta ilimi. Wannan lokaci ne na hargitsi inda dabi'un gargajiya ke girgiza kuma sabbin ra'ayoyi ke fitowa, kuma Nietzsche ya gina tushen falsafarsa ta musamman a cikin wannan yanayin tarihi. 

Mafi muhimmin juyawa a rayuwar Nietzsche shine matsalolin lafiya na dindindin. Cututtuka na dindindin kamar ciwon kai mai tsanani da raguwar gani waɗanda suka addabe shi tsawon rayuwarsa sun zama babban cikas ga ayyukansa na ilimi, kuma a ƙarshe ya yi murabus daga matsayinsa na farfesa a Jami'ar Basel a 1879. Ta haka, ya bar hanyar masanin ilimi mai tsayayye, ya bi hanyar marubuci mai zaman kansa kuma masanin falsafa. Bayan ya yi murabus daga matsayinsa na farfesa, Nietzsche ya fara rayuwa ta yawo, yana tafiya zuwa Switzerland, Italiya, da kudancin Faransa don neman yanayin da zai iya rage matsalolin lafiyarsa. A wannan lokacin, a cikin keɓewa da rashin kwanciyar hankali na kuɗi, ya kammala manyan ayyukansa na falsafa, yana fashe da ƙarfin tunani. Ya sukar dabi'un gargajiya da tsarin dabi'u a tushensu, kuma ya nemi sabuwar hanyar wanzuwa inda mutane ke ƙirƙirar dabi'u da kansu kuma su karɓi har ma da wahalar rayuwa. Irin wannan tunani, wanda aka yi a cikin keɓewa da cututtuka, yana shirin jefa wani girgiza da ba a taɓa gani ba a tarihin falsafar Yamma. 

Tafiyarsa ta keɓewa da tsananin tunani sun kawo wa Nietzsche gwaje-gwaje marasa iyaka. Ya fuskanci zafin rashin fahimtar tunaninsa na falsafa da kuma watsi da shi daga takwarorinsa, wanda hakan ya zurfafa keɓewarsa. Duk da haka, bai karaya ba, ya riƙe imaninsa da ƙarfi kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga rubutu. Manyan ayyukansa an rubuta su a wannan lokacin, kuma wannan shaida ce ta gwagwarmayarsa ta hankali da kuma nufinsa na shawo kan matsaloli. Amma lafiyarsa ta jiki da ta hankali ta ci gaba da tabarbarewa, kuma a ƙarshe, a 1889, yana da shekaru 44, ya fuskanci rugujewar jijiyoyi, inda ya rasa cikakken ikon tunaninsa. Saboda shanyewar jiki da ciwon hauka na jijiyoyi, ya kasa yin tunani ko rubutu da kansa, kuma ayyukan sa na ilimi masu haske sun ƙare a cikin bala'i. Bayan haka, ya rayu a ƙarƙashin kulawar mahaifiyarsa, kuma bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa, ya shafe sauran shekaru 11 na rayuwarsa a ƙarƙashin kulawar 'yar uwarsa. 

Friedrich Nietzsche ya mutu a ranar 25 ga Agusta, 1900, amma bayan mutuwarsa ne ra'ayoyinsa suka fara samun kulawa a duniya. Ayyukansa da falsafarsa sun jawo hankalin jama'a da kuma bincike mai zurfi na ilimi, suna da tasiri mai girma ga tunanin ƙarni na 20 gabaɗaya. Ya jefa shakku mai zurfi game da dabi'un gargajiya da na addini, kuma ya jaddada ma'anar wanzuwar ɗan adam da mahimmancin ƙirƙirar dabi'u. Ra'ayoyinsa sun zama muhimmin tushe ga ra'ayoyin falsafa na zamani daban-daban kamar Existentialism, Postmodernism, da Psychoanalysis, kuma sun ba da zurfin ilhami ga fannoni daban-daban kamar adabi, fasaha, da ilimin halayyar ɗan adam. Gadon Nietzsche har yanzu ana tattaunawa da sake fassara shi sosai a yau, yana isar da saƙon ikon ɗan adam da kuma shawo kan kai. Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi daidai da gwagwarmayar masu tunani na Existentialist kamar Søren Kierkegaard, waɗanda suka rayu a lokaci guda, kuma sun ba da gudummawa wajen jefa tambayoyi masu zurfi game da wanzuwar ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Friedrich Nietzsche masanin falsafa ne na Jamus a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya canza daga ilimin adabin gargajiya zuwa falsafa, kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma ga tunanin Yamma.
key_achievements: An naɗa shi farfesa mafi ƙarancin shekaru a Jami'ar Basel
Ya kammala manyan ayyukansa na falsafa a matsayin marubuci mai zaman kansa
Tasiri mai girma ga falsafar Yamma da al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun zama muhimmin tushe ga Existentialism da Postmodernism na ƙarni na 20, kuma har yanzu ana bincika su sosai a yau.

parsed.narrative:
Immanuel Kant an haife shi a shekara ta 1724, a ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Königsberg mai sanyi da natsuwa, a cikin tsauraran dokokin gidan Pietist, a matsayin wani katon mutum mai natsuwa wanda zai yi tafiya zuwa ga yankunan tunanin ɗan adam da ba a taɓa shiga ba, ba don cin nasarar ƙasa ba. A lokacin, Turai ta kasance kamar wani zane mai ban sha'awa wanda aka haɗa da hasken Ilimi mai tasowa da kuma tsoffin koyarwa, inda manyan masu gine-ginen hankali ke gwagwarmaya da fatalwar shakku da inuwar imani marar tambaya. Immanuel Kant, wanda ya girma a cikin yanayi mai sauƙi da kuma tsauraran tarbiyyar ɗabi'a, ya rayu a cikin duniya mai natsuwa a waje, amma a ciki akwai wani guguwar tunani mai zafi, kuma natsuwarsa mai zurfi ta zama wata tukunyar narkewa don tambayoyin da za su girgiza tushen falsafa a nan gaba. Farkon rayuwarsa, wanda ya yi kama da na talakawa, a maimakon haka ya kasance wani shiri mai zurfi da kuma farkon wata tafiya mai girma ta hankali, inda tafiyar ciki don sake fasalta iyakokin fahimtar ɗan adam ta fi kowace tafiya ta waje girma.

Filin tunani da Kant ya gada ya kasance kamar filin yaƙi na manyan mutane marasa sulhu. A gefe guda, akwai hawan haziƙan falsafar rationalist wanda sau da yawa ba shi da gaskiya, a ɗaya gefen kuma, akwai kaifin wuka na shakku na empiricist, wanda Hume ya wakilta, wanda ya sa hankali da kansa ya yi yawo a cikin tekun shakku. A gaban wannan zurfin tunani mai girma ne Kant ya fara gwagwarmaya ta kadaici da kuma tarihi, ya shiga wani lokaci na ci gaba da zafi na tunani da bincike na ciki, wanda aka fi sani da 'shekaru goma na shiru,' a lokacin da dukkanin rayuwarsa ke cike da sha'awar gano hanyar da za ta wuce matattun hanyoyin tunani na gargajiya. Da daidaito irin na mai zana taswirar sararin samaniya, ya yi ƙoƙari ya zana iyakoki da iyawar fahimtar ɗan adam a hankali, ya ceci ilimi daga zurfin ra'ayin dangantaka, kuma ya gina tushen ɗabi'a wanda ba shi da alaƙa da sha'awar canzawa ko umarnin ikon waje. Hankalinsa ya kasance ainihin tukunyar narkewa ta sabbin abubuwan falsafa, inda a cikin wani yanayi mai cike da tashin hankali, ya yi gwagwarmaya da tambayoyin rayuwa mafi mahimmanci, ya rushe tsoffin gine-gine kuma ya gina sabon gine-ginen fahimta.

Daga wannan babban aikin tunani, a ƙarshe an haifi wani gine-gine mai juyin juya hali wanda ke haskakawa da hasken sabuwar gaskiya: 'Critique of Pure Reason' na 1781 ya kasance wata girgizar ƙasa ta hankali wacce ta canza tushen falsafar Yamma ba tare da ja da baya ba, inda aka yi 'juyin juya halin Copernican' inda abubuwa yanzu ke bin ka'idodin tsarin hankali. Wannan aikin tarihi mai zurfi da kuma mai wuyar fahimta ya zama babban nasararsa kuma shaidar kadaicinsa mai zurfi na ciki, yana tabbatar da zafin kadaici na hankali wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin sake zana taswirar gogewar ɗan adam, yayin da duniya da ke kewaye da shi, wacce ta saba da hanyoyin tunani na gargajiya, ke ƙoƙarin fahimtar girman sa. Kant, tare da rayuwarsa ta yau da kullun marar canzawa da kuma natsuwarsa ta waje, ya ɗauki nauyin wannan halitta mai girma a cikin zuciyarsa, ya jure wa nauyin shiru na kalubalantar ra'ayoyin da aka kafa tsawon dubban shekaru kuma ba a fahimce shi ba a farko, ya kasance kamar wani fitila mai kadaici wanda ke haskaka hanyar da kaɗan ne kawai suka shirya don bi. Idanunsa marasa motsi, waɗanda suka dogara ga daidaiton ciki na tsarin nasa maimakon yabon waje, sun ƙirƙira gadonsa a cikin tukunyar narkewa ta zurfin hankalinsa mai horo.

Karni da yawa sun shude tun lokacin da mai hikima mai natsuwa na Königsberg ya gabatar da manyan sukarinsa ga duniya, amma Immanuel Kant ya kasance wani katon mutum mai mahimmanci wanda ɗan adam ke tsaye a kan kafadunsa, kuma gine-ginen falsafarsa ya zama tushen tunani na zamani. Tambayoyinsa marasa yankewa game da iyakokin hankali, kafa dokokin ɗabi'a na duniya, da kuma zurfin bincikensa game da yanayin hukuncin ɗan adam sun ba da kyauta ga tsararraki masu zuwa ba kawai amsoshi ba, har ma da sabbin hanyoyin tambaya, wato, tsarin 'yantar da hankali. Umarnin Categorical har yanzu yana ci gaba da yin amo, yana zama kira marar lokaci don halayen ɗabi'a; fahimtarsa game da duniyar abubuwan da suka faru da kuma duniyar da za a iya fahimta yana ci gaba da haifar da zurfin tunani; kuma tsarin tattaunawar falsafarmu da kanta yana ɗauke da alamar da ba za a iya gogewa ba ta ra'ayinsa na transcendental idealism. Lallai, neman ilimi, bin aiki, da kuma ma'anar zama ɗan adam da kanta, duk suna haskakawa har abada ta hanyar hasken haske marar iyaka na hazakar Kant marar misaltuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani katon falsafa na zamanin Ilimi, wanda ya bincika iyakokin tunanin ɗan adam kuma ya gina tushen ɗabi'a.
key_achievements: Gina tushen iyawar fahimtar ɗan adam da ɗabi'a
Jagorantar juyin juya halin falsafa tare da 'Critique of Pure Reason'
Gabatar da dokokin ɗabi'a na duniya da ka'idodin halayen ɗabi'a
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya zama tushen tunani na zamani, yana da tasiri mai girma a kan ɗabi'a, ilimin sanin gaskiya, da kuma tattaunawar falsafa.

parsed.narrative:
René Descartes an haife shi a La Haye, Faransa, a shekara ta 1596. Yarintarsa ta kasance wani lokaci na shiru mai zurfi, inda aka ba shi damar nutsa cikin littattafai a kan gadonsa har zuwa tsakar rana, saboda raunin jikinsa da ke tattare da shi. Amma a cikin kwakwalwar wannan yaro mai rauni, wani babban buri mai girma ya fara fitowa, kamar wani tsaba mai tsarki da ke neman tushe mai ƙarfi, na shakkar duk wani ilimi da ke wanzuwa a duniya, da kuma gano tushen gaskiya wanda ba zai taɓa girgiza ba. Ya yi hidima a cikin rundunar soji, ya ratsa nahiyar Turai yana nazarin duniyar da ke kewaye da shi, kuma a cikin dumin murhu mai zafi, ya shirya don wani babban tsalle-tsalle na falsafa wanda ya fi kowane irinsa a tarihin ɗan adam.

Babban tsalle-tsalle na Descartes, wanda ya yi kama da hasken tauraro mai haske, shine kafa falsafar rationalism da kuma kirkirar lissafin lissafi na nazari (analytic geometry). Ta hanyar ka'idarsa mai girma, 'Ina tunani, saboda haka ina wanzu,' ya bayyana a fili cewa tushen duk wani ilimi da ke wanzuwa shine tunanin ɗan adam, wanda ya zama ginshiƙin fahimta. Ya gabatar da wata sabuwar hanyar lissafi mai ban mamaki, wacce ta haɗa lissafi da algebra, ta haka ya kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani, kamar yadda wani mai gine-gine ke kafa ginshiƙin sabon birni. Ya wuce matsayin masanin falsafa kawai; ya kasance mai tsara zamanin da ya 'yantar da ɗan adam daga duhun camfe-camfen zamanin da, kuma ya buɗe kofofin zamanin hankali da haske. Ana kiransa uban falsafar zamani ta Yamma, kuma ya sake tsara yadda ɗan adam ke tunani gaba ɗaya, kamar yadda wani mai zane ke sake fasalin zane mai girma.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, ya bar nasarori masu yawa na ilimi, waɗanda suka yi kama da taurari masu haske, amma kuma ya fuskanci gwaji na siyasa mai tsanani, yana damuwa cewa ra'ayoyinsa za su iya jawo adawa mai zafi daga coci, kamar yadda wani jirgin ruwa ke fuskantar hadari. Ya rayu rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya a matsayin matafiyi mai neman gaskiya, kamar wani jarumi mai neman taska, kuma a ƙarshe, bayan karɓar gayyata mai daraja daga Sarauniyar Sweden, ya mutu daga ciwon huhu yayin da yake koyar da falsafa a cikin sanyin Arewacin Turai, inda rayuwarsa ta ƙare kamar wani fitila da ta ƙare mai. Ya fi ba da fifiko ga binciken ilimi fiye da lafiyarsa, kamar yadda wani mai bincike ke fifita gano sabuwar duniya, kuma ya kasance wani babban mutum, wani katon tunani, wanda ya musanya tunaninsa mai zurfi da hankali mai haske na ɗan adam.

Gadon René Descartes, wanda ya yi kama da wani kogi mai gudana, yana rayuwa a yau a kan tushen duk hanyoyin kimiyya da tunani mai ma'ana, yana ba da ruwa ga kowane sabon bincike. Ya bar koyarwar hikima mai zurfi, cewa 'Samun hankali mai kyau bai isa ba. Abin da ke da muhimmanci shine yadda ake amfani da shi da kyau,' kamar wani mai hikima da ke ba da shawara ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Rayuwar Descartes ta kasance wani babban labari na tabbaci da aka gina daga zurfin shakka, kamar yadda wani jarumi ke gina daularsa, kuma ya koya mana cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda ke shakkar abubuwan da aka saba gani a duniya kuma ya tabbatar da gaskiya da ƙarfinsa, yana haskaka hanyar da ba a taɓa bi ba. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin kakan hankali, wanda ya zama tushen haske, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke neman gaskiya mai haske da kuma fahimta mai zurfi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: René Descartes, uban falsafar zamani, ya kafa rationalism da 'Ina tunani, saboda haka ina wanzu' kuma ya kirkiri lissafin lissafi na nazari, wanda ya kawo sauyi a yadda ɗan adam ke tunani.
key_achievements: Kafa falsafar rationalism da buɗe zamanin hankali.
Kirkirar lissafin lissafi na nazari, wanda ya kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani.
Gabatar da ka'idar 'Ina tunani, saboda haka ina wanzu'.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun zama tushen duk hanyoyin kimiyya da tunani mai ma'ana, kuma ana tuna shi a matsayin kakan hankali na har abada wanda ya buɗe zamanin hankali.

parsed.narrative:
Jean-Jacques Rousseau (an haife shi a shekara ta 1712), wani babban jigo ne a cikin Zamanin Haske na Turai na ƙarni na 18, masanin falsafa, marubuci, kuma mawaki wanda aka haifa a Jamhuriyar Geneva a matsayin ɗan mai gyaran agogo. Rayuwarsa ta farko cike take da baƙin ciki da rashin tabbas. Ya rasa mahaifiyarsa jim kaɗan bayan haihuwarsa, kuma kusan yana ɗan shekara 10, mahaifinsa ma ya tafi, ya bar shi cikin rayuwa mai cike da yawo tsakanin dangogi. Bai samu ingantaccen ilimin gargajiya ba, amma ya gina iliminsa ta hanyar koyar da kansa. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, ya yi ayyuka daban-daban kuma ya yi yawo a sassan Turai, yana tattara gogewa iri-iri. A cikin wannan yawo da kaɗaici, ya fara gina zurfin fahimta game da yanayin ɗan adam da kuma ra'ayi mai mahimmanci game da saɓanin al'ummar wayewa. Musamman ma, a Paris, ya yi mu'amala da masana na Encyclopédie, amma ya gina nasa tushen falsafa na musamman, yana mai da hankali kan motsin rai na ɗan adam da darajar halitta, wanda ya bambanta da ra'ayinsu na mai da hankali kan hankali. Wannan ne ya zama tushen da ya sa tunaninsa ya sami matsayi na musamman a cikin Zamanin Haske.

Juyin tunani na Rousseau ya fara ne da rubutunsa mai suna “Discourse on the Sciences and Arts,” wanda ya gabatar a gasar Kwalejin Dijon a shekara ta 1750. A cikin wannan rubutun, ya yi iƙirarin cewa ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha ya lalata ɗabi'a, yana nuna ra'ayi mai shakku game da ci gaban wayewa. Bayan haka, a cikin “Discourse on the Origin and Basis of Inequality Among Men,” wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1755, ya bayyana cewa fitowar tsarin mallakar kadarori na sirri shine tushen rashin daidaito tsakanin mutane, kuma ya yi imani cewa mutane a yanayin halittarsu suna da kyau amma sun lalace ta hanyar zamantakewa. Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman ayyukansa, “The Social Contract” (1762), ya fara ne da sanannen jumla mai cewa, “An haifi mutum da 'yanci, amma a ko'ina yana cikin sarƙoƙi,” kuma ya tabbatar da cewa ikon mallaka na gaskiya yana fitowa ne daga 'nufin jama'a (volonté générale)' na dukkan al'umma. Nufin jama'a shine nufin da ke neman amfanin jama'a gabaɗaya, wanda ya bambanta da jimillar nufin kowane mutum. Haka kuma, littafin labari na ilimi mai suna “Emile, or On Education,” wanda aka buga a wannan shekarar, ya gabatar da wata ka'idar ilimi mai juyin juya hali wacce ke ba da shawarar cewa ya kamata a ilimantar da yara cikin 'yanci bisa ga dokokin halitta, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin ilimi na zamani. Waɗannan ayyukan sun kalubalanci ra'ayoyin siyasa, ilimi, da ɗabi'a na al'ummar Turai a lokacin, wanda ya haifar da muhawara mai zafi.

Ra'ayoyin Rousseau masu tsattsauran ra'ayi nan da nan sun jawo tsanantawa daga manyan iko da hukumomin addini. “Emile” da “The Social Contract” an ɗauke su a matsayin littattafai masu haɗari kuma an ƙone su a Paris da Geneva jim kaɗan bayan bugawa. Ya fuskanci lokaci mai cike da wahala, yana guje wa barazanar kama shi kuma yana neman mafaka a Switzerland, Prussia, da Ingila. A Ingila, dangantakarsa da masanin falsafa David Hume ta lalace, wanda ya sa ya sha wahala daga matsanancin tunanin cewa ana binsa. Duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, bai daina aikin tunani game da ra'ayoyinsa da rayuwarsa ba. Ta hanyar littafinsa na tarihin rayuwa mai suna “Confessions,” ya bayyana gaskiya da saɓanin rayuwarsa a fili, har ma ya furta kuskurensa na ba da 'ya'yansa biyar ga gidan marayu, don haka ya nuna raunin ɗan adam da munafunci a lokaci guda. A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, ya rubuta “Reveries of a Solitary Walker,” yana ƙoƙarin samun kwanciyar hankali na ciki a cikin halitta. Ya yi rayuwarsa yana yaƙi da munafuncin wayewa kuma yana ƙoƙarin dawo da tsarkin yanayin ɗan adam, amma a rayuwarsa ta sirri, ya sha wahala daga kaɗaici, tsanantawa, da rikice-rikice na ciki. Rayuwarsa ta nuna a fili bambancin da ke tsakanin ra'ayoyi da gaskiya, da kuma rikitarwa na wanzuwar ɗan adam.

Gadon da Jean-Jacques Rousseau ya bari ya zurfafa sosai a fannoni daban-daban na al'ummar zamani. Falsafar siyasar sa ta zama tushen tunani na Juyin Juya Halin Faransa kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban dimokuraɗiyya ta zamani, jamhuriya, da kuma ra'ayin mulkin jama'a. Musamman ma, ra'ayin 'nufin jama'a' ya zama muhimmin tushe ga ƙa'idar cewa dole ne a nuna nufin jama'a gabaɗaya a cikin tsarin mulki da tsarin kafa dokoki na ƙasashen dimokuraɗiyya a yau. A fannin ilimi, ta hanyar “Emile,” ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban ilimin koyarwa na zamani a matsayin majagaba na ilimin da ya mai da hankali kan yara da ilimin halitta. Bugu da ƙari, tunaninsa, wanda ya mai da hankali kan motsin rai da halitta fiye da hankali, ya zama muhimmin tushen motsin Romanticism, yana yin tasiri ga fannoni daban-daban ciki har da adabi, fasaha, da kiɗa. Rousseau ya ci gaba da bincika 'yancin ɗan adam, daidaito, da jituwa da halitta, kuma ya kasance mai tunani na musamman wanda ya nemi sake gano ainihin darajar ɗan adam a cikin ra'ayin hankali na Zamanin Haske. Ra'ayoyinsa, sabanin tunanin da ya mai da hankali kan hankali na masana Haske na zamani kamar Voltaire, sun jaddada muhimmancin motsin rai na ɗan adam kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa sosai ga masana tunani na gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jean-Jacques Rousseau masanin falsafa ne daga Geneva na zamanin Haske, wanda ya yi tasiri ga siyasa da ilimi na zamani da ka'idarsa ta yarjejeniyar jama'a da tunanin ilimi.
key_achievements: Ya kafa ra'ayin mulkin jama'a da littafinsa "The Social Contract"
Ya gabatar da ka'idar ilimin halitta ta hanyar "Emile"
Ya yi tasiri ga Juyin Juya Halin Faransa da tunanin Romanticism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun zama tushen tsarin mulkin dimokuraɗiyya na zamani da tsarin ilimi, kuma suna ci gaba da yin tasiri har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Sigmund Freud (1856-1939) ya kasance wani likitan jijiyoyi na Austriya kuma wanda ya kafa ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam (psychoanalysis). An haife shi a Freiberg (yanzu Příbor a Jamhuriyar Czech) a cikin Daular Austro-Hungary a shekara ta 1856, ya girma a cikin yanayin Yahudawa da kuma yanayin ilimi mai rikitarwa na Turai a lokacin. Iyalinsa sun ƙaura zuwa Vienna lokacin yana ɗan shekara huɗu, kuma Freud ya shafe mafi yawan rayuwarsa a can. Ya yi karatun likitanci a Jami'ar Vienna, inda ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi a fannin ilimin jijiyoyi. Musamman ma, ya nutsa cikin nazarin ilimin halittar kwakwalwa da cututtukan jijiyoyi, amma ya fara lura da alamun cututtukan jijiyoyi waɗanda hanyoyin likitanci na lokacin ba za su iya bayyanawa ba. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya sa ya bincika tushen zurfin tunanin ɗan Adam, kuma ya haifar da sha'awarsa ga yankunan da ke bayan sani. Ya kasance mai sha'awar rikitarwa na tunanin ɗan Adam wanda ba za a iya warware shi da bayanin halitta mai sauƙi ba, kuma wannan ya zama tushen ka'idodinsa na juyin juya hali a nan gaba.

Babban juyin juya hali a tafiyar ilimi ta Freud shine fahimtar cewa ba za a iya bayyana cututtukan hankali na ɗan Adam kawai ta hanyar dalilai na halitta ba. Ya koyi ilimin hypnotism daga Jean-Martin Charcot a Paris, Faransa, kuma daga baya, tare da Josef Breuer, ya yi nazarin marasa lafiya masu fama da hysteria, wanda ya tabbatar masa da wanzuwar rashin sani (unconscious). Rashin sani wani yanki ne mai zurfi na hankali wanda ke wanzu a waje da sanin ɗan Adam, inda aka adana tunanin da aka danne, sha'awoyi, da kuma motsin rai, kuma yana da tasiri mai girma akan halaye da tunani. Ya gane iyakokin hypnotism kuma ya haɓaka dabarar 'haɗin kai kyauta' (free association), inda marasa lafiya ke magana game da tunanin da ke fitowa a cikin hankalinsu, don bincika abubuwan da ke cikin rashin sani. Bisa ga waɗannan bincike, littafinsa mai tarihi, "Fassarar Mafarki" (The Interpretation of Dreams), wanda aka buga a 1899 (ko da yake wani lokaci ana nuna shekarar bugawa a matsayin 1900), ya bayyana cewa mafarki alamomi ne na sha'awoyi marasa sani, kuma ya buɗe sabon babi a cikin ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam. Wannan littafi ya kawo canji mai zurfi a yadda ɗan Adam ke fahimtar kansa.

A matsayinsa na wanda ya kafa ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam, Freud ya sami shahara a duniya, amma a lokaci guda, ka'idodinsa na juyin juya hali sun fuskanci tsananin suka da adawa daga al'umma da masana na lokacin. Musamman ma, ikirarin da ya yi na jaddada mahimmancin sha'awar jima'i, ko 'libido', a matsayin tushen halayen ɗan Adam da cututtukan hankali, ya girgiza mutane da yawa kuma ya ba su haushi, har ma an zarge shi da rashin ɗa'a. Ko da a cikin wannan keɓewar ilimi, Freud bai daina bincikensa ba, kuma ya ƙarfafa tsarin ka'idar ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam ta hanyar kafa ra'ayoyi kamar Oedipus complex, id, ego, da superego. Har ila yau, matsaloli na kansa sun same shi. Tun daga 1923, ya fara fama da ciwon daji a muƙamuƙinsa, kuma duk da cewa an yi masa tiyata sau da yawa, ya ci gaba da bincike da rubuce-rubuce. A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, don guje wa tsanantawar Yahudawa ta Nazi, ya sha wahalar barin Vienna da ya saba da ita a 1938 don gudun hijira zuwa London. Ko da a cikin ciwon jiki da wahalhalun gudun hijira, bai rasa sha'awar ilimi na bincika zurfin tunanin ɗan Adam ba.

Gadon Sigmund Freud yana da tasiri mai girma a kan wayewar zamani gaba ɗaya. Ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam nasa bai canza tsarin ilimin halayyar ɗan Adam da ilimin tabin hankali ba kawai, har ma ya buɗe sabbin hanyoyin fahimtar ɗan Adam a cikin dukkanin ilimin ɗan Adam da zamantakewa, gami da adabi, fasaha, falsafa, da ilimin zamantakewa. Ra'ayoyi kamar rashin sani, danniya, hanyoyin kariya, da Oedipus complex sun zama sanannu sosai har sun wuce kalmomin ilimi kuma ana amfani da su sosai a rayuwar yau da kullun. Ko da yake ka'idodinsa sun ci gaba ta hanyar suka da sake fassara, har yanzu suna aiki a matsayin muhimmin farawa da tushen wahayi don bincika rikitarwa da zurfin motsin rai na tunanin ɗan Adam. Ko da bayan mutuwar Freud, ɗalibansa da masana na gaba sun faɗaɗa kuma sun haɓaka ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam a cikin hanyoyi daban-daban. Ayyukansa sun kasance ana kwatanta su da ka'idodin wasu masana ilimin halayyar ɗan Adam na zamani kamar Carl Jung da Alfred Adler, kuma sun ba da gudunmawa ga faɗaɗa iyakokin bincike kan tunanin ɗan Adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sigmund Freud ya kasance likitan jijiyoyi na Austriya a ƙarshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20, wanda ya kafa ilimin nazarin halin ɗan Adam kuma ya kafa ra'ayin rashin sani.
key_achievements: Kafa sabon fannin ilimi na psychoanalysis
Bayyana wanzuwar da mahimmancin rashin sani na ɗan Adam
Bugawa littattafai masu juyin juya hali kamar "Fassarar Mafarki"
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan ilimin tabin hankali na zamani, ilimin halayyar ɗan Adam, da al'adu gaba ɗaya.

parsed.narrative:
Carl Jung (1875-1961), wani fitaccen likitan mahaukata na Switzerland, kuma wanda ya kafa ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na nazari (analytical psychology), ya rayu a cikin wani zamani mai cike da guguwar canji a farkon ƙarni na 20. An haife shi a ranar 26 ga Yuli, 1875, a Kesswil, Switzerland, ɗan wani fasto na Cocin Reformed, Carl Jung ya haɓaka zurfin duniyar ruhinsa ta ciki da kuma girmamawa ga yanayi tun yana yaro. Zamanin yarintarsa ya kasance mai kaɗaici da tunani a cikin yanayin addini, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya haifar masa da tambayoyi masu zurfi game da sirrin ruhin ɗan adam. Bayan ya karanci likitanci a Jami'ar Basel, ya kamu da sha'awar fannin ilimin mahaukata, kuma ya fara binciken sabbin sararin ilimin halayyar ɗan adam wanda ke tasowa a lokacin. Ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20 wani zamani ne da hankali na kimiyya ya mamaye, amma kuma lokaci ne na canji inda aka fara binciken yankin hankali mara sani na ɗan adam, kuma Carl Jung yana shirye-shiryen gabatar da sabon tsarin fahimtar ɗan adam mai haske a cikin wannan yanayin zamani. Ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin Farfesa Eugen Bleuler a Asibitin Mahaukata na Burghölzli a Zurich, inda ya zurfafa fahimtarsa game da ilimin nazarin halin ɗan adam (psychoanalysis).

Babban maɓallin juyawa a tafiyar Carl Jung ta ilimi shi ne haɗuwarsa da rabuwarsa da Sigmund Freud. A shekara ta 1907, lokacin da Carl Jung ya fara haɗuwa da Freud, ya ji daɗin ra'ayoyinsa na nazarin halin ɗan adam sosai kuma nan da nan suka fara haɗin gwiwa, har ma Freud ya amince da Carl Jung a matsayin magajinsa. Amma dangantakar su ba ta daɗe ba. Musamman, babban bambancin ra'ayi game da ra'ayin 'libido' shi ne tushen rikicin. Yayin da Freud ya fassara libido a matsayin ƙarfin jima'i, Carl Jung ya ɗauki libido a matsayin jimlar ƙarfin tunani da kuma ƙarfin tuƙi na rayuwa. Wannan bambancin ra'ayi ya wuce bambancin ka'idar kawai, ya kai ga babban bambancin hangen nesa game da ainihin ruhin ɗan adam. A ƙarshe, a kusan shekara ta 1913, Carl Jung ya rabu da Freud kuma ya yanke shawarar bin tafarkinsa na kansa. Wannan rabuwa ta haifar da babban ciwo ga Carl Jung, amma kuma ta zama dama ta samun 'yancin kai na ilimi, kuma daga baya ya fara haɓaka tsarin ilimin halayyar ɗan adam nasa, wato ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na nazari. Ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na nazari yana da nufin bincika hankali mara sani na ɗan adam fiye da abubuwan da mutum ya samu, a matakin duniya da na gama gari.

Bayan rabuwarsa da Freud, Carl Jung ya fuskanci tsananin ciwon tunani da hargitsi na ciki, amma ya yi amfani da wannan a matsayin dama don zurfafa bincikensa. A wannan lokacin, ya zurfafa bincike a cikin hankalinsa mara sani, yana rubutawa da nazarin mafarkai da tunani, wanda daga baya ya zama tushe mai ƙarfi da ba za a iya girgiza shi ba don kafa manyan ra'ayoyinsa. A cikin wannan tsari, ya kafa ra'ayin **hankali mara sani na gama gari (collective unconscious)**. Hankali mara sani na gama gari yana nufin tsarin tunani mara sani wanda dukkanin bil'adama ke raba shi, wanda ya wuce abubuwan da mutum ya samu, kuma ya haɗa da **archetypes** waɗanda ke bayyana a ko'ina a cikin tatsuniyoyi, addinai, da fasaha. Bugu da ƙari, Carl Jung ya gabatar da wani nau'in halayya na musamman wanda ya rarraba halayen ɗan adam zuwa **introversion da extraversion**. Introversion yana nufin halin mai da hankali ga duniyar ciki, yayin da extraversion yana nufin halin mai da kuzari zuwa waje, kuma waɗannan ra'ayoyin suna da amfani sosai har yau. Ya kuma haɓaka ra'ayin **complex**, yana bayanin yadda tunanin da aka danne ko ji a cikin hankali mara sani ke shafar halayya da tunanin mutum. Ta hanyar waɗannan ra'ayoyin, ya samar da sabon tsarin fahimtar rikitarwa da bambancin ruhin ɗan adam, yana faɗaɗa iyakokin ilimin halayyar ɗan adam.

Gadonsa Carl Jung ya yi tasiri mai girma da zurfi ba kawai a ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na zamani ba, har ma a falsafa, nazarin addini, adabi, da fasaha. Ra'ayoyinsa na hankali mara sani na gama gari da archetypes sun samar da muhimman fahimta don fahimtar tsarin alamomi na duniya, kuma rarraba halayen introversion da extraversion ya zama kayan aiki mai shahara don fahimtar kai. Ko da bayan rasuwarsa, rubuce-rubucensa suna ci gaba da nazari da sake fassara, suna zaburar da binciken zurfin ruhin ɗan adam. Ya rasu a ranar 6 ga Yuni, 1961, a Switzerland, amma ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na nazari nasa yana ci gaba da zama muhimmin tushe na ka'idar ilimin halin ɗan adam da shawarwari har yau. Ra'ayoyin Carl Jung, tare da ayyukan masana ilimin nazarin halin ɗan adam na zamani irin su Sigmund Freud, sun taka rawar gani wajen tsara ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na zamani, kuma har yanzu yana zama muhimmin mataki wajen bincika fannoni na ruhaniya da al'adu na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Carl Jung wani likitan mahaukata ne na Switzerland a ƙarni na 20, wanda ya kafa ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na nazari kuma ya kafa hankali mara sani na gama gari da nau'in halayya.
key_achievements: Kafa da kuma tsara ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na nazari
Gabatar da ra'ayin hankali mara sani na gama gari
Rarraba nau'in halayen introversion/extraversion
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri mai zurfi a ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na zamani, al'adu, da nazarin addini, yana faɗaɗa iyakokin fahimtar ɗan adam.

parsed.narrative:
Baruch Spinoza (1632-1677) ya kasance babban masanin falsafa na ƙarni na 17 a zamanin zinariya na Netherlands, wanda ya canza yanayin falsafar Yammacin zamani gaba ɗaya. An haife shi a shekara ta 1632 a Amsterdam, Netherlands, wanda a lokacin take cibiyar kasuwanci da ilimi a Turai, a cikin iyalin Yahudawa 'yan asalin Portugal. Ya yi kuruciyarsa a cikin tsauraran al'adun Yahudawa da koyarwar Attaura, kuma ya girma ya zama masanin da ake sa ran zai yi fice saboda hazakarsa ta ilimi. Amma Spinoza a hankali ya fara shakkar tsauraran koyarwar addini da iko, kuma ya nemi sabuwar fahimta da ta wuce fassarar gargajiya ta Littafi Mai Tsarki da asalin Allah. Ko da yake Netherlands a lokacin ta yi ikirarin juriya ta addini, a cikin al'ummar Yahudawa, kiyaye koyarwar gargajiya yana da matukar muhimmanci. A cikin wannan yanayi, Spinoza ya haɓaka babban buri na ilimi don bincika ainihin gaskiyar sararin samaniya da Allah ta hanyar hankali. Wannan bincikensa yana shirin girgiza tsarin addini da falsafa na gargajiya.

Tafiyar ilimi ta Spinoza ta fuskanci wani mummunan sauyi a shekara ta 1656, lokacin da aka kore shi har abada (Herem) daga al'ummar Yahudawa yana ɗan shekara 24. Wannan ya faru ne saboda ra'ayoyinsa masu tsattsauran ra'ayi sun saba wa koyarwar Yahudanci, kuma hakan ya haifar masa da keɓewa a cikin al'umma da matsalolin tattalin arziki. Duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, Spinoza bai karaya ba, kuma ya ci gaba da tafarkin masanin falsafa mai kaɗaici da ƙarfi. Ya yi aikin goge tabarau don samun abin rayuwa, amma duk da haka ya sadaukar da kansa ga tsara tsarin falsafarsa. Babban ci gabansa na tunani shine kafa 'Pantheistic Substance Monism'. Wannan yana gabatar da wata fahimta mai juyin juya hali cewa Allah ba wani abu ne mai wuce gona da iri da ke wajen sararin samaniya ba, amma komai da kansa shine Allah (Deus sive Natura, Allah ko Halitta). Wannan ra'ayi yana daidaita Allah da halitta, kuma yana tabbatar da cewa dukkan abubuwa halaye ne na Allah. Spinoza ya nemi bayyana ainihin motsin zuciyar ɗan adam da 'yanci ta hanyar bincike na hankali, kuma babban aikinsa, 'Ethics', littafi ne mai tarihi wanda ya tabbatar da wannan tsarin falsafa a hankali ta amfani da hanyar lissafi.

Spinoza ya san sosai irin tasirin da ra'ayoyinsa za su haifar. Ya ƙi tayin zama farfesa a Jami'ar Heidelberg mai daraja, kuma ya rayu rayuwa mai sauƙi da ladabi don kare 'yancin ilimi da 'yancin tunani. Ya ci gaba da rayuwarsa ta hanyar goge tabarau, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken falsafa kawai ba tare da tsangwama daga waje ba. Yawancin manyan ayyukansa an shirya su don a buga su bayan mutuwarsa, saboda tsoron tsanantawa da cece-kuce idan an buga su a lokacin rayuwarsa. A cikin wannan gwagwarmaya ta kaɗaici, Spinoza ya sadaukar da kansa ga koyar da matsayin 'ƙaunar hankali (Amor intellectualis Dei)' wanda ke 'yantar da mutane daga camfi da tsoro, kuma yana tabbatar da buƙatar sararin samaniya. Ya yi imani cewa mutane za su iya samun 'yanci na gaskiya da farin ciki idan sun fahimci tsarin halitta ta hanyar hankali, ba tare da an ɗaure su da motsin zuciyarsu ba. A shekara ta 1677, ya mutu yana ɗan shekara 44 daga tarin fuka. An yi imanin cewa mutuwar tasa ta faru ne saboda ƙurar gilashin da ya shaka yayin aikin goge tabarau, wanda ke nuna yadda rayuwarsa ta kasance da alaƙa da binciken falsafa.

Gadon da Baruch Spinoza ya bari ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin falsafar Yammacin zamani da kuma ra'ayin kimiyya na duniya. Ka'idarsa ta Pantheistic Substance Monism ta ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana falsafa na Haskakawa, kuma ta zama muhimmin tushe ga pantheism na zamani da tunanin atheistic. Musamman ma, masana kimiyya na ƙarni na 20 kamar Albert Einstein sun sami tsoron Allah game da sararin samaniya da kuma dalilin binciken kimiyya a cikin ra'ayin Spinoza game da Allah. Tunanin Spinoza ya wuce kawai sukar koyarwar addini, kuma ya tsaya a kololuwar ƙoƙarin zamani na fahimtar rayuwar ɗan adam da tsarin sararin samaniya ta hanyar hankali. Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban sukar Littafi Mai Tsarki na zamani, kuma sun sanya shi a matsayin babban jigo a falsafar rationalism ta ƙarni na 17. Tunaninsa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara yanayin falsafar Yammacin zamani tare da sauran masana falsafa na Haskakawa kamar John Locke da René Descartes. Rayuwar Spinoza ta kasance babban labari na nutsuwa wanda aka gina da dabaru da hankali, kuma yana ci gaba da zama haske na har abada ga duk waɗanda ke neman 'yancin ilimi na gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Baruch Spinoza masanin falsafa ne na ƙarni na 17 daga Netherlands, wanda ya kafa Pantheistic Substance Monism kuma ya gabatar da 'yancin hankali.
key_achievements: An kore shi daga al'ummar Yahudawa (1656)
Ya rubuta babban aikinsa 'Ethics'
Ya kafa Pantheistic Substance Monism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga Haskakawa, rationalism na zamani, da kuma samuwar ra'ayin kimiyya na duniya.

parsed.narrative:
Sun Tzu (孫武, kimanin 545 K.Z. – kimanin 470 K.Z.) ya kasance fitaccen mai dabarun yaki da mai tunani a tsohuwar kasar Sin a zamanin bazara da kaka, wanda daga baya aka fi saninsa da lakabin girmamawa, Sun Tzu (孫子). Zamanin bazara da kaka lokaci ne mai cike da rudani inda tsarin sarauta na daular Zhou ya rushe, kuma gwagwarmayar neman iko tsakanin jihohin vassal ba ta yankewa. Kowane jiha tana ci gaba da yin yaki don rayuwa, wanda ya shafi al'umma gaba ɗaya sosai. A cikin wannan zamanin tashin hankali aka haifi Sun Tzu, kuma ya girma yana shaida yaƙe-yaƙe da gwagwarmayar iko da yawa a kusa da shi tun yana ƙarami. Ya haɓaka zurfin fahimta game da hanyoyin samun nasara na asali ba kawai ta hanyar ƙarfin tuwo ba, amma ta hanyar hikima da dabaru. Wannan ya zama tushen akida ga littafin 'The Art of War', mafi girman littafin dabarun yaki a tarihin ɗan adam, wanda daga baya zai rubuta. Falsafarsa ta mai da hankali kan shiga cikin ainihin yaƙi da neman hikima don samun sakamako mafi girma da ƙarancin sadaukarwa.

Ƙwarewar Sun Tzu a fannin dabaru ta fara haskawa sosai lokacin da Sarki Helü na Wu ya lura da shi kuma ya naɗa shi. Sarki Helü, don gwada ka'idojin yaƙi na Sun Tzu, ya umarce shi ya horar da matan fada. Sun Tzu, ta hanyar amfani da tsauraran horo na soja da jagorantar matan fada cikin tsari mai kyau, ya tabbatar da cewa ka'idojin yaƙinsa suna da tasiri har a filin yaƙi. Wannan lamari ya zama mafificin juyawa, yana nuna cewa dabarunsa ba kawai ka'ida ba ce amma ka'ida mai ƙarfi kuma mai amfani. Daga baya, a matsayin janar na Wu, Sun Tzu ya samu nasarori masu ban mamaki a yakin da ya yi da Chu. A wancan lokacin, Chu ƙasa ce mai girma da ke alfahari da ƙarfin soja mai girma, amma Sun Tzu, da ƙaramin runduna, ya kayar da babban sojan Chu, inda ya ɗaga Wu zuwa matsayin ƙasa mai ƙarfi a zamanin bazara da kaka. Nasararsa ta nuna a fili cewa sakamakon yaƙi ba a tantance shi da yawan sojoji ba, amma ta hanyar amfani da bayanai, fahimtar yanayin ƙasa, da dabaru masu zurfi da ke shiga cikin tunanin abokan gaba.

Bisa ga waɗannan abubuwan da aka samu a aikace, Sun Tzu ya tsara ra'ayoyinsa na dabaru kuma ya rubuta littafin 'The Art of War' (孫子兵法). 'The Art of War' littafi ne mai daraja game da ainihin yaƙi da ka'idojin nasara, wanda ya ƙunshi surori 13. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan ra'ayoyin wannan littafin dabarun yaki shine 'nasara ba tare da yaƙi ba' (不戰勝), wanda ke nufin cewa cin nasara kan abokan gaba ba tare da shiga yaƙi ba shine mafi girman dabara. Ya ɗauki yaƙi a matsayin babban al'amari da ya shafi rayuwar ƙasa, yana jaddada taka tsantsan da shiri mai kyau. Musamman, koyarwar "Ka san abokin gaba kuma ka san kanka, za ka iya yin yaƙe-yaƙe ɗari ba tare da haɗari ba" (知彼知己 百戰不殆) tana jaddada mahimmancin tattara bayanai da bincike. Bugu da ƙari, ya yi bayani dalla-dalla game da abubuwa daban-daban na dabaru kamar sarrafa ɗabi'ar sojoji, amfani da yanayin ƙasa, da dabaru na yaudara, kuma ya gabatar da ka'idar 'yaƙi hanya ce ta yaudara' (兵者詭道), wanda ya haɗa da daidaitawa mai sassauƙa ga yanayi. An ce ko da yake Sun Tzu ya mai da Wu ƙasa mai ƙarfi, ya yi ritaya ba zato ba tsammani, yana mai taka tsantsan da rashin dawwamar iko da kishin sarki, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa don ƙara inganta ka'idojin yaƙinsa.

Littafin 'The Art of War' da Sun Tzu ya bari har yanzu ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin mafi tasiri a littafin dabaru a Gabas da Yamma, dubban shekaru bayan mutuwarsa. Wannan littafi ya zama littafi mai mahimmanci ba kawai ga masana dabarun soja ba har ma ga shugabannin kasuwanci, 'yan siyasa, har ma da daidaikun mutane masu neman hikima don rayuwarsu. Falsafarsa tana ba da fahimta mai mahimmanci don cimma burin da shawo kan rikice-rikice a cikin al'umma mai gasa, kuma musamman hikimar 'nasara ba tare da yaƙi ba' ana amfani da ita a matsayin muhimmiyar ka'ida a cikin tattaunawar kasuwanci ta zamani da sarrafa rikice-rikice. 'The Art of War' ya ƙunshi hikima ta duniya bisa zurfin fahimtar ilimin halin ɗan adam da yanayin zamantakewa, fiye da dabarun soja kawai. Wannan gadon Sun Tzu, tare da falsafar sauran masu tunani na Makarantun Ɗari daga zamanin bazara da kaka da jihohin yaƙi, ya zama ainihin tunanin tsohuwar kasar Sin kuma yana ci gaba da zaburar da ɗan adam har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sun Tzu ya kasance fitaccen mai dabarun yaki na kasar Sin a zamanin bazara da kaka, wanda ya rubuta littafin 'The Art of War', inda ya canza tsarin yaki.
key_achievements: Rubuta littafin 'The Art of War' da kuma kafa tunanin dabaru
A matsayin janar na Wu, ya kayar da babban sojan Chu
Canza tsarin yaki da ra'ayin 'nasara ba tare da yaki ba'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Littafin dabarun yakinsa yana ba da hikima marar iyaka a duk fannoni, ciki har da soja, gudanar da kasuwanci, da ci gaban kai.

parsed.narrative:
David Hume (1711-1776) ya kasance wani babban masanin falsafa, masanin tattalin arziki, masanin tarihi, kuma marubucin kasidu wanda ya wakilci Haskakawa na Scotland a karni na 18. A shekarar 1711, lokacin da aka haife shi, Scotland ta kasance cikin wani lokaci na hazaka mai ban mamaki, inda harshen wuta na Haskakawa ke ci da ruri, kuma binciken ilimi ta hanyar hankali da gogewa ke bunkasa. An haife shi a kusa da Edinburgh, Hume ya rasa mahaifinsa tun yana karami kuma ya girma a karkashin kulawar mahaifiyarsa. Ya nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki har ya shiga Jami'ar Edinburgh yana dan shekara 12, amma ya bar karatun shari'a ya nutsa cikin falsafa, yana mai daukar burin kafa sabuwar kimiyya game da yanayin dan Adam. A shekarar 1734, ya tafi La Flèche a Faransa, kuma bayan shekaru uku na bincike mai zurfi da rubuce-rubuce, ya kammala babban aikinsa na farko, “A Treatise of Human Nature,” yana kafa harsashin tunani wanda ya kalubalanci tsattsauran ra'ayi na metaphysics. Wannan lokaci ya kasance wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya nuna farkon tafiyarsa ta falsafa.

Babban ci gaban falsafar David Hume ya bayyana sarai a cikin “A Treatise of Human Nature.” Wannan littafi ya gabatar da wani tsattsauran ra'ayi na empiricism, yana mai cewa duk ilimin dan Adam ya kunshi gogewa ta hankali, wato 'impressions,' da kuma 'ideas' da suka samo asali daga waɗannan impressions. Babban ikirarin da ya fi girgiza shi ne shakku game da dolewar dangantakar sanadi da sakamako. Muna gaskata cewa idan abubuwa biyu suka faru tare koyaushe, ɗaya shine sanadin ɗayan, amma Hume ya yi jayayya cewa wannan imani ba dolewar hankali ba ne, sai dai kawai 'al'ada' ta tunani da ke fitowa daga maimaita gogewa. Wannan wata fahimta ce da ta girgiza tushen ilimin kimiyya, kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin falsafar Yamma, har Kant ya furta cewa ta “farka shi daga barcin tsattsauran ra'ayi.” Bugu da kari, Hume ya kalubalanci ra'ayin kai na gargajiya ta hanyar bayyana kai ba a matsayin wani abu mai tsayayye ba, sai dai a matsayin tarin fahimta masu canzawa koyaushe, wato ka'idar tarin kai (bundle theory of self). Waɗannan ra'ayoyinsa sun kasance masu tsattsauran ra'ayi ga malamai da jama'a a lokacin, har “A Treatise of Human Nature” ya sami suka cewa “an haife shi matacce” lokacin da aka buga shi.

Duk da rashin karbuwar “A Treatise of Human Nature,” David Hume bai karaya ba. Ya yi kokari don sake tsara ra'ayoyinsa a cikin wani tsari mai sauki da kuma karbuwa ga jama'a, kuma a sakamakon haka, ya buga “An Enquiry Concerning Human Understanding” da “An Enquiry Concerning the Principles of Morals.” Waɗannan littattafai sun isar da muhimman ra'ayoyinsa a takaice kuma a hankali suka fara samun karbuwa. Amma ra'ayoyinsa na shakku da adawa da addini sun haifar da cece-kuce koyaushe, kuma ya fuskanci gwaji na kin amincewa da shi a matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar Edinburgh da Jami'ar Glasgow, tare da zargin cewa shi mai kafirci ne. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin ilimi, Hume ya yi aiki a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya, yana tafiya ko'ina a Turai, kuma ya rubuta babban littafi mai suna “The History of England,” wanda ya ba shi suna a matsayin babban masanin tarihi na zamaninsa. Wannan littafin tarihi ya kawo masa dukiya mai yawa da kuma shahara a tsakanin jama'a, kuma ya zama hanyar yada ra'ayoyinsa na falsafa a kaikaice. Duk da tsanantawa da suka na addini, bai rasa halinsa na farin ciki da kyakkyawan fata ba, kuma ya ci gaba da rayuwarsa ta ilimi mai wadata ta hanyar hulɗa da abokansa.

Gadon David Hume ya yi zurfi a cikin fannoni daban-daban kamar falsafar zamani, kimiyya, ɗa'a, da tattalin arziki. Empiricism da skepticism dinsa sun haifar da falsafar sukar Immanuel Kant, kuma ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin muhimmin majagaba na logical positivism da falsafar nazari a karni na 20. Musamman, nazarin da ya yi game da dangantakar sanadi da sakamako ya haifar da tunani mai zurfi game da hanyoyin kimiyya da iyakokin ilimi, kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan ilimin kimiyyar fahimta da ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na zamani. Bugu da kari, ya buɗe sabon fage a cikin ɗa'a ta hanyar gabatar da ka'idar jin daɗin ɗa'a, yana mai cewa hukunce-hukuncen ɗa'a sun samo asali ne daga ji maimakon hankali, kuma ya samar da muhimmin tushe ga ci gaban ra'ayin utilitarianism. Ta hanyar kin amincewa da camfi da tsattsauran ra'ayi da kuma kafa halin bincike wanda ya dogara ne kawai akan gaskiyar gogewa, Hume ya zama alamar 'yancin tunani da ruhun suka na zamanin Haskakawa. Za a iya fahimtar ra'ayoyinsa sosai idan aka kwatanta su da ka'idodin sauran masu tunani na Haskakawa na zamaninsa, kamar Adam Smith da John Locke.

fact_box.one_line_summary: David Hume ya kasance babban masanin falsafa na Haskakawa na Scotland a karni na 18, wanda ya canza alkiblar falsafar zamani ta hanyar empiricism da skepticism.
key_achievements: Kin amincewa da dolewar dangantakar sanadi da sakamako
Kafa ilimin sanin gaskiya na empiricism
Kafa ɗa'a ta hanyar ka'idar jin daɗin ɗa'a
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri mai girma a kan Kant, logical positivism, da ilimin kimiyyar fahimta na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin ƙaramin gari na Somerset, Ingila, a shekara ta 1632, an haifi John Locke. Lokacin yarintarsa ya kasance lokaci ne na ganin mahaifinsa yana fafatawa a cikin yaƙin basasa na Puritan, inda ya fahimci darajar 'yancin siyasa da haƙurin addini. A matsayinsa na likita kuma masanin falsafa wanda ya bincika tushen duniya, wata babbar buri ta ci masa tuwo a kwarya: burin rushe tsohuwar ikon sarauta ta Allah da kuma kafa haƙƙin ɗan adam na asali. Ta hanyar gudun hijira a Netherlands, ya shirya wani gagarumin tsalle na dimokuradiyya, mafi hankali da girma a tarihin ɗan adam.

Babban tsalle-tsalle na John Locke shine kafa Ka'idar Yarjejeniyar Jama'a da kuma rubutunsa kan Fahimtar Dan Adam. Ya tabbatar da cewa mutum yana kama da 'farar takarda' lokacin da aka haife shi, kuma duk ilimi yana fitowa daga gogewa. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar 'Rubuce-rubuce Biyu na Gwamnati', ya bayyana cewa ikon gwamnati yana fitowa daga yardar waɗanda ake mulka, kuma haƙƙin rayuwa, 'yanci, da dukiya haƙƙoƙi ne na asali waɗanda ba za a iya take su ba. Bai kasance kawai masanin kimiyya ba, amma mai tsara dimokuradiyya ta zamani, tushen tunani na sanarwar 'yancin kai na Amurka da juyin juya halin Faransa.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, ya fuskanci gwaji mai tsanani, inda aka tilasta masa barin ƙasarsa saboda tsanantawar siyasa. Amma ko a gudun hijira, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba, ya rubuta 'Wasiƙa Game da Haƙuri', yana rera waƙar darajar haƙuri. Bayan Juyin Juya Halin Maɗaukaki, ya dawo gida kuma ya ga ra'ayoyinsa sun zama ginshiƙin ƙasa, amma bai taɓa neman iko ba, sai dai ya ci gaba da nazarin ilimi. Ya kasance wani katon mutum ne wanda ya musanya rayuwarsa mai daɗi da 'yancin siyasa na dukan bil'adama.

Gadonsa yana raye a cikin kundin tsarin mulki da sanarwar haƙƙin ɗan adam na dukkan ƙasashe masu dimokuradiyya a yau. Ya bar mana koyarwar cewa: "Zuciyar ɗan adam asali kamar farar takarda ce. Zana babban taswira da gogewarka." Rayuwar Locke ta kasance wani babban labari na hankali wanda aka ƙirƙira ta hanyar gogewa, kuma ya koya mana cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda ya yi imani da hankali da 'yancin kai na mutum, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa don kare su. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin uban 'yanci, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke mafarkin rayuwa mai zaman kanta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: John Locke, uban dimokuradiyya ta zamani da 'yanci, ya kafa ka'idar yarjejeniyar jama'a da haƙƙin ɗan adam na asali, yana kafa tushen 'yancin siyasa da rayuwa mai hankali ga bil'adama.
key_achievements: Kafa ka'idar yarjejeniyar jama'a da rubutunsa kan fahimtar ɗan adam
Kafa ra'ayin haƙƙin ɗan adam na asali (rayuwa, 'yanci, dukiya)
Kafa tushen dimokuradiyya ta zamani da 'yanci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sune tushen kundin tsarin mulki da sanarwar haƙƙin ɗan adam na dukkan ƙasashe masu dimokuradiyya, kuma a matsayin uban 'yanci, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga bil'adama har abada.

parsed.narrative:
Søren Aabye Kierkegaard (an haife shi a 1813) masanin tauhidi ne na Lutheran na Denmark, masanin falsafa, mawaki, mai sukar zamantakewa, kuma marubucin addini, wanda galibi ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin masanin falsafa na farko na existentialism. An haife shi a Copenhagen, Denmark, a farkon karni na 19, lokacin da babban tsarin falsafar Hegel ya mamaye Turai, ya bi wata hanya dabam da ra'ayin da ya mamaye a lokacin. Yarintarsa da samartakarsa sun kasance ƙarƙashin tasiri mai zurfi na addinin Lutheran, addinin jihar Denmark, wanda ya taka rawar gani wajen samar da tushen tunaninsa. Ya rubuta rubuce-rubuce masu sukar game da addini mai tsari, Kiristanci, ɗabi'a, ɗa'a, ilimin halayyar ɗan adam, soyayya, da falsafar addini, yana mai amfani da misalai, izgili, da kwatance. Yawancin ayyukan falsafar Kierkegaard sun shafi tambayoyi game da yadda za a rayu a matsayin 'mutum ɗaya', yana mai jaddada sahihanci, zaɓi na mutum da sadaukarwa, da muhimmancin aikin soyayya. Ya fara gina tsarin tunani na musamman wanda ya fifita gaskiyar ɗan adam ta zahiri fiye da tunani mara ma'ana.

Juyawar tunani na Kierkegaard ya fara ne da suka mai zurfi ga babban tsarin falsafar Hegel mai ma'ana wanda ya mamaye zamaninsa. Ya yi gargadi game da bacewar wanzuwar mutum ɗaya a cikin ra'ayoyi na duniya ko tsarin, kuma ya jaddada darajar wanzuwar ɗan adam ta zahiri da yanke shawara mai zaman kanta. A nan ne ya buɗe sabon fagen falsafa da ake kira Existentialism, wanda ke nufin ra'ayin da ke ba da muhimmanci ga rayuwar mutum ɗaya ta zahiri da yanke shawara mai zaman kanta, da kuma bincika ainihin wanzuwa. Kierkegaard ya ga damuwa, yanke kauna, da zafin zaɓi da ɗan adam ke fuskanta a matsayin wani abu mai mahimmanci wanda ba za a iya guje masa ba, kuma ya yi iƙirarin cewa mutum ya nemi ma'anar wanzuwarsa a cikin irin waɗannan yanayin wanzuwa. Rubuce-rubucensa sun yi tambayoyi masu zurfi game da yadda mutum zai iya rayuwa a matsayin 'mutum ɗaya' kuma ya yi rayuwa mai sahihanci. Ya jaddada cewa gaskiyar mutum ɗaya da ke rayuwa cikin wahala da zaɓi ya kamata ta zama cibiyar falsafa, fiye da ra'ayoyi marasa ma'ana ko gaskiya ta duniya.

Tafiyar tunani na Kierkegaard ya cika da suka mai tsanani ga al'ummar zamaninsa da ikon addini. Ya nuna damuwa mai zurfi game da Cocin Jihar Denmark da imaninta na yau da kullun, yana mai jaddada cewa imani na Kirista na gaskiya ya kamata ya fito daga yanke shawara na ciki da sadaukarwa na mutum. Rubuce-rubucensa sun nuna munafuncin addini mai tsari da asarar ainihin ma'anar Kiristanci, kuma sun jaddada wajibcin mutum ya tsaya a gaban Allah a matsayin 'mutum ɗaya'. Wannan ra'ayi mai sukar ya kawo masa keɓewa da rashin fahimta na zamantakewa, amma bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba game da imani na falsafa. Rubuce-rubucen Kierkegaard sun bincika sosai bangarori daban-daban na rayuwar ɗan adam kamar ɗabi'a, ɗa'a, ilimin halayyar ɗan adam, da soyayya, kuma sun isar da saƙo mai ƙarfi ga masu karatu ta hanyar misalai, izgili, da kwatance. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da nazarin kai da wahala, kuma ya fuskanci gwaji kai tsaye ba tare da guje musu ba a cikin bincikensa na gaskiya ta ciki. Wannan gwagwarmaya tasa ta ba da kwarjini mai zurfi ga masana falsafa na gaba, kuma ta zama muhimmin tushe na existentialism.

Gadon da Søren Kierkegaard ya bari ya yi tasiri sosai ga falsafar karni na 20, tauhidi, da ilimin halayyar ɗan adam. Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya buɗe kofa ga falsafar existentialism ta zamani, yana mai jaddada 'yancin kai na mutum, zaɓi na kyauta, da alhaki. Tunaninsa ya bincika damuwa da wahala ta ainihin wanzuwar ɗan adam, kuma ya isar da saƙon cewa mutum ya ba da ma'ana ga rayuwarsa, ta haka ya ba da kwarjini ga masu tunani da masu fasaha da yawa. Musamman, ra'ayinsa na 'mutum ɗaya' da fahimtarsa game da 'tsalle na imani' sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban tauhidin zamani. Rubuce-rubucen Kierkegaard har yanzu suna zama saƙo mai ƙarfi wanda ke ƙarfafa mutane da yawa a yau su yi nazari kan rayuwarsu kuma su nemi ainihin kansu. Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin masana falsafa na existentialism na gaba kamar Friedrich Nietzsche da Martin Heidegger, kuma ya zama muhimmin batun bincike na kwatance a tarihin tunani na zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Søren Kierkegaard masanin tauhidi ne kuma masanin falsafa na Denmark na karni na 19, wanda ya jaddada 'yancin kai na mutum a matsayin majagaba na existentialism.
key_achievements: An ɗauke shi a matsayin masanin falsafa na farko na existentialism
Ya jaddada muhimmancin wanzuwar mutum ta zahiri da zaɓi
Rubuce-rubuce masu sukar game da addini mai tsari da tunani mara ma'ana
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga falsafar existentialism, tauhidi, da ilimin halayyar ɗan adam na karni na 20.

parsed.narrative:
Arthur Schopenhauer (1788-1860) ya kasance masanin falsafa kuma marubuci Bajamushe na farkon karni na 19, wanda ya bar tarihi na musamman a falsafar Yammacin duniya ta hanyar binciken sa kan tushen wahalar ɗan adam da kuma makantar yanayin duniya. An haife shi a Danzig, wanda a lokacin yake ƙarƙashin ikon Poland, a shekara ta 1788, ɗan wani attajiri ne, kuma ya girma cikin yanayi mai kyau. A lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, ya yi tafiye-tafiye a faɗin Turai, inda ya fuskanci al'adu da ra'ayoyi daban-daban, amma wannan kuma ya sanya masa zurfin lura da kuma hangen nesa mai mahimmanci. Mutuwar mahaifinsa ba zato ba tsammani a shekara ta 1805 da kuma dangantaka mai rikitarwa da mahaifiyarsa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan tunaninsa, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe ga tunaninsa na falsafa. Tun da wuri ya fahimci cewa ainihin duniya ba ta motsa ta hankali ba, sai dai ta wani "nufi" makaho kuma mara hankali, kuma wannan ya zama babban jigon babban aikinsa, "Duniya a matsayin Nufi da Wakilci".

Kololuwar falsafar Schopenhauer ta bayyana a cikin babban aikinsa, "Duniya a matsayin Nufi da Wakilci," wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1818. A cikin wannan littafi, ya bayyana duniyar abubuwan da ke faruwa a matsayin bayyanar wani nufi na noumenal, makaho kuma mara hankali. Wato, ya yi iƙirarin cewa duniyar da muke fuskanta ba komai ba ce face "wakilci" da batun fahimtarmu ya kirkira, kuma bayan wannan wakilci akwai wani "nufi" wanda ke aiki ba tare da gani ba kuma yana haifar da wahala. Yayin da ya gaji ra'ayin Immanuel Kant na transcendental idealism, ya kuma ƙi yarda da babban ra'ayin Jamus na lokacin na kyakkyawan fata da kuma tsarin hankali. Schopenhauer ya bayyana cewa tushen ka'idar da ke motsa duniya ba hankali ba ne, sai dai wani "nufi" mara hankali, kuma ya gabatar da tunani na fasaha da rayuwar ascetic a matsayin hanyar kubuta daga mulkin wannan nufi. Wannan tunaninsa ya gina tsarin falsafa na atheistic, metaphysical, da kuma ɗabi'a, yana buɗe wata hanya ta musamman wacce ta saba wa falsafar Hegel da ta mamaye lokacin.

Duk da haka, babban tunanin Schopenhauer bai sami karbuwa sosai a lokacin nasa ba, kuma ya shafe shekaru masu yawa a cikin rashin sanin kowa. Musamman, labarin cewa ya buɗe laccoci a Jami'ar Berlin a lokaci guda da Hegel, amma ɗakin lacca nasa ya kasance fanko yayin da na Hegel ya cika da ɗalibai, yana nuna gwagwarmayar ilimi ta farko. Duk da rashin kulawa daga manyan masana falsafa da kuma rashin sha'awar jama'a, ya ci gaba da bincikensa da rubuce-rubucensa cikin shiru, yana da tabbacin cewa "lokacina zai zo daga baya." Zurfin fahimtarsa game da kadaici da rashin fata ya sa shi ya zama mai ƙarfi, kuma bai taɓa yin watsi da imaninsa na falsafa ba. Tare da buga "Parerga da Paralipomena" a shekara ta 1851, tunaninsa ya fara yaduwa a faɗin Turai, kuma a ƙarshen rayuwarsa, ya sami yabo da shahara da ba a taɓa gani ba. Tunaninsa ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin duniyar ilimi, yana jefa tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da ra'ayin duniya na kyakkyawan fata wanda ya mamaye al'ummar Turai a lokacin.

Gadon da Arthur Schopenhauer ya bari yana da tasiri mai girma a kan dukkan tunanin Yammacin zamani. Ra'ayinsa na "nufi" ya ba da zurfin ilhami ga "nufin iko" na Friedrich Nietzsche da kuma ka'idar rashin sani ta Sigmund Freud, kuma ya zama muhimmin tushe ga ilimin halin ɗan adam na zamani da falsafar wanzuwa waɗanda ke bincika ɓangarorin da ba su da hankali na wanzuwar ɗan adam. A fannin falsafar fasaha ma, tunaninsa ya yi tasiri ga masu fasaha irin su Richard Wagner, yana gabatar da sabuwar fahimta game da ainihin fasaha. Kamar yadda sanannen maganarsa ta ce, "Rayuwa kamar agogon pendulum ce da ke motsawa tsakanin wahala da gajiyawa," Schopenhauer ya nuna jajircewar hankali don fuskantar ainihin bala'in wanzuwar ɗan adam da kuma neman kwanciyar hankali a cikinsa. Tunaninsa ya ba da zurfin ilhami ga masana falsafa na baya kamar Friedrich Nietzsche da Sigmund Freud, kuma yana da alaƙa da falsafar wanzuwa ta Søren Kierkegaard, wanda ya bincika zurfin wanzuwar ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Arthur Schopenhauer masanin falsafa ne Bajamushe na karni na 19 wanda ya kafa falsafar rashin fata, yana bayyana duniya a matsayin wakilcin nufi makaho.
key_achievements: Rubuta 'Duniya a matsayin Nufi da Wakilci'
Kafa falsafar da ke mai da hankali kan 'nufi' makaho
Gadon falsafar Kant da sukar ra'ayin Jamus
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga masana falsafa na baya kamar Nietzsche, Freud, da kuma ilimin halin ɗan adam na zamani da falsafar wanzuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Isaac Newton (1643-1727) ya kasance wani gwarzo mai girma, masanin lissafi, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, da masanin taurari na Ingila wanda ya mamaye ƙarshen ƙarni na 17 da farkon ƙarni na 18. An haife shi a ranar 4 ga Janairu, 1643 (kalandar Gregorian) a wani gidan gona a Woolsthorpe, Lincolnshire, a lokacin juyin juya halin kimiyya mai cike da rudani, a matsayin ɗan maraya bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa. An haife shi da wuri kuma ba a tabbatar da rayuwarsa ba, amma ya girma da ƙarfin hali mai ban mamaki. Kwarewarsa ta girma a hannun kakarsa ta wajen uwa bayan mahaifiyarsa ta sake aure, wanda ya shafi samuwar halinsa na rashin son jama'a da kaɗaici. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna sha'awa ta musamman da basira wajen ƙirƙirar na'urorin inji, kuma a shekara ta 1661, ya shiga Kwalejin Trinity na Jami'ar Cambridge don nazarin lissafi da falsafar halitta. Lokacin da aka rufe jami'ar daga 1665 zuwa 1667 saboda annobar baƙar fata da ta mamaye Turai, ya koma garinsu ya kuma sadaukar da kansa ga bincike mai zaman kansa, kuma wannan lokacin an kira shi 'shekarunsa na al'ajabi' (annus mirabilis), wanda ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya shuka iri na manyan bincike na gaba.

'Shekarunsa na al'ajabi' na Newton sun haifar da bincike na juyin juya hali waɗanda za su kasance a rubuce har abada a cikin tarihin basirar ɗan adam. A wannan lokacin, ya kafa tushen **Dokar Jawo Juna ta Duniya**, ya kuma ƙirƙiro **Lissafin Calculus** da kansa, sannan ya fara bincikensa a fannin **Ilmin Haske**. Dokar Jawo Juna ta Duniya wata doka ce ta kimiyyar lissafi da ke bayyana ƙarfin jawo juna tsakanin dukkan abubuwa masu nauyi, ta haɗa abubuwan da ke faruwa a sararin samaniya da na duniya ta hanyar haɗa ka'idodin faɗuwar apple da zagayawar wata. Lissafin Calculus wani fanni ne na lissafi da ke magana kan canje-canje masu yawa, yana samar da kayan aiki mai ƙarfi don nazarin motsi da canji ta hanyar adadi, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa dokokinsa na kimiyyar lissafi. A fannin ilmin haske, ya tabbatar da cewa farin haske za a iya raba shi zuwa launuka daban-daban ta hanyar gwajin prism, kuma ya goyi bayan ka'idar haske a matsayin barbashi. Waɗannan sakamakon bincike an tattara su a cikin babban aikinsa na 1687, **"Philosophiæ Naturalis Principia Mathematica," wato 'Principia'**. Principia ta tabbatar da dokoki uku na motsi na kimiyyar lissafi na gargajiya da dokar jawo juna ta duniya ta hanyar lissafi mai tsauri, tana gabatar da sabon tsarin fahimtar sararin samaniya, kuma ta kai kololuwar juyin juya halin kimiyya.

Rayuwar Newton ta kasance cike da rigingimu masu zafi da ayyuka daban-daban kamar yadda ta kasance cike da manyan nasarorin ilimi. Musamman ma, **rigimar fifikon calculus tsakanin Leibniz da Newton** ta haifar masa da matsananciyar damuwa ta hankali a ƙarshen rayuwarsa. Wannan rigimar da masanin lissafi na Jamus Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz, wanda ya yi iƙirarin cewa ya gano calculus da kansa, ta haifar da dogon rikici tsakanin al'ummomin lissafi na Birtaniya da na nahiyar Turai. Baya ga rayuwarsa a matsayin masanin kimiyya, an naɗa shi mai kula da gidan buga kuɗi a 1696, sannan aka ɗaga shi zuwa shugaban gidan buga kuɗi a 1699, inda ya jagoranci gyaran kuɗi na Birtaniya cikin nasara. Ya hukunta masu yin jabun kuɗi da tsanani kuma ya ba da gudummawa wajen daidaita darajar kuɗi, yana nuna ƙwarewarsa ta musamman a matsayin mai gudanarwa. Bugu da ƙari, baya ga nasarorin kimiyya, Newton ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga nazarin tauhidi da alchemy. Ya fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki, ya yi nazarin annabce-annabce na dā, kuma ya nemi gano ainihin abubuwa da asirin sararin samaniya ta hanyar alchemy. Waɗannan ayyukan sun nuna gefensa na asiri wanda ya bambanta da hotonsa na masanin kimiyya mai hankali. Ya rayu shi kaɗai har tsawon rayuwarsa kuma an bayyana shi a matsayin mai rashin son jama'a kuma wani lokacin mai shakku, amma rayuwarsa ta sadaukar da kanta ga neman gaskiya a cikin kaɗaici, wanda kuma shine tushen manyan nasarorinsa.

Gadon kimiyya na Newton ya zama tushen kimiyyar lissafi ta zamani, kuma dokokinsa na motsi da dokar jawo juna ta duniya har yanzu sune manyan ka'idoji da ake amfani da su a fannoni daban-daban kamar binciken sararin samaniya, ƙirar injiniya, da kimiyyar motsin taurari. Littafinsa "Principia" ya gabatar da hanyoyin kimiyya da tsaurin lissafi, yana tasiri sosai ga masana kimiyya na gaba kuma yana samar da muhimmin tushe don ci gaban tunanin Haskakawa. Newton ya bar magana mai tawali'u cewa, "Idan na ga nesa fiye da wasu, hakan ya faru ne saboda na tsaya a kan kafadun manyan mutane," amma a gaskiya, shi da kansa wani babban mutum ne wanda ya canza yadda ɗan adam ke fahimtar duniya. Sunansa ya kasance alama ce ta binciken kimiyya da tunani mai ma'ana, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana kimiyya da masu tunani marasa adadi har yau. Nasarorin Newton sun cancanci a kwatanta su da na sauran manyan masu hankali na zamaninsa, domin ya gaji binciken hankali na masu falsafa na baya kamar René Descartes kuma ya haɗa su da hanyar gwaji ta Galileo Galilei don buɗe sabbin hanyoyi ga kimiyya ta zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Isaac Newton ya kasance masanin lissafi, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, da masanin taurari na Ingila na ƙarshen ƙarni na 17 da farkon ƙarni na 18, wanda ya kafa dokar jawo juna ta duniya da lissafin calculus, yana kafa tushen kimiyya ta zamani.
key_achievements: Ya gano kuma ya kafa Dokar Jawo Juna ta Duniya.
Ya ƙirƙiro Lissafin Calculus da kansa.
Ya rubuta "Principia" kuma ya kafa kimiyyar motsi ta gargajiya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idodinsa sun zama tushen kimiyyar lissafi ta zamani da injiniyanci, kuma sun kasance alama ce ta hanyoyin kimiyya da tunani mai ma'ana.

parsed.narrative:
Galileo Galilei (1564-1642) ya kasance wani tauraron dan Adam, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, injiniya, kuma mai ilimi daban-daban daga Italiya, wanda ya yi aiki a ƙarshen Renaissance da farkon juyin juya halin kimiyya. An haife shi a Pisa, Italiya, a shekara ta 1564, ya girma yana gadon tunanin lissafi da ruhun bincike mai zurfi daga mahaifinsa, Vincenzo Galilei, wanda ya kasance mawaki. A wancan lokacin, Turai tana ƙarƙashin rinjayen ra'ayin Aristotle da Ptolemy game da sararin samaniya, wato, ra'ayin cewa Duniya ita ce cibiyar sararin samaniya (geocentric model), kuma wannan yana da alaƙa sosai da koyarwar Cocin Roman Katolika. Matashin Galileo ya yi karatun likitanci a Jami'ar Pisa, amma ya canza alkiblar karatunsa saboda ya fi sha'awar lissafi da falsafar halitta. Ya sadaukar da kansa ga lura da duniya da binciken ka'idodin lissafi da ke ɓoye a cikinta, wanda daga baya ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani. Musamman ma, ya ba da gudummawa ga binciken kimiyyar lissafi na farko, kamar gano isochronism na pendulum, wanda ya nuna farkon sabon zamani.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Galileo ya faru ne a shekara ta 1609, lokacin da ya ji labarin na'urar hangen nesa da aka ƙirƙira a Netherlands, kuma ya inganta ta da kansa don amfani da ita wajen lura da taurari. Ya inganta aikin na'urar hangen nesa sosai, yana fara bayyana sirrin sararin samaniya waɗanda ba za a iya gani da ido ba. Abubuwan da ya lura sun haifar da sakamako mai ban mamaki wanda ya kalubalanci ra'ayin geocentric da ke mamaye a lokacin. Ya gano tauraron dan adam huɗu da ke kewaye da Jupiter (tauraron dan adam na Galileo), yana tabbatar da cewa akwai tauraron dan adam da ke kewaye da wasu taurari ban da Duniya. Kuma ta hanyar lura da cewa Venus tana fuskantar canje-canje na matakai kamar wata, ya goyi bayan ra'ayin Copernicus na heliocentric (cewa Venus tana kewaye da Rana) da ƙarfi. Bugu da ƙari, ya gano ramuka da tsaunuka a saman wata, yana nuna cewa wata ba cikakkiyar siffa ba ce, sabanin da'awar Aristotle cewa wata cikakkiyar siffa ce. Waɗannan binciken ba kawai sun faɗaɗa ilimin taurari ba ne, amma sun kasance masu juyin juya hali saboda sun kafa tushen hanyar kimiyya ta zamani don fahimtar abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi ta hanyar lura da gwaji.

Binciken Galileo mai juyin juya hali da goyon bayansa ga ra'ayin heliocentric sun haifar da mummunar rikici da Cocin Roman Katolika. A shekara ta 1616, Cocin ta ayyana ra'ayin heliocentric na Copernicus a matsayin bidi'a kuma ta gargadi Galileo kada ya koyar ko ya goyi bayansa. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 1632, ya sake goyon bayan ra'ayin heliocentric ta hanyar buga littafinsa mai suna “Tattaunawa Game da Manyan Tsarin Duniya Biyu,” wanda ya kwatanta ra'ayin heliocentric da geocentric a cikin tsarin tattaunawa. Saboda wannan, an kira shi zuwa Kotun Bincike ta Roman Katolika a shekara ta 1633, kuma an tilasta masa ya janye da'awarsa a ƙarƙashin matsin lamba mai tsanani. An yanke masa hukunci a kotun bincike kuma ya shafe sauran rayuwarsa a tsare a gida. Amma duk da waɗannan matsalolin, Galileo bai rasa sha'awar karatunsa ba. Ya ci gaba da bincike kan ka'idodin motsi yayin da yake tsare a gida, kuma a shekara ta 1638, ya buga littafinsa mai suna “Tattaunawa da Hujjojin Lissafi Game da Sabbin Kimiyya Biyu.” Wannan littafi, wanda ya kafa tushen kimiyyar lissafi ta zamani kamar motsin faɗuwa da motsin parabolic, ya yi tasiri sosai ga binciken injiniyanci na Isaac Newton. Matsalolinsa sun nuna wahalar da gaskiyar kimiyya ta fuskanta lokacin da ta kalubalanci ikon addini.

Galileo Galilei ya rasu a shekara ta 1642, amma gadonsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin kimiyya na ɗan adam. Ya kafa hanyar kimiyya ta zamani don binciken abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi ta hanyar lura, gwaji, da nazarin lissafi, kuma wannan shine dalilin da ya sa ake kiransa 'Uban Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyya' da 'Uban Kimiyya ta Zamani'. Binciken taurarinsa ya faɗaɗa hangen nesa na ɗan adam game da sararin samaniya, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yaɗa ka'idar Copernican cewa Duniya ba cibiyar musamman ba ce a sararin samaniya. Bugu da ƙari, binciken kimiyyar lissafinsa ya zama tushen injiniyanci na Newton, wanda ya jagoranci ci gaban kimiyya tsawon ƙarnuka masu zuwa. Rayuwar Galileo ta kasance misali mai ma'ana na rikici da iko a cikin neman gaskiyar kimiyya, kuma tana tunatar da mu muhimmancin binciken ilimi mai 'yanci. Ruhunsa har yau yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga bincike a duk fannonin kimiyya, kuma kamar yadda masana falsafa irin su René Descartes suka jaddada tunani mai ma'ana a zamaninsa, Galileo ya jaddada muhimmancin shaidar gwaji, yana barin babban alama a tarihin tunanin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Galileo Galilei ya kasance masanin taurari da kimiyyar lissafi daga Italiya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 17, wanda ya kafa lura da na'urar hangen nesa da hanyar kimiyya ta zamani.
key_achievements: Inganta na'urar hangen nesa da sabunta lura da taurari
Gabatarwa da goyon bayan shaidar heliocentrism
Kafa tushen kimiyyar lissafi ta zamani (ka'idodin motsi)
