fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa uban kimiyya ta zamani kuma ya kafa tunanin kimiyya bisa lura da gwaji.

parsed.narrative:
Charles Darwin (1809-1882) ya kasance wani masanin halittu kuma masanin kimiyyar halittu na ƙarni na 19 daga Biritaniya, wanda ya kafa ka'idar juyin halitta ta hanyar zaɓin halitta, wata ka'ida mai juyin juya hali da ta bayyana bambancin rayuwa da tsarin juyin halitta, wanda ya canza tunanin duniya na ɗan adam gaba ɗaya. An haife shi a ranar 12 ga Fabrairu, 1809, a Shrewsbury, Biritaniya, cikin dangi masu arziki na likitoci, kuma tun yana yaro ya nuna sha'awar yanayi mai zurfi. Maimakon karatun makaranta, ya fi son yawo a cikin dazuzzuka da filaye, yana tattara kwari da lura da abubuwan da suka shafi ilimin ƙasa, wanda ya zama tushen bincikensa na kimiyya a nan gaba. Ya fara karatun likitanci a Jami'ar Edinburgh amma ya bar shi saboda ƙin yarda da aikin binciken gawa, sannan ya yi karatun tauhidi a Jami'ar Cambridge, yana shirin zama fasto. Duk da haka, a wannan lokacin ma, ta hanyar hulɗa da Farfesa John Stevens Henslow, masanin ilimin tsirrai, ya ci gaba da sha'awarsa ga tarihin halitta, wanda ya zama dalili mai mahimmanci na shigarsa jirgin ruwa na HMS Beagle a watan Disamba na 1831 don shiga cikin balaguron duniya na shekaru biyar. Wannan balaguron ya yi tasiri sosai a rayuwarsa da tunaninsa na kimiyya.

Balaguron jirgin ruwa na Beagle ya kasance wani muhimmin lokaci da ya tsara tunanin kimiyya na Charles Darwin. Ya lura da dabbobi da tsirrai marasa adadi a bakin tekun Kudancin Amurka, musamman a tsibirin Galapagos, wanda ya sa ya yi tambayoyi masu zurfi game da rarraba da bambancin nau'ikan halittu. Gano cewa tsuntsayen finch na kowane tsibiri suna nuna bambance-bambance masu laushi a cikin siffar bakinsu kuma sun dace da abinci daban-daban ya zama muhimmiyar alama da ta sa ya fahimci ra'ayin 'juyin halitta' a hankali, cewa nau'ikan halittu suna canzawa a hankali don dacewa da muhallinsu. Bayan balaguron, Darwin ya shafe shekaru da yawa yana bincike, yana amfani da tarin samfurori da rubuce-rubuce masu yawa da ya tattara. Ya sami wahayi daga ka'idar yawan jama'a ta Thomas Malthus, ya haɗa ra'ayin gwagwarmayar rayuwa cikin ka'idar juyin halitta, kuma a kusan 1838, ya tsara babban ka'idar 'zaɓin halitta'. Zaɓin halitta shine ka'idar cewa halittu masu dacewa da muhallinsu suna rayuwa, suna haifuwa, kuma suna isar da halayensu ga tsararraki na gaba, ta haka ne nau'ikan halittu ke canzawa a hankali. Ya gyara wannan ra'ayi mai juyin juya hali a hankali, yana tattara shaidu, kuma a ranar 24 ga Nuwamba, 1859, a ƙarshe ya buga babban aikinsa, *Asalin Nau'ikan Halittu*, wanda ya haifar da babban tashin hankali a duniya.

Buga littafin *Asalin Nau'ikan Halittu* ya haifar da cece-kuce mai yawa da suka mai tsanani ba kawai a cikin al'ummar kimiyya ba har ma a cikin addini da al'umma gaba ɗaya. A lokacin, al'ummar Yammacin Turai tana da ra'ayin cewa Allah ne ya halicci rayuwa, don haka, an ɗauki ka'idar juyin halitta ta Darwin a matsayin wadda ke musanta matsayi na musamman na ɗan adam kuma tana barazana ga wanzuwar Allah. Ya kasance a tsakiyar muhawara ta jama'a, kamar muhawarar Oxford, kuma ya fuskanci zargi da ba'a da yawa. Baya ga waɗannan matsalolin na waje, Darwin ya sha wahala daga cututtuka na yau da kullun marasa sanadi a duk rayuwarsa, kuma ya jimre da wahalhalu na ciki, kamar bala'in mutuwar 'yarsa ƙaunatacciya, Annie, a 1851. Duk da haka, bai taɓa yin watsi da bincikensa da imaninsa ba a cikin waɗannan matsalolin. Ya tattara ƙarin shaidu don fuskantar suka, kuma ya ƙarfafa ka'idarsa ta hanyar faɗaɗa juyin halitta zuwa ga ɗan adam a cikin littattafansa na gaba, kamar *Asalin Mutum da Zaɓin Jima'i* (1871). Bincikensa mai dorewa da jajircewarsa a hankali sun sami goyon bayan masana kimiyya da yawa, kuma sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen sanya juyin halitta ya zama babban ka'idar ilimin halittu na zamani.

Gadon Charles Darwin shine tushen duk ilimin kimiyyar rayuwa na zamani a yau. Ka'idarsa ta juyin halitta ta yi tasiri mai juyin juya hali a fannoni daban-daban kamar ilimin halittu, ilimin kwayoyin halitta, da ilimin muhalli, kuma tana ba da tsari mai mahimmanci don fahimtar bambancin da rikitarwa na rayuwa. Darwin ya canza yadda ɗan adam ke kallon kansa da yanayi gaba ɗaya ta hanyar tabbatar da kimiyya cewa ɗan adam reshe ne na babban bishiyar rayuwa ta yanayi. Ko bayan mutuwarsa, ka'idar juyin halitta ta zama mafi inganci tare da ci gaban ilimin kwayoyin halitta, kuma ta ci gaba zuwa ga Haɗin Zamani (Modern Synthesis), inda ta zama ka'idar mafi ƙarfi da ke bayyana abubuwan rayuwa. Rayuwar Darwin ta nuna misalin masanin kimiyya wanda ke neman gaskiya ta hanyar gaskiya da shaidu kawai, ba tare da nuna bambanci ba. Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai a cikin masana na zamaninsa, ana kwatanta su da aikin Herbert Spencer, wanda ya tattauna juyin halitta na zamantakewa, ko Gregor Mendel, wanda ya kafa tushen ilimin kwayoyin halitta. Sunansa zai kasance har abada a matsayin alamar juyin halitta, yana ba da wahayi ga duk waɗanda ke binciken rayuwa marar ganuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Charles Darwin ya kasance masanin halittu kuma masanin kimiyyar halittu na Biritaniya a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya kafa ka'idar juyin halitta ta hanyar zaɓin halitta, wanda ya jagoranci juyin juya hali a ilimin halittu.
key_achievements: Lura da bambancin halittu ta hanyar balaguron Beagle
Buga littafin *Asalin Nau'ikan Halittu* da kafa ka'idar juyin halitta
Sabunta fahimtar rayuwa ta hanyar ra'ayin zaɓin halitta
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idarsa ta juyin halitta ita ce tushen ilimin halittu na zamani kuma tana ba da tsari mai mahimmanci don binciken kimiyyar rayuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Michelangelo Buonarroti an haife shi a shekara ta 1475 a Italiya, cikin wata iyali mai daraja amma talauci. Yarintarsa ta kasance lokaci na juriya, inda ya yi ta sassaƙa duwatsu shi kaɗai, a ƙarƙashin dukan uba da adawa, wanda ya ɗauki aikin sassaƙa a matsayin wani abu marar daraja. Ya girma a ƙarƙashin wani mai sassaƙa dutse, mijin mai shayar da shi, har ya ce "Madarar da na sha tana da gawayin marmara a ciki," yana nuna cewa ya karɓi sassaƙa a matsayin ƙaddararsa. Ya ɗauki guduma da sassaƙa, yana ɗauke da babban burin 'yantar da rayukan da ke cikin duwatsu.

Babban ci gaban Michelangelo ya kasance aikin da ya fi na ɗan adam, wanda ake kira 'Hannun Allah,' da kuma ruhin fasaharsa. A lokacin da yake ɗan shekara ashirin, ya sassaƙa 'Pietà' da 'David,' wanda ya ba duniya mamaki. Musamman ma, lokacin da yake zana rufin Cocin Sistine (Halittar Duniya), ya ci gaba da aiki tsawon shekaru huɗu, yana jingina kansa baya, yana fuskantar zane-zane, wanda ya haifar masa da ciwon wuya da idanu. Ba kawai mai zane ba ne wanda ke ƙirƙirar ayyuka, amma wani babban mutum ne na zamaninsa wanda ya ɗaukaka wahala zuwa fasaha, yana ƙoƙarin bayyana asirin sama a duniya.

A tsayin rayuwarsa, ya sami yabo mai yawa, amma ya rayu cikin tawali'u duk rayuwarsa, yana mai da hankali kan aikinsa kawai. Ya kira kansa koyaushe 'mai fasaha mara isasshe,' kuma bai taɓa ajiye gudumarsa ba har zuwa lokacin da ya rasu yana ɗan shekara 89. Ya bar kalmar "Har yanzu ina koyo," yana ci gaba da neman kamala. Ya kasance mai gwagwarmaya mai kaɗaici wanda ya karya iyakokin jiki da ƙarfin hali na tunani, kuma ya nuna da kansa inda kololuwar kyau da ɗan adam zai iya kaiwa.

Gadon da Michelangelo ya bari yana ci gaba da haskakawa a yau a matsayin babban taska na wayewar ɗan adam. Ya bar koyarwar cewa "Babban haɗari ba shine saita burin da ya yi yawa ba har ka kasa cimma shi, amma saita burin da ya yi ƙasa har ka cimma shi." Rayuwar Michelangelo ta kasance babban labari na ɗaukaka wanda aka ƙirƙira ta hanyar gwagwarmaya, kuma ya koya mana cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda ke sassaƙa ruhinsa don sanya duniya ta zama kyakkyawa. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin mai sassaƙa na allahntaka, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke ƙalubalantar iyakokinsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani babban mutum na zamanin Renaissance wanda aka haifa a cikin iyali mai daraja amma talauci, ya sadaukar da kansa ga sassaƙa duk da adawar mahaifinsa, kuma ya bar ayyuka marasa mutuwa.
key_achievements: Sassaƙa 'Pietà' da 'David' a lokacin da yake ɗan shekara ashirin
Kammala zanen rufin Cocin Sistine, 'Halittar Duniya'
Buɗe sabon matsayi na fasaha ta hanyar neman kamala ba tare da tsayawa ba
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun kasance babban taska na wayewar ɗan adam, suna ba da kwarin gwiwa na har abada ga duk waɗanda ke ƙalubalantar iyakokinsu.

parsed.narrative:
Claude Monet (an haife shi a shekarar 1840) mai zane ne wanda aka haifa a tsakiyar karni na 19 a Faransa, kuma ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin wanda ya kafa Impressionism da kuma babban majagaba na fasahar zamani. A wancan lokacin, duniyar fasaha ta Faransa tana da ra'ayin mazan jiya sosai, inda makarantun fasaha da salons ke jagoranta, kuma ana daraja zanen tarihi ko na tatsuniyoyi sosai, tare da buƙatar dabarun zane masu tsauri. An haifi Monet a ranar 14 ga Nuwamba, 1840, a Paris, amma ya shafe yawancin yarintarsa a Le Havre, birnin bakin teku a Normandy. Tun da wuri ya nuna baiwa a zane, kuma ya fara samun suna a yankin musamman ta hanyar zane-zanen ban dariya (caricatures) masu ban sha'awa. A ƙarshen shekarunsa na samartaka, ya sadu da mai zane na yankin, Eugène Boudin, kuma ya fara koyon dabarar "plein air" (wato, zane a waje kai tsaye). Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a tafarkin fasaharsa, inda ya bar hanyar gargajiya ta zana shimfiɗar wuri mai kyau a cikin ɗakin aiki, don kama haske da launuka na yanayi a lokacin. A ƙarƙashin tasirin Boudin, Monet ya kamu da sha'awar lura da yanayi da kuma canje-canjensa masu ban mamaki a kan zane.

A farkon shekarun 1860s, Monet ya koma Paris kuma ya sadu da abokan aikinsa na Impressionism na gaba, kamar Pierre-Auguste Renoir, Alfred Sisley, da Frédéric Bazille, a ɗakin aikin Charles Gleyre. Waɗannan masu fasaha sun nuna rashin gamsuwarsu da ƙa'idodin tantancewa na salon masu ra'ayin mazan jiya da kuma hanyoyin zane na gargajiya na wancan lokacin, kuma suka fara neman sabuwar fasaha. Musamman ma, Monet ya mai da hankali kan kama tasirin haske da launuka na lokaci-lokaci, yana so ya nuna yanayin iska mai canzawa kowane lokaci maimakon siffofin abubuwa masu tsayayye. Wannan imani na fasaha ya tabbata a shekarar 1874, lokacin da shi da sauran masu fasaha masu ra'ayi ɗaya suka shirya 'Nunin Impressionist na Farko' a ɗakin aikin mai ɗaukar hoto Nadar a Paris. Ɗaya daga cikin ayyukan da Monet ya nuna a wannan nunin, "Impression, Sunrise", ya zama sanadin ƙirƙirar kalmar "Impressionism" ta mai sukar fasaha Louis Leroy. Impressionism ta kasance sabon salo na zane wanda ya samo asali daga falsafar bayyana fahimtar mutum game da yanayi, musamman ma a cikin zanen shimfiɗar wuri na waje, inda ake nuna yanayin iska ta hanyar canjin haske da mu'amalar launuka.

A matsayin majagaba na motsin Impressionism, rayuwar Monet a farkon ta cika da matsalolin kuɗi da gwagwarmayar rayuwa. Musamman ma, mutuwar matarsa ta farko, Camille Doncieux, a shekarar 1879, ta jefa shi cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi, amma ya yi ƙoƙari ya shawo kan hakan ta hanyar sha'awarsa ga fasaha. A shekarar 1883, Monet ya zauna a Giverny, Faransa, kuma ya fara kula da lambunsa, wanda ya zama tushen ilhamarsa ta fasaha da kuma babban wuri na ayyukansa na baya. Ya haɓaka dabarar "zane-zane jerin" (series painting), inda yake zana abu ɗaya akai-akai a lokuta daban-daban da kuma ƙarƙashin haske daban-daban. Jerin ayyukan "Haystacks", "Rouen Cathedral", da kuma musamman jerin "Water Lilies" manyan ayyuka ne waɗanda suka nuna gudun lokaci a kan zane, suna binciken tasirin canjin haske da yanayi a kan abubuwa. A ƙarshen rayuwarsa, ya sha wahala yayin da hangen nesansa ya fara raguwa saboda cataract, amma bai ajiye burushinsa ba. Duk da cewa bai dawo da cikakken hangen nesa ba bayan tiyata, ya ci gaba da ƙona ruhin fasaharsa, yana kammala manyan ayyukan "Water Lilies" bisa zurfin fahimtarsa da tunawa da launuka.

Claude Monet ana tunawa da shi a matsayin babban mai fasaha wanda ya nuna ainihin Impressionism kuma ya faɗaɗa iyakokin fasahar zamani. Ya yi tasiri mai girma ga masu fasaha na gaba ta hanyar kama kyawun yanayi na lokaci-lokaci da kuma gabatar da sabuwar hanya ta isar da gogewa ta hankali ta hanyar haske da launuka. Ayyukansa sun wuce kawai sake haifar da shimfiɗar wuri; suna ba da nutsuwa da ke sa mai kallo ya ji canje-canje masu laushi na haske da yanayi kai tsaye. Musamman ma, jerin "Water Lilies" waɗanda aka haifa a lambun Giverny suna nuna kololuwar bincikensa na fasaha, kuma suna da zurfin da za a iya fassara su a matsayin farkon nau'in fasahar abstraction. Gadon Monet ya zama tushen motsin fasahar zamani daban-daban a farkon karni na 20, kamar Post-Impressionism, Fauvism, da Cubism, kuma har yau yana ci gaba da ba da ilhami ga masoya fasaha a duk duniya. Sha'awarsa ga haske da 'yancin bayyana launuka suna ba da muhimmiyar mahanga don fahimtar ci gaban fasahar zamani, idan aka kwatanta da ayyukan sauran masu zane-zane masu kirkire-kirkire na zamaninsa kamar Vincent van Gogh ko Paul Cézanne.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Claude Monet mai zane ne na Faransa na karni na 19, wanda ya kafa Impressionism kuma ya faɗaɗa iyakokin fasahar zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa da jagorantar motsin Impressionism
Ba da suna ga Impressionism ta hanyar "Impression, Sunrise"
Kafa dabarar zane-zane jerin da ke nuna canjin haske da lokaci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa muhimmin tushe ga fasahar zamani ta hanyar kama haske da launuka na yanayi a lokaci-lokaci.

parsed.narrative:
Fedor Dostoevsky (1821-1881) ya kasance babban marubuci, masanin falsafa, marubucin gajerun labarai, marubucin kasidu, kuma ɗan jarida na ƙarni na 19 a Rasha. An haife shi a Moscow a shekara ta 1821, ɗan wani likita a asibitin talakawa, ya yi kuruciyarsa a cikin yanayin siyasa, zamantakewa, da ruhaniya mai cike da tashin hankali na ƙarni na 19 a Rasha. A wancan lokacin, Rasha tana cike da rikice-rikicen zamantakewa game da kawar da bauta da kuma rudani na hankali sakamakon shigar da tunanin Yamma, kuma wannan yanayin tarihi ya yi tasiri sosai a kan duniyar ayyukansa. Tun yana yaro, ya shaida wahalar ɗan adam da rashin daidaito, wanda ya sa ya zurfafa cikin tunani, kuma wannan ya zama iri na bincikensa game da zurfin zuciyar ɗan adam wanda ya bayyana a cikin ayyukansa na gaba. Ko da yake ya yi karatu a makarantar injiniyan soja, sha'awarsa ta adabi ta sa ya zaɓi hanyar marubuci da wuri, kuma ya shahara a fagen adabi a shekara ta 1846 lokacin da ya buga littafinsa na farko, *Talakawa*. Wannan aikin ya ba da sabon girgiza ga duniyar adabin Rasha a wancan lokacin kuma ya zama dalilin da aka gane basirarsa.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Fedor Dostoevsky ya zo a shekara ta 1849. An kama shi kuma aka yanke masa hukuncin kisa saboda shiga cikin Petrashevsky Circle, wata ƙungiyar masu ilimi masu ci gaba waɗanda ke tattauna gyare-gyare a cikin al'ummar Rasha a wancan lokacin. Kafin a kashe shi, ya fuskanci wani abin mamaki inda aka rage masa hukuncin zuwa gudun hijira a Siberia ta hanyar afuwar sarki. Abin da ake kira 'kisan gilla' ya bar alama mai zurfi a cikin tunaninsa kuma ya canza ra'ayinsa game da rayuwa da mutuwa, zunubi da ceto. Daga baya ya sha wahala aikin tilas na tsawon shekaru huɗu a gudun hijira a Omsk, kuma a wannan lokacin, ya yi hulɗa da mutane daban-daban, wanda ya ba shi damar lura da zurfin yanayin ɗan adam. Rayuwar gudun hijira ta kawo masa wahala ta jiki da ta hankali, amma a lokaci guda, ta ba shi zurfin fahimta game da rikitarwa na ruhin ɗan adam da mahimmancin imani. Wannan kwarewa ta zama tushen manyan ayyukansa na baya, musamman waɗanda ke magana game da wahalar ɗan adam da matsalolin ɗabi'a.

Bayan dawowarsa daga gudun hijira a Siberia a shekara ta 1859, Fedor Dostoevsky ya ci gaba da gwagwarmayar adabi duk da matsalolin kansa marasa iyaka. Ya yi yaƙi da gaskiyar mai raɗaɗi na talauci na dindindin, mummunar jarabar caca, da kuma ciwon farfadiya wanda ya addabe shi tsawon rayuwarsa. Amma waɗannan matsalolin, a wata hanya mai ban mamaki, sun sa duniyar ayyukansa ta zama mai zurfi da wadata. Ya ɗaukaka wahalarsa da damuwarsa zuwa ga wahayi na fasaha, yana bincika batutuwan laifi, 'yancin zaɓi, wahala, da ceto waɗanda ke zaune a cikin zurfin zuciyar ɗan adam. Littafin *Notes from Underground*, wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1864, an ɗauke shi ɗaya daga cikin ayyukan farko na adabin existentialist, yana nuna zurfin fahimtarsa game da keɓewar ɗan adam da rashin hankali. Daga baya, manyan ayyukansa kamar *Laifi da Hukunci* (1866), *Mai Hankali* (1869), *Aljanu* (1872), da *Matashi* (1875) an buga su a jere, kuma waɗannan ayyukan sun zama manyan ayyuka a tarihin adabin duniya, suna nuna rikitarwa na tunanin ɗan adam da rikice-rikicen ɗabi'a a kan yanayin zamantakewa mai cike da rudani na ƙarni na 19 a Rasha.

Fedor Dostoevsky ya kai kololuwar adabi a shekara ta 1880 lokacin da ya kammala *’Yan’uwan Karamazov*, wanda ake ɗauka a matsayin babban aikinsa na ƙarshe kuma mafi girma. Wannan aikin ya ƙunshi zurfin bincike game da tambayoyin asali na wanzuwar ɗan adam, wato, wanzuwar Allah, nagarta da mugunta, 'yanci da alhaki, da ceto. Ayyukansa ba kawai suna ba da labarai ba ne, amma suna da ikon sa masu karatu su yi zurfin tunani game da yanayin ɗan adam da matsalolin ɗabi'a. Bayan mutuwarsa a shekara ta 1881, gadon adabin Fedor Dostoevsky ya bazu a duk faɗin duniya, kuma an ɗaukaka shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan marubuta a tarihin adabin Rasha da na duniya. Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai a fannin ilimin halin ɗan adam na zamani, falsafa, da tauhidi, kuma musamman sun ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban falsafar existentialist. Har zuwa yau, littattafansa sun kasance dole ne a karanta ga duk waɗanda ke neman fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam da rikitarwa na rai, kuma ana ɗauke shi a matsayin babban malami wanda, tare da Tolstoy, ke wakiltar zamanin zinariya na adabin Rasha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Fedor Dostoevsky marubuci ne kuma masanin tunani na ƙarni na 19 a Rasha, wanda ya bar manyan ayyuka waɗanda suka bincika zurfin zuciyar ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar manyan ayyuka bayan kwarewar gudun hijira a Siberia
Rubuta *Laifi da Hukunci*, *’Yan’uwan Karamazov*, da sauransu
Yin rawar jagoranci a adabin existentialist
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan adabi na zamani, falsafa, da ilimin halin ɗan adam, kuma suna sa ɗan adam ya yi tunani game da zurfin zuciyarsa.

parsed.narrative:
Victor-Marie Hugo, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1802, marubuci ne na Faransa mai ra'ayin soyayya (Romanticist), mawaki, marubucin wasan kwaikwayo, ɗan jarida, mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin ɗan adam, kuma ɗan siyasa. Haihuwarsa ta zo ne a lokacin da tashin hankalin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa da zamanin Napoleon bai lafa ba tukuna, kuma wannan yanayin tarihi ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan adabinsa da tunaninsa. Yana yaro, ya yi kaura zuwa sassa daban-daban na Turai, kamar Italiya da Spain, yana bin mahaifinsa wanda jami'i ne a sojojin Napoleon, inda ya fuskanci al'adu da yanayin zamantakewa daban-daban. Musamman ma, ya sami ilimin gargajiya a Paris, amma a hankali ya kamu da sha'awar sabon ra'ayin da ke mamaye duniyar adabi ta Turai a lokacin, wato Romanticism. Romanticism wani salon adabi da fasaha ne wanda ke ba da fifiko ga ji, tunani, da keɓantawa, ba tare da an ɗaure shi da hankali da tsari ba, kuma Victor Hugo ya zama jagora kuma ginshiki na wannan motsi. Tun yana saurayi, ya nuna basira mai ban mamaki a rubutun waƙoƙi da wasan kwaikwayo, kuma tun daga farkon shekarun 1820, ya fara jawo hankalin duniya adabi ta hanyar buga tarin waƙoƙi da yawa. Ayyukansa na farko sun nuna halaye na gargajiya, amma ba da daɗewa ba ya bayyana burinsa na buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a adabin Faransa ta hanyar ɗaukar tutar Romanticism.

Juyin juya halin adabi da tunani na Victor Hugo ya bayyana sarai a farkon wasan kwaikwayonsa na "Hernani" a shekara ta 1830. Wannan aiki ya karya ƙa'idodin wasan kwaikwayo na gargajiya masu tsauri, yana nuna tsari mai 'yanci da ji mai ƙarfi, wanda ya haifar da 'Yaƙin Hernani' wanda ya girgiza duniyar adabi a lokacin, kuma ya zama wani alamar nasara mai girma ga Romanticism. Bayan haka, ya samu karbuwa a idon jama'a ta hanyar littafinsa "Notre-Dame de Paris" (1831), inda ya zana rayuwar Paris ta tsakiya da kuma mummunan kaddarar ɗan adam. Yayin da yake gina sunansa a fannin adabi, Victor Hugo ya fara zurfafa tunani a kan matsalolin zamantakewa. Ya jagoranci motsi na soke hukuncin kisa da ƙarfi, kuma ya wakilci muryoyin marasa galihu ta hanyar haɗa ra'ayoyinsa masu sukar talauci da rashin daidaito a cikin ayyukansa. Bayan Juyin Juya Halin Fabrairu na 1848, ya yi aiki a matsayin ɗan siyasa yana kare ra'ayin jamhuriya, amma a shekara ta 1851, lokacin da Louis Napoleon Bonaparte (Napoleon III) ya yi juyin mulki kuma ya kafa Daular Faransa ta Biyu, Victor Hugo ya yi tir da kakkausar murya ga mulkinsa na kama-karya. Wannan ya haifar da wani babban juyi a rayuwarsa, inda ya bar ƙasarsa ta Faransa don yin gudun hijira.

Rayuwar gudun hijira ta Victor Hugo, wacce ta yi adawa da mulkin kama-karya na Napoleon III, ta ci gaba daga 1851 zuwa 1870, kusan shekaru 19. Da farko ya koma Brussels a Belgium, sannan ya koma tsibirin Jersey da Guernsey a Tekun Ingila, yana rayuwa a matsayin ɗan gudun hijira. Wannan lokaci ya kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje da wahalhalu na kansa a gare shi, amma a lokaci guda kuma, lokaci ne da basirarsa ta adabi ta kai kololuwa. A gudun hijira, ya kunna wutar adawa ta hanyar buga tarin waƙoƙin zargi mai suna "Les Châtiments" (1853) wanda ke sukar Napoleon III, kuma ya buga babban aikinsa "Les Misérables" a shekara ta 1862, wanda ke magana kan wahalar ɗan adam ta duniya da adalcin zamantakewa. "Les Misérables" wani labari ne mai girma da faɗi wanda ke bayyana fuskoki daban-daban na rayuwar ɗan adam kamar talauci, laifuka, ceto, da soyayya, a kan yanayin zamantakewa bayan Juyin Juya Halin Faransa, kuma ya taɓa zukatan masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya kuma ya yi tasiri mai zurfi. Bugu da ƙari, ya ci gaba da gwagwarmayar adabi ta hanyar rubuta manyan ayyuka da yawa, ciki har da tarin waƙoƙin falsafa "La Légende des siècles" (1859-1883). Duk da bala'o'in da ya fuskanta na mutuwar 'yarsa ƙaunatacciya Léopoldine ta nutse (1843) da mutuwar sauran 'ya'yansa, bai rasa imaninsa ba kuma bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba, yana riƙe da imani ga mutuncin ɗan adam da 'yanci.

A shekara ta 1870, lokacin da Daular Faransa ta Biyu ta rushe kuma aka kafa jamhuriya, Victor Hugo ya dawo ƙasarsa kuma an tarbe shi a matsayin gwarzon ƙasa. Bayan haka, ya ci gaba da shiga siyasa, yana aiki a matsayin sanata kuma bai taɓa daina ƙoƙari ba don gyaran zamantakewa da haɓaka haƙƙin ɗan adam. A ranar 22 ga Mayu, 1885, lokacin da ya rasu yana da shekaru 83, fiye da mutane miliyan biyu suka taru a jana'izarsa, suna nuna girmamawa da baƙin ciki mai zurfi na al'ummar Faransa. An binne gawarsa a Panthéon, inda manyan mutanen Faransa ke hutawa har abada. Gadon da Victor Hugo ya bari ya wuce nasarorin adabi kawai. Ya kare mutuncin ɗan adam, adalcin zamantakewa, da ƙimar 'yanci da daidaito, yana isar da saƙon jin kai wanda ya wuce zamani. Ayyukansa har yau ana karanta su a duk faɗin duniya kuma ana sake fassara su ta hanyoyi daban-daban, suna jawo tunani mai zurfi game da ƙimar ɗan adam ta duniya. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa sun zama ginshiki mai muhimmanci a tarihin tunanin Faransa, tare da sawun sauran masu gyaran zamantakewa da masu kirkire-kirkire na adabi na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Victor Hugo marubuci ne na Faransa mai ra'ayin soyayya kuma mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin ɗan adam na ƙarni na 19, wanda ya tabbatar da adalcin zamantakewa ta hanyar manyan ayyuka kamar 'Les Misérables'.
key_achievements: Rubuta manyan ayyuka marasa mutuwa kamar "Les Misérables"
Jagorantar motsi na kare haƙƙin ɗan adam, ciki har da soke hukuncin kisa
Gudun hijira don adawa da mulkin kama-karya na Napoleon III
fact_box.legacy_statement: Adabinsa ya taɓa zukatan masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya kuma yana da tasiri mai girma a kan tunanin haƙƙin ɗan adam.

parsed.narrative:
Anton Chekhov (an haife shi a 1860) shahararren likita ne, marubucin gajerun labarai, kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo a Daular Rasha. A ƙarshen karni na 19, al'ummar Rasha sun ci gaba da fuskantar rikicin aji da hargitsin zamani bayan 'yantar da bayi, kuma a cikin wannan yanayi ne aka haifi Chekhov a ranar 17 ga Janairu, 1860, a cikin iyalin ɗan kasuwa matalauci a Taganrog, kudancin Rasha. Tun yana yaro, ya fuskanci matsalolin tattalin arziki saboda gazawar kasuwancin mahaifinsa, kuma yana da shekaru 16, dole ne ya koyar da ɗalibai kuma ya sami kuɗin makaranta don tallafa wa iyalinsa. Wannan ƙuruciya mai wahala ta ba shi fahimtar baƙin ciki na rayuwar ɗan adam da nauyin rayuwar yau da kullun, wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan ayyukansa na gaba. Ya ci gaba da karatunsa a Jami'ar Moscow, inda ya karanta likitanci, kuma a lokaci guda ya fara rubuta gajerun labarai dare da rana don tallafa wa iyalinsa. Rayuwarsa, wacce ta haɗa da hangen nesa na kimiyya na likitanci da kuma hankalin fasaha na adabi, ta samar da tushe na musamman don bincika abubuwan da suka shafi rayuwar ɗan adam.

Tsakanin rayuwa a matsayin likita da kuma sha'awar zama marubuci, Anton Chekhov ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya kuma ya buɗe hanyarsa ta adabi. Da farko, ya ci gaba da rayuwarsa ta hanyar buga gajerun labarai masu ban dariya ba tare da sunansa ba, amma a hankali ayyukansa sun fara zurfafa cikin tunanin ɗan adam da abubuwan da ba su dace ba a cikin al'umma. Babban ci gaban adabi da ya samu shine 'ƙirƙira gajerun labarai na zamani da wasan kwaikwayo ta hanyar bayanin gaskiya'. Wannan sabon tsarin adabi ne wanda ya bayyana ainihin rayuwa da kaɗaicin ɗan adam ta hanyar tattaunawar yau da kullun na haruffa, canje-canje masu laushi na tunani, da kuma motsin zuciyar da ke ɓoye a cikin shiru, maimakon abubuwan ban mamaki ko tsarin rikici bayyananne. Wasan kwaikwayo 'The Seagull', wanda aka fara gabatarwa a 1896, da farko ya gaza saboda wannan sabon yunkuri kuma masu kallo da masu suka ba su fahimta ba, amma daga baya Stanislavski ya sake kimanta shi kuma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci a tarihin wasan kwaikwayo na zamani. Ta hanyar waɗannan ayyukan, Chekhov ya nuna kansa fiye da mai ba da labari, a matsayin 'likitan ruhi' da ke gano da kuma warkar da ruhin ɗan adam.

Duk da samun shahara a matsayin marubuci, rayuwar Anton Chekhov ta kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje da gwagwarmaya. Ya sha wahala daga cutar tarin fuka tun yana saurayi, wanda ya takaita ayyukansa na kirkire-kirkire da lafiyarsa sosai. Duk da haka, a 1890, ya fara balaguro mai girma zuwa tsibirin Sakhalin a Gabashin Rasha, yana mai haɗarin lafiyarsa. Wannan 'Ziyarar Tsibirin Sakhalin' ba kawai tafiya ba ce, amma ta samo asali ne daga aikin jin kai don bincika da rubuta rayuwar fursunoni da mazauna Sakhalin, wanda a lokacin gidan yari ne na Daular Rasha, da kuma fallasa su ga al'umma. Wannan kwarewar ta sanya zurfin fahimtar zamantakewa da tausayi ga bil'adama a cikin ayyukansa. Daga baya, ya buga manyan ayyuka kamar 'Uncle Vanya', 'Three Sisters', da 'The Cherry Orchard' a jere, yana faɗaɗa hangen nesa na wasan kwaikwayo na zamani. Waɗannan ayyukan sun ƙunshi kyakkyawar baƙin ciki ta Chekhov, wacce ke neman kyau a cikin takaicin ɗan adam, bege, da kuma rashin ma'anar rayuwa, kuma suna nuna gwagwarmayarsa ta ci gaba da ƙona ruhin fasaha duk da tabarbarewar rashin lafiyarsa.

Anton Chekhov ya rasu a ranar 2 ga Yuli, 1904, yana da shekaru 44, amma gadonsa yana tasiri sosai ga adabin duniya da wasan kwaikwayo har yau. 'Bayaninsa na gaskiya' da 'gaskiyar tunani' sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara muhimman abubuwan da suka shafi adabin zamani da wasan kwaikwayo na karni na 20. Maimakon manyan jarumai ko abubuwan ban mamaki, Chekhov ya nuna gaskiya da hankali rayuwar yau da kullun ta talakawa, motsin zuciyar da ke ɓoye a ciki, da kuma kaɗaicin ɗan adam da bege, yana haifar da zurfin tausayi daga masu karatu da masu kallo. Ayyukansa har yanzu ana yin su a duk duniya, an fassara su zuwa harsuna da yawa, kuma suna ba da ilhami mara iyaka ga marubuta da daraktoci na zamani. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin babban mai ba da labari, yana da tasiri mai zurfi ga duk waɗanda ke neman fahimtar kaɗaicin ɗan adam. Ayyukansa sun yi daidai da zurfin fahimtar sauran manyan marubutan Rasha na zamaninsa waɗanda suka bincika kaɗaicin ɗan adam da bege, misali Dostoevsky ko Tolstoy, kuma sun wadatar da duniyar ruhaniya ta bil'adama ta hanyoyi daban-daban.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Anton Chekhov likita ne kuma marubuci a Daular Rasha a ƙarshen karni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci sabbin abubuwa a gajerun labarai na zamani da wasan kwaikwayo.
key_achievements: Ya sabunta gajerun labarai da wasan kwaikwayo ta hanyar bayanin gaskiya.
Ya bincika kuma ya rubuta ainihin halin fursunoni a tsibirin Sakhalin.
Ya zurfafa bincike kan kaɗaicin ɗan adam da rayuwar yau da kullun.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai ga wasan kwaikwayo da adabin Yammacin Turai na karni na 20, kuma sun zama ginshiƙin fasahar zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Frédéric Chopin (1810-1849) ya kasance mawaki ɗan Poland kuma mai kaɗa piano mai fasaha a farkon zamanin Romantic, wanda ya fi rubuta waƙoƙi don piano kaɗai. An haife shi a ranar 1 ga Maris, 1810, a Żelazowa Wola, Duchy of Warsaw, Poland, ga mahaifin Faransa da mahaifiyar Poland, ya nuna baiwar kiɗa ta musamman tun yana yaro. A lokacin, Poland ta kasu kashi-kashi tsakanin Rasha, Prussia, da Austria, kuma wannan yanayin siyasa mara tabbas ya yi tasiri sosai ga asalin ƙasarsa da duniyar kiɗansa. Ya kasance yaro mai hazaka, har ya rubuta Polonaise na farko kuma ya yi wasan kwaikwayo a bainar jama'a yana ɗan shekara bakwai, kuma ya inganta fasaharsa ta kaɗa piano da rubuta waƙoƙi ta hanyar samun ilimin kiɗa na tsari daga Wojciech Żywny da Józef Elsner a Warsaw Conservatory. A wannan lokacin, ya fara gina nasa harshen kiɗa na musamman, yana shanye waƙoƙin gargajiya na Poland da al'adun kiɗa na gargajiya. Ayyukansa na farko sun riga sun nuna waƙoƙinsa da kuma ƙwarewarsa.

Wani muhimmin canji a rayuwar Frédéric Chopin ya zo ne a watan Nuwamba 1830, lokacin da ya bar Poland don tafiya Turai. Yayin da yake Vienna, Ƙasar Poland ta fuskanci tawayen Nuwamba (1830-1831) a kan Rasha, kuma bayan gazawar tawayen, ya zama gudun hijira wanda ba zai iya komawa ƙasarsa ba. Bayan ya zauna a Paris a 1831, ya faɗaɗa hangen nesansa na kiɗa ta hanyar hulɗa da manyan masu fasaha na lokacin, kamar Franz Liszt, Vincenzo Bellini, da Eugène Delacroix, a wannan cibiyar al'adu da fasaha ta Turai. A Paris, ya fi yin wasan kwaikwayo a cikin manyan ɗakunan shakatawa kuma ya sami abin rayuwa ta hanyar koyar da piano, kuma ya sami shahara cikin sauri, ana yaba masa da cewa “hazakarsa ta waƙa ta dogara ne akan fasaha ta musamman wacce ba ta da kamarta a zamaninsa.” A wannan lokacin, ya haɓaka babban buri na ɗaukaka piano daga kayan aiki mai rakiyar zuwa wata hanya mai zaman kanta ta bayyana fasaha.

Duk da nasararsa a Paris, Frédéric Chopin ya rayu cikin rashin lafiya a duk rayuwarsa. Cutar tarin fuka da ya sha fama da ita tun yana yaro ta ci gaba da raunana lafiyarsa, kuma babban sha'awar ƙasarsa ta sa kiɗansa ya cika da baƙin ciki da damuwa. Musamman ma, dangantakarsa mai rikitarwa na shekaru tara da marubuciyar Faransa George Sand ta yi tasiri sosai ga rayuwarsa da fasaharsa. Lokacin sanyi a Mallorca ya ƙara raunana lafiyarsa, amma a lokaci guda ya zama tushen haihuwar wasu daga cikin ayyukansa mafi zurfi. Dangantakarsa da Sand ta ƙare a 1847, wanda ya ƙara masa wahala ta jiki da ta hankali. Duk da waɗannan gwagwarmaya, ya ci gaba da ƙirƙirar ayyuka masu juyin juya hali a fannin waƙoƙin piano kaɗai, kamar Nocturnes, Mazurkas, Polonaises, Ballades, da Etudes, yana kaiwa ga kololuwar kiɗan piano na Romantic. Kiɗansa yana buƙatar fasaha mai zurfi da kuma bayyanar motsin rai, yana haɓaka sautin piano da damar bayyanawa.

Frédéric Chopin ya rasu a Paris a ranar 17 ga Oktoba, 1849, yana da shekaru 39. Ɗaya daga cikin wasiyyarsa ta ƙarshe ita ce a binne zuciyarsa a ƙasarsa ta Poland, wanda ke nuna zurfin ƙauna da haɗin kai ga ƙasarsa wanda ya ratsa duk rayuwarsa. An binne gawarsa a makabartar Père Lachaise da ke Paris, kuma an ajiye zuciyarsa a cocin Holy Cross da ke Warsaw, Poland. Gadonsa ya zama muhimmin repertoire ga duk masu kaɗa piano a yau kuma tushen wahayi na har abada. Ya ɗaukaka kiɗan piano fiye da nuna fasaha kawai zuwa matsayin fasaha wanda ke bayyana mafi kyawun motsin rai na ɗan adam, kuma ana ɗaukar ayyukansa a matsayin mafi tsarkin misali na ruhun zamanin Romantic. Kiɗansa, tare da na Franz Liszt da Robert Schumann waɗanda suka rayu a zamaninsa, yana wakiltar zamanin zinariya na kiɗan piano na Romantic, kuma kowannensu ya faɗaɗa damar piano a hanyoyinsu daban-daban.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Frédéric Chopin ya kasance mawaki ɗan Poland kuma mai kaɗa piano a farkon zamanin Romantic, wanda ya buɗe sabon salo na waƙoƙin piano kaɗai.
key_achievements: Kafa matsayin mai zaman kansa na waƙoƙin piano kaɗai
Rubuta ayyuka da yawa masu ɗauke da ruhun ƙasar Poland
Buɗe sabbin nau'ikan kamar Nocturnes da Ballades
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sune ainihin repertoire na piano a yau kuma ana ƙaunarsu a duk faɗin duniya a matsayin kololuwar kiɗan Romantic.

parsed.narrative:
Katsushika Hokusai (an haife shi a shekara ta 1760) ya kasance fitaccen mai zane na Ukiyo-e kuma mai buga hotuna a zamanin Edo na Japan. A tsakiyar karni na 18, a karkashin mulkin Edo Shogunate, Japan ta kasance lokacin da al'adunta na musamman suka bunƙasa, kuma Edo (yanzu Tokyo) ta kasance cibiyar kasuwanci da fasaha. Ukiyo-e (浮世繪), wanda ya samo asali daga al'adun talakawa, yana nufin 'hotunan duniya mai wucewa', kuma ya kasance nau'in fasaha da ke nuna 'yan wasan Kabuki, kyawawan mata, da al'adun zamani. Hokusai an haife shi a Edo a ranar 31 ga Oktoba, 1760, kuma ya nuna basirar fasaha tun yana yaro, inda ya fara koyon zane a karkashin wani malamin Ukiyo-e tun yana matashi. Da farko, ya koyi salon gargajiya ta hanyar zana hotunan 'yan wasan Kabuki da kyawawan mata, amma yana da babban sha'awar bincika sabuwar duniya ta fasaha fiye da iyakokin da aka saba. A cikin wannan yanayi, Hokusai ya taka rawar gani wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin Ukiyo-e.

Babban juyin juya hali a tafiyar fasahar Hokusai shi ne faɗaɗa batutuwan Ukiyo-e daga hotunan mutane zuwa shimfiɗar wuri, tsirrai, da dabbobi. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka Ukiyo-e daga salon da ya fi mayar da hankali kan hotunan geisha da 'yan wasan kwaikwayo zuwa wani salo mai faɗi. Musamman, jerin bugu na katako "Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji" (富嶽三十六景) da aka fitar tun yana ɗan shekara 70, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin babban aikin da ya tattara duniyar fasaharsa. Daga cikin wannan jerin, "The Great Wave off Kanagawa" (神奈川沖浪裏) shine mafi shahararren aiki a duniya, yana nuna girman yanayi da raunin ɗan adam ta hanyar bambancin lokacin da igiyar ruwa mai girma ke tashi kamar za ta haɗiye jirgin ruwa, da kuma Dutsen Fuji da ke tsaye a bayansa. Wannan aikin ya wuce zane mai sauƙi na shimfiɗar wuri, yana ɗauke da zurfin fahimtar yanayi da saƙon falsafa, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen ɗaga Ukiyo-e daga fasahar jama'a zuwa matsayin fasaha mai tsabta.

Rayuwar Hokusai ta kasance ci gaba da binciken fasaha da sabunta kai. A tsawon rayuwarsa, ya gwada salo da batutuwa daban-daban, yana gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman. Musamman, har zuwa tsufansa, sha'awarsa ta kirkira ba ta taɓa raguwa ba, inda ya kira kansa 'Tsohon Mutum Mai Hauka da Zane' (畫狂老人, Kakyō Rōjin), yana nuna zurfin nutsuwarsa da sha'awarsa ga fasaha. Yana da tawali'u da kuma ƙishirwar koyo mara iyaka, har ya kai ga furta cewa bai fara fahimtar tsarin abubuwa masu rai da marasa rai ba sai bayan ya wuce shekaru 70. Har zuwa lokacin da ya rasu a ranar 10 ga Mayu, 1849, yana da shekaru 90, ya yi kuka, "Idan sama ta ba ni ƙarin shekaru biyar, da na zama mai zane na gaskiya," yana nuna sha'awarsa mai zafi da burinsa na fasaha da bai cika ba. Wannan halinsa ya nuna ba kawai ƙwarewar fasaha ba, har ma da neman gaskiyar rayuwa ta hanyar fasaha, kuma ya zama tushen da ayyukansa ke ba da motsin rai wanda ya wuce lokaci. Ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa wajen faɗaɗa damar Ukiyo-e.

Gadon Katsushika Hokusai ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan duniyar fasaha a duk faɗin duniya, fiye da tarihin fasahar Japan. Ayyukansa sun zama ginshiƙin sha'awar Japonisme da ta bazu a Turai a ƙarshen karni na 19, inda suka ba da babban kwarin gwiwa ga masu zane-zane na Yamma irin su Vincent van Gogh da Claude Monet. Musamman, tsarinsa mai ƙarfin hali, launuka masu haske, da kuma hangen nesansa na musamman game da yanayi sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen buɗe sabbin iyakoki a fasahar Yamma. Hokusai ya ɗaga Ukiyo-e daga fasahar jama'a da ke mai da hankali kan mutane zuwa fasahar duniya da ke nuna yanayi, tsirrai, da dabbobi. Ayyukansa har yau suna zama tushen zane-zane na zamani, manga, da fasahar gani, suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa. Ruhun bincike na Hokusai mara yankewa da duniyar fasaharsa mai sabbin abubuwa sun fi fitowa fili a cikin asali da tasirinsu idan aka kwatanta da ayyukan sauran manyan masu fasahar Ukiyo-e na Japan na zamaninsa, kamar masu zane-zane na shimfiɗar wuri irin su Utagawa Hiroshige.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Katsushika Hokusai ya kasance mai zane na Ukiyo-e a zamanin Edo na Japan, wanda ya faɗaɗa iyakokin Ukiyo-e ta hanyar zane-zanen shimfiɗar wuri.
key_achievements: Ya kawo sabbin abubuwa ga Ukiyo-e tare da jerin "Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji"
Ya kirkiri "The Great Wave off Kanagawa"
Ya ba da gudummawa wajen faɗaɗa batutuwan Ukiyo-e zuwa zane-zanen shimfiɗar wuri
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri a kan fasahar Yamma ta hanyar Japonisme, kuma sun zama tushen fasahar gani ta zamani.

parsed.narrative:
A shekarar 1835, shekarar da tauraron wutsiya na Halley ya ratsa sararin samaniya, aka haifi Samuel Langhorne Clemens, wanda daga baya aka fi sani da Mark Twain, a Florida, Missouri, Amurka. Ya kasance babban marubuci, mai ba da dariya, kuma mai rubutun kasidu na Amurka, wanda ya kafa matsayinsa a matsayin uban adabin Amurka. Ya yi kuruciyarsa a Hannibal, wani gari a bakin kogin Mississippi, wanda ya zama muhimmin tushen wahayi ga manyan ayyukansa na gaba. Bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa yana da shekaru 12, dole ne ya yi aiki a matsayin mai koyon buga littattafai don tallafa wa kansa, sannan kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin jagoran jirgin ruwa a kogin Mississippi, inda ya fuskanci nau'ikan mutane daban-daban da fuskokin rayuwa. Kwarewar wannan lokacin ta ba shi zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam da al'umma, kuma ta kafa harsashin salon magana mai rai da barkwanci waɗanda suka haskaka a cikin ayyukansa na gaba. Ya fara amfani da sunan alkalami 'Mark Twain' lokacin da ya fara aikin jarida, wanda ke nufin 'zurfin ƙafa biyu' a cikin harshen ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa, yana nuna ƙaunarsa da kwarewarsa da kogin. Don haka, rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance mai cike da ƙalubale, amma a lokaci guda, ta zama abinci mai mahimmanci don gina duniyar adabinsa ta musamman.

Juyin juya halin adabi na Mark Twain ya zo ne ta hanyar littafin *The Adventures of Tom Sawyer* da aka buga a 1876, da kuma mabiyinsa, *The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn*, wanda aka buga a 1884. Musamman ma, *The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn* ana kiransa sau da yawa 'Babban Littafin Amurka', kuma ya buɗe sabon babi a adabin Amurka. A cikin wannan aikin, ya kauce daga tsarin rubutu na Turai mai tsauri da tsari na lokacin, yana amfani da salon magana mai rai na yankin kogin Mississippi don nuna halayen mutane da kuma isar da labarin cikin gaskiya. Wannan littafin ya yi ba'a mai tsanani ga bauta, nuna bambancin launin fata, da ka'idojin zamantakewa na munafunci, yana haskaka duhun gefen al'ummar Amurka. Har Ernest Hemingway ya yaba masa sosai, yana cewa, “Duk wani adabin Amurka na zamani ya fito ne daga littafi ɗaya mai suna *Huckleberry Finn*,” wannan aikin ya kafa asalin adabin Amurka kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga marubuta na gaba. Twain bai takaita ga ba da labarai kawai ba, amma ta hanyar ayyukansa, ya yi yaƙi da rashin adalci na zamantakewa kuma ya jefa tambayoyi masu zurfi game da yanayin ɗan adam, yana nuna halin mai hankali fiye da mai ba da dariya kawai.

Duk da cewa ya sami shahara a duniya a matsayin marubuci, ya fuskanci matsanancin gwaji a rayuwarsa ta sirri. Ko da yake ya sami babban nasara a 1873 tare da *The Gilded Age: A Tale of Today*, wanda ya rubuta tare da Charles Dudley Warner, yana ba'a ga haɗama da cin hanci da rashawa na Amurka a lokacin, daga baya ya fuskanci matsanancin matsalar kuɗi saboda kuskuren saka hannun jari da gazawar kasuwanci. Musamman ma, saka hannun jari mai yawa a cikin ƙirƙirar na'urar bugawa ya kai shi ga gabar fatara. Abin takaici, ya faɗa cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi bayan ya rasa matarsa mai ƙauna, Olivia Langdon Clemens, da biyu daga cikin 'ya'yansa mata uku a jere. Waɗannan matsalolin na sirri sun zama dalilin da ya sa ayyukansa na baya suka ɗauki hangen nesa mai cike da baƙin ciki da suka. Duk da haka, ya yi ƙoƙari ya biya bashinsa kuma ya shawo kan matsalolin kuɗi ta hanyar ayyukan lacca, yana ba da dariya da ta'aziyya ga masu sauraro tare da barkwancinsa na musamman da basira. Wasu daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, kamar *A Connecticut Yankee in King Arthur's Court* (1889) da *Pudd'nhead Wilson* (1894), sun nuna ruhinsa na marubuci mai juriya wanda bai taɓa daina binciken yanayin ɗan adam da hangen nesa na sukar zamantakewa ba duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje.

Gadon da Mark Twain ya bari yana ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a kan adabin Amurka da na duniya har zuwa yau. Ya ɗaukaka salon magana zuwa matsayin harshen adabi, kuma ya kafa gaskiyar zamantakewa mai sukar lamiri, yana buɗe sabuwar hanya ga marubuta na gaba. Ayyukansa sun wuce nishaɗi kawai, suna sukar munafuncin ɗan adam da rashin adalci na al'umma da kaifi, suna buƙatar zurfin tunani daga masu karatu. Musamman ma, *The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn* yana magana ne game da batutuwan launin fata da matsalolin ɗabi'a a cikin al'ummar Amurka, yana isar da saƙo na duniya wanda ya wuce lokaci. Twain ya yi fice wajen bayyana gaskiya ta hanyar barkwanci da ba'a, kuma adabinsa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da asalin Amurkawa. Ana iya samun tasirinsa a cikin manyan marubuta na adabin Amurka na ƙarni na 20 kamar Ernest Hemingway da William Faulkner, wanda ke tabbatar da dalilin da ya sa ake kiransa da gaske 'Uban Adabin Amurka'. Gadonsa yana ci gaba har zuwa yau ta hanyar ayyukan da ke ɗauke da hangen nesa na sukar zamantakewa da zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mark Twain marubuci ne kuma mai ba da dariya na Amurka a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya buɗe sabon babi a adabin Amurka tare da *The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn*.
key_achievements: Bugawa *The Adventures of Tom Sawyer* (1876)
Bugawa *The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn* (1884)
Majagaba a amfani da salon magana a adabin Amurka
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun kafa asalin adabin Amurka kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga gaskiyar zamantakewa mai sukar lamiri.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin karni na 18, lokacin da hasken wayewa da kuma ruhin soyayya suka hadu a cikin wani zamani mai cike da rudani, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe (1749-1832) ya fito fili a matsayin babban mawaki, marubucin wasan kwaikwayo, marubucin labari, masanin kimiyya, kuma dan siyasa na Jamus, inda ya bar tasiri mai girma a kan tarihin tunanin dan Adam. An haife shi a ranar 28 ga Agusta, 1749, a cikin birnin Frankfurt am Main mai 'yanci na Daular Roma Mai Tsarki, a matsayin dan wani attajiri mai shari'a. A karkashin tsauraran tarbiyyar mahaifinsa da kuma zurfin fahimtar mahaifiyarsa, ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannoni daban-daban na ilimi da fasaha tun yana yaro. Ko da yake ya yi karatun shari'a a Leipzig da Strasbourg, sha'awarsa ga adabi ba ta taba raguwa ba. Musamman ma a tsakiyar shekarunsa na ashirin, a shekara ta 1774, ya wallafa littafin labari na wasika mai suna 'The Sorrows of Young Werther,' wanda ya haifar da wani babban tashin hankali a duk faɗin Turai. Wannan aiki ya zama murya ga ra'ayoyin matasa da kuma takaicin su a lokacin, ya zama alamar motsi na 'Sturm und Drang' (Guguwa da Damuwa), kuma nan take ya sanya Goethe a tsakiyar duniyar adabi ta Turai. Daga wannan lokaci, ya fara wani babban bincike na adabi wanda ya shafi kowane fanni na ruhin dan Adam.

Bayan ya sami shahara tare da 'The Sorrows of Young Werther,' Johann Wolfgang von Goethe ya fuskanci wani muhimmin sauyi a rayuwarsa a shekara ta 1775 lokacin da ya koma Weimar bisa gayyatar Duke Karl August na Duchy na Weimar. Bai kasance kawai mawaki na kotu ba, amma a matsayinsa na firaminista na Duchy, ya nuna kansa a matsayin babban mai gudanarwa, yana kula da al'amuran siyasa, gudanarwa, da soja. A wannan lokacin, ban da ayyukansa na adabi, ya zurfafa cikin fannoni daban-daban na kimiyyar halitta kamar ilimin tsirrai, ilimin haske, da ilimin kasa, yana gudanar da bincike na kansa. Musamman ma, ya bar muhimman nasarori a matsayin masanin kimiyya ta hanyar kafa ka'idar metamorphosis na tsirrai da kuma ka'idar launuka. Bayan tafiyarsa zuwa Italiya, inda ya zurfafa cikin fasahar gargajiya, ya jagoranci 'Weimar Classicism' tare da Friedrich Schiller da sauran su, yana buɗe zamanin zinariya na adabin Jamus. Daga wannan lokaci, ya fara zurfafa cikin rubutun 'Faust,' wanda zai zama babban aikinsa na rayuwa. 'Faust' babban wasan kwaikwayo ne wanda ke dauke da labarin binciken dan Adam mara iyaka, sha'awa, da ceto, wani yunkuri ne na tattara cikakken fahimtar ruhin dan Adam da ya ke nema.

Rayuwar Johann Wolfgang von Goethe ta kasance ci gaba da bincike na hankali da kirkire-kirkire, amma kuma ya fuskanci matsaloli na kansa da yawa. Ya sadaukar da kusan shekaru 60 don kammala 'Faust,' kuma a cikin wannan tsari, ya yi gyare-gyare da yawa da kuma wahala mai zurfi. Mutuwar abokinsa na kud da kud kuma abokin adabinsa, Friedrich Schiller (1805), ta haifar masa da babban rashi, kuma daga baya, ya fuskanci zurfin kadaici a tsufansa bayan mutuwar matarsa, Christiane Vulpius (1816), da dansa, August (1830). Duk da haka, ko da a cikin waɗannan baƙin ciki na kansa, bai taɓa rasa sha'awarsa ga ilimi da kirkire-kirkire ba. Ko da a cikin tsufansa na sama da shekaru 80, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba har zuwa lokacin ƙarshe, yana kammala 'Faust Part II.' Ya shawo kan matsalolin rayuwa ta hanyar nufinsa na wuce iyakokin ɗan adam da kuma halinsa na koyo da bincike marar tsayawa, kuma an ce ya bar kalmominsa na ƙarshe, "Haske mai yawa! (Mehr Licht!)," wanda ke nuna sha'awarsa ta hankali a duk rayuwarsa.

Gadon da Johann Wolfgang von Goethe ya bari ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin adabin duniya, fiye da adabin Jamus kawai. Ta hanyar 'Faust,' ya bincika tambayoyin asali na wanzuwar ɗan adam da kuma yiwuwar ceto, wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan falsafar Yamma da adabi. Johann Wolfgang von Goethe kuma shi ne na farko da ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Adabin Duniya' (Weltliteratur), yana mai jaddada cewa adabin kasashe daban-daban ya kamata su yi mu'amala da juna kuma su ci gaba. Wannan ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin tunani mai jagoranci wanda ke jaddada mahimmancin fahimtar al'adu daban-daban da sadarwa a yau. Ayyukansa har yanzu suna ba da zurfin wahayi ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya, suna farkar da yiwuwar ruhin ɗan adam mara iyaka. Johann Wolfgang von Goethe ana tunawa da shi ba kawai a matsayin marubuci ba, amma a matsayin misali na 'mutum mai cikakken ilimi' wanda ya bar nasarori masu ban mamaki a fannoni daban-daban kamar kimiyya, siyasa, da falsafa. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa, tare da tafiye-tafiyen hankali na mutanen zamaninsa kamar Friedrich Schiller da Herder na zamanin Romanticism, suna haskakawa har abada a cikin gadon al'adun ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe babban mawaki ne kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na Jamus a karni na 18-19, wanda ya faɗaɗa iyakokin adabin duniya ta hanyar 'Faust' da 'The Sorrows of Young Werther'.
key_achievements: Wallafa 'The Sorrows of Young Werther'
Rubutawa da kammala babban wasan kwaikwayo 'Faust'
Yin aiki a matsayin Firaminista na Duchy na Weimar da gudanar da bincike na kimiyya
Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Adabin Duniya' (Weltliteratur)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa da tunaninsa har yau suna da tasiri mai zurfi a kan gadon hankali da al'adu na ɗan adam, suna gabatar da manufar 'mutum mai cikakken ilimi'.

parsed.narrative:
Mary Shelley (an haife ta a shekara ta 1797) shahararriyar marubuciya ce kuma mai rubutun littattafai a farkon ƙarni na 19 a zamanin Romantic na Biritaniya, wadda a yau ake ɗauka a matsayin majagaba a fannin labaran kimiyya. Ita ce 'yar masanin falsafar siyasa mai tsattsauran ra'ayi William Godwin da kuma mai kare haƙƙin mata kuma masaniya Mary Wollstonecraft, an haife ta a London a ranar 30 ga Agusta, 1797. Amma haihuwarta ta zo tare da bala'i, domin mahaifiyarta, Mary Wollstonecraft, ta rasu jim kaɗan bayan haihuwarta saboda zazzaɓin haihuwa. Sakamakon haka, Mary Shelley ta girma ba tare da tunanin mahaifiyarta ba, amma tun tana ƙarama ta sami ƙarfafa tunani daga ɗakin karatu na mahaifinta da kuma manyan masana na lokacin da ke ziyartarsa. Ta ilmantar da kanta ta hanyar karatu da tattaunawa maimakon ilimin gargajiya, wanda daga baya ya zama ginshiƙin zurfin tunaninta da ƙirƙirar adabinta. A duk lokacin yarintarta, ta ji kaɗaici a cikin yanayin ilimi, amma wannan yanayin ya yi tasiri sosai wajen haɓakarta a matsayin marubuciya mai binciken tambayoyi masu mahimmanci na wanzuwar ɗan adam.

Rayuwar Mary Shelley ta ɗauki babban juyi a shekara ta 1814, lokacin da ta haɗu da mawaƙin Romantic Percy Bysshe Shelley, wanda a lokacin yana da aure. Su biyun sun gudu zuwa nahiyar Turai duk da zargin al'umma, kuma wannan ya yi tasiri mai girma a rayuwarta da adabinta. Musamman ma lokacin rani na 1816, wanda suka yi a gefen tafkin Geneva a Switzerland tare da manyan masana na lokacin kamar Percy Shelley, Lord Byron, da John Polidori, ya ba ta kwarin gwiwa mai mahimmanci don ayyukanta na ƙirƙira. A wata daren ruwan sama, sun yi alƙawarin kowannensu zai rubuta labarin fatalwa, kuma a lokacin ne Mary Shelley ta fara rubuta daftarin farko na “Frankenstein; ko, Prometheus na Zamani,” bisa ga wani hoto mai ban tsoro da ta gani a mafarki. Ana ɗaukar wannan aikin a matsayin littafin Gothic mai tambayar girman kai na kimiyya da alhakin mahalicci, kuma misali na farko na labaran kimiyya da ke gabatar da tambayoyin ɗabi'a game da ƙirƙirar rayuwa da sakamakonta. Ta hanyar wannan littafin, ta zurfafa bincike kan mummunan sakamakon da ruhun bincike na ɗan adam mara iyaka zai iya kawowa, da kuma kaɗaici da fushin halitta da mahaliccinta ya watsar, wanda ya haifar da babban girgiza ga al'umma a lokacin.

Duk da nasarar “Frankenstein,” rayuwar Mary Shelley ta kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje na kashin kai. Ta fuskanci bala'in rasa uku daga cikin 'ya'yanta huɗu da ta haifa da mijinta Percy Shelley tun suna yara. Musamman ma a shekara ta 1822, dole ne ta jure baƙin ciki mai girma na mutuwar mijinta Percy Shelley a wani hatsarin jirgin ruwa a Italiya. Ta kasance ita kaɗai tana da shekaru 24, ta fuskanci yanayi mai wuya na renon ɗanta ƙarami, Percy Florence Shelley, ita kaɗai da kuma kula da rayuwarta. Amma ba ta miƙa wuya ga waɗannan gwaje-gwaje ba, sai dai ta ci gaba da rayuwarta da ƙarfin hali. Ta sadaukar da kanta wajen adana gadon adabi na mijinta ta hanyar gyarawa da buga ayyukansa na bayan mutuwarsa, yayin da kuma ta ci gaba da ayyukanta na ƙirƙira. Ta buga wasu littattafai kamar “Mutum na Ƙarshe,” kasidu, da gajerun labarai, tana ci gaba da nuna iyawarta a matsayin marubuciya. Rayuwarta ita kanta wani tsari ne na gwagwarmaya tsakanin 'yancin kai na tunani, alhakin uwa, da kuma sha'awar ƙirƙira marar yankewa, tana mai da baƙin ciki zuwa fasaha.

Gadon Mary Shelley mafi girma babu shakka “Frankenstein” ne, kuma wannan aikin yana ci gaba da zama ginshiƙin nau'in labaran kimiyya da kuma muhimmiyar kibiyar ɗabi'a a adabin zamani a yau. Littafinta yana gabatar da tambayoyi masu zurfi game da matsalolin ɗabi'a da ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha zai iya kawowa da kuma alhakin ɗan adam, yana da tasiri sosai a cikin al'ummar zamani, wadda ta shiga zamanin basirar wucin gadi da fasahar halittu. Ba kawai marubuciyar labaran tsoro ba ce, amma mai hangen nesa ce wadda ta hango rikicin tsakanin fasaha da ɗabi'a, tana binciken zurfin wanzuwar ɗan adam da muryar mace. Ayyukan Mary Shelley sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga fina-finai, wasannin kwaikwayo, da adabi marasa adadi, kuma 'Frankenstein' ya zama alama ga halitta da ta kubuce daga ikon mahaliccinta. Rayuwarta da ayyukanta sun kasance babban labari na tunani da aka ƙirƙira a cikin duhu, yana farkar da ainihin ma'anar ƙirƙira da alhaki. Ayyukanta sun bincika yanayin ɗan adam da matsalolin ɗabi'a na kimiyya da fasaha, suna samar da zurfin alaƙa ta tunani tare da sauran marubutan Romantic na zamaninta da kuma marubutan adabin dystopian na baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mary Shelley marubuciya ce ta Biritaniya a farkon ƙarni na 19, wadda ta rubuta “Frankenstein,” wani aiki na majagaba a fannin labaran kimiyya.
key_achievements: Rubuta da buga “Frankenstein” (1818)
Kafa farkon tsarin nau'in labaran kimiyya
Gyara da gabatar da ayyukan mijinta Percy Shelley
Yi tasiri a fannin adabi a matsayin marubuciya mace
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta suna gabatar da tambayoyi masu zurfi game da kimiyya, fasaha, da ɗabi'ar ɗan adam, suna da tasiri sosai a adabin zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Sir Alexander Fleming (an haife shi a 1881) likita ne kuma masanin kwayoyin cuta na Birtaniya wanda ya jagoranci juyin juya halin likitanci a farkon karni na 20. Daga karshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, cututtuka masu yaduwa sun kasance daya daga cikin manyan abubuwan da ke barazana ga rayuwar bil'adama, inda mutane da yawa suka mutu sakamakon kamuwa da kwayoyin cuta. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haife Fleming a ranar 6 ga Agusta, 1881, a wani karamin gona a yankin Ayrshire na Scotland, inda ya yi yarintarsa a cikin yanayi. Ya koma London kuma ya yi karatun likitanci a Makarantar Likitanci ta Asibitin St Mary's, inda ya nuna sha'awa ta musamman ga fannin ilimin kwayoyin halitta (microbiology). Bayan kammala karatunsa, ya fara nutsa cikin binciken ilimin kwayoyin cuta (bacteriology) karkashin jagorancin Sir Almroth Wright a Sashen Allurar rigakafi na Asibitin St Mary's. A wannan lokacin, bincikensa ya mai da hankali kan yaki da makiyan da ba a gani, wato kwayoyin cuta, wadanda ke addabar bil'adama. Ya ci gaba da gwaje-gwaje da lura ba tare da gajiyawa ba, yana neman sabbin hanyoyin magance cututtuka masu yaduwa.

Lokacin da Yakin Duniya na Farko ya barke, Fleming ya yi aiki a cikin Rundunar Sojojin Likitoci kuma ya fuskanci kalubale wajen magance raunukan da suka kamu da cuta na sojoji a fagen fama. Ya gane cewa magungunan kashe kwayoyin cuta da ake amfani da su a lokacin suna lalata kwayoyin cuta da kuma nama na mai haƙuri, yana iyakance tasirin maganin. Wannan ya sa ya fahimci buƙatar wani abu mai ƙarfin kashe kwayoyin cuta wanda ba shi da lahani ga jikin ɗan adam. Bayan yakin, ya koma Asibitin St Mary's, kuma a shekarar 1921, ya gano lysozyme, wani enzyme mai kashe kwayoyin cuta da ke cikin hawaye, majina, da yawu na ɗan adam. Lysozyme wani abu ne da ke kashe kwayoyin cuta a zahiri a cikin jiki, kuma shine bincikensa na farko mai mahimmanci. Amma lysozyme bai yi tasiri ga dukkan kwayoyin cuta ba, kuma bai yi tasiri sosai ga kwayoyin cuta masu haɗari ba. Sai a kusan Satumba 1928, Fleming ya dawo daga hutu kuma ya gano cewa ɗaya daga cikin faranti na al'adun staphylococci ya gurɓata da wani nau'in naman gwari mai launin shudi (Penicillium notatum), kuma kwayoyin cuta ba su iya girma a kusa da naman gwari. Wannan lamari shine lokacin da ya kai ga gano penicillin, wanda zai kasance a tarihin likitancin ɗan adam har abada.

Gano penicillin ba zato ba tsammani ya ba da sabon bege ga bil'adama, amma tsarin haɓaka wannan abu zuwa magani na gaske ya kasance mai wahala. Fleming ya tabbatar da cewa wannan abu da naman gwari mai launin shudi ke samarwa yana da ikon kashe kwayoyin cuta kuma ya kira shi 'penicillin', amma ya fuskanci iyakokin fasaha wajen ware shi a tsarkakakken tsari da kuma samar da shi da yawa. Saboda penicillin ba shi da kwanciyar hankali kuma yana lalacewa cikin sauƙi, kuma ana iya cire shi kaɗan, muhimmancinsa bai samu karbuwa sosai ba a farkon. Fleming ya buga sakamakon bincikensa, amma al'ummar kimiyya a lokacin ba su nuna sha'awa sosai ga bincikensa ba. Sai dai a karshen shekarun 1930, tawagar bincike ta Howard Florey da Ernst Chain a Jami'ar Oxford sun mai da hankali kan binciken Fleming kuma suka fara haɓaka fasahar samar da penicillin da yawa da kuma tsarkake shi. Barkewar Yakin Duniya na Biyu ya kara buƙatar magance sojoji masu raunuka masu kamuwa da cuta, kuma wannan ya hanzarta saka hannun jari a binciken penicillin. Tawagar Florey da Chain sun yi nasarar gwajin asibiti na penicillin a farkon shekarun 1940, suna tabbatar da tasirin maganinsa mai ban mamaki, kuma daga baya, tare da goyon bayan gwamnatin Amurka, an sami damar samar da shi da yawa.

Penicillin ya taka rawar gani wajen ceton rayukan sojojin kawance a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu, kuma bayan yakin, ya yadu a duk duniya, yana ceton marasa lafiya da yawa daga cututtuka masu yaduwa daga bakin mutuwa. Ta haka, bil'adama sun sami ingantacciyar hanyar magance cututtukan kwayoyin cuta, kuma wannan ya zama wani abu da ya canza tsarin likitancin zamani gaba daya. An gane Fleming saboda gano penicillin da kuma tabbatar da tasirin maganinsa, kuma a shekarar 1945, ya raba kyautar Nobel ta Fizioloji ko Magani tare da Howard Florey da Ernst Chain. Bincikensa ya buɗe kofa ga 'zamanin maganin rigakafi', kuma ya buɗe hanya ga haɓaka magungunan rigakafi daban-daban. Fleming ya yi gargadi tun da wuri cewa rashin amfani da wuce gona da iri na penicillin na iya haifar da juriya ga maganin rigakafi, kuma ya gabatar da sabbin kalubale ga bil'adama. Sunansa zai kasance a cikin tarihin bil'adama na shawo kan cututtuka har abada, kuma nasarorinsa, tare da binciken masu gabatarwa irin su Louis Pasteur da Robert Koch waɗanda suka sadaukar da kansu ga yaƙi da cututtuka a zamaninsu, sun yi tasiri sosai ga inganta lafiyar ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sir Alexander Fleming likita ne kuma masanin kwayoyin cuta na Birtaniya a farkon karni na 20, wanda ya gano penicillin kuma ya buɗe zamanin maganin rigakafi.
key_achievements: Gano Lysozyme, wani abu mai kashe kwayoyin cuta
Gano Penicillin ba zato ba tsammani
Samun lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Fizioloji ko Magani a 1945
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya ceci rayuka marasa adadi kuma ya canza tsarin likitancin zamani.

parsed.narrative:
A kan tsohon tashar jiragen ruwa na katako a tsibirin Caribbean mai wahala, inda faɗuwar rana mai ja kamar jini ke lulluɓe, iska mai ɗauke da ƙamshin gishiri tana hurawa da ƙarfi. Tsakanin jinin baƙi da ke gudana a jijiyoyinsa da burin da ke zurfafa a cikin zuciyarsa, ƙaramin rai da ke kallon teku mai faɗi ya riga ya hango hadari. Kamar itacen da ba shi da tushe a ƙasar baƙi, kaɗaici ya lulluɓe shi, kuma tunanin asara mai zafi ya soka zuciyarsa sanyi kamar hasken taurari. Tare da raɗaɗin mahaifiyarsa da ke yawo a kunnensa da daddare, ya yi mafarkin ranar da zai jefa nasa anka a kan raƙuman ruwa na ƙaddara mai tsanani.

A cikin ƙurar mulkin mallaka kamar an zana shi da goga mai ƙarfi, ya saƙa zaren ƙaddara da hannayensa masu tabon tawada. Manyan ra'ayoyin wayewa sun bugi kunnuwansa, kuma wutar juyin juya hali ta kunna jijiyoyinsa da zafi. A cikin tsoffin littattafan dokoki da littattafan siyasa da suka lalace, ya goge takobin ilimi. A titunan London, a ofisoshin lauyoyi na New York, ya gina nasa babban gida a sararin samaniya. Da zuciyar da ke kan bakin kogi, ya yi ƙoƙarin tattara gutsuttsura don kammala babban hoto ɗaya.

Lokacin da inuwar babban yaƙi ta rufe nahiyar, ya riƙe takobi maimakon alƙalami. Ƙamshin gumi na tsohuwar rigar soja da kukan yaƙi mai jini sun bugi zuciyarsa matashiya da ƙarfi. Rashin jin daɗi bayan nasara ta ɗan lokaci, raunuka masu zurfi da mutuwar abokan gaba ta bari, ya ci gaba da tafiya yana adana komai a zuciyarsa. Nufinsa marar karyawa duk da zargin da ake masa ya tashi kamar babban dutse, kuma ya yanke sarƙoƙin da suka ɗaure shi kuma ya ci gaba da kiran 'yanci.

Yanzu sunansa an rubuta shi a sarari a cikin manyan shafukan tarihi. A kan teburin da ke cike da ƙura a tsohon ɗakin taro, hannunsa da ya tsara wayewar sabon zamani ya kasance tare da mu, ya wuce lokaci da sarari. Sha'awarsa ta haɗa kan al'ummomi masu tarwatsewa zuwa ƙasa ɗaya mai girma, har yanzu tana raye kamar bugun zuciyar al'ummarmu a yau, kuma ta zama fitila mai haskaka mana hanyar da za mu bi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mutum daga Caribbean wanda ya shawo kan wahalhalu, ya shiga juyin juya hali da ilimi da jaruntaka, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga gina sabuwar ƙasa.
key_achievements: Gabatar da sabon hangen nesa na ƙasa tare da ra'ayoyin wayewa
Shiga cikin Yaƙin Juyin Juya Hali don kare 'yanci
Haɗa kan al'ummomi masu tarwatsewa don gina ƙasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sha'awarsa ta haɗin kai da ci gaban ƙasa har yanzu tana raye a yau a matsayin fitilar al'umma.

parsed.narrative:
Benjamin Franklin (Janairu 17, 1706 – Afrilu 17, 1790) wani babban mutum ne mai hikima da basira, wanda ya rayu a cikin karni na 18, lokacin da Amurka ta kasance a karkashin mulkin mallaka mai cike da rudani, da kuma farkon Jamhuriyar Amurka. Ya kasance ɗan siyasa, mawallafi, mai buga littattafai, mai ƙirƙira, jami'in diflomasiyya, kuma mai ilimi mai yawa. An haife shi a Boston, Amurka ta Biritaniya, tun yana ɗan shekara 12, ya fara aiki a matsayin almajiri a gidan buga littattafai na ɗan'uwansa, inda ya koyi fasahar buga littattafai. Duk da cewa bai samu ilimin boko mai yawa ba, ya gina kansa ta hanyar karatu da kuma ci gaba da neman ilimi ba tare da gajiyawa ba. Yana ɗan shekara 17, ya koma Philadelphia, inda ya fara gina sana'ar buga littattafai mai nasara, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya zama ɗan jarida mai tasiri da mawallafi ta hanyar buga "Pennsylvania Gazette." A wannan lokacin, ya shahara sosai ta hanyar yada hikima mai amfani da darussan ɗabi'a ga jama'a ta hanyar "Poor Richard's Almanack," wanda ya tabbatar da sunansa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance misali ne mai kyau na yadda ƙishirwar ilimi da himma za su iya haɓaka mutum da kuma gina tushen al'umma. Ya wuce matsayin mai buga littattafai kawai, ya taka rawar jagoranci wajen tada hankalin ilimi a cikin al'ummar mulkin mallaka.

Bisa nasarar da Franklin ya samu a harkar buga littattafai, ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga al'ummar Philadelphia, inda ya jagoranci ci gaban al'ummar farar hula. Ya jagoranci kafa kamfanin Laburare na Philadelphia, wanda shine laburare na farko ga jama'a, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa rundunar kashe gobara ta sa kai, da kuma Kwalejin Philadelphia, wacce ita ce tushen Jami'ar Pennsylvania. Waɗannan ayyukan sun tabbatar da cewa shi jagora ne mai hangen nesa don ci gaban al'umma, ba kawai ɗan kasuwa ba. A cikin shekarun 1750, ya faɗaɗa ayyukansa zuwa fagen siyasa, inda aka zaɓe shi a matsayin ɗan majalisa a Majalisar Pennsylvania, kuma a matsayin Babban Jami'in Wasiku na mulkin mallaka, ya inganta tsarin wasiku, yana sauƙaƙa sadarwa tsakanin mulkin mallaka. A wannan lokacin, ya shaida yadda rikici tsakanin Biritaniya da mulkin mallaka ke ƙara tsananta, kuma ya fara bayar da murya don kare haƙƙoƙin mulkin mallaka. Musamman ma, an tura shi Biritaniya a matsayin wakilin mulkin mallaka don fuskantar manufofin Biritaniya masu tsauri kamar Dokar Stamp da Dokar Townshend, inda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kare matsayin mulkin mallaka. Ƙwarewarsa ta diflomasiyya da kuma ikon shawo kan mutane sun fara haskawa a cikin rikicin da ke ƙara tsananta da ƙasar uwa.

Lokacin da wutar Juyin Juya Halin Amurka ta tashi, Franklin ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samun 'yancin kai na mulkin mallaka. Ya shiga cikin kwamitin da ya tsara Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai ta Amurka a shekara ta 1776, inda ya ba da gudummawa ga 'yancin kai na Amurka a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin Uban Kafa na Amurka. Bayan haka, an tura shi Faransa a matsayin jakada na musamman, inda ya ba da gudummawa mai yawa wajen kulla kawance da sojojin Faransa. Wannan nasara ce ta diflomasiyya mai mahimmanci wacce ta canza yanayin Yaƙin Juyin Juya Hali, kuma ta zama hanyar samun goyon baya mai mahimmanci don rayuwar sabuwar Amurka. Baya ga ƙwarewarsa ta musamman a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya, ya kuma ba da gudummawa wajen wadatar da rayuwar ɗan adam a matsayin masanin kimiyya da mai ƙirƙira. Ta hanyar bincikensa na farko game da walƙiya da wutar lantarki, ya ƙirƙira sandar walƙiya, yana inganta tsaron ɗan adam, kuma ya haɓaka abubuwan ƙirƙira masu amfani kamar tabarau masu ninki biyu (wanda shine tushen tabarau masu ninki da yawa) da kuma murhun Franklin. Bugu da ƙari, shi ne masanin kimiyya na farko da ya ƙirƙira jirgin sama na farar hula. Waɗannan nasarorin da ya samu a fannoni daban-daban sun nuna cewa shi ɗaya ne daga cikin manyan masana ilimi na zamaninsa.

Ko da yake Benjamin Franklin ya rasu a ranar 17 ga Afrilu, 1790, gadonsa yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi a Amurka da ma duniya baki ɗaya har zuwa yau. A matsayinsa na Uban Kafa na Amurka, ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa manufofin dimokuraɗiyya da jamhuriya, kuma tunaninsa na aiki da kuma ruhin shiga cikin al'umma sun zama muhimmin tushe wajen samar da asalin Amurkawa. Ruhinsa na binciken kimiyya da abubuwan da ya ƙirƙira sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ci gaban fasahar ɗan adam, kuma ayyukansa a matsayin ɗan jarida sun tada hankali game da 'yancin faɗar albarkacin baki da mahimmancin ilimin jama'a. Tarihin rayuwar Franklin ya kasance littafi mai daraja don ci gaban kai, yana ba da hikimar rayuwa da hanyar samun nasara ga mutane marasa adadi. Ya wuce matsayin ɗan siyasa ko masanin kimiyya kawai, ya kasance masanin ilimi na gaskiya wanda ya ci gaba da koyo da bincike, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga al'umma. Rayuwarsa ta nuna manufofin zamanin wayewa, kuma tare da sauran jarumawan kafa ƙasar na zamaninsa kamar Thomas Jefferson da John Adams, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen sabuwar ƙasa mai suna Amurka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Benjamin Franklin ya kasance ɗan siyasa, mawallafi, mai ƙirƙira, kuma jami'in diflomasiyya a cikin karni na 18 a Amurka ta mulkin mallaka da kuma farkon Jamhuriyar Amurka, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga 'yancin kai da kafa Amurka.
key_achievements: Gudummawa ga Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai ta Amurka da Tsarin Mulki
Jagorancin kulla kawance da sojojin Faransa
Ƙirƙirar sandar walƙiya da jagorancin binciken wutar lantarki
Ƙirƙirar jirgin sama na farar hula na farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Iliminsa mai yawa da ruhinsa na aiki sun zama tushen kafa Amurka, kuma har zuwa yau, yana ci gaba da zama alamar kirkire-kirkire da shiga cikin al'umma.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka na Ingila, a cikin ƙananan titunan London inda ɗaukaka da hargitsin daular Tudor suka haɗu, an haifi wani rai matashi. A cikin inuwar tsoffin gine-ginen dutse, a cikin iskar London inda kamshin gaskiya da inuwar buri suka haɗu, Francis Bacon ya fara binciken bayyanar duniya mai wucewa da tsari mai ɓoye a bayanta. A cikin ɗakin karatu na lauya mai haske kamar madubi, a cikin hasken sanyi na bugu na ƙarfe da ƙamshin tawada mai nauyi, ya yi mafarkin sabbin hanyoyin ilimi. Tun yana yaro, ya riga ya fahimci cewa duk abubuwan duniya suna kama da wani babban inji mai haɗaɗɗun kayan aiki, kuma sha'awar warware yadda wannan inji ke aiki ta ci gaba da ƙona zuciyarsa.

A cikin tsoffin dakunan karatu na Cambridge, inda tsoffin tunanin zamanin da suka yi karo da tambayoyin zamani masu kaifi, ya shiga cikin tunani na kaɗaici. A tsakanin littattafai masu murfin fata da suka tsufa, hankalinsa ya ci gaba da wahala, yana ƙoƙarin haɗa gutsuttsarin hikima da aka manta. A cikin al'adun ilimi, an rufe su kamar hazo mai kauri, hanyar zuwa ilimi na gaskiya tana da wahala, amma bai tsaya ba. Wani lokaci a cikin zarge-zarge masu zuba kamar tsawa, wani lokaci a cikin inuwar iko mai duhu, ya ɗaga tocilinsa sama kuma ya ratsa cikin duhu. Tafiyarsa ta kaɗaici ta kasance gudu mai zafi zuwa sabuwar duniya wadda yawancin masu karatu suka manta, ko kuma ba su taɓa yin mafarkin ta ba.

Lokutan da ya yi yana ta faman fita daga kogin yanke kauna, lokutan da ya ɗauki gicciyen cin amana da kunya, sunansa ya watse a cikin sanyin iska na kotu, kuma burinsa kamar an murkushe su. Amma ko a cikin duhuwar ɗaurin kurkuku, ruhinsa ya ƙara kaifi. Yana kallon hasumiyar rana mai rauni tana shiga ta cikin sanduna, ya ƙara sha'awar hasken haske na hankalin ɗan adam. Zafi ya zama tukunyar narkewa don horar da ruhinsa, kuma kunya ta ba da sabon ƙarfi ga alƙalaminsa. Lokacin da duniya ta juya masa baya, ya yi tunani a kan kansa da zurfin fahimta, kuma a cikin wannan kaɗaici, ya samo sabon kuzari don bincike.

Yanzu, a kan teburin karatu mai ƙura na tsohon ɗakin karatu, sunansa har yanzu yana haskawa. Daruruwan shekaru sun shude, amma muryarsa tana amsawa a dakunan gwaje-gwaje na zamani, dakunan karatu, da kuma a cikin zukatan duk waɗanda ke ci gaba da tambaya. Ba wai kawai wani mutum ne na baya ba. Shi shaida ne mai rai wanda ke zaburar da mu a cikin tafiyarmu ta ci gaba don fahimtar duniya, faɗaɗa ilimi, da kai ga gaskiya. Tunaninsa, mai ƙarfi kamar ƙarfe mai sanyi, mai zafi kamar harshen wuta, ya zama babban kogi wanda ke ci gaba da faɗaɗa tunaninmu da buɗe sabbin hanyoyi ga kimiyya har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin falsafa wanda ya buɗe sabbin hanyoyin ilimi a cikin hargitsin zamanin Tudor kuma ya kafa tushen tunanin kimiyya na zamani.
key_achievements: Ya kalubalanci tsoffin tunanin zamanin da kuma ya nemi sabbin hanyoyin ilimi
Ya gabatar da hanyar binciken kimiyya bisa ga gogewa da lura
Ya kafa tushen tunanin kimiyya na zamani da hanyoyinsa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa yana zaburar da ci gaban kimiyya na zamani da faɗaɗa ilimi, yana haskaka hanyar neman gaskiya.

parsed.narrative:
Johannes Kepler (1571-1630) ya kasance masanin taurari Bajamushe, masanin lissafi, kuma mai duba taurari wanda aka haifa a lokacin tashin hankali na Daular Roma Mai Tsarki a ƙarshen karni na 16. A lokacin da tasirin Gyaran Addini da farkon Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyya suka haɗu, an haife shi a Weil der Stadt, wani ƙaramin gari a kudu maso yammacin Jamus. Tun yana yaro, duk da cewa yana da rauni da talauci, ya nuna sha'awar ilimi mai ban mamaki da basirar lissafi. Yayin da yake nazarin ilimin tauhidi a Jami'ar Tübingen, ya ci karo da ka'idar Copernicus ta heliocentric kuma ya yi matuƙar sha'awar ta, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwarsa. Ya yi tambaya game da ka'idodin geocentric na Aristotle da Ptolemy, waɗanda suka fi yawa a lokacin, kuma ya haɓaka sha'awar bayyana jituwa da tsari na sararin samaniya ta hanyar lissafi. Bincikensa na farko ya mai da hankali kan binciken tsarin geometric na sararin samaniya, wanda daga baya ya zama tushe don gano dokokin motsin taurari.

Mafi muhimmancin juyi a tafiyar ilimin Kepler shine haɗuwarsa da Tycho Brahe, babban masanin taurari mai lura a zamaninsa, a Prague a shekara ta 1600. Brahe ya tattara bayanai masu yawa na lura da taurari, amma bai sami tsarin ka'ida don bayyana su ba. Kepler ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin Brahe kuma an ba shi aikin nazarin hanyar Mars, wanda ya zama babban kalubale a gare shi. Wannan saboda ka'idar hanyar zagaye da ake da ita ba za ta iya bayyana ingantattun lura na Brahe ba, musamman motsin Mars na baya. Ya shafe shekaru takwas yana nazarin hanyar Mars a hankali, yana yin lissafi marasa adadi da gwaji da kuskure. A cikin wannan tsari, ya kalubalanci imani na dā tun zamanin Girka cewa taurari suna zagaye rana a cikin hanyoyin zagaye. Wannan rikici ba kawai muhawara ce ta ilimi ba ce, amma ya buƙaci canjin tsarin tunani na asali wajen fahimtar sararin samaniya.

Bayan mutuwar Brahe, Kepler ya gaji bayanai masu yawa na lura da shi kuma ya sami damar ci gaba da bincikensa. Ya kai ga ƙarshe mai juyin juya hali cewa hanyar Mars ellipse ce, ba da'ira ba, kuma ta haka ya kafa **Dokar Kepler ta Farko (Taurari suna zagaye Rana a cikin hanyoyin ellipse tare da Rana a wani wuri mai mahimmanci)**. Daga baya, ya gano cewa taurari suna motsi da sauri lokacin da suke kusa da Rana kuma a hankali lokacin da suke nesa, yana buga **Dokar Kepler ta Biyu (Layin da ke haɗa tauraro da Rana yana share wurare daidai a cikin lokaci daidai)**. An bayyana waɗannan dokoki biyu ga duniya a cikin littafinsa na 1609, *Astronomia nova*. Daga baya, ya gano dangantaka tsakanin lokacin zagayen tauraro da babban axis na hanyarsa, yana sanar da **Dokar Kepler ta Uku (Murabba'in lokacin zagayen tauraro yana daidai da kubu na babban axis na hanyarsa)** a cikin *Harmonices Mundi* a 1619. A wannan lokacin, dole ne ya kare mahaifiyarsa, wadda aka zarga a shari'ar mayu, kuma ya jure wahalhalu da yawa, ciki har da matsalolin tattalin arziki da bala'o'i na kansa, yayin da yake motsawa sau da yawa a cikin rikicin Yaƙin Shekaru Talatin.

Dokokin Kepler guda uku na motsin taurari ana ɗaukar su a matsayin mafi muhimmancin ci gaba a tarihin ilimin taurari tun bayan ka'idar Copernicus ta heliocentric. Dokokinsa sun samar da tushe na lissafi don hango motsin taurari daidai, wanda ya ba Isaac Newton kwarin gwiwa sosai wajen tsara dokarsa ta jan hankali na duniya. Newton ya kawo juyin juya hali a fahimtar sararin samaniya ta hanyar haɗa dokokin Kepler na gwaji zuwa doka guda ɗaya ta jiki na jan hankali. Kepler ba kawai mai lura ba ne amma masanin ka'ida na gaskiya wanda ya nemi gano tsarin lissafi da ke ɓoye a bayan abubuwan da aka lura. Nasarorinsa sun zama ginshiƙin ilimin sararin samaniya na zamani da injiniyan taurari kuma ana amfani da shi a yau a fannoni daban-daban, kamar lissafin hanyoyin tauraron dan adam. Ruhun bincikensa, tare da sauran masana kimiyya na zamani kamar Galileo Galilei, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen kunna wutar Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Johannes Kepler masanin taurari ne na Daular Roma Mai Tsarki a farkon karni na 17, wanda ya kafa dokokin motsin taurari guda uku.
key_achievements: Kafa Dokokin Kepler guda uku na Motsin Taurari
Gabatarwa da tabbatar da ra'ayin hanyar ellipse
Rubuta littattafan "Astronomia nova" da "Harmonices Mundi"
fact_box.legacy_statement: Dokokinsa na motsin taurari sun zama tushe ga dokar Newton ta jan hankali na duniya, suna da tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban ilimin taurari na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
A bakin tekun New England mai dutse, inda iskar Atlantic mai tsanani ke ratsa har zuwa kashi, a kan wata kasa mai girma da inuwar yaki mai haske amma mai nauyi ta lullube ta, an haifi wani matashi mai rai, wanda jinin sarauta na da da rudanin sabon zamani suka gauraya. Yana kallon teku mara iyaka da ke shimfida a wajen taga tsohon gidan sarauta, zuciyarsa ta yaro ta ji sha'awar duniyar da ba a gani ba, da kuma nauyin babban kaddara da ke tafe a lokaci guda. Tsakanin labaran jarumai a cikin tsoffin littattafai da kuma gaskiyar rudani da ke gabansa, ya fara tafiya a kan hanya mai kadaici a cikin hasken alfijir mai rauni, yana neman abin da zai rike da abin da zai bari.

Yana ratsa harsasai masu zuba kamar ruwan sama a cikin hayaniyar yaki, tsoron mutuwa da ya wuce shi kamar iska ya kara masa karfi. A cikin karamin jirgin ruwa, tare da numfashin abokansa masu nauyi, ya rike wata manufa kamar yadda yake bin taurari masu rauni a cikin duhu mai zurfi. Nufin da ba ya karyewa a cikin yanke kauna mai tsanani, da kuma jajircewar tashi tsaye a cikin fatan da ya karye, ya sassaƙa su a cikin kasusuwansa da jikinsa. Kamar wutar da ke tashi daga toka, wahala ta koya masa yiwuwar sabuwar rayuwa, kuma raunuka sun ba shi zurfin fahimta.

A gaban jan tubalin Fadar White House, a kan matakin da idon duniya ke kansa, ya ci gaba da tafiya yana ratsa igiyoyin ruwa masu tsanani. A kan kaifin takobi tsakanin manufa da gaskiya, ya dauki babban nauyi da jajircewa marar sassauci, da imani marar girgiza. A cikin tilasta shiru da matsin lamba mai cike da damuwa, ya yi tafiya shi kadai a cikin sanyayyen corridor, yana hadiye wahalhalu da ba zai iya fada wa kowa ba. Amma a cikin muryarsa akwai wakar bege, kuma a cikin idanunsa akwai wutar da ke nuna gaba.

Kogin lokaci ya gudana, fuskarsa ba ta da matashiya kuma, amma tasirin da ya bari har yanzu yana raye a tare da mu. Jajircewar yin mafarki, kalubalen fuskantar abin da ba zai yiwu ba, da kuma sha'awar da ba ta karewa ga duniya mafi kyau, suna ratsa labulen lokaci kuma suna buga zukatan sabbin tsararraki. Labarinsa ba wai kawai tarihi ba ne, amma ya zama fitila mai haskaka mana hanyar da za mu bi a yau, yana ci gaba da bude sabbin hanyoyin yiwuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaba ne da aka haifa a lokacin rudani, ya fuskanci yaki kuma ya jagoranci duniya daga Fadar White House, ya bar gadon bege da jajircewa wanda har yau yake tasiri.
key_achievements: Ya shawo kan wahalhalun yaki kuma ya kafa nufi mai karfi.
Ya jagoranci lokacin rudani a fagen duniya.
Ya kunna wutar bege ga gaba.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Jajircewarsa da ruhin kalubale sun zama fitila ga duniya mafi kyau, suna gabatar da sabbin damammaki har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Sarauniya Victoria (1819-1901) ta kasance sarauniya wadda ta jagoranci Daular Burtaniya zuwa kololuwar ikonta a karni na 19, kuma ita ce sarauniya mafi dadewa a kan mulki a tarihin Burtaniya. An haife ta a ranar 24 ga Mayu, 1819, a Fadar Kensington da ke London, ga Duke Edward da Gimbiya Victoria na Saxe-Coburg-Saalfeld. Ba ta kai shekara daya ba da haihuwa mahaifinta ya rasu, hakan ya sanya ta shafe yarintarta cikin rashin uba. A lokacin, Burtaniya tana fuskantar sauye-sauye masu tsauri sakamakon Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu, inda al'umma ke fuskantar canje-canje masu yawa, kuma ikon sarauta ma yana fuskantar kalubale. A matsayinta na jikanyar George III kuma 'yar uwar George IV da William IV, ta zama ta farko a jerin masu gadon sarauta saboda rashin magada na halal ga kawunanta biyu. Ta girma a karkashin tsarin 'Kensington System' mai tsauri da ke killace ta, wanda mahaifiyarta da Sir John Conroy suka kafa. An ware ta daga duniyar waje, inda ta yi shiru tana shirya kanta don nauyin da ke jiranta a matsayin sarauniya mai zuwa. Wannan yanayi ya zama wata kafa da ta gina mata tunani mai zaman kansa da kuma jajircewa mai karfi tun tana karama.

A ranar 20 ga Yuni, 1837, rasuwar William IV ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Sarauniya Victoria, inda ta hau gadon sarauta tana da shekaru 18. Nan da nan bayan hawanta mulki, ta 'yantar da kanta daga tasirin mahaifiyarta da Sir Conroy, ta tabbatar da matsayinta a matsayin mai mulki mai zaman kanta. A farkon mulkinta, ta gina harsashin gudanar da mulki a karkashin jagorancin Lord Melbourne, wanda shi ne Firayim Minista a lokacin. A shekarar 1840, ta auri dan uwanta, Yarima Albert na Saxe-Coburg da Gotha, inda ta samu farin ciki na kashin kanta da kuma kwanciyar hankali na siyasa a lokaci guda. Yarima Albert ya kasance mai ba ta shawara mafi amana kuma abokin tafiyarta, inda ya taka rawa sosai wajen sabunta masarauta da kuma bunkasa kimiyya da masana'antu. Aurensu ya wuce kawai haduwa; ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan mulkin Sarauniya Victoria da kuma yadda jama'a ke kallon masarauta. Daga wannan lokaci ne 'Zamanin Victoria', wanda ke nuni ga lokacin mulkinta, ya fara samuwa, kuma an san shi da saurin bunkasar masana'antu, motsin gyaran zamantakewa, da kuma fadada Daular Burtaniya.

Amma rayuwar aurensu mai cike da farin ciki ta fuskanci wani juyi mai ban tausayi a watan Disamba na 1861, lokacin da Yarima Albert ya rasu ba zato ba tsammani. Wannan rashi ya jefa Sarauniya Victoria cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi, kuma ta ɓoye daga idon jama'a tsawon shekaru, inda aka ba ta laƙabin 'Bazawar Windsor', kuma a wani lokaci farin jinin masarauta ya ragu.
