Duk da baƙin cikinta na kashin kai, ta ci gaba da mulkin babbar Daular Burtaniya, kuma a lokacin mulkinta, daular ta kai kololuwar ikonta. Musamman ma, an yi ta fadada yankunan mulkin mallaka, ciki har da Indiya, wanda hakan ya kai ga Majalisar Dokokin Burtaniya ta ba ta ƙarin laƙabin 'Empress of India' a shekarar 1876. Ta yi aiki tare da Firayim Ministoci daban-daban kamar Benjamin Disraeli da William Gladstone, inda ta yi tafiya cikin yanayin siyasa mai sarkakiya, kuma ta yi tasiri a kan manufofi yayin da take riƙe da matsayinta na sarauniya mai bin tsarin mulki. A ƙarshen mulkinta, ta sake dawo da farin jininta a idon jama'a, inda ta zama alamar kwanciyar hankali da ƙarfin Daular Burtaniya.

Mulkinta na tsawon shekaru 63 da kwanaki 216 ya kasance mafi tsawo a cikin sarakunan Burtaniya kafin Sarauniya Elizabeth II, kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan Burtaniya da ma duniya baki daya. 'Zamanin Victoria', wanda aka sanya mata suna, ya zama kalmar da ke nuna sabbin abubuwa a masana'antu, ci gaban kimiyya, gyaran zamantakewa, da kuma kololuwar Daular Burtaniya. 'Ya'yanta tara sun auri sarakunan Turai daban-daban, inda aka ba ta laƙabin 'Kakar Turai', kuma hakan ya haifar da wata hanyar sarauta mai sarkakiya wadda ta yi tasiri a kan siyasar Turai a karni na 20. Mulkinta, wanda ya jaddada darajar iyali da tsaurin ɗabi'a, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen dawo da martabar masarauta. Har yau, gadonta yana ci gaba da rayuwa ta hanyar rawar da sarauniya mai bin tsarin mulki ke takawa, da kuma dimbin al'adu da gine-ginen zamaninta, da kuma hoton sarauniya mai ƙarfi amma mai bin ka'ida. Kamar yadda Bismarck na Jamus, wanda ya rayu a zamaninta, ya kafa harsashin Jamus mai haɗin kai, haka Sarauniya Victoria ta kafa asalin Daular Burtaniya kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a kan tarihin duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarauniya Victoria ta kasance sarauniyar Daular Burtaniya a karni na 19, wadda ta buɗe Zamanin Victoria kuma ta faɗaɗa daular.
key_achievements: Ta yi mulki na tsawon shekaru 63, inda ta buɗe Zamanin Victoria.
Ta jagoranci Daular Burtaniya zuwa kololuwar ikonta kuma ta faɗaɗa ta.
An ba ta laƙabin Empress of India daga Majalisar Dokokin Burtaniya a shekarar 1876.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinta ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan asalin Burtaniya ta zamani da kuma tsarin duniya.

parsed.narrative:
Thomas Jefferson (1743-1826) ya kasance uban kafa Amurka kuma shugaban kasa na uku, kuma shi ne marubucin sanarwar 'yancin kai ta Amurka. A tsakiyar karni na 18, yankunan mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya a Arewacin Amurka sun shiga wani lokaci na tashin hankali, inda rikici da kasar uwa ke kara kamari. An haife shi a yankin Virginia a matsayin ɗan wani mai gona mai arziki kuma mai aikin binciken ƙasa, Jefferson ya nutsa cikin karatu mai zurfi da ilimi tun yana yaro, kuma ya shiga cikin tunanin Haskakawa (Enlightenment) sosai. Bayan ya yi karatun shari'a a Kwalejin William & Mary, ya yi aiki a matsayin lauya, inda ya sami zurfin fahimtar haƙƙoƙin mazauna yankin. Tushen iliminsa da akidunsa na 'yanci sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da ra'ayi mai mahimmanci game da rashin daidaito da zalunci da suka yadu a cikin al'ummar mulkin mallaka a lokacin. Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai ta Amurka, wata takarda ce da aka amince da ita a ranar 4 ga Yuli, 1776, wata sanarwa ce ta tarihi da ta bayyana 'yancin kai na yankuna 13 daga Birtaniya, kuma ta tabbatar da daidaito da haƙƙoƙin da ba za a iya raba su ba na dukkan mutane. A wannan lokacin, ya fito a matsayin babban jigo wanda ya wakilci burin 'yancin kai a matsayin mai magana da yawun yankunan, yana zana taswirar sabuwar al'umma.

A shekarar 1776, lokacin da wutar Juyin Juya Halin 'Yancin Kai na Amurka ke ci, Thomas Jefferson ya shiga cikin Majalisar Nahiyar (Continental Congress) a matsayin memba, inda ya tsaya a wani muhimmin lokaci na tarihi. An zaɓe shi a matsayin babban jigo a kwamitin daftarin Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai, kuma ya kammala ɗaya daga cikin takardun siyasa mafi tasiri a tarihin ɗan adam, bisa ga falsafar Haskakawa kamar ra'ayin John Locke na haƙƙoƙin halitta da ka'idar Montesquieu na raba iko. Wannan sanarwa ta gabatar da ainihin akidar sabuwar al'umma ta hanyar jimloli masu juyin juya hali cewa 'An halicci dukkan mutane daidai, kuma Mahalicci ya ba su wasu haƙƙoƙi marasa raba, wato haƙƙin rayuwa, 'yanci, da neman farin ciki.' Amma, gibin da ke tsakanin manufofin wannan babban sanarwa da gaskiyar cewa yana da bayi a lokacin ya jefa inuwa mai rikitarwa a kan rayuwarsa da kimantawar da aka yi masa a baya. Bayan 'yancin kai, ya yi aiki a matsayin Gwamnan Virginia, inda ya sadaukar da kansa wajen kafa tushen sabuwar jamhuriya, yana kare 'yancin addini da kuma inganta gyare-gyaren ilimi. Daga baya, an tura shi a matsayin Jakadan Faransa, inda ya shaida jajibirin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa, kuma ya ba da gudummawa wajen karfafa matsayin Amurka a cikin rikice-rikicen siyasa na Turai.

Bayan ya dawo gida, Thomas Jefferson, wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin Sakataren Gwamnati na farko a gwamnatin George Washington, ya kafa Jam'iyyar Democratic-Republican a cikin tsananin rikicin akida da Alexander Hamilton, ta haka ya kafa tushen tsarin siyasar jam'iyyu biyu na Amurka. A shekarar 1801, ya hau kujerar shugabancin Amurka na uku, inda ya yi shekaru takwas yana jagorantar zaman lafiya da fadada sabuwar jamhuriya. Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman nasarorin da ya samu a lokacin mulkinsa shi ne sayen Louisiana daga Faransa a shekarar 1803. Sayen Louisiana ya ninka girman yankin Amurka, kuma ya kasance babban nasarar diflomasiyya da ta kafa tushen fadada zuwa Yamma. Ya tura balaguron Lewis da Clark don bincika wannan babban yanki, don tattara bayanan yanki da na halittu game da yankin Yamma da ba a sani ba. Bugu da kari, ya gudanar da aikin soja don kawar da 'yan fashin Barbary da ke barazana ga jiragen ruwan kasuwanci na Amurka a Tekun Bahar Rum, ta haka ya ba da gudummawa wajen tabbatar da tsaron kasuwancin teku na Amurka. Ya mai da hankali kan girmama ra'ayoyin 'yan tsiraru, da kafa 'yancin addini, magana, da bugawa, yana ƙoƙarin cimma manufofin jamhuriya.

Bayan ya sauka daga shugabancin kasa, Thomas Jefferson ya koma garinsu na Monticello, inda ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken ilimi da gudanar da gonaki. Ya kafa Jami'ar Virginia, yana jaddada muhimmancin ilimi, kuma ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban kamar gine-gine, kimiyya, da falsafa, yana nuna cikakken halinsa na mai ilimi. Bayan mutuwarsa, ruhun Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai cewa 'An halicci dukkan mutane daidai' ya zama babban darajar dimokuradiyyar Amurka, kuma manufofinsa na jamhuriya sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga 'yan siyasa da masu tunani na gaba. Amma, gadonsa mai rikitarwa na mallakar bayi har yau yana zama batun muhawara mai zafi a cikin al'ummar Amurka. Duk da haka, Thomas Jefferson, a matsayin mutumin da ya kafa tushen akidun kafa Amurka da tsarin ta, ya bar sawun da ba za a iya gogewa ba a tarihin Amurka, tare da sauran ubannin kafa kamar George Washington da James Madison.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Thomas Jefferson ya kasance ɗan siyasa na Amurka daga ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci rubuta Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai da sayen Louisiana.
key_achievements: Rubuta Sanarwar 'Yancin Kai ta Amurka (1776)
Ya yi aiki a matsayin Shugaban Amurka na uku (1801-1809)
Nasarar sayen Louisiana (1803)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Manufofinsa na 'yanci da jamhuriya sun zama tushen dimokuradiyyar Amurka kuma suna ci gaba da tasiri har yau.

parsed.narrative:
Ahn Jung-geun (安重根, 1879-1910) ya kasance jarumin kasa, mai fafutukar neman 'yanci da mai tunani a karshen Daular Daehan, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga 'yancin kai na kasarsa a kan mamayar daular Japan. Shekarar 1879, lokacin da aka haife shi, wani lokaci ne da Joseon ta bude tashoshin jiragen ruwanta a karkashin matsin lamba daga kasashen Yamma da Japan, kuma ta shiga cikin guguwar zamani. An haife shi a Haeju, Lardin Hwanghae, Ahn Jung-geun ya koyi karatun Sinanci na gargajiya da fasahar yaki tun yana karami, kuma a shekarar 1897, ya shiga Katolika, inda ya hadu da sabbin ilimomi kuma ya fadada fahimtarsa game da wayewar Yamma da al'amuran kasa da kasa. Fiye da samun ilimi kawai, ya fahimci rikice-rikicen al'ummar Joseon da kuma matsalar kasa a lokacin, yana bunkasa sha'awar ceton kasarsa. Musamman, yayin da Japan ta karfafa ikonta a kan yankin Koriya ta hanyar Yakin Sino-Japan da Yakin Russo-Japan, sannan ta kwace ikon diflomasiyya na Daular Daehan da Yarjejeniyar Eulsa ta 1905, Ahn Jung-geun ya shiga cikin ayyukan ilimi da kuma Yunkurin Biyan Bashin Kasa, yana neman hanyar samun 'yanci ta hanyar karfafa karfin kasa. Amma, yayin da mamayar daular Japan ta karu kuma yunkurin kwace ikon kasa da karfi ya bayyana fili, ya kai ga yanke shawara mai tsanani cewa hanyoyin lumana kadai ba za su iya ceton kasarsa ba.

A shekarar 1907, lokacin da makomar kasarsa ke rataye a kan igiya, Ahn Jung-geun, da ya ga cewa ci gaba da ayyuka a cikin kasar yana da wuya, ya tafi gudun hijira zuwa Manchuria kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga ayyukan sojojin adalci (義兵). Sojojin adalci kungiya ce ta yaki da Japan da aka kafa da son rai don kare 'yancin kai da ikon kasa, kuma ya jagorance su, yana fafatawa da sojojin Japan a kan iyaka. Amma, saboda yanayi mai tsanani da karancin kayan aiki, ayyukan sojojin adalci sun fuskanci matsaloli a hankali, kuma Ahn Jung-geun ya yi imanin cewa dole ne a dakatar da burin mamayar daular Japan ta hanyar da ta fi dacewa. A wannan lokacin, ya yanke shawarar kawar da Ito Hirobumi (伊藤博文), wanda aka gano a matsayin babban mai shirya mamayar Koriya kuma barazana ga zaman lafiya a Gabas, a matsayin Babban Mazaunin Farko na Daular Daehan. Kisan Ito Hirobumi wani lamari ne a ranar 26 ga Oktoba, 1909, lokacin da Ahn Jung-geun ya harbe Ito Hirobumi a tashar Harbin da ke Manchuria. Wannan ba ramuwar gayya ce ta sirri ba, sai dai juriya ce ta adalci a kan daular Japan, wacce ta take ikon Daular Daehan kuma ta lalata zaman lafiya a Gabas. Wannan babban aiki ya haifar da babban girgiza a cikin gida da kuma a duniya, ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya kawo sabon kuzari ga yunkurin 'yancin kai da ya tsaya cak.

Nan da nan bayan harbin Ito Hirobumi, an kama Ahn Jung-geun a wurin kuma aka daure shi a gidan yarin Lushun (旅順) ta hukumomin Japan, inda ya fuskanci tsananin tambayoyi da shari'a. Ko da a lokacin shari'ar, ya tabbatar da cewa ayyukansa aiki ne na adalci, yana lissafa laifuka 15 na Ito Hirobumi dalla-dalla don yin Allah wadai da ayyukan mamayar Japan. Bugu da kari, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba ga shari'ar daular Japan mara adalci kuma ya ci gaba da rike matsayinsa mai daraja a matsayin Laftanar Janar na Sojojin Adalci na Daehan. Ko da a cikin kurkuku, Ahn Jung-geun ya fara rubuta "Akan Zaman Lafiya a Gabas" (東洋平和論). "Akan Zaman Lafiya a Gabas" wani aiki ne da ba a kammala ba wanda ke dauke da ra'ayin cewa Koriya, Sin, da Japan ya kamata su hada kai don yakar daular Yamma da kuma cimma zaman lafiya a Gabashin Asiya, yana nuna zurfin fahimtarsa da kuma sha'awarsa ga zaman lafiya. Ta hanyar wannan rubutun, ya bi diddigin dabi'u na duniya fiye da kishin kasa kawai, yana jaddada cewa ayyukansa na zaman lafiya ne a Gabas. A ranar 14 ga Fabrairu, 1910, Kotun Yanki na Kwantung Leased Territory ta yanke wa Ahn Jung-geun hukuncin kisa, kuma bayan ya yi watsi da roko, ya mutu a matsayin shahidi a gidan yarin Lushun a ranar 26 ga Maris. Ko da har zuwa lokacinsa na karshe, burinsa mai karfi na neman 'yancin kai na kasarsa da zaman lafiya a Gabas bai girgiza ba.

Sadaukarwar Ahn Jung-geun mai daraja ta zama alama da ginshikin ruhaniya na yunkurin 'yancin kai a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan. Ayyukansa na adalci sun motsa kuma sun karfafa Koriya a gida da waje, ya zama tushe ga yunkurin 'yancin kai daban-daban da za su faru daga baya, kamar Yunkurin Maris 1 da kafa Gwamnatin Wucin Gadi ta Jamhuriyar Koriya. Musamman, rubuce-rubucen kira (遺墨) da ya bari a gidan yarin Lushun sun kasance wani gado mai daraja, yana isar da ruhinsa mai tsarki da kishin kasa ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Maganganunsa masu shahara, kamar "一日不讀書口中生荊棘 (Idan mutum bai karanta ba ko da kwana daya, kashin kifi zai fito a bakinsa)," suna ci gaba da ba da hikima da darussa ga rayuwa ga mutane da yawa har yau. "Akan Zaman Lafiya a Gabas" na Ahn Jung-geun yana nuna babban hangen nesansa na zaman lafiya da zaman tare, maimakon ramuwar gayya kawai, kuma har yanzu yana da muhimmiyar ma'ana a cikin dangantakar kasa da kasa da ilimin tarihi a yau. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa suna wakiltar dabi'u na duniya na bil'adama na adawa da zalunci da neman 'yanci da zaman lafiya, suna daidaita da ruhin sauran masu fafutukar 'yancin kai da suka rayu a lokaci guda, kamar Yun Bong-gil da Kim Gu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ahn Jung-geun ya kasance mai fafutukar 'yancin kai a karshen Daular Daehan, wanda ya kawar da Ito Hirobumi kuma ya ba da shawarar "Akan Zaman Lafiya a Gabas," yana sadaukar da kansa ga 'yancin kai na kasa.
key_achievements: Shiga da jagorancin ayyukan sojojin adalci
Kisan Ito Hirobumi a Harbin
Rubuta "Akan Zaman Lafiya a Gabas"
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarsa da tunaninsa sun kasance alama ce ta yunkurin 'yancin kai da kuma gadon ruhin zaman lafiya har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
A fadin filayen Manchuriya masu kura, bayan katangar birni mai ɗauke da shekaru marasa adadi, a cikin fadar da hasken rana mai jan hankali da duhu mai zurfi suka haɗu, iri guda na buri mai zafi ga kursiyin sarki da ba a sani ba yana tushe. Cikin riguna masu ja da iska mai sanyi ke kaɗawa, kururuwa da aka danne suka yi amo a kunnuwa, kuma labulen kaddara, wanda aka buɗe a ƙarƙashin hasken kyandir mai rauni, ya yi nisa sosai amma kuma kusa; wannan babban gidan yari ne, rami na Ɗan Sama, inda kyakkyawa mai wucewa da dabbobi masu zafin rai suka haɗu.

Cikin siliki mai shakewa, nauyin kursiyin sarauta ya zo mata a matsayin ciwo mai yanke kashi. Makirci da aka gina a cikin inuwa cikin shiru sun ratsa duhun dare, kuma rada-rada da suka shiga kunnuwa sun zama guba mai zaki, suna cinye rai. A kan matakala masu cike da tabo na jini ja, a cikin kallon raini da wulakanci, nufin juriya mai ƙarfi, yana saka gutsuttsarin fatan da ya karye, ko da yake mai rauni da haɗari, ya fi ƙarfe ƙarfi; wannan shine farkon gwagwarmaya mai kadaici wanda babu wanda ya fahimta.

A ranar da ta hau kursiyin sarauta a ƙarshe, umarni mai girgiza duniya ya girgiza sama da ƙasa. Kamar dodon da ya farka daga barcin shekaru dubu na zalunci, Empress Wu Zetian ta fara canza tafarkin tarihi ba tare da jinkiri ba. Hikimarta, mai gudana kamar kogi mai karkata, ta wadatar da al'umma, kuma azamar ta, mai tashi kamar tsaunuka masu wahala, ta kwantar da tarzoma. Furannin wayewa mai haske sun yi fure sosai, kuma murnar jama'a ta rera wakar sabon zamani, amma a bayan wannan ɗaukaka, inuwar kadaici wanda ba za a taɓa gogewa ba ta rataya.

A ƙarƙashin rawanin zinariya mai sanyi, burinta mai wuce zamani yana ci gaba da gudana kamar kogi mai zafi. Cikin tawadar da ke kan gashin fensir, numfashinta yana raye kuma yana numfashi, kuma a kan bangon dutse na tsohuwar fada wanda ya jure shekaru marasa adadi, ƙarfinta yana ci gaba da rada. Nufin ɗan adam mai haske ko da a cikin banza na mulki mai wucewa, wannan wasan kwaikwayo mai girma yana ba da zurfin amo a cikin zukatanmu har zuwa yau, yana haskawa har abada kamar tauraro marar ganuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Labarin wata mace wacce, saboda burin kursiyin sarauta na wani sarki da ba a sani ba, ta shawo kan matsaloli, ta hau mulki, kuma ta canza zamani.
key_achievements: Burin kursiyin sarauta da makirci mai zurfi
Shawo kan matsaloli kuma a ƙarshe ta zama Empress
Wadatar da al'umma da hikima da azama
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tauraro na har abada wanda, da nufin ɗan adam mai haske ko da a cikin banza na mulki, yana ba da zurfin amo har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Jeong Yak-yong (丁若鏞, 1762-1836) ya kasance fitaccen masanin Silhak, masanin falsafa, jami'in gwamnati, kuma masanin kimiyya na Joseon daga ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19, wanda ya gabatar da sabbin ra'ayoyi da hanyoyin gyara a cikin wani zamani mai cike da rudani. A wancan lokacin, Joseon tana fama da hargitsi da cin hanci da rashawa a duk faɗin al'umma saboda "siyasar sedo" da rikicin jam'iyyu, kuma rayuwar talakawa tana cikin matsanancin hali. A cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, fahimtar cewa tsarin Neo-Confucian na yanzu ba zai iya magance matsalolin zamantakewa ba ya yaɗu, kuma sabon tsarin ilimi da ake kira Silhak (實學) ya fito. Silhak wani fanni ne mai amfani da ke da nufin magance matsalolin gaske da inganta rayuwar mutane maimakon ka'idoji marasa ma'ana, kuma Jeong Yak-yong ya kasance babban jigo wanda ya haɗa kuma ya haɓaka wannan Silhak. An haife shi a shekara ta 1762 a Gwangju, lardin Gyeonggi (yanzu Namyangju), daga wata fitacciyar iyali, kuma ya nuna hazaka ta musamman tun yana ƙarami, yana mai zurfafa cikin ilimi. Musamman ma, ya gaji salon ilimi na malaminsa, Seongho Yi Ik, kuma ya fahimci akidar Silhak ta Gyeongsechiyong (經世致用 – amfani mai amfani don mulkin duniya) da wuri, wanda ya zama tushen manyan nasarorin iliminsa na gaba. Binciken iliminsa ya wuce samun ilimi kawai, yana mai da hankali kan fuskantar saɓani na al'ummar Joseon na zamani da neman matakan gyara na asali.

Ƙarfin ilimi na Jeong Yak-yong ya fara haskawa a ƙarƙashin tagomashin Sarki Jeongjo. Bayan ya ci jarrabawar ma'aikatan gwamnati a shekara ta 1789, ya shiga cikin siyasar gyara ta Jeongjo sosai, yana riƙe da manyan muƙamai a Gyujanggak (Laburaren Sarauta). Musamman ma, a lokacin ginin Hwaseong Fortress a Suwon, ya tsara "Geojunggi" (na'urar ɗaga kaya) ta amfani da fasahar kimiyya ta Yamma, wanda ya rage lokacin gini da farashi sosai, yana nuna ƙwarewarsa ta musamman wajen amfani da ilimin Silhak a cikin manufofin gaske. Duk da haka, aikinsa na gwamnati mai sauƙi ya fuskanci babban canji tare da mutuwar Sarki Jeongjo ba zato ba tsammani a shekara ta 1800. Bayan mutuwar Jeongjo, ƙungiyoyin Noron masu ra'ayin mazan jiya sun sami iko, kuma an fara murkushe ƙungiyoyin gyara sosai, wanda ya kai ga kololuwa a cikin tsanantawar Sinyu (Sinyu Persecution) na 1801. Ko da yake tsanantawar Sinyu an yi ta ne don murkushe Katolika, tana da babban niyyar siyasa don kawar da ƙungiyar Namin da ta goyi bayan manufofin gyara na Jeongjo. An zargi Jeong Yak-yong da hannu a cikin Katolika kuma ya fuskanci bala'in gudun hijira zuwa Gangjin. Wannan lamarin ya canza rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya, ya tilasta masa ya bar burinsa na zama jami'i kuma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci a gare shi don zurfafa cikin hanyar masanin ilimi.

Shekaru 18 na gudun hijira (1801-1818) a Gangjin sun kasance gwaji mai tsanani ga Jeong Yak-yong, amma a lokaci guda, lokaci ne na babban gwagwarmaya wanda ya ba da damar ƙwarewarsa ta ilimi ta bunƙasa. Duk da yanayin da ba shi da kyau, bai yanke kauna ba amma ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken ilimi da rubuce-rubuce. A gudun hijira, ta hanyar karatu mai yawa da zurfin tunani, ya tsara akidar Silhak ɗinsa kuma ya mai da hankali kan gabatar da tsare-tsaren gudanar da ƙasa masu kyau ga mutane. A wannan lokacin ne aka haifi manyan ayyukansa: "Mokminsimseo" (牧民心書), wanda ya tattauna ayyukan jami'ai masu mulkin mutane; "Heumheumsinseo" (欽欽新書), wanda ya jaddada gyaran tsarin hukunci da adalci a shari'a; da "Gyeongseyupyo" (經世遺表), wanda ya ƙunshi tsare-tsaren gyara ga tsarin ƙasa. Bugu da ƙari, ya bar kusan littattafai 500 a fannoni daban-daban kamar likitanci, labarin ƙasa, tarihi, da adabi, yana tabbatar da cewa shi ne babban masanin ilimi na ƙarshen zamanin Joseon. Ta hanyar waɗannan rubuce-rubucen, ya soki saɓani na al'ummar zamani da kaifi kuma ya nuna ƙarfin hali don inganta rayuwar mutane ta hanyar gabatar da matakan gyara masu amfani kamar inganta aikin gona, haɓaka kasuwanci da masana'antu, gyaran tsarin matsayi na zamantakewa, da gyaran ilimi.

A shekara ta 1818, yana da shekaru 57, Jeong Yak-yong an sake shi daga gudun hijira kuma ya koma garinsu, inda ya shafe sauran rayuwarsa a binciken ilimi da rubuce-rubuce. Bayan mutuwarsa, ra'ayoyinsa da nasarorinsa ba a kimanta su yadda ya kamata ba na wani lokaci, amma a lokacin aiwatar da zamani, an sake kimanta akidar Silhak ɗinsa, wanda ya kafa shi a matsayin babban mai tunani wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin ilimin Koriya. Ra'ayoyin Jeong Yak-yong ba wai kawai gadon baya ba ne amma har yanzu suna da daraja a yau. Ruhinsa na son mutane, tunani mai amfani da kimiyya, da ci gaba da neman adalci na zamantakewa ana ɗaukar su a matsayin muhimman halaye waɗanda al'ummar Koriya ta zamani ya kamata su bi. Musamman ma, ra'ayoyinsa na gyara ana sake fassara su daga hangen nesa na zamani a fannoni daban-daban kamar gudanarwa, shari'a, da tattalin arziki, suna zama batun bincike mai ci gaba. Ana tuna shi a matsayin majagaba masanin ilimi wanda, tare da sauran masana Silhak na ƙarshen zamanin Joseon, kamar Park Ji-won da Park Je-ga, suka nemi buɗe sabon zamani a kan tsohon tsarin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jeong Yak-yong ya kasance masanin Silhak na Joseon daga ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19, wanda ya haɗa ra'ayoyin gyara don mutane.
key_achievements: Haɗawa da tsara akidar Silhak
Rubuta littattafai kusan 500 ciki har da Mokminsimseo
Gudummawa ga kimiyya da fasaha, kamar tsara Geojunggi (na'urar ɗaga kaya)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa na gyara da hikimarsa mai amfani sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban al'ummar Koriya ta zamani da tabbatar da adalci.

parsed.narrative:
Mencius, wani masanin falsafa kuma mai tunani na Confucian na tsohuwar kasar Sin wanda aka haife shi a kusan shekara ta 372 K.Z., ana girmamawa a matsayin 'Sarki na Biyu' (亞聖) wanda ya gaji kuma ya bunkasa tunanin Confucius. Zamanin da ya yi aiki shi ne zamanin Jihohi Masu Yaki, lokacin da ikon daular Zhou ya ragu kuma sarakunan feudal ke gwagwarmaya don samun iko. Wannan lokaci ne da rayuwar talakawa ta lalace kuma suka sha wahala saboda yaki marar yankewa da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa, kuma akwai babban jin tsoron rugujewar dabi'un kirki da tsari a cikin al'umma gaba daya. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haifi Mencius a Zou (鄒, yanzu Shandong), kuma an ce ya yi karatu a karkashin Zisi (子思), jikan Confucius. Ta hanyar koyarwar malaminsa, ya fahimci kyawawan halayen dan Adam na asali da kuma muhimmancin shugabanci na adalci, kuma ya sanya burin rayuwarsa ya zama gina al'umma mai kyau bisa ga Renyi (仁義), wato, soyayya ga dan Adam da adalci. Tunaninsa bai takaita ga binciken ilimi kawai ba, amma ya samo asali ne daga tsananin sha'awar ceton mutane masu wahala da gyara duniya mai rudani.

Mencius ya zagaya jihohin feudal daban-daban, yana wa'azin Wangdao Politics (王道政治) don cimma burinsa. Wangdao Politics tana nufin tsarin mulki mai kyau wanda ya dogara ga ka'idodin dabi'a, yana ba da fifiko ga walwala da farin ciki na jama'a. Ya jaddada cewa dole ne sarakuna su watsar da Badao Politics (覇道政治), wato dogaro ga karfi da dukiya, kuma su yi mulki da Renyi kawai don cimma hadin kai da kwanciyar hankali na gaskiya a duniya. Amma, yawancin sarakunan lokacin sun shagaltu ne kawai da Fuguo Qiangbing (富國強兵), wato wadatar da kasa da karfafa sojoji, kuma ba su saurari koyarwarsa ba. A cikin tattaunawarsa da Sarki Xuan na Qi (제나라 선왕), Mencius ya nuna iyakokin mulkin da ke watsi da wahalar jama'a, yana jaddada alhakin dabi'a na mai mulki da muhimmancin jama'a. Duk da wadannan takaici, Mencius ya yi imani da gaske ga Xingshan Theory (性善說), wato kyawawan halayen dan Adam na asali. Xingshan Theory ita ce babban ra'ayinsa cewa dabi'ar dan Adam an haife ta da 'Farkon Hudu' (四端) na Ren (仁), Yi (義), Li (禮), Zhi (智), kuma mugunta tana faruwa ne saboda yanayi na waje, kuma wannan ya zama tushen manufofinsa na siyasa da ka'idodin ilimi.

Duk da yawon shakatawa da yawa da kuma rashin iya aiwatar da manufofinsa a cikin siyasar gaskiya, Mencius bai yanke kauna ba, amma ya kara sadaukar da kansa ga binciken ilimi da horar da almajirai. Ya koma garinsu kuma ya yi aiki tare da almajiransa don tsara da tsarin tunaninsa, kuma a cikin wannan tsari ne aka tattara littafin "Mencius" (『맹자』), wanda ke dauke da falsafarsa da tattaunawarsa da sarakuna. Wannan littafi ya kunshi zurfin falsafar Mencius da fahimtarsa ta siyasa gaba daya, kuma daga baya ya zama babban littafi na tunanin Confucian. Ta hanyar "Mencius," ya yi kira sosai ga Minben Zhuyi (民本主義). Minben Zhuyi ita ce ra'ayin cewa tushen kasa yana ga jama'a, kuma rayuwa da walwala na jama'a sune mafi girman fifiko na siyasa kuma tushen halaccin masu mulki, yana ganin cewa jama'a sun fi mai mulki muhimmanci. Ya yi ikirari mai ban mamaki cewa mai mulkin kama-karya za a iya watsar da shi ta hanyar jama'a, har ma ya amince da halaccin Yixing Geming (易姓革命), wato 'yancin juyin juya hali. Wadannan ra'ayoyinsa sun kasance gaskiya mai ban haushi ga sarakunan da ke da cikakken iko a lokacin, amma sun nuna tabbacin gaskiyarsa na neman shugabanci na adalci daga mahangar jama'a.

Tunanin Mencius bai yi fice sosai ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, amma bayan mutuwarsa ya zama babban jigon tunanin Confucian tsawon karnoni, yana yin tasiri sosai ga tarihi da al'adun Gabashin Asiya. Musamman a lokacin daular Song, lokacin da Zhu Xi (朱熹) ya tattara "Mencius" tare da "Analects," "Great Learning," da "Doctrine of the Mean" a matsayin 'Littattafai Hudu' (四書), ya zama littafi mai muhimmanci ga masana Confucian. An karbe shi a matsayin babban darasi a jarabawar ma'aikatan gwamnati, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara tsarin tunani na masana. Xingshan Theory dinsa ta jaddada mutuncin dan Adam da damar ilimi, tana samar da tushen dabi'un Gabashin Asiya, kuma ra'ayoyinsa na Wangdao Politics da Minben Zhuyi sun ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga tattaunawa kan samfuran mulki masu kyau da halaccin siyasa. Har yau, tunanin Mencius yana ba da zurfin tunani game da dabi'ar dan Adam tare da gabatar da dabi'u na duniya don al'umma mai adalci da shugabanci mai alhaki, yana ci gaba da kasancewa mai dacewa a cikin al'ummar zamani. Tunaninsa ya bambanta da sauran masana na Makarantun Tunani Dari (諸子百家) wadanda suka nemi mafita daban-daban a cikin wannan lokaci mai rudani, misali, Xinge Theory (性惡說) na Xunzi (荀子) ko tunanin Legalist (法家) na Han Fei (韓 Fei), yana ba da zurfin fahimta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mencius (孟子) wani masanin falsafa ne na Confucian na kasar Sin a zamanin Jihohi Masu Yaki, wanda ya yi kira ga Xingshan Theory da Wangdao Politics, kuma ya gaji kuma ya bunkasa tunanin Confucius.
key_achievements: Ya yi kira ga Xingshan Theory (性善說) don zurfafa tunanin Confucian.
Ya wa'azin Wangdao Politics (王道政治) yana gabatar da mulki mai kyau.
Ya yada tunaninsa ga zuriyar baya ta hanyar littafinsa 『Mencius』.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga siyasa, dabi'a, da ilimi a Gabashin Asiya, kuma yana ba da tunani game da dabi'ar dan Adam da shugabanci mai kyau.

parsed.narrative:
Sima Qian (kimanin 145 BC ko 135 BC – kimanin 86 BC) ya kasance babban masanin tarihi na daular Han ta Yamma kuma Babban Masanin Tarihi (Taishiling), mutumin da ya buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a rubutun tarihi na kasar Sin. An haife shi a lokacin da daular Han ta kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi kuma tana jin daɗin ci gaban al'adu. Mahaifinsa, Sima Tan, shi ma ya yi aiki a matsayin Babban Masanin Tarihi, yana riƙe da muhimmin matsayi da ke da alhakin lura da taurari da rubuta tarihi, kuma yana da babban burin tattara cikakken tarihi (Tongshi) wanda zai haɗa dukkan tarihin kasar Sin. Sima Qian tun yana yaro ya sadaukar da kansa ga ilimi a ƙarƙashin tasirin mahaifinsa, kuma tun yana ɗan shekara ashirin, ya yi tafiye-tafiye a sassa daban-daban na kasar Sin, yana tattara bayanai masu yawa da kayan tarihi. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya gani sun zama kadarori masu mahimmanci a gare shi daga baya wajen rubuta babban littafin tarihi, "Shiji" (Tarihin Babban Masanin Tarihi). Babban aikinsa, "Shiji," shi ne cikakken tarihi na farko (Tongshi) da ya rubuta kimanin shekaru 2,000 na tarihin kasar Sin mai yawa, tun daga zamanin Sarkin Yellow (Huangdi) har zuwa zamanin Sarkin Wu na Han (Han Wudi), a cikin tsarin annal-biography (Jizhuanti), yana haskaka tafarkin tarihi ta hanyar labarin da ya fi mayar da hankali kan mutane.

Rayuwar Sima Qian ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba, kuma musamman, lamarin Li Ling da ya faru a shekara ta 99 BC ya kasance wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya girgiza makomarsa gaba ɗaya. A wancan lokacin, Janar Li Ling, wanda ya tafi yaƙar Xiongnu bisa umarnin Sarkin Wu na Han (Han Wudi), ya yi yaƙi da jaruntaka duk da cewa an fi shi yawa, amma daga ƙarshe an kewaye shi kuma ya mika wuya. Lokacin da manyan jami'an kotu suka zargi Li Ling kuma suka nemi a kashe shi, Sima Qian shi kaɗai ya kare jaruntaka da aminci na Li Ling, yana mai cewa ya yi yaƙi da dukkan ƙarfinsa. Amma faɗin gaskiyarsa ya jawo fushin Sarkin Wu na Han, kuma Sima Qian ya shiga cikin wani yanayi mai ban tausayi inda dole ne ya zaɓi tsakanin kisa ko kuma yanke al'aura (Gongxing) saboda laifin kalubalantar ikon sarki. A wancan lokacin, yanke al'aura an ɗauke shi a matsayin abin kunya fiye da mutuwa ga malami-jami'i, kuma yawancin mutane sun zaɓi kashe kansu don girmansu. Wannan lamarin ya haifar da ciwo mai tsanani na tunani da na jiki ga Sima Qian, amma a lokaci guda, ya zama dama da ta canza alkiblar rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya.

Bayan ya karɓi mummunar hukuncin yanke al'aura, Sima Qian ya sha wahala daga zurfin yanke kauna da kunya. Duk da haka, ya yi watsi da jarabar mutuwa kuma ya zaɓi rayuwa, saboda ƙaƙƙarfan azama ta kammala aikin tattara littafin tarihi wanda mahaifinsa, Sima Tan, bai iya cimmawa ba a lokacin rayuwarsa. Bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba a cikin kurkuku mai sanyi, ko kuma a cikin wulakancin duniya. Duk da ciwon jiki da kuma kunyar jama'a, Sima Qian ya sadaukar da komai don kammala "Shiji." Ya bincika kayan tarihi marasa adadi daga zamanin da zuwa zamaninsa, ya bincika ayyukan mutane da cikakkun bayanai na abubuwan da suka faru, kuma wani lokaci, ya nuna wahalarsa don bayyana farin ciki da baƙin ciki na mutane a fili. Wannan gwagwarmaya a cikin wahala ta sanya "Shiji" zurfin fahimtar ɗan adam da kuma mahimmin ra'ayi na tarihi fiye da jerin abubuwa kawai, kuma gwagwarmayar da ya fuskanta ta zama ƙarfin da ya sa ya gano gaskiyar tarihi da kaifi.

"Shiji," wanda Sima Qian ya kammala a cikin wahala, ya ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi a kan tarihin kasar Sin da adabinta har bayan mutuwarsa, ya kafa kansa a matsayin gado marar mutuwa. Fiye da rubutun tarihi na yau da kullun, "Shiji" ya gabatar da misali na labarin salon annal-biography, yana haɗa tarihin rayuwar mutane da yanayin tarihi a haɗe. Wannan ya zama tsarin asali don tattara Tarihin Ashirin da Huɗu (Ershisi Shi), tarihin hukuma (Zhengshi) na kasar Sin, kuma ya yi tasiri mai mahimmanci a kan hanyar rubuta tarihi a Gabashin Asiya. Bugu da ƙari, "Shiji" an kuma ɗauke shi a matsayin aikin da ke da ƙimar adabi mai ban mamaki, yana zaburar da marubuta na baya, kuma har yanzu ana ba da labarai da karin magana marasa adadi na mutanensa a yau. Ra'ayin tarihi mai mahimmanci da kuma mai adalci na Sima Qian, da kuma ruhinsa na ƙoƙarin rubuta gaskiya ko da a cikin wahala, yana da tasiri mai zurfi ga masana tarihi da masu ilimi a kowane zamani. Rayuwarsa da nasarorinsa suna da daraja mai kama da ruhin rubuce-rubuce na masana tarihi na da, kamar Herodotus ko Thucydides a Yamma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sima Qian babban masanin tarihi ne na daular Han ta Yamma, wanda ya kafa tushen rubutun tarihi na kasar Sin ta hanyar rubuta "Shiji."
key_achievements: Rubutawa da kammala "Shiji"
Kafa salon rubutun tarihi na annal-biography (Jizhuanti)
Fuskantar hukuncin yanke al'aura saboda lamarin Li Ling
fact_box.legacy_statement: "Shiji" nasa ya zama abin koyi ga littattafan tarihi na kasar Sin na gaba, kuma ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan ra'ayin tarihi na Gabashin Asiya.

parsed.narrative:
Tsohon itace wanda ba ya zama ga tsuntsu mai launi mai ban sha'awa, ciyawar gefen kogi inda hazo mai kauri ke shawagi, da kuma hamadar zamanin bazara da kaka inda kura mai launin rawaya ke tashi. A wurin da kukan tsoffin mutane ke tashi a cikin sautin tsohuwar garaya, wani mutum yana kallon banza na duniya shi kaɗai a cikin tsoffin tufafinsa. Sha'awar banza ta daraja ta jami'ai da ke daure da mukamai, da kuma gaskiyar da ke cike da warin jini na filin yaƙi, sun kasance kamar ƙura da ke gurɓata tunaninsa mai tsabta. Ya riƙe sandar kamun kifi maimakon goga, yana ƙoƙarin neman gaskiya a cikin motsin kifin. Sha'awar mutane marasa amfani kamar akwatin goga mara komai ta jura shi cikin zurfin kaɗaici, amma wannan kaɗaici ba zalunci ba ne, sai dai farkon 'yanci marar iyaka.

Wani yanayi mai ban sha'awa inda ya zama malam buɗe littafi ya tashi sama a cikin mafarki, kuma lokacin da ya farka, ya kasa gane ko shi malam buɗe littafi ne, ko kuma shi ne ke mafarkin malam buɗe littafi. Ya gyara tsohuwar hularsa, ya jawo keken da ke ruri, ya bi ta hanyar daji. A cikin ƙamshin furannin daji da ke warwatse a tsaunuka da kwaruruka, da raɗaɗin rassan itatuwa da ke motsawa da iska, da kuma wasan hasken rana da ke nunawa a cikin rafi, ya gane yadda dokoki da tsarin da duniya ta ƙirƙira suke da banza. Ya ji tausayin mutanen duniya da ke daure kamar da sarka, amma ya koyi yadda ake rawa shi kaɗai a cikin babban sararin samaniya, ya fita daga ƙaramin shingen su.

Waɗanda ke neman manyan mukamai da dukiya ba su fahimci maganarsa ba. A cikin hayaniyar kasuwa, ya ci gaba da kaɗa tsohuwar garaya a hankali, kuma ya rubuta ba tare da tsayawa ba da goga mai tsufa. Rubutunsa ba a rubuta shi da goga ba, amma yana da 'yanci kamar gashin tsuntsu da iska ke shawagi, ko ganyen itace da ke shawagi a kan ruwa. Ya fita daga dukkan zalunci da takurawa na duniya, yana binciken ainihin ma'anar rayuwa da ke gudana kamar gajimare, kuma ya yi dariya tare da sararin sama mara komai a kan tsohuwar tabarma. Baƙin ciki na waɗanda ke daure a cikin duniyar wauta, da farin ciki na waɗanda suka sami 'yanci, sun bayyana a fuskarsa a hankali.

Kogin lokaci ya gudana, tsohuwar tabarma da keken da ke ruri sun ɓace, amma labarinsa har yanzu yana yawo a duniya kamar iska. A cikin idanun yaro da ke kallon sararin sama mara komai, da kuma cikin gajiya ta matafiyi da ya gaji da bin daraja ta wucin gadi, ya tashi kamar malam buɗe littafi ya sake zuwa kusa da mu. Tunaninsa goga ne wanda ba ya ƙarewa, dariyarsa kuma waƙa ce wadda ba ta tsufa, tana sa malam buɗe littafi na 'yanci da fahimta ya tashi ga rayukanmu da ke daure a cikin gaskiyar da ba ta da daɗi. Har yau, muryarsa tana raye, kuma tana zama fitila da ke jagorantar mu mu sami ainihin hanyar rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mai hikima wanda ya bar mukami, ya binciki 'yanci da gaskiya a cikin yanayi, kuma ya wuce sha'awar duniya.
key_achievements: Kin amincewa da mukamai, binciken gaskiya a cikin yanayi
Neman 'yanci ta hanyar tunanin mafarkin malam buɗe littafi
Fita daga zalunci, binciken ma'anar rayuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa mai 'yanci da fahimtarsa sun zama fitila ga tsararraki masu zuwa don neman ainihin hanyar rayuwa, suna ba su kwarin gwiwa.

parsed.narrative:
Zhuge Liang (諸葛亮, 181-234) ya kasance Firayim Minista kuma fitaccen ɗan siyasa na Shu Han a lokacin Masarautu Uku na China. Lokacin da aka haife shi, a ƙarshen daular Han ta Gabas, ikon sarauta ya faɗi ƙasa, kuma sarakunan yaƙi sun mamaye ko'ina, suna jefa duniya cikin hargitsi mai tsanani. Jama'a sun sha wahala a cikin yaƙe-yaƙe da yunwa, kuma muradin sabon tsari ya ƙaru. An haifi Zhuge Liang a wannan zamanin na hargitsi, ya rasa iyayensa tun yana yaro, kuma ya zauna a ɓoye a Longzhong, Xiangyang, Jing Province, yana mai da hankali kan karatu. Ya kira kansa 'Wolong' (Dragon mai barci), yana kallon guguwar duniya, kuma ya zurfafa bincike kan tsoffin littattafai da dabarun yaƙi, yana haɓaka hikimar fahimtar yanayin zamanin hargitsi. A lokacin, mutane masu basira da yawa sun fita neman shugabanninsu, amma Zhuge Liang ya zauna a ɓoye, yana jiran lokacinsa, kuma yana haɓaka hangen nesa don fahimtar yanayin duniya. Wannan rayuwarsa ta ɓoye ta zama tushen manyan shirye-shiryen da zai aiwatar a nan gaba.

Wani muhimmin lokaci a rayuwar Zhuge Liang shine haɗuwarsa da Liu Bei. Liu Bei, wanda a lokacin ba shi da tushe mai ƙarfi amma yana da burin farfaɗo da daular Han, ya ji labarin Zhuge Liang kuma ya ziyarce shi sau uku a matsayin alamar girmamawa (San Gu Chao Lu). Zhuge Liang ya gabatar wa Liu Bei da 'Dabarar Raba Duniya Uku' (Tian Xia San Fen Zhi Ji), yana bayyana dabarar kafa iko daidai da Wei da Wu, ta hanyar amfani da Jing Province da Yi Province a matsayin tushe, don raba duniya zuwa kashi uku. Wannan dabara ta zama jagora mai mahimmanci ga Liu Bei wajen kafa Shu Han, kuma Zhuge Liang ya sami amincewar Liu Bei, yana tsayawa a gefensa a matsayin mai ba da shawara na soja. Musamman ma, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen cin nasarar Liu Bei a Yi Province, ta hanyar amfani da gundumomi huɗu na kudancin Jing Province a matsayin tushe, yana kafa harsashin Shu Han. A shekara ta 221, lokacin da Liu Bei ya zama sarki, Zhuge Liang ya zama Firayim Minista, yana kula da harkokin cikin gida da na waje, kuma ya tabbatar da tushen Shu Han. Dabaru da hangen nesansa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen mayar da babban burin Liu Bei gaskiya a cikin wannan zamanin na hargitsi.

Lokacin da Liu Bei ya rasu a Baidicheng a shekara ta 223, Zhuge Liang ya zama babban minista mai kula da dukkan harkokin Shu Han, yana ba da shawara ga matashin sarki Liu Shan. Duk da cewa ya ji kalaman Liu Bei a kan gadon mutuwa cewa "idan sarki bai da basira, kai ne ya kamata ka hau gadon sarauta," ya yi biyayya ga Liu Shan da cikakken aminci, yana neman zaman lafiya ga Shu Han. Bayan ya daidaita yankunan kudancin da ke da kabilu daban-daban don tabbatar da tsaro a baya, Zhuge Liang ya fara balaguron arewa don murkushe Wei da farfaɗo da daular Han, kamar yadda Liu Bei ya yi buri. Daga 227 zuwa 234, tsawon shekaru takwas, ya kai hari sau biyar a yankunan Yong Province da Liang Province na Wei, yana yin yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi. A cikin wannan tsari, ya gabatar da 'Chu Shi Biao' (Memorandum on the Expedition), yana bayyana amincinsa da babban burin balaguron arewa, wanda ya zama rubutu mai daraja da aka watsa ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Ko da yake balaguron arewa bai yi nasara gaba ɗaya ba, Zhuge Liang ya yi iyakar ƙoƙarinsa don tabbatar da wanzuwar Shu Han, duk da ƙarancin ƙarfin ƙasa, tare da basirarsa ta soja da kuma jajircewarsa.

Zhuge Liang ya rasu yana da shekaru 54 a sansanin Wuzhangyuan a lokacin balaguron arewa na biyar a shekara ta 234, yana kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da rudani. Mutuwarsa ta kasance babban rashi ga Shu Han, kuma bayan haka, Shu Han ta fara tafiya kan hanyar raguwa. Duk da haka, Zhuge Liang ana tunawa da shi har abada a matsayin alamar dabaru da aminci a tarihin China. Manyan dabarunsa da dabaru na yaƙi, da kuma amincinsa marar canzawa ga sarkinsa, sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana tarihi da marubuta na gaba, kuma ya zama sananne ga jama'a ta hanyar littafin 'Romance of the Three Kingdoms', yana kafa kansa a matsayin wani hali na tatsuniya. Ya wuce Firayim Minista kawai, ana girmama shi a matsayin misali na mai ba da shawara na soja mai kyau da kuma ɗan siyasa mai hikima. Har yau, hikimarsa da jagorancinsa suna zama abin koyi ga mutane da yawa, kuma sunansa ana amfani da shi a matsayin kalma mai ma'ana ga basira mai ban mamaki wajen magance matsaloli masu wuya. Dabarunsa da amincinsa ana kwatanta su da falsafar mulkin wasu mutane na zamaninsa, kamar Cao Cao ko Sun Quan, kuma suna zama muhimmin ma'auni don fahimtar hadaddun halayen mutane na zamanin Masarautu Uku.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Zhuge Liang ya kasance Firayim Minista na Shu Han a lokacin Masarautu Uku, ya taimaki Liu Bei wajen kafa Shu Han kuma ya jagoranci balaguron arewa.
key_achievements: Ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa Shu Han tare da Liu Bei
Ya ba da shawara ga Liu Shan kuma ya jagoranci siyasar Shu Han
Ya jagoranci balaguron arewa sau biyar a kan Wei
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kasance alamar dabaru da aminci, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin da al'adun Gabashin Asiya.

parsed.narrative:
Ashoka (wanda ya yi mulki daga kimanin 268 K.Z. zuwa 232 K.Z.) ya kasance sarki na uku na daular Mauryan, wanda ya mulki Magadha a tsohuwar Indiya, kuma ya jagoranci daular zuwa kololuwar daukakarta, yana mulkin wani yanki mai fadi a yankin Indiya. Daularsa ta yi alfahari da girma mai ban mamaki, tana shimfida daga babban birninta Pataliputra, zuwa yamma har zuwa Afghanistan ta yau, kuma zuwa gabas har zuwa Bangladesh. Ashoka an haife shi jikan Chandragupta Maurya, wanda ya kafa daular Mauryan, kuma dan sarki na biyu Bindusara. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin soja da kuma iyawar mulki. Kafin ya hau karagar mulki, ya yi aiki a matsayin gwamnan yankuna daban-daban, inda ya sami gogewa a fannin gudanarwa da soja na daular, musamman ma ya nuna jagoranci mai karfi wajen murkushe tawayen Taxila. Ko da yake daular Mauryan ta riga ta mallaki manyan yankuna tare da karfin sojojinta, Ashoka ya fuskanci gasa mai tsanani da 'yan uwansa a lokacin gadon sarauta, kuma dole ne ya tabbatar da ikonsa. A cikin wannan yanayi, ya hau kan karagar mulki da babban burin hadin kai da fadada daular.

A farkon mulkin Ashoka, ya ci gaba da manufofin cin nasara na sarakunan da suka gabace shi, yana mai da hankali kan fadada yankin daular. Kimanin shekara ta takwas ta mulkinsa, Ashoka ya kaddamar da babban yaki don cinye Kalinga, wata masarauta mai karfi da ke gabar tekun gabashin Indiya. Wannan yakin Kalinga ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Ashoka da kuma tarihin daular Mauryan. Bayan gwagwarmaya mai tsanani, sojojin Mauryan sun yi nasara, amma sakamakon yakin ya kasance mai ban tsoro. Dubban daruruwan sojoji da fararen hula sun mutu, kuma an kama mutane da yawa ko kuma sun sha wahala a cikin yanayi mai ban tausayi. Bayan nasarar, Ashoka ya zagaya filin yaki da kansa, inda ya ga dimbin asarar rayuka da kuma kasar da aka lalata, kuma ya shiga cikin wani babban firgici da nadama. Wannan kwarewa ta sa ya fahimci rashin amfanin yaki da kuma banza na tashin hankali, kuma ya haifar da babban canji a cikin zuciyarsa. Ya fara neman hanyar zaman lafiya da jin kai, maimakon cin nasara ta hanyar karfi, kuma a karshe ya rungumi addinin Buddha, yana kafa sabon tsarin mulki.

Bayan yakin Kalinga, Ashoka ya bude sabon zamani na mulkin daular, yana mai da koyarwar Buddha, Dharma (dokar addinin Buddha), a matsayin falsafar mulkinsa. Ya dakatar da yakin cin nasara mai tashin hankali, kuma ya bi mulkin zaman lafiya bisa Dharma, wato 'cin nasara ta Dharma (Dharma-vijaya)'. Don yada ruhun rashin tashin hankali, jin kai, da hakuri na addinin Buddha, Ashoka ya sassaƙa kuma ya sanar da umarnai masu yawa na Ashoka (Edicts of Ashoka) a kan duwatsu ko ginshiƙai a duk faɗin daular. Waɗannan umarnai sun jaddada rayuwa mai kyau da alhakin zamantakewa ga jama'a, kuma sun ƙunshi jagororin ɗabi'a daban-daban kamar haƙurin addini, kare dabbobi, da inganta jin dadin jama'a. Ya kuma taka rawa mai mahimmanci wajen yada addinin Buddha zuwa yankuna masu fadi kamar Sri Lanka, Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya, da Yammacin Asiya, ta hanyar tura sufaye na Buddha zuwa kasashen waje. Musamman ma, labarin tura dansa Mahendra da 'yarsa Sanghamitra zuwa Sri Lanka don yada addinin Buddha sananne ne. Ashoka ya tallafa wa ci gaban addinin Buddha sosai ta hanyar gina gidajen ibada na Buddha da stupas, da kuma tattara littattafan Buddha, yana ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga yaduwar addinin Buddha fiye da yankin Indiya zuwa duk faɗin Asiya.

Mulkin Ashoka Mai Girma ana daukarsa a matsayin daya daga cikin manyan lokuta a tarihin Indiya, kuma gadonsa yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi har zuwa yau. Ya yi kokarin cimma mulki bisa ka'idojin ɗabi'a da da'a, yana nisantar mulki ta hanyar karfi, kuma wannan ya ba da misali na mulki mai kyau ga daulolin Indiya na gaba. Musamman ma, a matsayinsa na mai tallafawa addinin Buddha, ya taka rawa mai mahimmanci wajen yada addinin Buddha a duk faɗin Asiya, yana kafa harsashin ci gaban addinin Buddha a matsayin addini na duniya. A yau, 'Ashoka Chakra' da aka sassaƙa a tsakiyar tutar Jamhuriyar Indiya yana nuna falsafar mulkinsa na Dharma, kuma 'Ginshiƙan Ashoka' da ya gina suna nuna kololuwar fasahar fasaha da gine-gine na tsohuwar Indiya, yayin da suke isar da sakonsa har abada. Ruhun zaman lafiya da jin kai na Ashoka har yanzu yana da daraja a cikin al'ummar zamani, kuma falsafar mulkinsa ta zaburar da sarakuna da yawa na Gabas, kuma tare da sauran manyan sarakuna waɗanda suka bi manufar zaman lafiya da jin kai, ya bar babban tarihi a tarihin bil'adama.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ashoka, sarki na uku na daular Mauryan, ya rungumi addinin Buddha bayan yakin Kalinga, ya ba da gudummawa ga mulkin zaman lafiya da yada addinin Buddha a Asiya.
key_achievements: Fadada daular Mauryan zuwa mafi girman yankinta
Juyawa zuwa addinin Buddha bayan yakin Kalinga
Ba da gudummawa ga yada addinin Buddha a duk faɗin Asiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa bisa addinin Buddha da kuma manufar zaman lafiya sun yi tasiri mai girma a kan al'adun Indiya da tarihin addini na Asiya.

parsed.narrative:
King Jeongjo (正祖, an haife shi a 1752) sarki ne mai girma kuma fitaccen masanin kimiyya wanda ya jagoranci zamanin Joseon na baya zuwa gyare-gyare da farfaɗowar fasaha a cikin lokaci mai cike da rudani. A karni na 18, Joseon ya fuskanci yanayi mai cike da rudani, inda rikicin bangaranci ya ci gaba da tsananta kuma ikon sarauta ya raunana, duk da manufar Tangpyeong ta King Yeongjo. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, King Jeongjo an haife shi a ranar 28 ga Oktoba, 1752, a matsayin ɗan Yarima Sado mai mummunan rabo da Lady Hyegyeong Hong. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna basira ta musamman da hazaka a fannin ilimi, amma dole ne ya girma a cikin zurfin raunin mutuwar mahaifinsa, Yarima Sado, da kuma matsin lamba na siyasa. Kakansa, King Yeongjo, ya naɗa jikansa King Jeongjo a matsayin Yarima kuma ya horar da shi kai tsaye, yana ƙoƙarin kafa halaccin gadon sarauta, amma adawa daga ƙungiyoyin adawa, musamman Noron Byeokpa, ba ta taɓa tsayawa ba. Wannan yanayi ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci ga King Jeongjo don ƙarfafa niyyarsa ta aiwatar da gyare-gyare bisa ga ikon sarauta mai ƙarfi a nan gaba. Tun kafin hawansa gadon sarauta, ya riga ya fahimci rikicin ƙasar kuma ya nemi hanyoyin shawo kan shi, yana haɓaka iyawarsa a matsayin sarki na gaba.

A ranar 27 ga Afrilu, 1776, King Jeongjo ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin sarki na 22 na Joseon. Nan da nan bayan hawansa, ya bayyana cewa, "Ni ɗan Yarima Sado ne," yana mai tabbatar da halaccinsa da kuma nuna niyyarsa ta fuskantar rikicin siyasa da ke tattare da mutuwar mahaifinsa kai tsaye. Wannan ya zama babban girgiza da ƙalubale ga Noron Byeokpa, ƙungiyar da ke mulki a lokacin. King Jeongjo ya kafa Gyujanggak (奎章閣) a matsayin babban manufa don ƙarfafa ikon sarauta. Gyujanggak ba kawai ɗakin karatu na sarauta ba ne, amma ya yi aiki a matsayin babbar cibiyar ilimi da kuma wurin haifuwar gyare-gyare, yana horar da hazaka, binciken manufofin sarki, da kuma jagorantar ayyukan ilimi. Ta hanyar wannan cibiya, ya naɗa matasa masu basira waɗanda ba su da alaƙa da ƙungiyoyin da suka gabata kuma ya kafa tushen ilimi don tallafawa ra'ayoyinsa na gyare-gyare. Duk da haka, waɗannan yunƙurin gyare-gyare sun fuskanci tsayin daka mai ƙarfi daga masu ra'ayin mazan jiya, kuma King Jeongjo ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya shi kaɗai don aiwatar da niyyarsa a cikin barazanar kisan kai da makircin siyasa marasa ƙarewa.

King Jeongjo ya ci gaba da haɓaka manufar Tangpyeong bisa ga ikon sarauta mai ƙarfi. Idan manufar Tangpyeong ta kakansa, King Yeongjo, ta mai da hankali kan daidaita tsakanin bangarori, King Jeongjo ya aiwatar da Tangpyeong mai aiki, inda sarki da kansa ya jagoranci naɗa hazaka da yanke shawara kan manufofi. Ya ƙarfafa tunanin Silhak (Ilimin Aiki) ta hanyar Gyujanggak kuma ya yi yunƙurin gyare-gyare daban-daban don inganta rayuwar mutane. Musamman, ginin Suwon Hwaseong (水原 華城) wani aiki ne mai ban mamaki wanda ke nuna alamar gyare-gyaren King Jeongjo da kuma niyyarsa ta aiwatar da birni mai kyau wanda ke mai da hankali kan mutane. Suwon Hwaseong birni ne da aka tsara kuma sansanin soja wanda aka gina daga 1794 zuwa 1796 don ƙarfafa ikon sarauta, haɓaka ci gaban kasuwanci, da inganta ƙarfin tsaro na ƙasa. An kammala wannan babban aiki yadda ya kamata a cikin ɗan gajeren lokaci ta amfani da ilimin kimiyya na masana Silhak kamar Jeong Yak-yong da sabbin fasahohi kamar 'geojunggi' (crane), kuma ƙoƙarin rage nauyin aiki ga mutane ya fito fili. Bugu da ƙari, ya yi ƙoƙari daban-daban don daidaita rayuwar mutane da ci gaban ƙasa, kamar ba da izinin 'yan kasuwa na 'sijeon' (kasuwannin titi) ban da 'Yukui-jeon' (shagunan gwamnati shida) su gudanar da ayyukan kasuwanci kyauta ta hanyar Sinhaetonggong (辛亥通共), don farfado da tattalin arziki.

Zamanin mulkin King Jeongjo ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin lokacin da ya kawo sabon kuzari ga al'ummar Joseon ta baya kuma ya jagoranci farfaɗowar fasaha da al'adu. Ya ƙarfafa ilimi da fasaha, kuma ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu amfani don inganta rayuwar mutane, yana nuna hoton sarki mai kyau. Duk da haka, a ranar 18 ga Agusta, 1800, King Jeongjo ya rasu ba zato ba tsammani, kuma bayan mutuwarsa, ƙarfin gyare-gyare ya raunana, kuma ya zama farkon zamanin 'sedo jeongchi' (mulkin dangi). Duk da haka, gadon da King Jeongjo ya bari ya yi tasiri sosai ga al'umma da al'adun Joseon na baya. Ikon sarautarsa mai ƙarfi, niyyarsa ta gyare-gyare, da kuma sha'awarsa ta ilimi har yau suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa kuma ana sake kimanta su. Musamman, Suwon Hwaseong an jera shi a matsayin Gidan Tarihi na Duniya na UNESCO, yana sanar da hangen nesansa da nasarorinsa ga duniya. Niyarsa ta gyare-gyare da sha'awarsa ta ilimi sun yi daidai da ra'ayoyin masana Silhak na zamaninsa, suna barin zurfin alama a tarihin ilimi na Joseon na baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: King Jeongjo sarki ne na Joseon a karni na 18, wanda ya jagoranci farfaɗowar fasaha da al'adu tare da ikon sarauta mai ƙarfi da manufofin gyare-gyare.
key_achievements: Kafa Gyujanggak da horar da hazaka
Gina Suwon Hwaseong da tsara birni
Ƙarfafa ikon sarauta ta hanyar manufar Tangpyeong
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhun gyare-gyarensa da nasarorin iliminsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga al'ummar Joseon ta baya kuma ana sake kimanta su har yau.

parsed.narrative:
Li Bai (701-762) babban mawaki ne a zamanin daular Tang, ana girmama shi a matsayin daya daga cikin taurari mafi haske a tarihin adabin kasar Sin. A farkon karni na 8, daular Tang ta kasance zamanin zinariya inda al'adu da fasaha suka bunkasa, kuma babban birnin Chang'an ya ji dadin wadata ta duniya, yana samar da marubuta da masu tunani da yawa. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Li Bai, wanda aka haifa a ranar 19 ga Mayu, 701, an kira shi Taibai da sunan girmamawa, kuma Qinglian Jushi a matsayin sunan laƙabi. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna basira ta musamman, ya zurfafa cikin falsafar Taoist, kuma ya yi rayuwar yawo tare da yanayi a matsayin abokinsa, yana haɓaka ruhu mai 'yanci. Waƙoƙinsa sun ƙunshi girma da ruhin buɗaɗɗen zuciya da aka samu daga wannan yanayi, da kuma ruhin da ba ya damu da al'amuran duniya. Musamman ma, ya shahara wajen samun wahayi daga giya da rubuta waƙoƙi, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin abu da ke wakiltar duniyar adabinsa.

Rayuwar Li Bai ta nuna bambanci mai ban mamaki tsakanin yawo na 'yanci da ɗan gajeren lokaci a fadar sarki. A wani lokaci, Sarki Xuanzong na Tang ya kira shi zuwa fada a matsayin Hanlin Academician, amma ya gaji da takura na ofis da gwagwarmayar iko, kuma nan da nan ya bar fadar don sake zaɓar hanyar yawo. Ya fi daraja giya, waƙoƙi, da 'yanci a cikin yanayi fiye da daraja ta duniya ko dukiya. Wannan halin rayuwarsa ya bayyana sarai a cikin waƙoƙinsa, wani lokaci yana nuna girma da buɗaɗɗen zuciya, wani lokaci kuma yana nuna baƙin ciki da zafi. Musamman ma, ya yi abota mai zurfi da Du Fu, daya daga cikin manyan mawaka na zamaninsa, kuma ana kiran su biyu “Li Du,” ana yaba musu a matsayin manyan mawaka a tarihin adabin kasar Sin. An kuma kira Li Bai da sunan laƙabi “Mawakin Allah (Shixian)” saboda gwanintarsa ta musamman a fannin waƙa. Waƙoƙinsa sun rera waƙar jiye-jiye na ɗan adam na duniya waɗanda suka wuce yanayin zamantakewa da matsalolin mutum na lokacin, kuma sun sami tausayi daga mutane da yawa.

Shekarun baya na Li Bai sun cika da gwagwarmaya mai tsanani. Tawayen An Lushan, wanda ya barke a shekara ta 755, ya jefa daular Tang cikin hargitsi, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a rayuwar Li Bai. A wancan lokacin, ya yi aiki na ɗan lokaci a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga Yarima Yong (Li Lin), amma an kama shi bisa zargin cin amanar ƙasa saboda rashin fahimta cewa Li Lin ya yi tawaye ga Sarki Suzong, kuma an kore shi zuwa Yelang. Ko da yake an yi masa afuwa kuma an sake shi daga gudun hijira ba da daɗewa ba, wannan lamarin ya bar masa rauni mai zurfi a ruhinsa. Bayan haka, ya ci gaba da rayuwarsa ta yawo a yankin Jiangnan, yana rubuta waƙoƙi. Waƙoƙin wannan lokacin sun nuna zurfafa na rashin dawwama na rayuwa, baƙin ciki, da kaɗaici, tare da buɗaɗɗen zuciya na baya. Ya rasu a ranar 30 ga Nuwamba, 762, yana da shekaru 61. Akwai labarai da yawa game da mutuwarsa, amma labarin soyayya cewa ya nutse yayin da yake ƙoƙarin kama wata da ke nunawa a cikin kogi shine mafi shahara, kuma ana ambaton shi a matsayin labari mai nuna rayuwarsa mai 'yanci da waƙa.

Ko da yake Li Bai ya yi rayuwa mai cike da kalubale, waƙoƙinsa sun wuce lokaci kuma suna ci gaba da ba da zurfin motsin rai ga mutane da yawa har yau. A halin yanzu, an san waƙoƙi kusan 1,100, kuma ana ɗaukar ayyukansa a matsayin kololuwar adabin kasar Sin. Waƙoƙinsa suna bayyana falsafar Taoist, ƙaunar giya, girmamawa ga yanayi, da kuma ainihin jiye-jiye na ɗan adam a cikin harshe mai gaskiya da ƙarfi, suna ba da zurfin tasiri ga masu karatu. Waƙoƙin Li Bai sun ba da wahayi ga mawaka da masu fasaha da yawa na baya, kuma sunansa ya zama alamar adabin kasar Sin da kuma ma'anar ruhin fasaha mai 'yanci. Waƙoƙinsa sun wuce zama ayyukan adabi kawai, suna zama muhimmin maɓalli don fahimtar motsin rai da kyawawan halaye na Sinawa. Ruhin soyayya da rashin damuwa da waƙoƙin Li Bai ke nunawa ana iya fahimtar su sosai lokacin da aka kwatanta su da ayyukan Du Fu, mawaki mai gaskiya na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Li Bai mawaki ne na kasar Sin a zamanin daular Tang, wanda ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na adabin kasar Sin tare da Du Fu.
key_achievements: Mawakin Allah (Shixian) wanda ke wakiltar zamanin daular Tang
Kusan waƙoƙi 1,100 sun wanzu
Ya gina duniyar waƙa da ke mai da hankali kan Taoism da giya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa sun wuce lokaci kuma ana ɗaukar su a matsayin kololuwar adabin kasar Sin.

parsed.narrative:
A hayin tekun da ke natsuwa, a tsibirin Japan inda jan rana ta fito sabuwa, a cikin rudanin zamanin jini da ake kira Sengoku, an haifi wani yaro. Maimakon kukan jariri, sai kawai iska mai radadin rashin dawwama ta rayuwa ce ke ratsa sararin samaniya. Wannan matashin rai da ake kira ‘Arayama’, a karkashin hannun mahaifinsa mai tsauri, ko kuma numfashin kawunsa mai zafi, ya farka da wuri ga tsiraici na duniya mai sanyi fiye da kaifin takobi. Horon da ya yi tsanani har ya sanyaya kashi, da karfen da aka tilasta wa hannun jariri ya rike, ya kaifafa idanunsa kamar na dabba, kuma tun yana dan shekara uku ko hudu, ya tsaya da karfin da zai yanke duniya da kaifin takobinsa. A shekaru goma sha uku, tatsuniyar cewa takobin da ba a san shi ba a hannun yaron da bai ma san nauyin babba ba, ya dauki ran wani jarumi da ya fadi, nan da nan ta zama kaddararsa.

A shekaru goma sha bakwai, kowace hanya a duniya hanya ce ta horo, kuma kowace haduwa a duniya gwaji ce. Kamar tafiyar matafiyi da ke yawo a kan kunkuntar hanyoyin dutse, ya yi yawo a cikin daji. Ya huda abokan gaba da idanun dabba, ya kaifafa takobinsa ga radadin iska. A shekaru ashirin, a gaban takobin da aka gurbata da jinin Yoshioka Seijuro, ya fuskanci kadaici maimakon tsoro. Fadan da ba shi da tausayi ya ci gaba har sau goma sha biyu, sau da yawa, kuma sunansa ya yi amo a fagen fama kamar kukan dabba. Kukan wadanda suka fadi ya zurfafa shiru, kuma murnar nasara ta wuce kunnuwansa kamar kuka mara amfani. A karkashin tutar nasara, ya shiga cikin daji mai zurfi na kadaici.

Takobi biyu, rai daya. Ya bi hanyar da ake kira ‘Niten Ichi-ryū’. Takobin hannunsa na hagu ya bi walƙiya, takobin hannunsa na dama ya lulluɓe iska. Kamar rawa, ko kuma kukan dabba, ya kai hari ga raunin abokin gaba, ya yanke igiyar rayuwa da motsi marar tsammani. Yaƙe-yaƙe marasa adadi sun mamaye rayuwarsa, kuma ya sassaƙa alamun gwagwarmaya mai zafi a cikin kube mara komai. Sai wata rana, a ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe marasa amfani, ya gane. Cewa hanya ta gaskiya ba a cikin jini take ba, amma a cikin kaifin goga. A ƙarshen tafiya mai wahala, ya ɗauki goga. Ko da a cikin raguwar jiki mai wucewa, ruhinsa ya ƙara ƙarfi, kuma harshen wuta na hikima da ke fitowa daga kaifin goga bai taɓa mutuwa ba.

A lokacin ƙarshe, ko da a cikin zafin jiki da zai shuɗe, idanunsa ba su yi rawar jiki ba. A cikin ɗaki mara komai, ya kammala rubutun gaskiya da ya ratsa duniya, mai suna ‘Go Rin No Sho’. Ya ɓace, amma kaifin takobin da ya yanke duniya har yanzu yana raye, kuma tafarkin tunani da gogarsa ta zana har yanzu yana jagorantar rayuka masu ɓacewa a yau. Ruhinsa na yaƙi, wanda ya fito daga kadaici mara komai, ya wuce lokaci, yana tsaye kusa da mu har yanzu da basira mai kaifi da ke huda mu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani jarumi mai takobi na zamanin Sengoku wanda, ta hanyar yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa, ya kafa Niten Ichi-ryū kuma ya rubuta Go Rin No Sho, ya bar gadon fasahar yaƙi da falsafa.
key_achievements: Ya kafa suna ta hanyar cin nasara a yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa
Ya kafa makarantar takobi ta Niten Ichi-ryū
Ya rubuta Go Rin No Sho, mai ɗauke da fasahar yaƙi da falsafa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fasahar takobinsa da falsafarsa sun wuce lokaci, suna ba da zurfin fahimta da ilhami har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
A lokacin Sengoku, lokacin da faɗuwar rana ja ke jefa inuwa a kan tsibirin Japan da jini da ƙura suka haɗu, a cikin ƙaramin ƙasar Owari, wani babban guguwar kaddara tana ta juyawa. A tsakiyar wannan hargitsi, inda tsoffin tsarin suka rushe kuma daji na sabon zamani ke ruri, wutar Oda Nobunaga ta fara ci. Idanunsa sun nuna haske mai sanyi na dabba mai cin nama mai kaɗaici, kuma tun yana yaro, ya ci gaba da horar da kansa don fuskantar tsoffin al'adun zamani da bangon al'adun da ke danniya. Yayin da jarumai da yawa da ke bin burin duniya mai wucewa suka faɗi, ya riga ya fara tafiya tasa ta musamman wadda ba za a iya musanya ta da komai ba, wanda shine kololuwar ɗaukaka wanda mai rushewa da mai ginawa kaɗai zai iya kaiwa.

Burinsa mai kaifi kamar fukafukan gaggafa ya ci gaba da ci da ƙarfin hali na haɗa kan ƙananan yankuna masu rarrabuwar kawuna. Kamar yana yi wa girman kai na tsoffin samurai ba'a, ya girgiza ma'aunin iko gaba ɗaya da harshen wuta mai zafi na sabbin bindigogi. A kan filin yaƙi mai cike da jini, wani lokaci ya zama guguwa marar tausayi wadda ta haɗiye maƙiya, wani lokaci kuma ya yanke ɓangarorin da suka lalace na zamani kamar likitan tiyata marar tausayi. Dare da yawa, ya zauna shi kaɗai cikin shiru, yana fuskantar shakku da kaɗaici da ke damunsa, amma hakan ya sa zuciyarsa ta ƙara ƙarfi. Yana mafarkin abin da babu wanda zai fahimta, ya ci gaba ba tare da jinkiri ba.

Ko a cikin zurfin rami na yanke kauna, yakan sami ɗan haske na bege. Yana jin tausayin waɗanda suka makale cikin imani makaho kuma suka kai kansu ga halaka, amma a lokaci guda, bai dakatar da ci gabansa mai zafi ba. A cikin tsoffin lambunan Kyoto, ko a cikin ƙasa mai wuya na yankunan tsaunuka masu tsauri, koyaushe yana zama majagaba da ke gaba da zamani. Ya nemi rusa tsarin feudal mai danniya da kuma ƙirƙirar sabon tsari ta hanyar ci gaban kasuwanci da fasaha. A cikin haikalin da ke cin wuta da ganuwar da ke rushewa, ya ga kyakkyawar makoma, kuma wannan hangen nesa ya sa tafiyarsa ta ƙara sauri.

Ko da yake rayuwarsa ta ƙare da sauri a cikin harshen wuta na Honnō-ji, sunan Oda Nobunaga an rubuta shi har abada a cikin babban kogin tarihi. Sha'awarsa mai zafi na karya tsoffin ƙa'idodi da buɗe sabon zamani ya zama iri wanda ya kafa tushen Japan ta yau. Har yanzu ana ambaton sunansa a matsayin alamar sabbin abubuwa, buri, kuma wani lokaci rashin tausayi, kuma yana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga jarumai masu rai waɗanda ba sa tsoron canji. Gadonsa bai taɓa dushewa ba a cikin tafiyar lokaci, kuma har yanzu yana raye a cikin zukatanmu da ke mafarkin sabon zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai kirkire-kirkire wanda ya rushe tsohon tsari a lokacin Sengoku, ya yi mafarkin haɗa kan duniya da bindigogi, kuma ya buɗe sabon zamani.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan yankuna masu rarrabuwar kawuna don kafa tushen haɗin kai
Gabatar da bindigogi don sabunta dabaru da canza ma'aunin iko
Rushe tsarin feudal da ƙirƙirar sabon tsari ta hanyar ci gaban kasuwanci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya karya tsohon zamani kuma ya kafa tushen sabuwar Japan, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa har zuwa yau a matsayin alamar sabbin abubuwa da buri.

parsed.narrative:
Sun Yat-Sen (孫文, an haife shi a 1866) likita ne, mai juyin juya hali, kuma masanin falsafar siyasa na kasar Sin, wanda ya yi mafarkin sabuwar jamhuriya a cikin rudanin Daular Qing mai rugujewa a ƙarshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20. An haife shi a ranar 12 ga Nuwamba, 1866, a Xiangshan County (yanzu Zhongshan City), lardin Guangdong, ɗan manomi ne, kuma tun yana yaro ya fuskanci sha'awar al'adun Yamma da kuma rashin daidaito na al'ummar gargajiya. Ya buɗe masa ido ga tunanin zamani yayin da yake samun ilimin Yamma a Hawaii, kuma daga baya ya yi karatun likitanci a Kwalejin Likitanci ta Hong Kong, inda ya sami lasisin likita a 1892. A lokacin, Daular Qing tana cikin mawuyacin hali saboda mamayar manyan ƙasashe na Yamma da cin hanci da rashawa na cikin gida, kuma wannan yanayin tarihi ya zama wani muhimmin dalili da ya sa Sun Yat-Sen ya wuce hanyar likita kawai don zama mai juyin juya hali wanda zai tsara makomar ƙasar. Ya fahimci cewa ba za a iya ceton ƙasa mai ciwo ba da maganin jiki mai ciwo, kuma ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da kansa ga gyaran siyasa da juyin juya hali. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fuskanta na farko da sauyin tunaninsa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa harsashin zamantakewar kasar Sin. 

Ayyukan juyin juya hali na Sun Yat-Sen sun fara ne da gaske a 1894 lokacin da ya kafa Ƙungiyar Farfaɗo da Sin (興中會) a Hawaii. Ƙungiyar Farfaɗo da Sin ita ce ƙungiyar juyin juya hali ta zamani ta farko da ke da burin kifar da Daular Qing da kafa jamhuriya. Tun daga wannan lokacin, ya fara tsara falsafar siyasa ta Sanmin Zhuyi (三民主義), ko Ka'idodin Jama'a Uku. Sanmin Zhuyi ya ƙunshi Ƙasa (民族主義), Dimokuraɗiyya (民權主義), da Rayuwar Jama'a (民生主義) a matsayin manyan abubuwan da ke cikinsa, kuma yana da burin yantar da Sin daga matsin lamba na waje, ba wa jama'a haƙƙin siyasa, da daidaita rayuwar tattalin arzikin jama'a. Sun Yat-Sen ya yi yunƙurin tayar da zaune tsaye da yawa, amma ya kasa kuma dole ne ya ci gaba da rayuwa a gudun hijira. Musamman, bayan gazawar tawayen Guangzhou a 1895, ya yi gudun hijira zuwa ƙasashen waje, yana tafiya tsakanin Japan, Amurka, da Turai don tattara kuɗin juyin juya hali da haɗa kan abokan gaba. A 1905, ya haɗa kan ƙungiyoyin juyin juya hali daban-daban a Tokyo don kafa Tongmenghui (中國同盟會), yana tattara ƙarfin juyin juya hali, kuma wannan ya zama tushe mai mahimmanci ga nasarar Juyin Juya Halin Xinhai na gaba. Ƙoƙarinsa mai ɗorewa da tsarin tunaninsa sun ba da jagoranci bayyananne ga sojojin juyin juya hali na Sin da suka rabu a lokacin. 

Duk da gwagwarmaya da gazawa da yawa, Sun Yat-Sen bai taɓa karaya ba, kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 10 ga Oktoba, 1911, Juyin Juya Halin Xinhai (辛亥革命) ya ɓarke bayan nasarar Tawayen Wuchang (武昌起義). Juyin Juya Halin Xinhai wani babban taron ne da ya kawo ƙarshen Daular Qing kuma ya kafa jamhuriya ta farko a tarihin Sin. Sun Yat-Sen, wanda ke ƙasashen waje a lokacin, ya dawo gida bayan jin labarin juyin juya hali kuma ya hau mulki a matsayin Shugaban riƙon ƙwarya na Jamhuriyar Sin a Nanjing a ranar 1 ga Janairu, 1912. Wannan wani lokaci ne na tarihi da ya sanar da haihuwar jamhuriyar da ya yi mafarkin ta tsawon rayuwarsa. Duk da haka, saboda sulhu da Yuan Shikai (袁世凱), shugaban sojojin Beiyang, Sun Yat-Sen ya miƙa masa muƙamin shugaban ƙasa, kuma bayan haka, ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya ba tare da tsayawa ba, yana adawa da yunƙurin mulkin kama-karya na Yuan Shikai da motsin maido da daular, yana ƙaddamar da Juyin Juya Hali na Biyu da Motsin Kare Tsarin Mulki. A 1919, ya kafa Kuomintang (中國國民黨, KMT) don sake tsara ƙarfin juyin juya hali, kuma ya ci gaba da ƙoƙari don haɗin kai da dimokuraɗiyya na Sin, ciki har da haɗin gwiwa na farko tsakanin Kuomintang da Jam'iyyar Kwaminis tare da haɗin gwiwar Tarayyar Soviet. A cikin wannan tsari, ya fuskanci matsaloli da cin amana da yawa na siyasa, amma imaninsa ga zamantakewar Sin bai girgiza ba. 

Sun Yat-Sen ya rasu a Beijing a ranar 12 ga Maris, 1925, saboda cutar kansar hanta, amma tunaninsa da nasarorinsa sun yi tasiri sosai a tarihin zamantakewar Sin. A matsayinsa na wanda ya kafa Jamhuriyar Sin da Kuomintang, ana girmama shi a matsayin 'Uban Ƙasa' (國父), kuma Sanmin Zhuyi nasa ya zama muhimmin tushe na akida ga ci gaban siyasa da zamantakewa na Sin. Musamman, Ƙasa ta zama ƙarfin da ke neman 'yancin kai da haɗin kai na Sin a kan mamayar waje, Dimokuraɗiyya ta ba da gudummawa ga shigar jama'a cikin siyasa da ci gaban dimokuraɗiyya, kuma Rayuwar Jama'a ta ba da jagoranci ga manufofin daidaiton tattalin arziki da zamantakewa. Bayan mutuwarsa, magajinsa irin su Chiang Kai-shek (蔣介石) sun ci gaba da gadonsa, kuma duk da cewa Jam'iyyar Kwaminis ta hau mulki a babban yankin Sin, a Taiwan, ruhin Sun Yat-Sen har yanzu yana nuna halaccin Jamhuriyar Sin. Rayuwar Sun Yat-Sen ta wakilci manufar wani zamani da ya nemi rushe tsohuwar daula da gina sabuwar ƙasa, fiye da kasancewa mai juyin juya hali kawai. Wannan gadonsa za a iya kwatanta shi ta hanyoyi da yawa da tunanin shugabannin wasu ƙasashe da suka nemi 'yancin kai da dimokuraɗiyya a lokacin zamantakewar Gabashin Asiya, misali, Kim Gu na Koriya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sun Yat-Sen ya kasance mai juyin juya hali kuma masanin falsafar siyasa na Sin a ƙarshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20, wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa Jamhuriyar Sin da kuma kifar da Daular Qing.
key_achievements: Kafa Jamhuriyar Sin da Kuomintang (KMT)
Jagorantar Juyin Juya Halin Xinhai na 1911 don kifar da Daular Qing
Ya yi aiki a matsayin Shugaban riƙon ƙwarya na farko na Jamhuriyar Sin
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana girmama shi a matsayin 'Uban Ƙasa', kuma Sanmin Zhuyi nasa ya yi tasiri sosai a ci gaban siyasa da zamantakewa na Sin da Taiwan na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Tokugawa Ieyasu (1543-1616), wani jarumi mai girma da ɗan siyasa mai hikima, ya fito fili a fagen tarihi daga ƙarshen zamanin Sengoku mai cike da rudani zuwa farkon zamanin Edo mai cike da alheri. Shi ne mutumin da ya haɗa kan ƙasar Japan da ta watse, kuma ya kafa daular Tokugawa mai ɗorewa. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 16, ƙasar Japan ta shiga wani zamanin hargitsi da tashin hankali, wanda aka fi sani da zamanin Sengoku, inda sarakuna masu yawa, daimyo, ke gwagwarmaya ba kakkautawa don faɗaɗa ikonsu da yankunansu, suna jefa ƙasar cikin wutar yaƙi. A cikin wannan guguwar tarihi, a ranar 31 ga Janairu, 1543, wani tauraro ya bayyana a sararin samaniyar Mikawa, lokacin da aka haifi Ieyasu a matsayin ɗan Matsudaira Hirotada, shugaban wani ƙaramin gida na daimyo. Sunansa na farko shi ne Matsudaira Takechiyo. Tun yana ɗan yaro, an tilasta masa rayuwa mai cike da rashin tabbas, yana zama garkuwa ta siyasa tsakanin manyan iyalai na Oda da Imagawa, wanda hakan ya zama farashin rayuwar danginsa. Wannan tafiya mai wahala ta siffanta shi. Waɗannan gwagwarmaya na farko sun zama makarantarsa, suna siffanta shi zuwa wani shugaba mai hikima, mai haƙuri, da kuma mai yanke hukunci mai sanyi, wanda zai iya jure wa kowane irin guguwa. Bala'in rasa mahaifinsa tun yana ƙarami ya buɗe masa idanu ga rashin dawwama na rayuwa da kuma tsananin ikon duniya, yana koya masa darasi mai zurfi tun farkon rayuwarsa.

Wani babban juyi, wanda ya canza tafarkin rayuwar Ieyasu har abada, ya faru ne a shekara ta 1560, a lokacin Yaƙin Okehazama mai tarihi. A lokacin da Oda Nobunaga ya yi nasara mai ban mamaki a kan Imagawa Yoshimoto a wannan yaƙin, Ieyasu, wanda ya kasance a ƙarƙashin Imagawa a matsayin garkuwa, ya ga wata kofa ta buɗe. Ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba, ya yi amfani da wannan damar ta zinariya, ya ayyana 'yancinsa daga sarƙoƙin bauta. Nan da nan, ya yanke shawara mai hikima da dabara, wanda zai zama ɗaya daga cikin muhimman matakai a tafarkin rayuwarsa: ya kulla kawance mai ƙarfi da Oda Nobunaga, wanda ya zama ginshiƙin nasararsa. Wannan kawance ya ba Ieyasu damar ƙarfafa ikonsa a yankin Mikawa, ya kuma shimfiɗa masa hanyar faɗaɗa yankunansa, yana gina tushe mai ƙarfi ga daularsa. A shekara ta 1566, ya ɗauki sunan Tokugawa, wanda zai zama alamar iko da daukaka, kuma a hankali ya fara hawa matsayi, yana zama babban daimyo mai ƙarfi da tsoro. A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da gwagwarmaya, ya yi yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa da daimyo na kewaye, yana ƙarfafa ƙarfin sojojinsa. Ya kuma yi amfani da damar da ya samu, ya kalli dabarun Nobunaga na juyin juya hali da kuma dabarun haɗin kai na Toyotomi Hideyoshi, yana gina nasa falsafar mulki da dabaru na musamman, waɗanda za su zama ginshiƙin nasararsa.

Bayan da Oda Nobunaga, shugaban da ba a taɓa gani ba, ya gamu da mummunan ƙarshe a lamarin Honnoji a shekara ta 1582, fagen siyasa ya buɗe. Ieyasu ya tsinci kansa a cikin gwagwarmaya mai zafi da Toyotomi Hideyoshi don gadon sarautar Nobunaga. A Yaƙin Komaki-Nagakute na shekara ta 1584, ya fuskanci Hideyoshi a fagen yaƙi. Duk da haka, da hikima mai zurfi, ya yanke shawara mai amfani, ya miƙa wuya ga Hideyoshi, kuma ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan jarumansa, yana jiran lokacinsa. Wannan mataki ya nuna haƙurin Ieyasu mai ban mamaki da kuma tunaninsa na dabara, yana nufin gaba mai nisa maimakon nasara ta ɗan lokaci, yana gina makomarsa da hankali. Ko da yake Hideyoshi ya yi ƙoƙarin rage masa ƙarfi ta hanyar tura shi yankin Kanto, Ieyasu, mai hikima da dabara, ya juya wannan ƙalubale zuwa dama. Ya yi amfani da wannan damar, ya gina tushe mai ƙarfi na tattalin arziki da soja a Edo (wato Tokyo ta yanzu), yana shirya kansa don babban lokaci. A shekara ta 1598, lokacin da Hideyoshi ya mutu, Ieyasu, a matsayin shugaban Majalisar Dattawa Biyar (Go-Tairo), ya ga lokacinsa ya yi. Ya fara motsawa da ƙarfi don karɓar mulkin Japan, yana shirya don babban gwagwarmaya. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1600, a Yaƙin Sekigahara mai girma, ya yi nasara mai ban mamaki a kan sojojin Yamma, ya kawo ƙarshen zamanin Sengoku mai cike da hargitsi, kuma ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin ainihin mai mulkin Japan, yana cika burinsa na tsawon lokaci.

Bayan nasarar da ya samu a Yaƙin Sekigahara, wanda ya canza tarihi, Tokugawa Ieyasu ya sami babban matsayi. A shekara ta 1603, Sarkin sarakuna ya naɗa shi Seii Taishogun, kuma a wannan lokacin ne ya kafa daular Tokugawa, wanda zai yi mulki na ƙarni da yawa. Ta haka ne, ƙasar Japan ta shiga wani sabon zamani na zaman lafiya da kwanciyar hankali, wanda ba a taɓa gani ba, wanda aka sani da zamanin Edo, wanda zai ɗore sama da shekaru 260, yana kawo ƙarshen hargitsi. Ieyasu, mai hikima da hangen nesa, ya kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi, wanda aka sani da tsarin Bakuhan, wanda ya haɗa kan ƙasar. Ya kuma aiwatar da manufofi masu tsauri kamar Sankin-kōtai (tsarin halartar madadin) don sarrafa daimyos, yana hana duk wata yiwuwar tawaye, yana tabbatar da zaman lafiya. Tsarin mulkinsa, wanda ya dogara ga gwamnati mai ƙarfi da tsakiya, ya zama ginshiƙin ci gaban tattalin arziki da bunƙasar al'adu, yana siffanta tushen al'ummar Japan har abada. Ko da yake Ieyasu ya bar duniya a shekara ta 1616, daular da ya kafa ta ci gaba da mulkin Japan na dogon lokaci bayan mutuwarsa, tana shimfiɗa tushen siyasa, zamantakewa, da al'adu na Japan ta zamani, wanda har yau ake gani. Haƙurinsa mai ban mamaki, hangen nesansa na dabara, da kuma gadonsa na gina ƙasa, za a iya kwatanta su da nasarorin manyan sarakuna masu haɗin kai kamar Qin Shi Huang na China, waɗanda suka kawo tsari daga hargitsi, suka kuma kafa zaman lafiya mai ɗorewa, suna barin tarihi mai girma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Tokugawa Ieyasu jarumi ne na Japan daga ƙarshen zamanin Sengoku zuwa farkon zamanin Edo, wanda ya kafa Shogunat na Tokugawa kuma ya haɗa kan Japan.
key_achievements: Ya kulla kawance da Oda Nobunaga
Ya ci nasara a Yaƙin Sekigahara
Ya kafa Shogunat na Tokugawa kuma ya haɗa kan Japan
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin mulkinsa ya jagoranci Japan zuwa zaman lafiya da kwanciyar hankali sama da shekaru 260, yana shimfiɗa tushen Japan ta zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Toyotomi Hideyoshi (豊臣秀吉, an haife shi kusan 1537) jarumi ne kuma ɗan siyasa mai ban mamaki wanda ya kawo ƙarshen hargitsin zamanin Sengoku na Japan, ya haɗa kan ƙasar, kuma ya buɗe zamanin Azuchi-Momoyama. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 16, Japan ta shiga wani lokaci na hargitsi mai tsanani, wanda aka fi sani da zamanin Sengoku, inda ikon Muromachi Shogunate ya ragu, kuma daimyō suka yi faɗa don mallakar yankunansu. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Toyotomi Hideyoshi an haife shi a cikin wani gidan manoma marasa galihu a Nakamura, Aichi District, Owari Province (yanzu Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture). Sunansa na asali Kinoshita Tōkichirō ne, kuma ya girma cikin talauci da wahalhalu tun yana yaro. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, ya yi yawo yana bauta wa sarakuna daban-daban, har sai da ya shiga ƙarƙashin Oda Nobunaga. Da farko, ya yi ayyuka marasa daɗi kamar mai ɗaukar takalmi ko soja mai ƙaramin matsayi (ashigaru), kuma a hankali ya fara samun karɓuwa saboda amincinsa da basirarsa ta musamman. Hankalinsa mai kaifi da ƙwarewarsa wajen mu'amala da mutane sun zama ginshiƙin samun amincewar Nobunaga a hankali.

A ƙarƙashin Oda Nobunaga, Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya nuna basirar soja ta musamman da ƙwarewar gudanarwa, inda ya hau matsayi cikin sauri. Ya yi gagarumin nasarori a yaƙe-yaƙe da dama, musamman ma a yaƙin kewaye na Tottori Castle da kuma dabarun ambaliyar ruwa (suikō) a Bitchū Takamatsu Castle, inda ya jagoranci sojoji zuwa ga nasara da dabaru masu ban mamaki, ya kafa kansa a matsayin babban mai biyayya ga Nobunaga. Amma a shekara ta 1582, lokacin da Oda Nobunaga ya gamu da ƙarshe mai ban tausayi a Honnō-ji Incident saboda cin amanar bawan sa Akechi Mitsuhide, rayuwar Toyotomi Hideyoshi ta kai ga wani muhimmin canji. Ya jagoranci sojojinsa da ke yaƙi a yankin Chūgoku, ya koma baya cikin gaggawa (Chūgoku Ōgaeshi), kuma cikin ƴan kwanaki kaɗan, ya fatattaki Akechi Mitsuhide a yaƙin Yamazaki, inda ya ɗauki fansar Nobunaga. Wannan lamari ya ba shi damar yin gasa da sauran manyan masu biyayya kamar Shibata Katsuie don matsayin magajin gaskiya na dangin Oda, kuma bayan nasararsa a yaƙin Shizugatake a 1583, ya tabbatar da jagorancinsa wajen haɗa kan ƙasar.

Bayan ya karɓi mulkin ƙasar, Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya fara manyan yaƙe-yaƙe don haɗa kan Japan. Ya kammala nasarar mamaye Shikoku a 1585 da Kyushu a 1587, kuma a ƙarshe ya haɗa kan dukkan Japan ta hanyar mamaye Odawara Castle na dangin Hōjō a 1590. A 1585, an naɗa shi Kampaku (Regent) daga kotun masarauta, kuma a shekara mai zuwa, ya zama Dajō-daijin (Chancellor of the Realm), ya hau matsayin mai mulki mafi girma, kuma Emperor ya ba shi sunan Toyotomi. Bayan haɗin kai, Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya fara gyare-gyare don kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi na tsakiya. Ya aiwatar da **Taiko Kenchi (Binciken Ƙasa na Taiko)**, wani bincike na ƙasa a duk faɗin ƙasar, don tantance mallakar ƙasa da yawan amfanin gona, da kuma sake tsara tsarin haraji. Ya kuma aiwatar da **Katanagari (Farautar Takobi)**, wanda ya hana manoma mallakar makamai, don raba matsayin samurai da manoma sosai da kuma daidaita tsarin zamantakewa. Amma a ƙarshen rayuwarsa, ya kama shi da burin mamaye nahiyar, inda ya fara yaƙe-yaƙe biyu na mamaye Joseon a 1592 da 1597, wanda aka fi sani da Imjin War da Jeongyu War (ko Bunroku-Keichō no Eki a Japan), wanda ya haifar da babbar barna da hargitsi a Gabashin Asiya.

A 1598, lokacin da Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya rasu, zamaninsa ya zo ƙarshe, kuma mamayar Joseon da ya fara ta ƙare da gazawa. Bayan mutuwarsa, dangin Toyotomi sun faɗi a hannun Tokugawa Ieyasu, amma nasarar haɗa kan Japan da Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya cimma, da kuma gyare-gyaren da ya yi don kafa tsarin feudal na tsakiya, sun zama muhimmin ginshiƙi ga buɗe zamanin Tokugawa Shogunate. Bugu da ƙari, al'adun Azuchi-Momoyama masu ban sha'awa da girma waɗanda suka bunƙasa a lokacin mulkinsa sun bar tasiri mai zurfi a kan fasahar Japan da gine-gine. Rayuwarsa, daga matsayi mai ƙasƙanci zuwa haɗa kan ƙasar, ana tuna ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin labaran nasara mafi ban mamaki a tarihin Japan, kuma ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin alamar hawan matsayi da kuma misali na jagoranci mai ƙarfi. Rayuwarsa, tare da Oda Nobunaga da Tokugawa Ieyasu na zamaninsa, ta nuna hadaddiyar halayen shugabannin da suka canza tafarkin tarihi ta hanyoyi daban-daban, waɗanda suka cimma babban aikin haɗa kan Japan.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Toyotomi Hideyoshi jarumi ne na Japan a zamanin Sengoku, wanda ya haɗa kan ƙasar kuma ya buɗe zamanin Azuchi-Momoyama.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan ƙasar bayan Honnō-ji Incident
Aiwatar da Taiko Kenchi da Katanagari
Jagorantar mamayar Joseon (Imjin War)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Nasarar haɗin kansa ta kafa ginshiƙin al'ummar Japan ta zamani, amma mamayar da ya yi wa waje ta bar tabo mai zurfi a Gabashin Asiya.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Siam mai ja, a lokacin da kogin Siam mai gudana ba tare da gajiyawa ba ke lulluɓe da iska mai zafi da ke ratsa shiru na tsohon fadar sarauta, a ƙasar da ƙura ke manne da goge-goge kuma ƙamshin furannin lotus ke rawa, a cikin zurfin da nauyin daular da ta daɗe shekaru dubu da kuma iskar canji mai zuwa suka haɗu, an haifi wani basarake. Kaddara ta rataya a kafaɗunsa kamar inuwa mai duhu, kuma a cikin idanunsa na yaro, nauyin makoma mai ban mamaki ya bayyana a hankali. Tsakanin sarƙoƙin al'ada da raɗaɗin gyare-gyare, dole ne ya auna hanyarsa shi kaɗai fiye da kowa.

Kwanakin basaraken yaro sun kasance haɗuwar haske mai haske na zinariya da inuwa mai wucewa. Lokacin da bukukuwan fadar suka ƙare kuma ya kasance shi kaɗai a cikin shiru, lokacin da tsammanin da damuwar mutane da yawa suka haɗu suka isa gare shi, tabbas ya ji wani zurfi da ba za a iya danne shi ba. Wajibi na kiyaye tsohuwar tsari da kuma sha'awar buɗe sabon zamani sun yi karo da juna a cikinsa, kuma a cikin shiru, ya fahimci bayan dare da yawa. Cewa nauyin jagorantar wannan babban masarauta ba za a taɓa ɗauka shi kaɗai ba.

Ya so ya yanke tsoffin sarƙoƙi kuma ya buɗe kofofin sabuwar wayewa. Muryoyin baƙi na ƙasashen waje sun yi ta yawo a kunnuwansa, kuma a tashar jiragen ruwa inda manyan jiragen ruwa ke isa, ya ga makoma. Amma matakansa sun kasance ba tare da tsayawa ba, kuma tafiyar ta kasance cike da raunuka. A cikin rashin amincewar tsoffin ministoci, jahilcin mutane, da kuma raƙuman ruwa na waje da ke ci gaba da kai hari, ya yi ƙoƙari kada ya girgiza. Ko da yake akwai lokutan da ya kusan durƙusa ga yanke kauna, ya tashi tsaye da nufin da ba ya karyawa.

A hannunsa, masarautar ta sami sabuwar rayuwa a kan raƙuman ruwa na canji. Tsoffin tsarin sun rushe, kuma hasken bege ya shiga rayuwar mutane. Makomar da idanunsa suka gani yanzu ta zama gaskiya, kuma har yanzu tana haskaka da haske a ƙarƙashin sararin Siam. Kogin yana ci gaba da gudana, kuma faɗuwar rana mai ja tana ja da baya bayan sararin sama, amma sunansa zai haskaka har abada kamar tauraro marar mutuwa da aka zana a cikin kogin tarihi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Labarin wani basarake mai kaɗaici wanda, a cikin rikicin al'ada da gyare-gyare, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba ga raƙuman ruwa na waje kuma ya rushe tsoffin tsarin don gina sabuwar Siam.
key_achievements: Jagoranci rushewar tsoffin tsarin da buɗe wayewa
