Har sai gumi ya zubo mata kuma muryarta ta yi rauni, ba ta tsaya ba. Ta fito da tsaba na bege daga cikin laka na yanke kauna, kuma ta ɗaga tutar 'yanci daga cikin tokar zalunci. Ba tare da tsoron adawa da izgili marasa adadi ba, sai dai kiran ɗaukaka don mutuncin ɗan adam ne kawai ke sa zuciyarta ta buga.

Kogin lokaci yana gudana, kuma rubuce-rubucenta da suka rage a matsayin tsoffin tabo na tawada har yanzu suna raye. Kukan waɗanda aka zalunta ya ragu, kuma kukan da aka danne ya tashi a ranar, har yanzu yana amsawa a matsayin kaho da ke sanar da farkon sabuwar gwagwarmaya. Kiran ɗaukaka da ta yi don daidaito da 'yancin ɗan adam ya wuce shinge na zamani, kuma yana tsaye a gefenmu a matsayin fitila mara mutuwa wacce ke ba da ƙarfin hali da kwarin gwiwa ga rayuka marasa adadi har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata jarumar mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin ɗan adam wacce ta sadaukar da rayuwarta don 'yancin baƙaƙe da 'yancin mata na zaɓe a Philadelphia a ƙarni na 18.
key_achievements: Jagoranci a fafutukar 'yantar da bayi baƙaƙe
Matsayin majagaba a fafutukar neman 'yancin mata na zaɓe
Yaɗa darajar daidaito da 'yancin ɗan adam
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kiran da ta yi don daidaito da 'yanci ya wuce zamani kuma yana ci gaba da zama fitila mai ba da ƙarfin hali da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
A lokacin da hazo mai kauri na Venice ke lulluɓe da tsoffin jiragen ruwa, kuma soyayyar jamhuriyar da ke raguwa ke ratsa tsoffin gine-ginen dutse, wata zuciya matashiya mai bin inuwar sirri ta Gabas ta yi ta shawagi a cikin iska mai zafi ta teku. A cikin tsoffin taswirori, da kallon mahaifinsa mai nauyi, da kuma raɗaɗin harsunan baƙi da ke yawo a kunnuwansa, ya ji farkon tafiyarsa. Sha'awar duniyar da ba a sani ba, wadda ke ɓoye a zurfin teku fiye da raƙuman ruwa masu haɗari, da kuma kaɗaici mai zafi da waɗanda suka bar ƙasarsu kawai ke iya ji, sun yi masa nauyi a kan matashin kafadarsa. Yana tsammanin kyawun ƙasashe baƙi da kuma tsananin wahalar da ke ɓoye a cikinsu, tafiyarsa ta riga ta wuce bincike kawai, ta zama gwaji mai gwada iyakar ruhin ɗan adam.

A ƙarshen hamada inda iska mai yashi mai launin zinariya ke ratsawa, a cikin zuciyar daular Mongol mai girma, ya fuskanci abubuwan gani da ko da fensir ba zai iya ɗauka ba. Darajar Khan da ke zaune a kan kursiyinsa, da hargitsin jakadu daga ƙasashe daban-daban, da kuma kyawun fadar da ke cike da dukiya marar adadi, duk wani babban mafarki ne da ke buɗe a gabansa. Amma a bayan wannan kyawun, akwai nishi na mutanen da aka zalunta da kuma inuwar mulkin kama-karya. A cikin tukunyar narke-narke mai girma inda al'adun Gabas da Yamma suka haɗu, ya ga sha'awar ɗan adam marar iyaka, da kuma ƙarfin hali na rayuwa da ke ci gaba da bunƙasa duk da haka. Cututtuka marasa sani da tsoron mutuwa sun yi ta yawo a kusa da shi, amma bai ajiye fensirinsa ba.

A daren da dubban fitilu ke haskawa, ƙarƙashin taurari marasa sani, ya motsa fensirinsa yana kewar gida. Rawar mata masu rawa sanye da jajayen rigunan siliki, da ƙamshin kayan yaji mai daɗi, har ma da sanyin lambunan da aka yi da jade, duk sun rayu a cikin zuciyarsa. Amma a lokaci guda, wata kewar da ba za a manta ba ta ratsa zuciyarsa. Lokacin da ya ɓata a cikin doguwar tafiya, fuskar mahaifinsa da ta tsufa, da kuma rashin begen cewa watakila ba zai taɓa komawa ba, sun yi masa nauyi a kan fensirinsa. Ya rubuta. Farin ciki na ɗan lokaci da baƙin ciki na har abada, duk abin da ya faru.

Bayan shekaru masu yawa, labarinsa ya sake rayuwa a cikin tsofaffin shafukan littafi. Sawunsa da ya ratsa taswirori yanzu ya kai har zuwa ɗayan gefen duniya, yana kawo fahimta da mamaki ga al'adun baƙi. Sirrin Gabas da ya haɗa da fensirinsa ya wuce tazara ta lokaci, yana motsa tunaninmu a yau kuma yana ƙarfafa mu mu shiga duniyar da ba a sani ba. Ƙarfin halinsa na rubutawa, ba tare da rasa bege ba a cikin kaɗaici da rashin bege, har yanzu yana kaiwa ko'ina a duniya, yana zama abin ƙarfafawa ga waɗanda ke buɗe sababbin hanyoyi. Sunan Marco Polo ba kawai tsohon labari ba ne, amma yana rayuwa a matsayin babban gadon ruhin ɗan adam wanda ke fuskantar duniya koyaushe kuma yana rubutawa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marco Polo, mai binciken Venice, ya bincika Gabas kuma ya rubuta al'adun Daular Mongol, yana faɗaɗa musayar Gabas da Yamma da fahimtar duniyar da ba a sani ba.
key_achievements: Ya buɗe duniyar da ba a sani ba ta hanyar binciken Gabas
Ya rubuta wayewar Daular Mongol mai ban mamaki
Ya kafa tushen musayar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yamma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Yana motsa tunani game da duniyar da ba a sani ba, kuma ya kasance babban gadon ruhin ɗan adam wanda ke rubutawa koyaushe.

parsed.narrative:
Vasco da Gama, wani mai bincike kuma mai tukin jirgin ruwa na Portugal, an haife shi a kusan 1460 (ko kusan 1469), ya bayyana a ƙarshen karni na 15 lokacin da Turai ke matuƙar neman sabbin hanyoyin kasuwanci ta teku saboda mamayar da Daular Usmaniyya ta yi wa kasuwancin gabas. Musamman ma, Portugal tana da babban buri na buɗe hanyar zuwa Indiya tun zamanin Yarima Henry Mai Bincike, ta hanyar binciken gabar yammacin Afirka. An haife shi a Sines, kudu maso yammacin Portugal, a cikin gidan sarauta, tun yana yaro, ya saba da ayyukan teku, ya sami gogewar soja, kuma ya haɓaka fasahar tukin jirgin ruwa da jagoranci. A lokacin, Sarki Manuel I na Portugal yana neman wanda zai buɗe hanyar ƙarshe zuwa Indiya bayan Bartolomeu Dias ya gano Cape of Good Hope. A cikin wannan buƙatar ta tarihi, an ƙaddara Da Gama ya ɗauki wannan aikin mai girma. Tafiyarsa ba kawai binciken yanki ba ce, amma zai zama wani muhimmin al'amari da zai buɗe sabon tsarin duniya wanda zai haɗa Turai da Asiya kai tsaye.

A ranar 8 ga Yuli, 1497, Vasco da Gama, bisa umarnin Sarki Manuel I na Portugal, ya bar Lisbon don fara tafiyarsa ta farko mai tarihi zuwa Indiya. Jiragen ruwansa sun fara tafiya mai haɗari, suna tsallaka Tekun Atlantika da ba a sani ba, suna kewaye Cape of Good Hope, kuma suna tafiya arewa tare da gabar tekun Gabashin Afirka. Wannan tafiya ta cika da gwaje-gwaje masu yawa: guguwa mai tsanani, mutuwar ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa da yawa daga cutar scurvy, ƙarancin abinci, da yunƙurin tawaye saboda rashin gamsuwa na ma'aikatan jirgin. Amma Da Gama ya shawo kan waɗannan matsalolin da jagoranci mai ƙarfi da jajircewa marar yankewa, kuma ya ci gaba da tafiya. A ƙarshe, a ranar 20 ga Mayu, 1498, jiragen ruwansa sun isa Calicut (Kozhikode) a gabar yammacin Indiya, inda suka kammala tafiya ta farko mai nasara daga Turai zuwa Indiya ta teku. Wannan ya buɗe hanyar ga Turai don samun damar kai tsaye ga kayan yaji da masaku masu yawa na Asiya, amma a Indiya, sun fuskanci sabbin rikice-rikice: adawa daga 'yan kasuwar Larabawa da wahalar tattaunawar kasuwanci da sarkin yankin, Zamorin.

Duk da rikice-rikicen farko a Indiya, Vasco da Gama ya dawo Portugal a watan Satumba na 1499 kuma an tarbe shi a matsayin gwarzo. Nasararsa ta kawo wa Portugal dukiya mai yawa da daraja, kuma Sarki Manuel I ya nemi ya mallaki kasuwancin kayan yaji na Indiya gaba ɗaya. Don haka, Da Gama ya jagoranci jiragen ruwa masu yawa na biyu zuwa Indiya a 1502. A wannan tafiyar, ya yi amfani da ƙarfi sosai don kafa ikon Portugal a Tekun Indiya. Ya kai hari kan jiragen ruwan kasuwanci na Larabawa a Tekun Indiya kuma ya yi ruwan bama-bamai a Calicut, yana ɗaukar matakan ramuwar gayya masu tsanani, yana mai tabbatar da ikon teku na Portugal. Waɗannan matakan tsauri sun taimaka wajen tabbatar da matsayin Portugal na musamman a hanyar kasuwancin Tekun Indiya, amma kuma sun nuna a fili gefen tashin hankali na mulkin mallaka na Turai. Daga baya ya zauna a Portugal na wani lokaci, sannan a 1524, an naɗa shi Mataimakin Sarki (Viceroy) na Indiya kuma ya sake tafiya Indiya, amma ya mutu a ranar 24 ga Disamba na wannan shekarar a Kochi, Indiya, mai yiwuwa daga cutar zazzabin cizon sauro. Rayuwarsa ta ƙunshi binciken duniya da ba a sani ba, gwagwarmayar kafa sabon tsarin kasuwanci, da cin nasara mai tsanani.

Tafiye-tafiyen Vasco da Gama sun yi tasiri mai zurfi a tarihin ɗan adam. Ta hanyar buɗe hanyar teku kai tsaye tsakanin Turai da Asiya, ya canza gaba ɗaya yanayin kasuwancin Gabas da Yamma wanda ya wuce ta Gabas ta Tsakiya tsawon ƙarnuka. Wannan ya kafa harsashin ginin da Portugal ta yi na daular teku mai ƙarfi kuma ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wajen samar da tsarin tattalin arzikin duniya mai tsakiya a Turai. Sunansa ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar Zamanin Bincike, yana wakiltar ruhun ɗan adam na ci gaba da kalubalantar abin da ba a sani ba. Duk da haka, mulkin mallaka da mamayar kasuwanci mai tashin hankali da tafiye-tafiyensa suka kawo har yanzu ana kimanta su da rikitarwa a yau. Ya kasance babban mai bincike kuma majagaba na mulkin mallaka, wani mutum wanda ya buɗe hanyar rikicin wayewar Gabas da Yamma. Nasarorinsa, tare da na sauran masu bincike na Zamanin Bincike kamar Christopher Columbus da Ferdinand Magellan, sun taimaka wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin yanki na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Vasco da Gama ya kasance mai bincike na Portugal a ƙarshen karni na 15, wanda ya buɗe hanyar teku daga Turai zuwa Indiya, kuma ya buɗe Zamanin Bincike.
key_achievements: Farkon buɗe hanyar teku tsakanin Turai da Indiya
Kafa harsashin daular teku ta Portugal
Fara mamayar kasuwancin kayan yaji na Tekun Indiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tafiye-tafiyensa sun canza yanayin kasuwancin duniya kuma sun buɗe sabon babi a musayar Gabas da Yamma, amma kuma sun buɗe hanyar mulkin mallaka.

parsed.narrative:
A wata rana da rana mai zinariya ta Zamanin Bincike ke ratsa kunnuwa, kuma iska mai gishiri ke hura tsoffin jiragen ruwa, zuciyar wani mutum ta fara bugawa zuwa ga abin da ba zai yiwu ba a cikin zaluncin Portugal da rashin kulawar sarki. Tekun Atlantika mai tsananin guguwa ya kai shi ga bakin teku marar sani, inda labarin kayan yaji da zinariya na Gabas suka kama idanunsa, kuma tsofaffin taswirori suka rada masa burinsa. Ko da yake daraja da aka rasa, girman kai da aka taka, da inuwar shakku da kishi da ke ci gaba da damunsa sun yi masa doguwar inuwa, bai tsaya ba. Maimakon haka, a cikin wannan duhu, ya ƙarfafa nufinsa kamar takobin ƙarfe, kuma sha'awar babban teku ta mamaye ruhinsa.

Lokacin da ya tunkari labulen shudi na farko, wanda har yanzu ba a kira shi Tekun Pasifik ba, akwai fuskoki marasa sani a gefensa, cike da damuwa da bege. A cikin yunwa da cututtuka, da kuma barazanar tawaye a jirgin ruwa, ya zama tsibiri mai kadaici. Yana bin taurari marasa sani, yana fama da yunwa da ƙishirwa na kwanaki, amma bai taɓa barin burinsa na duniya marar zane ba. Yana kallon sararin sama da idanu jajaye, ya shafe dare marasa adadi, kuma ko da yake raƙuman takaici da bege sun mamaye shi, bai taɓa ɗaga anka ba. Gunaguni na abokan aikinsa sun yi ta maimaitawa a kunnuwansa, amma bugun zuciyarsa ya ji rada na babban teku kawai.

A ƙarƙashin rana mai zafi na Philippines, a ƙasar da murna da cin amana na kabilu marasa sani suka haɗu, sunansa ya zama mai ƙarfi. Jini ja ya haɗu da ƙura, kuma iyakokin duniya da ya sani sun rushe. Ya ɗanɗana ɗan lokaci na ɗaukaka, tare da fahimtar cewa ya zagaya babban duniyar Duniya daga gabas zuwa yamma. Amma kibiyoyin kwaɗayi da ƙiyayya ba su kauce masa ba, kuma ƙasar waje ta zama wurin hutawa kaɗai. A lokacin ƙarshensa mai ja-jajir, shin nahiyoyi da tekunan da ya taka da ratsa sun ratsa idanunsa, ko kuwa kawai nadama ce ta duniya marar sani da bai taɓa gani ba?

Jininsa ya shiga cikin tsibiri marar sani, amma hanyar da ya buɗe ba ta ɓace ba. Wannan shine mataki na farko da ɗan adam ya ɗauka don fuskantar sirrin duniya mai zagaye, lokacin da mafarkin da aka zana a taswira ya zama gaskiya. Ƙarnuka sun shude, kuma yanzu muna ci gaba zuwa duniya mai faɗi, muna bin hanyar teku da jaruntakarsa ta buɗe. Sunansa yanzu ya wuce shafin tarihi kawai; ya zama alama marar mutuwa na ruhun ɗan adam mai ci gaba da kalubale, yana haifar da raƙuman ruwa har abada a cikin zukatanmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai binciken Portugal wanda ya kalubalanci abin da ba zai yiwu ba, ya buɗe hanyar zagayawa duniya ta farko ga ɗan adam, amma ya mutu a Philippines.
key_achievements: Ya fara kuma ya jagoranci tafiyar zagayawa duniya ta farko ga ɗan adam.
Ya buɗe sabuwar hanyar teku da ta ratsa Tekun Atlantika da Tekun Pasifik.
Ya ba da gudummawa wajen tabbatar da siffar duniya mai zagaye ta hanyar gwaji.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Jaruntakarsa ta bayyana sirrin duniya mai zagaye kuma ta ƙarfafa ruhun bincike na ɗan adam, ya zama alama marar mutuwa da ta buɗe sabon zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Cornelius Vanderbilt (1794-1877) ya kasance ɗan kasuwa kuma mai ba da agaji wanda ya tara dukiya mai yawa ta hanyar fara kasuwancin jigilar ruwa da layin dogo a Amurka. A ƙarshen karni na 18, Amurka, bayan samun 'yancin kai ba da daɗewa ba, tana shiga farkon matakan masana'antu, kuma biranen tashar jiragen ruwa kamar New York suna haɓaka cikin sauri a matsayin cibiyoyin kasuwanci. An haife shi a ranar 27 ga Mayu, 1794, a Staten Island, New York, ɗan wani manomi matalauci, Vanderbilt bai sami ilimi mai zurfi ba kuma dole ne ya yi aiki tun yana yaro don samun abin rayuwa. Lokacin da ya kai shekaru 16, ya sayi wani ɗan ƙaramin jirgin ruwa na jigilar kaya da dala 100 da ya aro daga iyayensa, ya fara kasuwancin jigilar kaya tsakanin Staten Island da Manhattan. Wannan shine matakin farko na daular kasuwancinsa mai girma. Ya faɗaɗa kasuwancin jirgin ruwa cikin sauri tare da himma da ƙwarewar kasuwanci, kuma ta hanyar wannan gogewa, ya fahimci mahimmancin dabaru da jigilar kaya tun da wuri. A wannan lokacin, fiye da jigilar fasinjoji da kaya kawai, ya kafa harsashin gaba ta hanyar hango tasirin tattalin arziƙi da tsarin jigilar kaya mai inganci zai kawo.

Kasuwancin Vanderbilt ya sami sabon juyi a farkon karni na 19 tare da ci gaban fasahar jirgin ruwa mai tururi. Kasuwancin jirgin ruwa mai tururi wata sabuwar hanyar jigilar kaya ce da ke amfani da injin tururi maimakon jirgin ruwa don jigilar fasinjoji da kaya tare da koguna da bakin teku. Ya gane damar wannan sabuwar fasaha nan da nan, kuma daga 1818, ya shiga cikin kasuwancin jirgin ruwa mai tururi na Thomas Gibbons, yana shiga cikin fannin jirgin ruwa mai tururi sosai. A lokacin, Robert Fulton da Robert Livingston suna da ikon mallakar jirgin ruwa mai tururi a jihar New York, amma Vanderbilt ya yi gasa mai tsanani da wannan ikon mallaka. Ya jawo hankalin abokan ciniki tare da farashi mai rahusa da ingantaccen sabis, yana girgiza tsarin ikon mallaka, kuma a ƙarshe, lokacin da ikon mallaka ya rushe bayan hukuncin Kotun Koli ta Amurka na 1824 a shari'ar 'Gibbons v. Ogden', wanda ya ƙarfafa ikon gwamnatin tarayya akan kasuwancin tsakanin jihohi, kasuwancinsa ya haɓaka cikin sauri. A wannan lokacin, saboda faɗaɗa kasuwancinsa mai tsauri da nasara, ya sami laƙabin "Commodore," ma'ana babban mutum a masana'antar jigilar ruwa.

A tsakiyar shekarun 1840, Vanderbilt ya nemi sabbin damammaki, yana amfani da arziƙin da ya tara daga kasuwancin jigilar ruwa. Ya yanke shawarar cewa layin dogo shine masana'antar gaba, kuma a hankali ya fara janyewa daga kasuwancin jigilar ruwa. Masana'antar layin dogo wani sabon kasuwanci ne wanda ke jigilar fasinjoji da kaya da yawa a ƙasa ta amfani da injin tururi, kuma yana da damar gina babban hanyar sadarwa da ke haɗa duk faɗin Amurka. A cikin shekarun 1860, Vanderbilt ya fara gina daular layin dogo ta hanyar saye da haɗa ƙananan kamfanonin layin dogo da yawa a New York da yankunan da ke kewaye. Musamman a cikin 1867, ya karɓi ikon New York Central Railroad kuma ya haɗa shi da Hudson River Railroad don gina babban hanyar layin dogo daga New York zuwa Chicago. A cikin wannan tsari, ya yi yaƙi mai tsanani da sauran manyan mutane kamar Jay Gould da Jim Fisk ta hanyar dabaru masu wayo a kasuwar hannun jari da kuma wani lokacin gasa marar tausayi. Manufarsa ba kawai mallakar kamfanonin layin dogo ba ne, amma don gina ingantaccen tsarin jigilar kaya mai haɗin kai don zama babban jijiya na tattalin arzikin Amurka.

Cornelius Vanderbilt ya tara dukiya mai yawa, kimanin dala miliyan 100, har zuwa mutuwarsa a ranar 4 ga Janairu, 1877, wanda ya kasance babban ɓangare na GDP na Amurka a lokacin. Bayan mutuwarsa, gadonsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga al'ummar Amurka. A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, ya kuma mai da hankali ga ayyukan agaji, inda a cikin 1873, ya ba da gudummawar dala miliyan 1 ga Jami'ar Vanderbilt don ci gaban ilimi a yankin Kudu. Wannan gudummawa ce mai yawa wacce ba a taɓa gani ba a lokacin. Ana ɗaukar Vanderbilt a matsayin mutumin da ya jagoranci juyin juya halin masana'antu na Amurka kuma ya kafa harsashin jari-hujja na zamani. Duk da cewa an soki salon kasuwancinsa mai tsauri da matsayinsa na ikon mallaka, a lokaci guda ana tunawa da shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya kawo sauyi a kayan aikin sufuri na Amurka kuma ya haɓaka ci gaban tattalin arziki. Rayuwarsa tana tunatar da mu nasarori da ƙalubale na sauran manyan 'yan kasuwa na zamaninsa kamar Andrew Carnegie da John D. Rockefeller, da kuma tattaunawa game da alhakin zamantakewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Cornelius Vanderbilt ya kasance ɗan kasuwa kuma mai ba da agaji wanda ya fara kasuwancin jigilar ruwa da layin dogo a Amurka a karni na 19, yana tara dukiya mai yawa.
key_achievements: Faɗaɗa kasuwancin jirgin ruwa mai tururi da mamaye masana'antar jigilar ruwa.
Haɗa manyan kamfanonin layin dogo don gina daular layin dogo.
Ba da gudummawa ga ayyukan agaji, gami da kafa Jami'ar Vanderbilt.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin alamar juyin juya halin masana'antu na Amurka kuma mutumin da ya kafa harsashin jari-hujja na zamani, kuma gadonsa yana ci gaba har yau.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin iskar sanyi ta daular Han, inda iska mai bushewa ke karkade ƙura, a kan babban matakin tarihi, wani rai da aka ɗaure da zaren kaddara don buɗe doguwar hanyar siliki. Fadar Chang'an mai ban sha'awa ta kasance kamar mafarki mai nisa, kuma takobin Xiongnu koyaushe sanyi ne mai ratsa wuya. Kamar yadda rana ta Gabas ke faɗuwa zuwa Yamma, iyakar wayewa ta bazu kamar ruɗani mai duhu. Ya tsaya shi kaɗai, yana ɗauke da nauyin kaddara mai girma, ƙishirwar ƙasashe da aka manta da su da kuma rawar jiki ga duniyar da ba a sani ba sun cika zuciyarsa. Numfashin da ya fitar ta cikin leɓunansa da aka rufe ya watse a hankali kamar hasken taurari.

Cikin daren shiru, abin da ya cika tanti shiru ne kawai na taurari baƙi. Kwanakin zalunci da ya sha a ɗaure da sarƙoƙi, daren hamada da ya yi fama da yunwa da ƙishirwa, duk sun tura shi bakin kogi. Ko da a cikin cin amana na mutanensa da barazana marar iyaka, idanunsa ba su taɓa kashewa ba. Yana kallon faɗuwar rana mai ja, ya tattara bege. Ya yi rantsuwa cewa zai kammala wannan tafiya mai wahala kuma ya buɗe sabbin sarƙaƙƙiya. A ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin jini, an ƙarfafa nufinsa kamar ƙarfe.

A kan faɗin ƙasa mai bushewa marar iyaka, harsuna da al'adu baƙi sun kewaye shi. Wadata na Samarkand, ƙamshin Bukhara mai ban mamaki, da girman dawakai masu daraja na Fergana. Da fuskarsa mai ɗauke da gumi da gajiya, ya yi tafiya da imani mai ƙarfi. Sha'awar ƙasashe da aka rasa da kuma sha'awar gina gada da za ta haɗa Gabas da Yamma ta hanzarta tafiyarsa. Wani lokaci ya kan zauna cikin yanke kauna, amma nufin kunna wutar wayewa ya sake tashe shi.

Duk da cewa dubban shekaru sun shude, sunansa har yanzu yana yawo kamar iska. Ya zama hanyar da ya bi, kuma ya zama zaren tarihi marasa adadi da suka haɗu tare da Hanyar Siliki. Irin hikima da aka kawo daga ƙasashe baƙi, labaran da wayewar daban-daban suka raba, suna raye tare da mu a yau. Kamar hannu marar ganuwa, har yanzu yana haɗa duniya, yana buɗe kofofin da aka rufe, kuma yana farkar da ruhun bincike marar iyaka na ɗan adam. Tafiyarsa ba ta ƙare ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Manzon daular Han ya binciko yankin Yamma a cikin barazanar Xiongnu, ya buɗe Hanyar Siliki kuma ya kafa harsashin musayar wayewa tsakanin Gabas da Yamma.
key_achievements: Buɗe Hanyar Siliki ta hanyar binciken yankin Yamma
Buɗe hanyar musayar wayewa tsakanin Gabas da Yamma
Faɗaɗa ilimi game da duniyar da ba a sani ba
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhun bincikensa da hanyar buɗe sabbin abubuwa suna ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga haɗin kai na ɗan adam da ci gaban wayewa har abada.

parsed.narrative:
Zheng He (1371-1433) ya kasance babban jami'in fada (eunuch), mai bincike mai girma, jami'in diflomasiyya, kuma Admiral na sojojin ruwa a farkon daular Ming. An haife shi da suna Ma He a Kunyang, lardin Yunnan, kuma danginsa zuriyar Musulmai ne da suka yi hijira daga Tsakiyar Asiya a karkashin mulkin Daular Mongol. A shekara ta 1381, lokacin da daular Ming ta ci Yunnan, an kama Ma He yana yaro, an yi masa kaciya, kuma ya zama babban jami'in fada. An tura shi fadar Ming a Nanjing don ya yi wa Zhu Di, ɗa na huɗu na Zhu Yuanzhang, wanda daga baya ya zama Sarkin Yongle, hidima. Ta hanyar rayuwarsa a fada, Ma He ya nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki da aminci, ya sami amincewar Zhu Di, kuma a hankali ya haɓaka basirarsa ta soja da diflomasiyya. Wannan lokaci ne da daular Ming ke daidaita rikice-rikicen farkon kafuwarta kuma tana neman nuna ƙarfinta a waje, tare da ƙaruwar sha'awar faɗaɗa tasiri ta hanyar kasuwancin teku da diflomasiyya. Ma He yana jiran damar da zai nuna basirarsa a cikin wannan yanayin zamani.

Wani muhimmin canji a rayuwar Ma He ya faru a lokacin Yaƙin Jingnan (1399-1402). Wannan yaƙin basasa ne da Zhu Di ya fara don kwace sarauta daga hannun ɗan'uwansa, Sarkin Jianwen, kuma Ma He ya goyi bayan Zhu Di sosai a wannan yaƙin. Musamman, ya nuna ƙwarewa ta musamman wajen tsara dabarun soja da jagorancin sojoji, yana ba da gudummawa sosai ga nasarar Zhu Di. Bayan Zhu Di ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Sarkin Yongle, an gane gudummawar Ma He, an ba shi sunan iyali 'Zheng', kuma ya zama Zheng He. Bugu da ƙari, ya hau matsayin Taizhen (babban jami'in fada), ɗaya daga cikin manyan jami'an fada a fada, yana samun iko mai yawa. Bayan hawansa gadon sarauta, Sarkin Yongle yana da babban hangen nesa na nuna ƙarfin daular Ming a waje, ƙarfafa kasuwancin teku, da kuma samun sabbin ƙasashe masu biyan haraji. Don cimma wannan hangen nesa, Sarkin Yongle ya umarci Zheng He ya jagoranci manyan balaguron teku, wanda ya haifar da "Balaguron Zheng He," wani binciken teku mai girman gaske wanda ba a taɓa gani ba a tarihin ɗan adam.

Daga 1405 zuwa 1433, Zheng He ya jagoranci manyan balaguron teku guda bakwai tsawon kimanin shekaru 28. Jiragen ruwansa sun kai 300, ciki har da manyan jiragen ruwa da ake kira 'Jiragen Taska' (Baoshan), kuma sama da mutane 27,000 ne suka hau jiragen. Jiragen Taska, waɗanda suka fi tsayin mita 120, su ne manyan jiragen ruwa na katako a duniya a lokacin, suna nuna ƙwarewar daular Ming a fasahar gina jiragen ruwa. Jiragen ruwan Zheng He sun yi tafiya a yankuna masu faɗi, daga Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya zuwa Tekun Indiya, Tekun Fasha, Tekun Ja, har zuwa gabar tekun Gabashin Afirka. Ya kafa dangantakar diflomasiyya da sarakunan kowane yanki, ya yada al'adun Ming, kuma ya dawo da kayayyakin gida da dabbobi da tsire-tsire masu daraja (misali, rakumin dawa, zebra) zuwa Ming. Wani lokaci, ya shiga tsakani wajen murkushe 'yan fashin teku ko warware rikice-rikicen gida, yana nuna ƙarfin sojan Ming. Waɗannan balaguron sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa ikon teku na Ming, ƙarfafa tsarin haraji, da haɓaka musayar al'adu, fiye da bincike kawai. Zheng He ya fuskanci matsaloli da haɗari da yawa a wannan tafiya, amma ya shawo kan dukkan matsalolin kuma ya kammala aikinsa tare da jagoranci mai kyau, fasahar kewayawa, da basirar diflomasiyya.

Balaguron Zheng He na ƙarshe ya ƙare tare da mutuwarsa a shekara ta 1433. Bayan mutuwar Sarkin Yongle, manufofin waje na Ming a hankali sun koma manufar hana tafiye-tafiyen teku (Haijin), kuma tare da raguwar tallafin kuɗi da siyasa ga manyan balaguron teku, ba a ci gaba da manyan tafiye-tafiyen Zheng He ba. Har ma an yi barazanar ɓacewa daga tarihi, tare da ɓacewa ko ɓoye bayanan tafiye-tafiyensa. Duk da haka, a zamanin yau, an fara sake nazarin nasarorinsa, kuma ana ɗaukar Zheng He a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin muhimman mutane a tarihin teku na China. Tafiye-tafiyensa sun kasance alama ce ta fasahar Ming da ƙarfin ƙasa, kuma wata muhimmiyar hanya ce ta musayar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yamma. A yau, ana tuna Zheng He a matsayin majagaba wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin haɗa duniya ta hanyar diflomasiyya da musayar zaman lafiya, kuma ana ambaton ruhinsa a cikin dabarun teku na zamani kamar shirin "Belt and Road Initiative" na China. Manyan jiragensa da balaguron teku masu faɗi sun zama abin kwatance, suna nuna tarihin binciken teku daga hangen nesa na Gabas, wanda ya bambanta da na masu bincike na Yamma a zamanin bincike, kamar Vasco da Gama ko Christopher Columbus.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Zheng He ya kasance babban jami'in fada kuma Admiral na sojojin ruwa a farkon daular Ming, wanda ya jagoranci manyan jiragen ruwa na taska a balaguro bakwai zuwa Tekun Indiya, yana ɗaukaka martabar daular Ming.
key_achievements: Jagorancin manyan balaguron teku guda bakwai a lokacin Sarkin Yongle na Ming
Buɗe hanyoyin teku zuwa Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya, Tekun Indiya, da gabar tekun Gabashin Afirka
Ba da gudummawa ga faɗaɗa kasuwancin teku da dangantakar haraji na Ming
Gudanar da manyan jiragen ruwa a duniya a lokacinsa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tafiye-tafiyensa sun nuna matsayin Ming a matsayin babbar ƙasa mai ƙarfin teku, kuma har yau ana tuna shi a matsayin alamar tarihin teku da musayar al'adu na China.

parsed.narrative:
Leif Erikson, wani mai bincike na Viking haifaffen Iceland wanda aka haifa a kusan shekara ta 970, an san shi a matsayin Turawa na farko da ya gano nahiyar Arewacin Amurka a kusan shekara ta 1000. Karshen karni na 10 shine kololuwar zamanin Viking, lokacin da mutanen Norse na Arewacin Turai ke tafiye-tafiye a cikin Tekun Atlantika don neman sabbin mazauna da hanyoyin kasuwanci. Mahaifinsa, Eirik Thorvaldsson, wato 'Erik Mai Ja', bayan an kore shi daga Iceland saboda kisan kai, ya yi tafiya zuwa yamma kuma ya gano Greenland a kusan shekara ta 985, inda ya kafa mazaunin Norse na farko a can. Leif ya girma a cikin wannan yanayi mai cike da ruhin bincike, kuma tun yana yaro, tabbas ya ji labarin Tekun Atlantika mai haɗari da kuma ƙasashe marasa sani. Iyalinsa sun koma Greenland a kusan shekara ta 986 don kafa sabuwar rayuwa, kuma a can Leif ya koyi fasahar kewayawa ta gargajiya ta Viking da dabarun rayuwa, yana kafa harsashin manyan bincike na gaba. Wannan tarihin ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tafiyarsa zuwa duniyar da ba a sani ba.

Wani babban canji a rayuwar Leif ya zo ne tare da tafiyarsa zuwa Norway da kuma karɓar Kiristanci. A kusan shekara ta 1000, ya gana da Sarki Olaf I Tryggvason na Norway kuma ya karɓi Kiristanci, kuma an ba shi umarni daga sarki ya koma Greenland don yada Kiristanci. A wannan lokacin, a kan hanyarsa ta komawa Greenland, ya ji labari daga wani ɗan kasuwa mai suna Bjarni Herjólfsson cewa ya ga wata ƙasa mai cike da dazuzzuka a yamma. An ce Bjarni ya ga sabuwar ƙasar ba zato ba tsammani bayan wata guguwa ta karkatar da jirginsa daga hanya, amma bai sauka a can ba. Wannan labarin ya motsa ruhin bincike na Leif, kuma ya yanke shawarar bincika ƙasar da kansa. Ya sayi jirgin Bjarni, ya shirya balaguro, kuma ya fara shirye-shiryen tafiya mai cike da jarumtaka zuwa yamma. Wannan ba kawai kasada ba ce, amma babban kalubale ne don faɗaɗa iyakokin yanki na Viking da neman sabbin albarkatu.

Tawagar bincike ta Leif Erikson ta bar Greenland a kusan shekara ta 1000 kuma ta fara tafiya zuwa yamma. Da farko sun isa wata ƙasa mai cike da kankara da duwatsu, wadda Leif ya kira 'Helluland', wato 'Ƙasar Duwatsu Masu Faɗi'. Ana kyautata zaton wannan shine Baffin Island a Kanada a yau. Daga nan sai suka isa wata ƙasa mai cike da dazuzzuka masu yawa, kuma suka kira ta 'Markland', wato 'Ƙasar Daji', wadda ake ganin ita ce gabar tekun Labrador a Kanada a yau. A ƙarshe sun isa wata ƙasa mai ni'ima mai yanayi mai laushi da yalwar inabi na daji (ko 'cranberries'), kuma Leif ya ba ta suna 'Vinland', wato 'Ƙasar Inabi'. Ana kyautata zaton Vinland shine L'Anse aux Meadows a Newfoundland, Kanada a yau, kuma a nan Leif ya gina wani mazauni na wucin gadi mai suna 'Leifsbúðir' kuma ya yi hunturu a can. Ya bincika albarkatu da damar wannan sabuwar ƙasa, yana cimma babban nasara na tarihi na zama Turawa na farko da ya taka ƙafa a nahiyar Arewacin Amurka. Bincikensa ya kasance sakamakon jarumtaka da fasahar kewayawa mai kyau a cikin Tekun Atlantika mai haɗari.

Leif Erikson ya koma Greenland bayan ya yi hunturu a Vinland, kuma an watsa abubuwan da ya gano ga zuriyar ta hanyar sagas na Iceland kamar 'Saga na Mutanen Greenland' da 'Saga na Erik Mai Ja'. Duk da haka, ba a san abin da ya gano sosai a cikin al'ummar Turai a lokacin ba, kuma bai haifar da babban mulkin mallaka ba. Kokarin Viking na kafa mazauni a Vinland ya gaza a ƙarshe saboda rikice-rikice da 'yan asali, nisan da ke tsakanin su da ƙasarsu, da kuma yanayi mai wuya. Duk da haka, an rubuta Leif Erikson a tarihi a matsayin Turawa na farko da ya gano nahiyar Arewacin Amurka, kimanin shekaru 500 kafin Columbus. Ruhinsa na bincike mai jarumtaka da kalubalensa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba suna ci gaba da karfafa gwiwar mutane da yawa har zuwa yau, musamman a Arewacin Amurka inda aka keɓe ranar 9 ga Oktoba a matsayin 'Ranar Leif Erikson' don tunawa da nasarorinsa. Tafiyarsa ta ketare Tekun Atlantika tana nuna sha'awar ɗan adam mara yankewa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba, kuma wannan yana da alaƙa da tafiye-tafiyen sauran masu bincike a Zamanin Bincike.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Leif Erikson wani mai bincike ne haifaffen Iceland daga zamanin Viking, kuma shine Turawa na farko da ya gano Arewacin Amurka a kusan shekara ta 1000.
key_achievements: Gano nahiyar Arewacin Amurka na farko
Kafa mazaunin Vinland
Nasara a tafiyar ketare Tekun Atlantika
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa yana nuna kalubalen ɗan adam mara yankewa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba.

parsed.narrative:
Charlemagne, wanda aka haifa a kusan shekara ta 742 kuma ya rasu a shekara ta 814, Sarkin Masarautar Frankish kuma Sarkin Yammacin Roma, ya kasance babban mai mulki wanda ya kafa sabon tsari da wayewa a Yammacin Turai bayan rugujewar Daular Roma. A tsakiyar karni na 8, Yammacin Turai ta kasance cikin rudani, tare da masarautun kabilun Jamus da yawa suna gwagwarmaya, wanda ya haifar da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa da koma bayan al'adu. Mahaifinsa, Pepin the Short, ya kafa daular Carolingian kuma ya karfafa alaka da Paparoma, yana kafa tushen Masarautar Frankish. Charlemagne ya taso a cikin wannan yanayi, kuma a shekara ta 768, ya gaji mahaifinsa, yana mulkin masarautar tare da dan uwansa Carloman I. Amma, bayan mutuwar Carloman I ba zato ba tsammani a shekara ta 771, Charlemagne ya zama mai mulkin Masarautar Frankish gaba daya, yana daukar nauyin makomar Turai a kafadunsa. Ya rungumi babban hangen nesa na hada kan Turai da kuma kare wayewar Kirista. Hawansa mulki ba kawai gadon sarauta ba ne, amma wani muhimmin juyi ne wanda ya bude sabon babi a Turai ta Tsakiya.

Bayan ya zama mai mulki guda daya, Charlemagne ya fara yakin neman fadada masarautarsa da tabbatar da zaman lafiya. Daya daga cikin manyan nasarorin sojansa shine cin nasarar Masarautar Lombard. A shekara ta 773, bisa bukatar Paparoma Hadrian I, ya shiga Italiya, kuma a shekara ta 774, ya rusa Masarautar Lombard, ya kira kansa Sarkin Lombards, kuma ya fadada tasirinsa har zuwa Arewacin Italiya. Bugu da kari, ya yi dogon yaki da Saxons, wanda aka fi sani da **Yakin Saxon (Saxon Wars)**, wanda ya yi barazana ga iyakar gabashin Masarautar Frankish, daga shekara ta 772 zuwa 804, sama da shekaru 30. Wannan yaki ba kawai fadada yanki ba ne, amma ya kasance game da hadin kai na addini da al'adu, inda aka tilasta wa Saxons su musulunta kuma aka shigar da su cikin al'adun Frankish. Ya kuma yi nasarar gudanar da yakin neman zabe a kan sojojin Musulmi a yankin Iberian Peninsula da kuma Avars, wanda ya sa daularsa ta yi alfahari da babban yanki wanda ya hada da Faransa, Jamus, da Italiya na yau. Wannan nasarar soja ta sanya Charlemagne ya zama mafi karfi a Yammacin Turai, kuma ya kafa tushen hada kan al'ummomin Turai da suka warwatse zuwa wata babbar kungiya ta siyasa.

Charlemagne bai tsaya kawai ga fadada yanki ba, amma ya yi kokari don karfafa daularsa da farfado da wayewa. Daya daga cikin manyan nasarorinsa shine **Farfadowar Carolingian (Carolingian Renaissance)**, wanda ke nufin farfadowar ilimi da al'adu a fannin ilimi, fasaha, da adabi daga karshen karni na 8 zuwa farkon karni na 9. Ya kafa makarantun fada kuma ya gayyaci manyan malamai na lokacin kamar Alcuin don adanawa da kwafin rubuce-rubucen gargajiya, yana inganta matakin ilimi. Ya kasance mai zurfin sha'awar ilimi, har ma ya yi kokarin koyon rubutu duk da cewa bai iya ba, kuma ta hanyar wannan, ya yi kokari wajen horar da limamai da masu gudanarwa. Bugu da kari, ya kafa dokoki da tsarin gudanarwa guda daya a duk fadin daular, kuma ya yi gyaran kudi don inganta zaman lafiya na tattalin arziki da kasuwanci. Ya tura wakilai masu sintiri da ake kira 'Missi Dominici' don sa ido kan gudanarwar yankuna da kuma sauraron korafe-korafen jama'a kai tsaye, yana karfafa tsarin mulki na tsakiya. Wadannan kokarin sun kawo sabon kuzari ga al'ummar Yammacin Turai wanda ya yi rauni bayan rugujewar Daular Roma, kuma sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen wayewar Turai ta Tsakiya.

Kololuwar mulkin Charlemagne shine lokacin da Paparoma Leo III ya sanya masa **rawanin Sarkin Yammacin Roma** a ranar Kirsimeti ta shekara ta 800 a Basilica na St. Peter a Roma. Wannan ya nuna farfadowar Daular Roma ta Yamma, kuma ya nuna hadin kan ikon Paparoma da ikon duniya. Ta haka, an gane shi a matsayin babban mai mulki na Yammacin Turai kuma mai kare duniyar Kirista. Ko da yake bayan mutuwarsa an raba daular ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Verdun a shekara ta 843, gadon siyasa da al'adu na Charlemagne ya yi tasiri sosai ga Turai ta gaba. Ana kiransa 'Uban Turai', kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da asalin Faransa da Jamus. Gyaran gudanarwarsa, inganta ilimi, da kokarin hada kan Kirista sun zama ginshikin wayewar Turai ta Tsakiya, kuma sun zama abin koyi ga sarakunan Daular Roma Mai Tsarki na gaba. Nasarorin Charlemagne sun nuna burinsa na hada kan Turai a cikin lokacin rudani, kuma wannan wani muhimmin misali ne na tarihi wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da kokarin wasu masu mulki na gaba da suka yi mafarkin hada kan Turai.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Charlemagne ya kasance Sarkin Masarautar Frankish kuma Sarkin Yammacin Roma a farkon zamanin Tsakiya, wanda ya hada kan Yammacin Turai kuma ya jagoranci Farfadowar Carolingian.
key_achievements: Cin nasarar Masarautar Lombard da fadada yanki
Sanya masa rawani a matsayin Sarkin Yammacin Roma a shekara ta 800
Jagorantar Farfadowar Carolingian da inganta ilimi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa 'Uban Turai', ya kafa tushen wayewar Turai ta Tsakiya kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga samar da asalin Turai.

parsed.narrative:
Inca, wata ƙaramar ƙabila ce kawai a cikin tsaunukan Andes masu tsauri da babu kowa. Lokacin da babbar rundunar Chanka mai zalunci ta yi wa babban birnin Cusco kawanya mai zafi da zalunci, har ma tsohon sarkin Inca da yarima mai jiran gado suka gudu cikin tsoro da tsoro. Amma Pachacuti, yarima na uku, a wannan lokacin na mummunan yanke kauna, bai bar mutanensa ba kuma ya tsaya shi kaɗai a layin tsaro, yana mai sadaukar da ransa. Duk da cewa kowa ya miƙa wuya ga kisan kiyashi saboda ƙarancin adadi, ya ƙarfafa jarumawansa da zazzafan gwiwa ta hanyar karisma da dabaru na ban mamaki, kuma a mu'ujiza ya tarwatsa babbar rundunar maƙiyi gaba ɗaya. Sunan Pachacuti, ma'anarsa 'Mai girgiza ƙasa', an haife shi, cike da jini, daga wannan yaƙi na tarihi na ceton al'umma.

Bayan ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin sarki, bai tsaya kawai a layin tsaro na ƙabila ba, amma ya ci ƙabilu maƙiya marasa adadi a kewayensa da gudun ban tsoro, yana jefa dukkanin yankin Andes cikin tukunyar tsoro da farin ciki. Amma bai kasance mai cin nasara na daji ba wanda kawai ya soka zuciyar maƙiyi da mashi da garkuwa. Ya sake tsara yankunan da aka ci nasara zuwa wata babbar daular da aka tsara sosai mai suna 'Tawantinsuyu (Yankuna Huɗu)', kuma ya aiwatar da manufar haɗa kai mai zurfi, yana kawo yaran manyan mutane daga ƙasashen maƙiya zuwa Cusco kuma yana koya musu harshen Inca da al'adunsu. Ta hanyar gina babbar 'Hanyar Inca' da ta miƙe ba iyaka a kowane bangare, ya nuna kololuwar basirar gudanarwa, inda nan take ya mallaki kayayyaki da bayanai na babbar daular.

An kuma yi imani cewa manyan gine-ginen birnin sama mai ban mamaki 'Machu Picchu', wanda ke shawagi a kan gajimare, an yi tunaninsu ne a ƙarƙashin hangen nesansa mai haske da jagorancinsa. A kan filayen tsaunukan Andes masu iska, Pachacuti ya haɓaka Inca zuwa daular zinariya mafi ƙarfi da girma a tarihin nahiyar Amurka cikin tsara ɗaya kawai.

Rayuwar Pachacuti babban labari ne mai ban mamaki na gina daula, wanda ya nuna yadda ƙarfin hali mai zafi da basira mai sanyi, waɗanda ba su taɓa ja da baya ba ko da a bakin ramin halaka mafi muni na rugujewar al'umma, za su iya farfaɗo da mutum ɗaya zuwa wani babban halitta mai kama da Allah wanda ya canza taswirar dukkanin nahiyar gaba ɗaya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban sarki wanda ya ceci Inca daga barazanar mamayar Chanka, ya gina daula kuma ya haɗa kan dukkanin yankin Andes.
key_achievements: Kare babban birnin Cusco daga mamayar Chanka
Gina daular Inca wacce ta mamaye dukkanin yankin Andes
Gina Hanyar Inca da kuma ba da umarnin gina Machu Picchu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin jarumin kafa daula wanda ya haɓaka Inca zuwa daular zinariya mafi ƙarfi a nahiyar Amurka.

parsed.narrative:
Abul-Fath Jalal-ud-din Muhammad Akbar (an haife shi a shekara ta 1542) shi ne sarki na uku na Daular Mughal, wanda ya mulki yankin Indiya a karni na 16. Zamanin mulkinsa (1556-1605) ana tuna shi a matsayin zamanin zinariya, lokacin da Daular Mughal ta zama daula ta gaskiya kuma ta bunƙasa a cikin tarihin Indiya mai cike da rarrabuwar kawuna da hargitsi. An haifi Akbar a ranar 15 ga Oktoba, 1542, a Umarkot a yankin Sindh na Pakistan a yanzu, yayin da mahaifinsa, Sarki Humayun, ke gudun hijira zuwa Farisa. Daular Mughal, wadda kakansa Babur ya kafa bayan ya zo daga Tsakiyar Asiya, har yanzu tana da tushe mara ƙarfi, kuma yaron Akbar ya girma a cikin yanayi mai cike da rashin tabbas. A shekara ta 1556, lokacin da ya hau gadon sarauta yana ɗan shekara 13 kacal bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Humayun ba zato ba tsammani, daular tana fuskantar barazana daga ciki da waje. Matashin sarki ya kafa tushen mulkinsa na farko tare da taimakon mai kula da shi, Bairam Khan, amma ba da daɗewa ba ya fuskanci babban ƙalubale na tabbatar da ikonsa da kuma gina makomar daular da kansa. Daidai da sunansa 'Akbar', wanda ke nufin 'Mai Girma' a cikin Larabci, ya ɗauki hangen nesa na haɓaka daular ba kawai a matsayin daular cin nasara ba, amma a matsayin ƙasa mai ƙarfi da haɗin kai.

Farkon mulkin Akbar ya kasance tsari na ficewa daga tasirin mai kula da shi, Bairam Khan, da kuma kafa ikon sarki na gaskiya. A kusan shekara ta 1560, ya kori Bairam Khan kuma ya fara mulki kai tsaye, yana neman tabbatar da zaman lafiya a daular. Bayan haka, Akbar ya nuna bajintar soji mai ban mamaki, inda ya ci nasara a kan masarautu da yawa a arewacin Indiya da tsakiyar Indiya, yana faɗaɗa yankin Daular Mughal sosai. Musamman ma, dangantakarsa da Rajputs ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a mulkinsa. Ya wuce cin nasara kawai, ya aiwatar da manufofi masu ban mamaki waɗanda ke neman haɗin kai tare da mutanen da aka ci nasara. Soke harajin jizya mai nuna bambanci da ake dorawa waɗanda ba Musulmi ba a shekara ta 1564 ya kasance alamar farkon manufofinsa na haƙuri. Wannan ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samun goyon bayan Hindu, waɗanda suka kasance mafi yawan jama'a a cikin daular. Bugu da ƙari, ya ƙarfafa kawancen siyasa ta hanyar auren siyasa da gimbiya Rajput Hindu, kuma ya aiwatar da manufar ɗaukar ma'aikata waɗanda suka wuce kabilanci da addini, kamar naɗa manyan Rajput a matsayin manyan jami'an daular, don neman haɗin kai da zaman lafiya na daular.

Manufofin haƙuri na Akbar sun ci gaba da haɓaka zuwa ga inganta tattaunawar addini da fahimta. A shekara ta 1575, ya gina 'Gidan Ibada (Ibadat Khana)' a babban birninsa na Fatehpur Sikri, inda kowane daren Alhamis, malamai da masana falsafa daga addinai daban-daban kamar Musulunci, Hindu, Kiristanci, Zoroastrianism, da Jainism ke taruwa don tattauna gaskiya. Duk da cewa bai iya karatu da rubutu ba, Akbar ya saurari muhawararsu da kyau kuma ya fahimci cewa akwai gaskiya ta duniya a cikin dukkan addinai. Bisa ga wannan zurfin bincike, a shekara ta 1582, ya kafa sabon tsarin tunani, 'Din-i-Ilahi', wanda ya haɗa da mafi girman dabi'u na dukkan addinai. Wannan za a iya fassara shi da 'Addini Mai Tsarki' ko 'Addinin Allah', kuma ya yi nufin ƙirƙirar al'umma mai ɗabi'a da ruhaniya da ke kewaye da sarki, maimakon tilasta wani addini na musamman. Wannan yunƙuri mai ban mamaki ya haifar da tsananin adawa daga malaman Musulunci na gargajiya (Ulama), amma Akbar ya ci gaba da riƙe falsafarsa ta haƙuri ba tare da girgiza ba. Ya kuma yi ƙoƙari don ƙarfafa tushen daular ta hanyar kafa ingantaccen tsarin harajin ƙasa ta hanyar gyare-gyaren Todar Mal, da kuma gabatar da tsarin Mansabdari don sake tsara tsarin soja da na gudanarwa.

Mulkin Akbar The Great ya canza Daular Mughal daga zama daular cin nasara kawai zuwa wani babban tukunyar narke al'adu inda kabilu da addinai daban-daban ke rayuwa tare. Manufofinsa na haƙuri na addini sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen rage rikice-rikice a cikin daular da kuma cimma haɗin kai na zamantakewa, wanda ya zama babban ƙarfin da ya sa Daular Mughal ta bunƙasa tsawon kimanin shekaru 150. Bugu da ƙari, a lokacin mulkinsa, an sami ci gaba mai ban mamaki a fannoni daban-daban kamar gine-gine, fasaha, da adabi, wanda ya buɗe zamanin zinariya na fasahar Mughal. Akbar ya jagoranci zaman lafiya da wadata na daular ta hanyar kafa tsarin gudanarwa mai ƙarfi na tsakiya da kuma aiwatar da adalci, wanda ya ba da muhimmin tsarin mulki ga sarakunan Indiya na gaba. Ko bayan mutuwarsa, ruhun haƙuri da haɗin kansa ya kasance a cikin ainihin Daular Mughal, kuma har yau ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin muhimmin misali na tarihi lokacin da ake tattauna bambancin al'adu da haɗin kai na addini a yankin Indiya. Manufofinsa na haƙuri sun bar muhimmin misali game da ƙalubale da hanyoyin magance su da sarakunan Indiya masu bambancin addini da al'adu suka fuskanta daga baya, kuma wannan ya fi bayyana idan aka kwatanta shi da manufofin sarakuna na gaba kamar Aurangzeb.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Akbar shi ne sarki na uku na Daular Mughal a karni na 16, wanda ya bunƙasa daular ta hanyar haƙuri na addini da kuma tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi na tsakiya.
key_achievements: Soke harajin jizya ga waɗanda ba Musulmi ba
Aiwatar da manufofin haɗin kai na addinai daban-daban da gyare-gyaren gudanarwa
Faɗaɗa yankin Daular Mughal da tabbatar da zaman lafiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Manufofinsa na haƙuri na addini da haɗin kai sun kasance muhimmiyar gadon tsarin mulki wanda ke girmama bambancin al'adu a yankin Indiya.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarni na 17, nahiyar Afirka tana cikin wani hali na jini da kuka marar yankewa saboda mamayar Portugal marar tausayi da cinikin bayi mai haɗama. Nzinga Ndongo, wadda aka haifa a matsayin gimbiya a Masarautar Ndongo ta yankin Angola, ta kasance jaruma mai ƙarfin ƙarfe, daban da sarakunan Afirka masu rauni waɗanda ke durƙusa gaban mahara suna biyan haraji cikin wulakanci. Lokacin da aka aika ta a matsayin jakadiya don tattaunawa da gwamnan Portugal a madadin ɗan'uwanta sarki, gwamnan ya yi mata watsi kuma bai ba ta kujera ba. Sai ta sa kuyangarta ta durƙusa, ta zauna a kanta da girma, tana nuna wani iko mai ban mamaki wajen jagorantar tattaunawar. Bayan mutuwar ɗan'uwanta mai ban mamaki, a ƙarshe ta hau gadon sarauta da kanta, ta fara wani mummunan kuma babban yaƙi na jini don kare 'yancin mutanen Angola daga farautar bayi na Portugal.

Ba wai kawai jaruma ce mai amfani da takobi ba, ta kasance fitacciyar jami'ar diflomasiyya kuma mai tsara dabaru a zamaninta. Maimakon ta fuskanci sojojin Portugal kai tsaye waɗanda ke turawa da ƙarfin wuta mai yawa, ta yi amfani da dabarun yaƙin ɓoye don yanke numfashin abokan gaba da dabara. Bugu da ƙari, ta nuna cikakkiyar fahimtar siyasar gaskiya cewa abokin gaba na abokin gaba abokina ne, ta kulla kawance mai ƙarfi da sojojin Holland, kuma ta haɗa kabilun maƙwabta don jefa Portugal cikin tsoro. Ko da a tsufa, sama da shekaru 60, ta ajiye kambinta mai kyau, ta sa sulke mai laka, kuma ta jagoranci sojojinta da ƙarfi a gaba-gaba na yaƙi, kuma a gaban idanunta masu buɗe, sojojin Portugal sun sha ɗanɗanon ja da baya sau da yawa.

Bayan shekaru 40 na yaƙi mai tsanani da juriya, Portugal a ƙarshe ba ta iya karya nufin wannan sarauniya mai ban tsoro ba kuma dole ne ta sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da ke amincewa da 'yancin kai na masarautarta (Matamba).

Har zuwa lokacin da ta mutu, 'yan kasuwar bayi ba su taɓa yin ƙarfin hali su taka ƙasar Angola ba. Rayuwar Sarauniya Nzinga Ndongo wani babban labari ne na jini na 'yancin Afirka, mafi tsanani kuma mafi girma, wanda ta ceci mutanenta daga sarƙoƙin bauta ba tare da ta durƙusa ba a gaban bindigogi marasa tausayi na manyan ƙasashen Yamma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nzinga Ndongo wata babbar sarauniya ce ta Afirka wadda ta yi yaƙi tsawon shekaru 40 da mamayar Portugal da cinikin bayi a ƙarni na 17, ta kare 'yancin mutanen Angola da 'yancin kai na masarautarta.
key_achievements: Nuna iko mai ban mamaki a tattaunawar da gwamnan Portugal.
Yaƙi da Portugal tsawon shekaru 40 ta hanyar dabarun yaƙin ɓoye da diflomasiyya.
Samun amincewar 'yancin kai na masarauta da ceton mutane daga sarƙoƙin bauta.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin mafi girman alamar 'yanci wadda ta kare 'yancin mutanen Afirka daga manyan ƙasashen Yamma.

parsed.narrative:
Epicurus (an haife shi kusan 341 K.Z.) masanin falsafa ne na Girka na da, wanda ya kafa Falsafar Epicurus, wata tsarin tunani ta musamman da ke binciko farin ciki da kwanciyar hankali na ɗan adam a cikin hargitsin zamanin Hellenanci. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 4 K.Z., lokacin da babbar daular Alexander Mai Girma ta rabu kuma yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa suka yadu ko'ina, mutane sun yi marmarin ma'ana da kwanciyar hankali a rayuwa. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haifi Epicurus a tsibirin Samos, mulkin mallaka na Athens, kuma ya haɓaka tunaninsa ta hanyar nazarin falsafa a wurare kamar Lesbos da Lampsacus. Kusan 306 K.Z., ya koma Athens kuma ya kafa al'umma mai suna 'Lambun', wadda ta kasance fiye da makaranta kawai; ta kasance wata al'umma ta musamman inda kowa, ba tare da la'akari da matsayi ko jinsi ba, ke taruwa daidai don tattaunawar falsafa da raba rayuwa mai sauƙi. Falsafar Epicurus ta ɗauki jin daɗi a matsayin babban alheri, amma wannan ba yana nufin lalata ta jiki ba, sai dai 'kwanciyar hankali na rai (ataraxia)' da 'rashin ciwon jiki (aponia)'.

Falsafar Epicurus ta fuskanci rashin fahimta da suka da yawa a lokacin. Musamman ma, 'ka'idar jin daɗinsa' sau da yawa ana karkatar da ita kuma ana sukar ta a matsayin mai goyon bayan rayuwa ta lalata da rashin kamun kai. Amma ainihin jin daɗin da Epicurus ya nema ba gamsuwa ta ɗan lokaci ba ce, sai dai kwanciyar hankali mai ɗorewa da ake samu ta hanyar 'yantuwa daga damuwar hankali da ciwon jiki. Ya ga manyan tushen rashin farin ciki na ɗan adam guda biyu. Na farko shi ne tsoron mutuwa mara ma'ana, na biyu kuma shi ne tsoron camfi na fushin alloli da shigarsu. Epicurus ya yi ƙoƙarin kawar da tsoron mutuwa da ka'idar cewa "Muddin muna raye, mutuwa ba ta tare da mu, kuma idan mutuwa ta zo, ba ma wanzu," kuma ya koyar da cewa babu buƙatar tsoron alloli domin ba sa shiga cikin al'amuran ɗan adam. Waɗannan koyarwar sun zama muhimmin juyi da suka 'yantar da mutane daga camfi da damuwa da suka yadu a lokacin, kuma suka jaddada cewa za a iya rayuwa mai lumana ta hanyar tunani mai ma'ana da fahimtar yanayi.

Epicurus ya tabbatar da falsafarsa ta hanyar rayuwarsa, inda ya fuskanci gwaje-gwaje da gwagwarmaya da yawa. Ya fuskanci suka mai tsanani daga sauran makarantun falsafa, musamman Stoics, kuma ra'ayoyinsa sau da yawa ana karkatar da su kuma ana gabatar da su ga jama'a ba daidai ba. Duk da haka, Epicurus bai girgiza ba da waɗannan hare-hare na waje kuma ya ci gaba da rayuwa mai sauƙi da tsantseni tare da almajiransa a 'Lambun'. Ya yi imani cewa abinci mai sauƙi, ruwa, da abota ta gaskiya sune ke kawo farin ciki mafi girma ga ɗan adam, kuma ya koyar da cewa ta hanyar waɗannan, mutum zai iya 'yantuwa daga buƙatun da ba dole ba da kuma haɗin kai na abin duniya. A cikin shekarunsa na baya, ya sha wahala mai tsanani daga ciwon jiki saboda wata cuta mai raɗaɗi mai suna ciwon koda, amma ya riƙe imaninsa na falsafa da ƙarfi har ma a bakin mutuwa. Har zuwa lokacin ƙarshe, a cikin wasiƙar da ya aike wa almajiransa, Epicurus ya tuna da tattaunawar falsafa da abota masu daɗi na baya, kuma ya nuna da kansa cewa jin daɗin hankali zai iya wuce ciwon jiki. Rayuwarsa ta zama mafi ƙarfin shaida na falsafar Epicurus cewa za a iya kiyaye kwanciyar hankali ko da a cikin wahala.

Ra'ayoyin Epicurus sun yi tasiri sosai tsawon ƙarnuka bayan mutuwarsa, har zuwa zamanin Roma. Musamman ma, mawaƙin Roma Lucretius ya yaɗa falsafar Epicurus sosai ta hanyar waƙarsa mai tsawo 'De rerum natura' (Game da Yanayin Abubuwa) wadda ke ɗauke da falsafarsa. Ko da yake ya zama kamar an manta da shi na ɗan lokaci a zamanin Tsakiya saboda rikici da tunanin Kirista, an sake kimanta shi bayan Renaissance kuma ya yi tasiri ga masu tunani na wayewa na zamani. A yau, kalmar 'Epicurean' sau da yawa ana amfani da ita ba daidai ba don nufin masu cin abinci ko masu jin daɗi, amma ainihin gadonsa yana cikin hikimar neman kwanciyar hankali na rai ta hanyar tunani mai ma'ana, abota, da rayuwa mai sauƙi, 'yantuwa daga tsoron mutuwa da alloli. Epicurus ya jaddada cewa ainihin farin ciki yana cikin daidaita buƙatun da ba dole ba da kuma samun zaman lafiya na ciki, kuma har yau yana ba da zurfin tasiri ga mutanen zamani don tunani game da mahimman dabi'un rayuwa a cikin abin duniya da damuwa. Ra'ayoyinsa, tare da sauran ra'ayoyin falsafa na lokacin kamar Stoicism, sun yi ado da yanayin ruhaniya na zamanin Hellenanci da launuka daban-daban, kuma har yau suna ci gaba da ba da muhimmiyar kwarin gwiwa don bincika farin ciki na ɗan adam da ma'anar rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Epicurus masanin falsafa ne na Girka na da a zamanin Hellenanci, wanda ya kafa Falsafar Epicurus don neman kwanciyar hankali na rai da farin ciki.
key_achievements: Kafa Falsafar Epicurus da tsara falsafarsa
Kafa al'umma ta musamman mai suna 'Lambun'
Jaddada shawo kan tsoron mutuwa da alloli
Gabatar da ataraxia da aponia a matsayin mafi girman alheri
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafarsa ta yi tasiri sosai ga ɗan adam da ke neman ainihin farin ciki a cikin rayuwa mai sauƙi da abota, kuma har yau tana ba da hikimar rayuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Michael Faraday (1791-1867) ya kasance masanin kimiyyar sinadarai da kimiyyar lissafi na Birtaniya a farkon karni na 19, lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu da binciken kimiyya ke ci gaba, kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga fannin electromagnetism da electrochemistry. An haife shi a cikin gidan wani maƙeri matalauci a Newington Butts, London, kuma bai sami ilimi na yau da kullun ba. Tun yana yaro, Faraday ya yi aiki don samun abin rayuwa, kuma yana da shekaru 14, ya zama mai koyon aiki a wurin ɗaure littattafai, inda ya koyi yadda ake ɗaure da gyara littattafai. Wannan lokacin ya ba shi damar da ba a zata ba, inda ya iya haɓaka sha'awar kimiyya mai zurfi da kuma ƙishirwar ilimi ta hanyar karanta littattafai masu yawa da ke shigowa wurin ɗaure littattafai. Musamman ma, ya nutsu cikin littattafan kimiyya, yana sha'awar ka'idojin yanayi da ba a gani, wanda ya zama tushen manyan bincikensa na gaba. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance cike da ƙarfin hali na neman ilimi ba tare da gajiyawa ba, duk da talauci da iyakantattun yanayi.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Faraday ya zo a shekara ta 1812, lokacin da ya halarci lacca ta jama'a ta Sir Humphry Davy. Ya rubuta bayanan laccar a hankali kuma ya ɗaure su da kyau, sannan ya aika wa Sir Davy, wanda hakan ya jawo hankalin Sir Davy, kuma ya sa aka ɗauke shi aiki a matsayin mataimaki a Royal Institution a shekara ta 1813. Wannan ya kasance babban canji, daga matalaucin mai ɗaure littattafai zuwa mataimakin babban masanin kimiyya na zamaninsa. Da farko, ya taimaka wa Sir Davy a fannin kimiyyar sinadarai kuma ya sami gogewa a bincike, amma hankalinsa ya fara karkata zuwa ga abubuwan da suka shafi wutar lantarki da maganadisu. Ya fara bincike kan filin maganadisu da ke kewaye da mai gudanarwa mai ɗauke da wutar lantarki kai tsaye, kuma ta hanyar wannan, ya kafa ra'ayin **filin lantarki da maganadisu (electromagnetic field)**, wani yanki na sararin samaniya da ke bayyana mu'amalar lantarki da maganadisu a kimiyyar lissafi. Wannan ra'ayi ya ba da gudummawa mai juyin juya hali wajen gani da fahimtar aikin ƙarfin da ba a gani.

Binciken Faraday ya bar manyan nasarori a fannin electromagnetism da electrochemistry. A shekara ta 1821, ya ƙirƙira **na'urorin juyawa na lantarki da maganadisu (electromagnetic rotary devices)**, waɗanda ke haifar da motsi na inji ta hanyar mu'amalar wutar lantarki da filin maganadisu, kuma wannan shine farkon samfurin da ya zama tushen duk fasahar injin lantarki na yau. A shekara ta 1831, ya gano ka'idar **induction na lantarki da maganadisu (electromagnetic induction)**, wato al'amarin da filin maganadisu mai canzawa ke haifar da filin lantarki. Wannan binciken ya zama ka'idar aiki na janareta, kuma ya kafa tushe mai mahimmanci don samar da wutar lantarki a babban sikelin da kuma amfani da ita a matsayin fasaha mai amfani. Bugu da ƙari, ya bayyana alaƙar asali tsakanin abu da wutar lantarki ta hanyar gano **diamagnetism**, wato al'amarin da abu ke turawa da rauni ta filin maganadisu, da kuma **dokokin electrolysis**, wato dokokin da wutar lantarki ke haifar da halayen sinadarai. Bincikensa da ya tabbatar da cewa maganadisu na iya shafar hasken wuta ya kasance sakamakon gwaje-gwaje masu yawa da basira, yana nuna alaƙar asali tsakanin waɗannan abubuwa biyu.

Binciken Faraday ya canza fahimtar abubuwan da suka shafi wutar lantarki da maganadisu, kuma ya kafa tushen kimiyyar lissafi da injiniyanci na zamani. Sakamakon nasarorinsa, wutar lantarki ta zama tushen makamashi mai amfani wanda ke canza rayuwar ɗan adam, fiye da kawai sha'awar kimiyya. Duk injinan lantarki, janareta, da na'urorin canza wuta na yau sun dogara ne akan ka'idar induction na lantarki da maganadisu. Rukunin SI na ƙarfin lantarki, **farad**, an ba shi suna don girmama shi, kuma wannan yana nuna gagarumar gudummawar kimiyya da ya bayar. Duk da cewa bai sami ilimi na yau da kullun ba, ya zama ɗaya daga cikin masana kimiyya mafi tasiri a tarihi ta hanyar ƙoƙarinsa. Ruhinsa na bincike da hanyar gwaji sun zaburar da masana kimiyya na gaba kamar James Clerk Maxwell, wanda ya kai ga kammala ka'idar electromagnetism, kuma ya shafi aikin masu ƙirƙira na ƙarshen karni na 19 kamar Thomas Edison da Nikola Tesla.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Michael Faraday masanin kimiyyar sinadarai da kimiyyar lissafi ne na Birtaniya a karni na 19, wanda ya kafa ka'idojin induction na lantarki da maganadisu da filin lantarki da maganadisu, kuma ya kafa tushen fasahar lantarki ta zamani.
key_achievements: Gano ka'idar induction na lantarki da maganadisu
Kafa ra'ayin filin lantarki da maganadisu
Bayyana dokokin electrolysis
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya zama tushen fasahar lantarki ta zamani da kimiyyar lissafi, kuma ya sa aka iya amfani da wutar lantarki a aikace, wanda ya canza rayuwar ɗan adam sosai.

parsed.narrative:
A tsakiyar karni na 11, a cikin lokacin tashin hankali a Turai, William Mai Nasara (William I, an haife shi a 1028) ya kasance Duke na Normandy kuma daga baya Sarkin Ingila. An haife shi a ranar 8 ga Nuwamba, 1028, a matsayin ɗan shege na Duchy na Normandy, dole ne ya jure matsayi mara tabbas da ƙalubale daga kewayensa tun yana yaro. A matsayinsa na zuriyar Rollo, ya gaji sarautar Duke na Normandy daga 1035, amma wannan ba hanya ce mai sauƙi ba. Duke na Normandy yana nufin babban mai mulki wanda ke mulkin Normandy, wani yanki mai ƙarfi na feudal a arewa maso yammacin Faransa, kuma William ya yi yaƙi da tawaye na ciki da barazanar waje da yawa don tabbatar da wannan matsayi. Kusan 1060, bayan dogon gwagwarmaya, ya iya tabbatar da yankin Normandy a matsayin nasa, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya kafa harsashin mamayar Ingila a nan gaba. Lokacin kuruciyarsa ya kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don rayuwa da ƙarfafa iko.

Yayin da William ya ƙarfafa matsayinsa na Duke na Normandy, sabon buri ya fara fitowa a zuciyarsa. A shekara ta 1066, lokacin da Sarki Edward Mai Ikirari na Ingila ya mutu ba tare da magaji ba, William ya yi iƙirarin cewa shi ne halattaccen magajin sarautar Ingila kuma ya yanke shawara mai girma wacce za ta girgiza dukan nahiyar. Wannan ya wuce faɗaɗa yanki kawai; ya kasance wani juyi na tarihi wanda zai canza yanayin iko na Turai har abada. Ya shirya babban jirgin ruwa da sojojin Norman kuma ya kai hari Ingila, kuma wannan jerin abubuwan sun zama sanannu a tarihi a matsayin 'Mamayar Norman'. Mamayar Norman tana nufin jerin abubuwan da William I ya kai hari Ingila a 1066, ya kwace sarauta kuma ya kafa daular Norman. A ranar 14 ga Oktoba na wannan shekarar, sojojin William sun yi arangama da zafi da sojojin Anglo-Saxon karkashin jagorancin Harold Godwinson a Yaƙin Hastings. Wannan yaƙin ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin lokuta mafi mahimmanci a tarihin Ingila, inda fifikon dabaru na mahayan dawakai da masu harbi da baka na Norman ya rushe katangar garkuwar sojojin ƙasa na Anglo-Saxon, kuma ya ƙare da nasara mai girma ga William. Da wannan nasara, William ya kafa harsashin zama sabon mai mulkin Ingila.

Bayan nasarar da ya samu a Hastings, an naɗa William Sarkin Ingila a Westminster Abbey a London a ranar Kirsimeti na 1066, inda ya sami laƙabin 'Mai Nasara'. Duk da haka, tushen mulkinsa har yanzu bai da tabbas, kuma tawaye mai zafi game da mulkin Norman bai taɓa tsayawa ba a duk faɗin Ingila. Ya gudanar da ayyukan murkushewa masu zafi amma masu inganci, inda ya murkushe masu tawaye ba tare da jin kai ba, kuma lalata Arewacin Ingila (Harrying of the North) an rubuta shi a matsayin wani lamari mai alama wanda ya ƙarfafa ikonsa. William ya sadaukar da sauran rayuwarsa don haɗa kai da daidaita yankunansa a Ingila da nahiyar Turai. Ya gabatar da sabon tsarin feudal kuma ya tattara 'Domesday Book', wanda ya rubuta mallakar filaye a Ingila, don kafa tushen tattara haraji mai inganci da mulki. Bugu da ƙari, rikici da ɗansa na fari, Robert Curthose, ya kasance tushen baƙin ciki har zuwa ƙarshen rayuwarsa. Robert ya yi tawaye ga mahaifinsa, yana neman sarautar Duke na Normandy, kuma wannan ya kasance gwaji na kansa kuma wani ƙalubale a matsayinsa na mai mulki. William ya shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubale na ciki da waje kuma ya kafa mulkin sarauta mai ƙarfi da tsakiya a Ingila.

William I ya mulki Ingila da Normandy har zuwa mutuwarsa a Rouen, Faransa, a ranar 9 ga Satumba, 1087, inda ya gina mulkin sarauta mai ƙarfi. Ko bayan mutuwarsa, gadonsa ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Ingila. Mamayar Norman ta kawo canje-canje masu juyin juya hali a fannin siyasa, zamantakewa, da al'adu na Ingila. Yayin da Faransanci na Norman ya zama harshen masu mulki, ya haɗu da Tsohon Ingilishi don kafa harsashin Ingilishi na zamani, kuma tsarin feudal na nahiyar Turai ya yi tushe sosai a Ingila. Bugu da ƙari, kafa mulkin sarauta mai ƙarfi da tsakiya da tsarin shari'a ya zama tushe mai mahimmanci ga Ingila don haɓaka zuwa ƙasa mai haɗin kai. Manyan gine-gine kamar Hasumiyar London sun kasance gadon da ke nuna mulkinsa da ikonsa har zuwa yau. Nasarorin William I sun wuce farawar daula ɗaya kawai; sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da asalin ƙasa da tushen hukumomi na Burtaniya ta zamani. Jagorancinsa mai ƙarfi da ruhin cin nasara sun samar da muhimmin mahallin tarihi wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da salon mulkin wasu manyan sarakunan Ingila na gaba, kamar Edward I na daular Plantagenet.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William I sarkin Ingila ne na Norman a karni na 11, wanda ya kafa daular Ingila kuma ya kafa tushen mulki ta hanyar Mamayar Norman.
key_achievements: Ya tabbatar da yankinsa a matsayin Duke na Normandy
Ya sami sarautar Ingila ta hanyar Mamayar Norman
Ya murkushe tawaye a Ingila kuma ya kafa tsarin mulki
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mamayarsa ta yi tasiri sosai a harshe, dokoki, da tsarin zamantakewa na Ingila, inda ta zama harsashin kafa Burtaniya ta zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Cyrus the Great (kimanin 600/576 K.Z. – 530 K.Z.) shi ne wanda ya kafa kuma sarki na farko, mai girma da ɗaukaka, na Daular Achaemenid ta Farisa ta dā. Gabas ta Tsakiya, inda aka haife shi a ƙarshen ƙarni na 7 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 6 K.Z., lokaci ne na gwagwarmayar iko mai zafi, inda manyan dauloli kamar Media, Lydia, da Neo-Babylonian ke fafatawa don mamaye duniya, yayin da Daular Assuriya ke faɗuwa. Cyrus ya fito daga gidan Achaemenid a yankin Pars, wanda ke ƙarƙashin Daular Media, kuma an san shi a matsayin ɗan Cambyses I kuma jikan Astyages, sarkin Media, ta wajen uwa. Tun yana yaro, ya ga halin da Farisawa ke ciki a ƙarƙashin mulkin Media, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe ga burinsa na gaba na samun 'yancin Farisa da gina babbar daula mai girma. A lokacin, Media tana mulkin wani yanki mai faɗi da ƙarfin soja mai girma, amma a cikin gida, zaluncin sarauta da rashin gamsuwa a tsakanin al'ummar da aka ci da yaƙi suna ƙaruwa kamar wuta. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Cyrus yana shirye-shiryen zana makomarsa da ta al'ummarsa da tawali'u da azama.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Cyrus the Great shi ne tawaye ga Daular Media. Kimanin shekara ta 550 K.Z., ya haɗa kan kabilun Farisa kuma ya fara yaƙin 'yanci don adawa da zaluncin Sarkin Media Astyages. Wannan yaƙin ya wuce tawaye kawai; ya kasance wani al'amari ne na tarihi wanda ya canza fuskar duniya gaba ɗaya a Gabas ta Tsakiya ta dā. Da dabaru masu hikima da jagoranci nagari, Cyrus ya ci sojojin Media, ya kama babban birninsu Ecbatana, kuma ya kawo ƙarshen Daular Media. Amma, maimakon zaluncin mai cin nasara, ya aiwatar da manufar haƙuri mai ban mamaki, wacce ta wuce tunanin kowa, inda ya haɗa manyan Media cikin tsarin mulkinsa kuma ya mutunta al'adunsu maimakon kashe su ko bautar da su. Wannan manufar haɗawa ta zama muhimmin tushe ga daularsa don haɗa kan al'ummai da al'adu daban-daban a nan gaba. Bayan ya ci Media, Cyrus ya mai da hankalinsa zuwa yamma, inda ya yi niyyar kai hari kan Lydia, wata ƙasa mai ƙarfi a Asiya Ƙarama. Kimanin shekara ta 547 K.Z., har ma ya ci Sarki Croesus na Lydia, wanda aka sani da arzikinsa mai ban mamaki, kuma ya haɗa Lydia cikin Daular Farisa, yana hanzarta faɗaɗa mulkinsa zuwa yamma, kamar yadda iska ke tura gajimare.

Bayan cin nasarar Lydia, manufar Cyrus the Great ta gaba ita ce babbar Daular Neo-Babylonian a Mesopotamiya. A lokacin, an san Babila a matsayin kagara mai wuyar shiga, wacce babu mai iya shiga, amma a shekara ta 539 K.Z., Cyrus ya yi nasarar kama babban birnin Babila ta hanyar amfani da dabaru masu wayo da kuma amfani da rashin gamsuwa a cikin Babila, kamar yadda ruwa ke ratsa dutse. Don haka, ya gina babbar daula, wacce ta mamaye kusan dukkan yankunan Gabas ta Tsakiya ta dā, kamar yadda rana ke haskaka duniya. Bayan cin nasarar Babila, Cyrus ya sake nuna falsafar mulkinsa ta musamman, wacce ta bambanta da sauran sarakuna. Ya maido da haikalin Babila kuma ya ba da damar ga al'ummai daban-daban da aka tilasta musu ƙaura, musamman Yahudawa, su koma ƙasashensu. An rubuta wannan manufar a kan wani silinda na yumbu da aka sani da “Cyrus Cylinder,” wanda ake ɗauka a matsayin tsohon takarda mai mutunta haƙurin addini da haƙƙin ɗan adam na al'ummar da aka ci da yaƙi, kuma ana ambaton shi a matsayin farkon nau'in sanarwar haƙƙin ɗan adam na zamani. Don gudanar da daular yadda ya kamata, Cyrus ya gabatar da tsarin satrap (gwamna) kuma ya kafa tsarin gudanarwa, ciki har da gyaran hanyoyi a faɗin yankin. A lokacin mulkinsa, Daular Farisa ta zama daula ta duniya ta gaskiya, wacce ta miƙa daga Tekun Aegean zuwa Kogin Indus, kamar yadda igiyar ruwa ke rufe bakin teku. Kimanin shekara ta 530 K.Z., an ce Cyrus the Great ya mutu a yaƙi da kabilar Massagetae a kan iyakar gabashin daular, kuma an binne gawarsa a wani kabari mai girma da ɗaukaka a Pasargadae.

Daular Achaemenid ta Farisa da Cyrus the Great ya gina ta kasance ɗaya daga cikin manyan dauloli masu ƙarfi da faɗi a duniyar dā, wacce ta yi fice a tarihi, kuma salon mulkinsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga sarakuna na gaba, kamar yadda hasken wata ke haskaka dare. Bayan cin nasarar soja, ya jagoranci daular zuwa zaman lafiya da wadata, kamar yadda mai shuka ke shuka iri mai kyau, ta hanyar manufar haƙuri wacce ta mutunta bambancin al'adu kuma ta tabbatar da addini da al'adun al'ummar da aka ci da yaƙi. Musamman, ra'ayoyinsa na mutunta haƙƙin ɗan adam, kamar yadda ke cikin “Cyrus Cylinder,” har yanzu ana ambaton su a matsayin muhimmin tushe na tarihi, wanda ba za a taɓa mantawa da shi ba, lokacin da ake tattauna farkon ra'ayoyin haƙƙin ɗan adam na duniya a zamanin yau. Gadonsa ba wai kawai faɗaɗa yanki ba ne, amma a cikin falsafar mulki wacce ta nuna yadda al'ummai da wayewa daban-daban za su iya rayuwa tare cikin jituwa. Daular Farisa ta ci gaba da wanzuwa kusan shekaru 200 bayan mutuwarsa, kuma ruhinsa ya zaburar da masu cin nasara na gaba kamar Alexander the Great. Ruhinsa na haƙuri da haɗin kai ya kuma yi tasiri ga manufofin gabas na Alexander the Great na gaba kuma har yanzu ana tattauna shi a yau a matsayin ingantaccen tsarin jagoranci, wanda ya zama abin koyi ga kowa, idan aka kwatanta shi da sauran manyan masu cin nasara na duniyar dā.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Cyrus the Great shi ne wanda ya kafa Daular Achaemenid ta Farisa ta dā, wanda ya gina babbar daula da mulkin haƙuri.
key_achievements: Cin nasarar Media, Lydia, da Babila
Kafa Daular Achaemenid ta Farisa
Sanarwar Cyrus Cylinder da mulkin haƙuri
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa na haƙuri da falsafar haƙƙin ɗan adam sun yi tasiri sosai ga dauloli na gaba da kuma ra'ayoyin haƙƙin ɗan adam na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Yayin da shuɗin yanayin Tekun Adriatic ke raguwa, a gefen daular da kukan juyin juya hali ya mamaye, a tsohuwar unguwar jami'a ta Vienna, wani haziki ya zo duniya. Garin da inuwar soyayya mai raguwa ta lulluɓe shi a ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka, amma a cikinsa, tsari da hargitsi marasa ganuwa suna ta gwabza faɗa da ƙarfi. Ƙaramin Erwin ya yi marmarin shiru mai zurfi fiye da sautin agogo mai wucewa, shiru don zurfafa cikin tushen komai. A gaban katangar injiniyanci na gargajiya, ya ji wani rauni mai matsewa, amma kamar makaho yana bin taurarin da suka ɓace a cikin labyrinth na kimiyyar lissafi, ya ci gaba da bin rawar jiki mai rauni na gaskiya kawai. Hayaniyar duniya ta ragu, kuma a cikinsa kawai, guntun dabaru masu karyewa suna kashe ƙishirwarsa.

A cikin shekarun 1920, lokacin da damuwar ƙarshen ƙarni da kuzarin sabon zamani suka haɗu, wani sabon ruhin juyin juya hali ya mamaye sararin kimiyyar lissafi. Iyakokin Planck da walƙiyar Einstein sun girgiza tsarin duniya mai ƙarfi, kuma Erwin Schrödinger ya ji cewa zai gano wani sabon tsari a cikin wannan guguwar hargitsi. Ƙoƙarinsa na kama raƙuman ruwa na asali na wanzuwa, wanda ba za a iya bayyana shi da harshen tsohuwar kimiyyar lissafi ba, ya kasance gwagwarmaya ta kadaici. Yana ci gaba da gwagwarmaya da kansa, ya yi fama da tawada duk dare, kuma a kan allon baƙar fata, jerin alamomin da ba a fahimta ba ne kawai suka warwatse. Duniya tana motsawa da ƙarfi a wajen ɗakin gwaje-gwajensa na kadaici, amma shi kawai yana fama da lissafin da ke gabansa, yana ƙoƙarin leƙa cikin ainihin duniyar da ba a gani.

Sai kuma, a shekarar 1926, wutar juyin juya hali ta tashi a kan tsohuwar tebur. Rawa ta barbashi da ke ɓoye a cikin misalin raƙuman ruwa, lissafin da aka sanya masa suna ya zama maɓalli don warware babban wasanin gwada ilimi na duniyar quantum. Kamar fitilar da ke haskaka hanya a cikin duhu, lissafin Erwin Schrödinger ya zama ingantaccen kamfas ga masana kimiyya da ke binciken yankunan da ba a sani ba. Amma bai gamsu ba. Paradox na wanzuwa da ke ɓoye a cikin wannan kyawun lissafi, tunanin kyanwa da ke ketare iyakar rayuwa da mutuwa, ya jefa zuciyarsa cikin zurfin tunani. Menene gaskiya, menene lura? Ya ci gaba da tambaya, yana duban zurfin falsafar da ke ɓoye a bayan sanyin dabaru na kimiyya.

Zamanin bai tsaya ba, kuma lissafin da aka sanya masa suna ya zama kamfas don binciken sararin samaniya fiye da duniya. Sirrin duniyar quantum da ba a gani yanzu yana buɗewa a hannunmu, kuma rawar jiki na waɗannan raƙuman ruwa yana ci gaba ba tare da tsayawa ba. A yau, kyanwar da ke cikin gwajin tunaninsa tana nan da rai, tana ci gaba da girgiza iyakokin gaskiyar da muka sani. Tambayoyin Erwin Schrödinger suna jagorantar mu daga baya zuwa yanzu, da kuma zuwa gaba, suna sa mu ci gaba da binciken tushen wanzuwa. Sunansa yanzu ya wuce masanin kimiyyar lissafi kawai, yana ta kiran sunan wani masanin falsafa wanda ya canza yadda muke fahimtar duniya har abada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masanin kimiyyar lissafi wanda ya kafa lissafin raƙuman ruwa na injiniyanci na quantum kuma ya bincika ainihin wanzuwa ta hanyar gwajin tunani na 'Kyanwar Schrödinger'.
key_achievements: Kafa lissafin raƙuman ruwa na injiniyanci na quantum
Gabatar da gwajin tunani na 'Kyanwar Schrödinger'
Binciken zurfin falsafar kimiyyar lissafi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa harsashin fahimtar duniyar quantum, kuma ya canza yadda muke fahimtar duniya har abada ta hanyar tambayoyi game da ainihin wanzuwa.

parsed.narrative:
A bakin teku baƙo da raƙuman ruwa masu shuɗi na Tekun Adriatic suka raba, wani mutum mai jajayen riga ya taka ƙafa. Ƙarar jirgin ruwa tsoho da iskar teku mai gishiri sun lulluɓe gashin kansa da ya warwatse. Ƙasa baƙuwa, harshe baƙo, amma a cikin zuciyarsa wutar da ta daɗe tana ci. A cikin dare mai kaɗaici yana kewar ƙasarsa, waƙar 'yanci da ya yi alƙawari a ƙarƙashin faɗuwar rana mai ja tana yawo a kunnensa. Yana shiru shi kaɗai a ƙarƙashin taurari masu yawa, yana jin iskar guguwa mai zuwa. Kaddarar wanda zai karya sarƙoƙin zalunci ta rataya a kansa.

Dutsen sanyi na gidan yari, sararin sama mara kyau da ake gani ta bayan sandunan ƙarfe. Yanke kauna tana matse zuciyarsa kamar maciji. Fuskokin abokan da suka ɓace, mafarkai da suka shuɗe ba tare da amfani ba suna amsa kamar amo mai zafi. Amma idanunsa ba su gushe ba. Ko a cikin tokar yanke kauna, yana riƙe da iri na bege. Kamar tauraro mai neman hanya a cikin duhu mai zurfi, yana ƙarfafa azamarsa mara yankewa. Lokutan azaba masu ban tsoro sun ƙara ƙarfafa ruhinsa.

Alƙawarin jajayen riga ya bazu ko'ina cikin Italiya. Takobi tsoho yana walƙiya yana yanke tsohuwar zamani. Ya zama tutar juyin juya hali, yana ratsa arewa da kudu. A filin yaƙi da aka gurbata da gumi da jini, sunansa ya zama tatsuniya. Yana ba da ƙarfin hali ga waɗanda suka yanke kauna, da bege ga waɗanda ake zalunta. Don buɗe tsagewa a cikin zuciyar daular mai girma, kuma a ƙarshe ya buɗe safiyar Italiya mai haɗin kai. Tafiyarsa ba ta tsaya ba. Kamar raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi, ya canza tafarkin tarihi.

Yanzu ƙurar lokaci ta rufe jajayen rigarsa, amma irin 'yancin da ya shuka har yanzu yana da tushe mai zurfi a cikin ƙasa. Sunansa ba kawai mutum ne na baya ba. Ƙarfin hali na fuskantar rashin adalci, ruhin adawa ga zalunci, sha'awar 'yanci mara yankewa. Jajayen riga na Giuseppe Garibaldi har yanzu yana ci da zafi a cikinmu, yana sa mu ci gaba da tafiya zuwa ga kyakkyawar makoma. Labarinsa ya wuce lokaci, labari ne na har abada wanda ke sa zuciyar sabuwar zamani ta buga.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mutumin jajayen riga wanda ya jagoranci haɗewar Italiya, yana marmarin 'yanci da adawa ga zalunci; azamarsa da ƙarfin halinsa sun zama gado mai wuce lokaci.
key_achievements: Ya jagoranci juyin juya hali tare da jagorantar sojojin jajayen riga.
Ya kafa tushen haɗewar arewa da kudu na Italiya.
Ya ba da 'yanci da bege ga waɗanda ake zalunta.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta ruhin adawa ga rashin adalci da marmarin 'yanci, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa fiye da lokaci.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Scotland mai launin toka a ƙarni na 19, wani yaro ya tsaya yana taka ƙasa mai dutse a Edinburgh. Ko da yake hayaniyar juyin juya halin masana'antu na London da ke juyawa kamar inji, ko kuma waƙar kade-kade na zamanin Victoria mai girma, sun shiga kunnuwansa, zuciyarsa koyaushe tana neman wani wuri mai zurfi, zurfin tsari marar ganuwa. Yana yawo a cikin dajin dabaru na lissafi da ba a saba gani ba, yana bin rawanin haske, ya kasance mai bincike mai kaɗaici. Yawancin idanu sun wuce shi kamar ba su fahimce shi ba, amma taurarin da ke bayan gilashin taga mai sanyi ne kawai abokinsa na musamman.

A wannan daren da walƙiya ta raba sama, kuma tsawa ta girgiza ƙasa, abin da ya haskaka a cikin tunaninsa ba wani abu ne mai sauƙi na yanayi ba. Maimakon haka, babban zaren ne da ke haɗa dukkan abubuwa a cikin sararin samaniya, gidan yanar gizo na ƙarfi marar ganuwa. Zafin dakin gwaje-gwaje da gajiyar dare sun danne idanunsa, amma bai tsaya ba. Da azama mai zafi, ya ratsa cikin bayanan da suka yi rikitarwa, kuma ya gano wani haske mai rauni a cikin gazawa da yawa. A kan babban teku na kimiyyar lissafi, shi kaɗai ne ya jefa anga, mai jirgin ruwa mai kaɗaici yana binciken yankunan da ba a sani ba.

Amma wannan tafarki bai kasance mai sauƙi ba. Tsarin da aka saba ya ɗauki sabbin bincikensa a matsayin baƙon abu, kuma shakku na abokan aikinsa ya sa ya ƙara ja da baya. Kyawun lissafin da ke yawo a cikin kansa, wani lokaci ya zama kaɗaici mai ban tsoro a gaban bangon gaskiya. Fahimtar da ya samu ta hanyar binciken ainihin haske, tabbas ya yi nisa ga mutanen zamaninsa. Ya kasance kamar tauraro mai kaɗaici, yana haskakawa shi kaɗai a cikin zurfin sararin samaniya inda babu wanda zai iya kaiwa.

Kogin lokaci ya ci gaba da gudana, kuma yanzu ba ya tare da mu. Amma lissafin da aka rubuta sunansa a kansu har yanzu suna yawo a cikin iska, kuma sun zama tushen babban ginin electromagnetism wanda ke kewaye da rayuwarmu. A cikin hasken fitilar da muke kunnawa ba tare da tunani ba, da kuma raƙuman rediyo na wayar hannu da ke hannunmu, ruhunsa yana raye. Tapestry na tsari da gwagwarmayarsa ta kaɗaici ta haɗa, ya zama fitila da ke jagorantar mu zuwa ga duniyar da ba a gani ba, tsawon ƙarnuka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin kimiyyar lissafi mai kaɗaici daga Scotland a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya bincika tsari marar ganuwa na haske da electromagnetism, ya kuma kafa tushen wayewar zamani.
key_achievements: Gano tsari marar ganuwa na ƙarfi a cikin dukkan abubuwa na sararin samaniya
Gabatar da zurfin fahimta ta hanyar binciken ainihin haske
Kafa lissafin da suka zama tushen electromagnetism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Lissafinsa sun zama tushen electromagnetism, sun ba da damar wayewar zamani, kuma sun kasance fitila mai haskaka duniyar da ba a gani ba.

parsed.narrative:
A kan magudanan ruwa na zinariya na Tenochtitlan, inda kyawun fuka-fukai da darajar daular suka haɗu cikin ban mamaki, zuciyar Moctezuma II, wanda ke zaune a kan kursiyin sarauta, tana fama da nauyin tsoffin alloli da kuma ƙaddara mai ban mamaki. Ko da yake ƙura ja tana shawagi a iska kuma manyan dala suna kaiwa sama, idanunsa suna kallon nesa, suna lura da wata babbar inuwa da ke zuwa daga teku mai nisa. Ko da a cikin raƙuman tutoci da amo na ihu, shi kaɗai ne, yana nutsewa cikin zurfin kaɗaici da damuwa, yana tsoron kada zuciyar daular ta tsaya.

Jiragen ruwa na ƙarfe da suka zo ta kan teku sun kawo ƙamshin baƙi da bai kamata ya taɓa ƙasa mai tsarki ba. Harsuna baƙi sun yi amo a kunnuwan Moctezuma kamar tsawa, kuma hasken wayewa mai haske fiye da zinariya ya danne ransa. Bai iya tantancewa ba ko allahn da aka annabta ne ya sauko, ko kuma alamar bala'i ce da ke nuna ƙarshen daular. A cikin rikice-rikice kamar ƙasa na girgiza a ƙarƙashin ƙafafunsa, ya riƙe ƙaddarar tsohuwar daular da hannu mai rawa a kan kursiyin, wurin hutawa na rayuka marasa adadi.

Inuwar da aka jefa a kan ƙasa mai albarka ba ta ɗauke ba, kuma tutoci baƙi sun fara shawagi a kan rufin haikalin da fuka-fukai ke shawagi a baya. Cikin Moctezuma ya kasance kamar guguwa mai tsanani. A gabansa, ɗaukakar Aztec ta tsohuwar zamani da faɗuwar da ba ta daɗe ba sun haɗu, kuma kogin jini da aka yi amfani da shi don hadayu masu tsarki ya zama kamar yana canzawa zuwa walƙiyar takobi baƙo. Ya rabu tsakanin girman kai na jarumi da rashin ƙarfi, kuma zuciyar daular ta raunana ba tare da tsayawa ba.

Ko da yake jikinsa ya raunana, kuma daular mai haske ta nutse cikin inuwa baƙo, sunan Moctezuma yana gudana kamar ruwa, yana rayuwa kamar kogi wanda ba za a manta da shi ba. Ko da yake kursiyinsa ya ɓace, baƙin cikinsa da jaruntakarsa, da kuma ransa da ya girgiza a gaban wayewa baƙo, an zana su a shafukan tarihi, suna amsawa har yau a cikin zukatanmu da muke rayuwa a sabon zamani, suna haifar da mamaki da baƙin ciki marar yankewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Baƙin ciki da faɗuwar Moctezuma II, sarkin ƙarshe wanda ya ɗauki ƙaddarar Daular Aztec a gaban wayewa ba a sani ba.
key_achievements: Ya yi mulki a matsayin Sarkin Daular Aztec
Ya yi ƙoƙarin kare daular daga mamayar Mutanen Spain
Ya fuskanci faɗuwar daular da kansa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Baƙin cikinsa da jaruntakarsa an zana su a shafukan tarihi, suna amsawa har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Tran Hung Dao (1226 – 1300) ya kasance basarake kuma babban janar na daular Tran ta Dai Viet (yanzu Vietnam) a lokacin tashin hankali a Gabashin Asiya a karni na 13. Ya kasance jarumin kasa wanda ya yi nasarar fatattakar mamayewar Daular Mongol sau uku, tare da kare 'yancin kasarsa. Shekarar haihuwarsa, 1226, lokaci ne da Daular Mongol ke mamaye nahiyar Eurasia, tana gina babbar daula, kuma Dai Viet ma tana fuskantar barazana mai karfi daga arewa. An haifi Tran Hung Dao a matsayin dan Tran Lieu, wani muhimmin mutum a daular Tran, kuma dan uwan Sarki Tran Thai Tong, wanda ya kafa daular Tran. Tun yana yaro, ya girma da zurfin alhakin tsaron kasa da rayuwar jama'a a matsayinsa na memba na gidan sarauta. A lokacin, Dai Viet tana jin dadin zaman lafiya a karkashin mulkin daular Tran, amma mamayewar Mongol ta rataya a kai kamar inuwa da za ta iya zama gaskiya a kowane lokaci. Wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe da ya sanya wa matashin Tran Hung Dao kishin kare kasarsa. Ya girma ba kawai basarake ba, amma mutum mai basirar soja, shirye don amsa kiran zamaninsa.

Mafi muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Tran Hung Dao shine fafatawarsa da Daular Mongol, wacce ta mamaye Dai Viet sau uku a shekarun 1258, 1285, da kuma 1288. Musamman mamayewar 1285 da 1288 sun kasance rikice-rikicen da suka tantance rayuwa ko mutuwa ga Dai Viet, kuma a wannan lokacin, Tran Hung Dao ya dauki babban alhakin kare kasa a matsayin babban kwamanda. Sojojin Mongol a lokacin su ne sojoji mafi karfi a duniya, kuma mamayewarsu ta haifar da tsoro da rudani mai girma a duk fadin Dai Viet. A cikin wannan yanayi mai tsanani, Tran Hung Dao ya nuna jagoranci marar girgiza da kuma basirar dabaru mai ban mamaki. Ba kawai ya jagoranci sojoji ba, amma ya mai da hankali kan warware rikice-rikicen cikin gida na gidan sarauta, da karfafa gwiwar jama'a, da kuma tattara dukkan karfin kasa. Musamman, don fuskantar karfin sojojin Mongol da kuma saurin motsinsu, ya yi amfani da dabarun tsaro na musamman da suka hada da dabarun kasa mai konewa (scorched-earth tactics) da kuma dabarun yaki da 'yan tawaye (guerrilla tactics), yana mai da hankali kan kawo cikas ga layin samar da kayayyaki na abokan gaba da kuma amfani da fa'idodin yanki gwargwadon iko.
