Gadon Clara Barton har yanzu yana zaburar da ƙungiyoyin jin kai da masu sa kai marasa adadi da ke aiki a wuraren bala'i a duk faɗin duniya a yau, kuma tare da nasarorin wasu majagaba na jinya na zamani kamar Florence Nightingale, yana tunatar da mu mahimmancin jin kai ga ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Clara Barton ta kasance ma'aikaciyar jinya kuma mai fafutukar jin kai a Amurka a ƙarni na 19, wacce ta kafa Red Cross ta Amurka kuma ta faɗaɗa iyakokin agajin bala'i.
key_achievements: Ayyukan jinya a filin yaƙi a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka
Kafa da gudanar da Ofishin Sojojin da Suka Bace
Kafa Red Cross ta Amurka da kuma zama shugabar ta farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarta ta zama ginshiƙin ƙungiyar jin kai ta zamani, kuma ta tunatar da mu mahimmancin agajin bala'i.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Masarautar Roma Mai Tsarki, a cikin daren Leipzig inda inuwar tsoffin kagara ke faɗuwa, a kusurwar ɗakin karatu na Mista Amber, inda ƙamshin tawada da tsoffin littattafai masu ƙura suka haɗu, ran yaron Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz tuni ya fara saƙa manyan taurari na tunani. A cikin ruwan kogin lokaci mai gudana, inda hikimar da ta gabata da sabbin raƙuman kimiyya suka yi karo, shi kaɗai ya tattara ɓangarorin haske na fahimta, yana jin makomarsa ta bincika zurfin ruhin ɗan adam mara iyaka. A kunnuwansa, sautin yaƙe-yaƙe na addini masu zafi ya cika, kuma duniya tana cikin hazo na hargitsi da rashin tabbas, duk da haka a cikin zuciyarsa, tsarin dabaru da hasken gaskiyar lissafi mai haske sun fara fitowa.

Ko a cikin manyan dakunan liyafa na kotun Faransa ko a cikin dakunan ilimi na London, ransa bai taɓa samun cikakken hutu ba. Yana ci gaba da marmarin sabbin ra'ayoyi, ya yi musayar wasiƙu da masana ilimi a duk faɗin Turai, kuma wani lokaci, ba tare da jinkiri ba, ya yi tafiye-tafiye masu wahala don neman su. Mafarkin harshe na duniya wanda ya haɗa komai, wato, dabaru masu kyau, ya sa zuciyarsa ta buga da ƙarfi, amma ƙarancin tunani da son zuciya na zamansa sun kasa fahimtar wannan babban hangen nesa. Duk da cewa duniya ta yabe shi a matsayin haziki, wani zurfin kaɗaici na rashin fahimta koyaushe yana bin hanyarsa ta tunani mai kaɗaici. A bayan abin rufe fuska na rayuwar kotu mai cike da aiki, ya yi gwagwarmaya shi kaɗai cikin dare, yana neman alamun da zai buɗe asirin sararin samaniya.

Ya ga damar da ba ta da iyaka a cikin abu ɗaya, da kuma ka'idar duniya da aka saƙa ba da gangan ba amma da buƙata. A cikin lanƙwasawa mai laushi na furen iris, ko motsi mai daidaito na kayan aiki, ya gano tsarin jituwa da tsari. Burinsa na tsara dukkan tunanin ɗan adam da ikon dabaru na alama ya kasance mai girma, kamar yana neman ya karya ciyawa, ya mai da shi goga, kuma ya rubuta dukkan dokokin sararin samaniya. Duk da haka, duniya ta sanya hanyar zuwa aljannar da yake mafarkin ta zama mai wahala, kuma mafi zurfin baƙin cikinsa sau da yawa ya ɓace a cikin raunin ɗan adam da rashin kamala. Duk da haka, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba, ya ƙirƙiri sabon lissafi (calculus), kuma ya tara manyan nasarori waɗanda suka yi tasiri sosai a fannoni da yawa na ilimi.

Sunansa ba wani tsohon abu bane da aka manta da shi. Da dabaru masu kaifi na lokaci guda da lissafi (calculus), ya buɗe ƙofofin kimiyyar zamani. A cikin da'irorin dabaru na kwamfutoci, a cikin damar fasahar hankali (AI), ra'ayoyinsa har yanzu suna numfashi kuma suna motsawa. Tambayarsa da ba ta ƙarewa ba, 'Ta yaya za mu iya ƙirƙirar duniya mafi kyau?', bincikensa, ya wuce lokaci, yana ci gaba da ba mu kwarin gwiwa, kuma yana barin alamunsa masu haske a kan tafiyar ɗan adam ta har abada don fahimtar tsarin asali na wannan duniyar da muke rayuwa a ciki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Rayuwar Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz, wanda ya bincika dabaru da gaskiyar lissafi a cikin hargitsi, ya ƙirƙiri lissafi (calculus), kuma ya yi mafarkin harshe na duniya.
key_achievements: Ya kafa lissafi (calculus) da kansa.
Ya tsara dabaru masu kyau da harshe na duniya.
Ya tsara dabaru na alama kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga dabaru na kwamfuta.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani, kwamfutoci, da AI, kuma yana ba da kwarin gwiwa mara iyaka ta hanyar bincikensa na neman duniya mafi kyau.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Ingila mai launin toka, a tashar jiragen ruwa mai ɗumi ta Portsmouth inda iskar Yorkshire mai tsaunuka ba ta taɓa tsayawa ba, tsakanin ƙarar jiragen ruwa na katako tsofaffi da iskar teku mai gishiri, wani yaro ya gina mafarki mai wuya na gaba. A cikin idanunsa da ke kallon teku mai duhu kamar baƙar fata, akwai kaɗaicin taurari da suka yi tsaro dare da yawa, kuma a kan yatsunsa da raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi suka sassaƙa, akwai sirrin bakin teku mai nisa da ba a kai ba tukad. Zuciyarsa ta buga ba tare da tsayawa ba, kuma sha'awarsa da aka danne ta lulluɓe shi kamar ɗan hasken rana mai rauni da ke fitowa ta cikin gizagizai masu launin toka.

A kowane mataki na tafiye-tafiyensa masu wahala, James Cook ya yi yaƙi da raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi kuma ya yi dare da yawa a farke, yana gwagwarmaya da mast a cikin guguwa mai tsanani. Ko da a cikin yunwa da sanyi, da kuma kaɗaicin da teku mai faɗi take bayarwa, niyyarsa ba ta karye ba. Yana karanta igiyoyin ruwa da ba a sani ba, kuma yana bin hanyoyin taurari, ya gano harshensa a cikin babban shiru na teku mara iyaka. Ta hanyar zafi mai tsanani, ya sake ƙirƙirar duniya da taswirori masu kyau, kuma da sha'awa mai zafi, ya sassaƙa sunaye a kan tekuna da ba a sani ba.

A cikin karimcin Māori da rawanin mata na Tahiti masu ban sha'awa, ya gano alamun wayewa da ɗan adam ya binne, kuma ya ga tsaba na bege suna tsirowa a cikin ƙasa mai bushewa. Ko da yake yana jin baƙon harsuna da al'adu da ba a sani ba, ya kusanci su da gaskiya, kuma wannan gaskiya ta yi aiki kamar hasken rana mai ɗumi da ke narkar da ƙasa mai daskarewa. A ƙarƙashin faɗuwar rana mai ja, ya shaida duka abin al'ajabi da raunin da ke cikin ɗan adam, kuma ya ji kansa yana tawali'u a gaban girman yanayi.

Tsofaffin littattafan tafiye-tafiye da James Cook ya bari yanzu sun zama layukan ja masu haske a kan taswirorin duniya, suna ba da shaida ga labarin bincike da ke ci gaba da gudana, yana bin sawun ɗan adam. Sunansa yanzu ba kawai sunan mai bincike ba ne, amma ya kasance alama ce ta ƙalubalen ɗan adam marar yankewa zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba da kuma ƙarfin hali don bin mafarkai marasa isa, yana rayuwa kuma yana numfashi a cikin zukatan waɗanda ke mafarkin sabbin tafiye-tafiye har ma a wannan lokacin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai bincike daga Portsmouth, Ingila, wanda ya buɗe tekuna marasa sani, ya kammala taswirorin duniya, kuma ya zama alamar ruhun ƙalubale na ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ya bincika kuma ya buɗe tekuna marasa sani
Ya sake ƙirƙirar duniya da taswirori masu kyau
Ya fahimci kuma ya yi musayar al'adu da 'yan asali
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sunansa ya kasance alama ce ta ƙalubalen ɗan adam marar yankewa da ƙarfin hali zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba, yana zaburar da tsararraki masu zuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Iskar sanyi mai kamar kankara ta Rhine ta ratsa ta cikin dogayen hanyoyin gidan sufi marasa rai, kuma fitilar tunani ta tsawaita inuwar addu'a. Yatsun da ke rawa a kan tsoffin takardun Littafi Mai Tsarki sun bincika tambayoyin har abada, kuma neman amsoshin ya kai ga zurfin da ke bincika tushen wanzuwar ɗan adam. Waɗannan dare masu kaɗaici inda hayaniyar duniya ta yi nisa, kuma kawai sautin ciki ne ke amsawa. Duniya ta kasance masa kabari cike da zunubi da banza, kuma shi kaɗai ya farka a cikinta, yana marmarin wutar Allah. Dare marasa adadi sun shude haka.

A kan titunan jama'a masu ƙura, ko a cikin kusurwar gidan sufi mai launin toka na asceticism, Meister Eckhart ya furta wa'azi mai zafi wanda ya karya shiru. Kalmominsa sun bugi kunnuwa kamar walƙiya, suna girgiza zurfin ruhin masu saurare. Cewa kasancewar Allah ba ta nesa a sama ba, amma a yanzu, a nan, a cikin bugun zuciyarka. Irin da ya shuka ya fito da rudani, firgici, da kuma ɗan fahimta. Mutane sun yi ƙoƙari su fahimci gaskiyarsa, wasu kuma sun juya baya cikin tsoro.

Ya ji kallon duniya a kansa. Muryoyin sanyi da ke nuna shi a matsayin mai ridda, da kaifafan takuba na iko sun yi barazana ga wanzuwarsa. Duk da haka, bai miƙa wuya ba. A'a, ba zai iya miƙa wuya ba. Wutar gaskiya da ke ci a cikinsa ba za a iya kashe ta da kowane irin ƙarfi na waje ba. Ya sani cewa ɗan adam ya fito daga Allah, kuma an ƙaddara shi ya koma cikin Allah. Wannan fahimta mai sauƙi amma mai zurfi ita ce garkuwarsa da takobinsa.

Muryarsa ta nutse cikin shiru, amma irin da ya bari a ƙarshe ya fito kamar fashewa, yana shayar da duniya. Kalmominsa sun haye kogin lokaci kuma suna raye tare da mu a yanzu. Ga waɗanda suka ɓace cikin rudani, ga waɗanda ke tambayar ma'anar wanzuwa, wutar Meister Eckhart har yanzu tana jagorantar su a matsayin fitila mai haske. Kukan waliyi mai kaɗaici yana amsawa a fili a cikin shiru, yana farkar da Allahntaka a cikinmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Meister Eckhart ya yi wa'azi yana jaddada Allahntaka ta ciki amma an zarge shi da ridda, kuma tunaninsa ya bar gado mai zurfi na ruhaniya har zuwa yau.
key_achievements: Jaddada kasancewar Allah a cikin ɗan adam
Yada da kuma koyar da gaskiyar ruhaniya mai zurfi
Gado mai zurfi na ruhaniya da tunani ga tsararraki masu zuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya kasance gado wanda ke zama fitila ga waɗanda suka ɓace cikin rudani, suna tambayar ma'anar wanzuwa, yana farkar da Allahntaka a cikinmu.

parsed.narrative:
Vitus Bering (1681-1741) ya kasance babban mai bincike kuma jami'in sojan ruwa na Daular Rasha a farkon karni na 18, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen kammala taswirar duniya ta hanyar binciken Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa da ba a sani ba. An haife shi a Horsens, Denmark a 1681, ya haɓaka sha'awar tafiye-tafiye tun yana yaro, kuma ya zama ƙwararren ma'aikacin jirgin ruwa ta hanyar samun gogewa a jiragen ruwa na Holland da Birtaniya. A shekara ta 1703, ya shiga Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Rasha, ya zama wani ɓangare na rundunar Rasha mai girma a ƙarƙashin manufofin gyare-gyare na Peter Mai Girma. Bayan ya nuna ƙwarewarsa a matsayin jami'in sojan ruwa a Yaƙin Arewa Mai Girma, an zaɓi Bering a matsayin mutumin da ya dace don cika babban hangen nesa na Peter Mai Girma, wanda ke son gano ko Asiya da Amurka suna haɗe a gabashin Rasha. A lokacin, gabashin Siberia yanki ne da ba a sani ba ga Turawa, kuma binciken wannan babban yanki ya kasance babban aiki don haɓaka ilimin ɗan adam na yanki. Aikin nasa ya wuce bincike kawai, yana da mahimmancin dabarun faɗaɗa yankin Rasha da buɗe sabbin hanyoyin kasuwanci.

Aikin Bering na farko mai mahimmanci shine Balaguron Kamchatka na Farko, wanda ya fara a 1725. Babban manufar wannan balaguron shine a tabbatar ko nahiyoyin Asiya da Arewacin Amurka suna haɗe da ƙasa ko kuma an raba su da wani mashigar ruwa. Tawagar balaguron ta yi tafiyar dubban kilomita ta hanyar ƙasa mai wahala a fadin Siberia, suna jigilar kayayyaki da kayan aiki, wanda ya kasance babban aikin dabaru wanda ba za a iya tunanin sa ba a lokacin. A lokacin rani na 1728, Bering ya jagoranci jirgin ruwa mai suna 'St. Gabriel' ya yi tafiya zuwa arewa daga yankin Kamchatka, kuma a ƙarshe ya kai digiri 67 na arewa, ya wuce gabashin nahiyar Asiya. A nan, ya tabbatar da cewa ƙasar ba ta ci gaba zuwa arewa ba amma tana buɗe zuwa teku, kuma daga baya aka sanya wa wannan mashigar ruwa suna 'Bering Strait' don girmama shi. Wannan ya kasance babban bincike da ya tabbatar da cewa Asiya da Arewacin Amurka nahiyoyi ne daban-daban, amma saboda hazo mai yawa da mummunan yanayi, bai iya ganin nahiyar Arewacin Amurka kai tsaye ba. Wannan balaguron ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen tsara taswirar gabar tekun Gabashin Siberia da ba a sani ba dalla-dalla.

Duk da nasarar balaguron farko, Bering ya fuskanci suka saboda rashin tabbatar da nahiyar Arewacin Amurka kai tsaye. Saboda haka, ya ba da shawarar wani balaguro mai girma, Balaguron Kamchatka na Biyu, wanda aka fi sani da 'Babban Balaguron Arewa', wanda ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan balaguro a tarihin ɗan adam, wanda ya gudana daga 1733 zuwa 1743. Wannan balaguron ya yi niyyar bincika yankuna masu faɗi a duk faɗin Siberia da Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa, kuma an saka dubban ma'aikata da albarkatu masu yawa. Bering ya jagoranci jirgin ruwa mai suna 'St. Peter', ya tashi daga Kamchatka a watan Yuni 1741, ya yi tafiya zuwa gabas, kuma a ƙarshe ya isa gabar tekun Alaska a Arewacin Amurka a ranar 16 ga Yuli. Wannan ya kasance lokaci mai tarihi inda Turawa suka fara gano Alaska. Amma tafiyar dawowa ta kasance jerin bala'o'i. Mummunan yanayi, ƙarancin abinci, da cutar scurvy sun addabi ma'aikatan jirgin, kuma mutane da yawa sun rasa rayukansu. Bering da kansa ya kamu da rashin lafiya kuma ya raunana, kuma a watan Nuwamba 1741, tawagar balaguron ta faɗa cikin guguwa kuma ta makale a wani tsibiri mara mazauni wanda yanzu aka sani da Tsibirin Bering. A can, ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da rudani a ranar 19 ga Disamba, saboda cutar scurvy.

Mutuwar Vitus Bering ta kawo ƙarshen balaguron nasa cikin baƙin ciki, amma gadon da ya bari ya yi tasiri sosai ga ilimin yanki na ɗan adam da ci gaban kimiyya. Tawagar balaguron nasa ta bincika manyan yankuna na Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa, ta gano Alaska da Tsibirin Aleutian, kuma ta ba da mahimman bayanai don kammala taswirar duniya. Musamman ma, sunaye da yawa na wurare da aka sanya masa suna, kamar Bering Strait, Bering Sea, da Bering Island, suna tunawa da nasarorin da ya samu har abada. Balaguron nasa ya samar da muhimmiyar hanya ga Rasha don mallakar Alaska da faɗaɗa zuwa gabar tekun Pasifik, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga binciken kimiyyar halitta ta hanyar tattara samfuran dabbobi da tsire-tsire da yawa da bayanan ilimin ƙasa. Ƙarfin hali da ruhun Bering na rashin tsoro suna nuna ƙalubalen ɗan adam na ci gaba zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba, kuma har yau suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa. Balaguron nasa, tare da nasarorin wasu manyan masu bincike kamar Captain James Cook waɗanda suka yi tafiya a Tekun Pasifik a lokaci guda, ya zama muhimmiyar alama wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin yanki na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Vitus Bering ya kasance jami'in sojan ruwa kuma mai bincike na Daular Rasha a karni na 18, wanda ya gano Bering Strait kuma ya ba da gudummawa wajen kammala taswirar Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa.
key_achievements: Tabbatar da rabuwar Asiya da Arewacin Amurka ta hanyar Balaguron Kamchatka na Farko
Isa gabar tekun Alaska ta hanyar Balaguron Kamchatka na Biyu
Gudummawa ga sanya sunaye ga manyan wurare kamar Bering Strait da Bering Sea
fact_box.legacy_statement: Balaguron nasa ya kammala taswirar Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa, ya ba Rasha damar shiga Alaska, kuma yana nuna ƙalubalen ɗan adam zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarshen karni na 15, Turai tana buɗe labulen Zamanin Bincike, tana mai karkata hankalinta zuwa ga tekuna marasa iyaka don neman hanyoyin kasuwanci na teku kai tsaye da Gabas. A cikin wannan zamani mai cike da rudani, **Bartolomeu Dias (an haife shi kusan 1450)** ya tsaya a sahun gaba na wata babbar tafiya da za a tuna da ita a tarihin ɗan adam, a matsayin fitaccen mai kewayawa da mai bincike na Portugal. A wancan lokacin, Portugal, tana gadon gadon Yarima Henry, tana mai da hankali kan ƙoƙarin ƙasa don bincika hanyar zuwa Indiya ta hanyar tafiya kudu tare da gabar yammacin Afirka. Yayin da Daular Usmaniyya ta mallaki hanyoyin kasuwanci na ƙasa, Turai ta fahimci buƙatar sabbin hanyoyin teku don samun kayan yaji da duwatsu masu daraja, wanda ya zama babban dalili ga jarumai masu bincike irin su Dias don kalubalantar tekuna marasa iyaka. A cikin waɗannan buƙatun zamani, Sarki João II na Portugal ya ba shi muhimmiyar manufa don neman ƙarshen kudancin nahiyar Afirka. Tafiyarsa ba kawai bincike ne na yanki ba, amma farkon wani babban canji da zai canza tafarkin tarihin duniya.

A watan Agusta na 1487, Dias ya jagoranci jiragen ruwa uku daga Lisbon, yana mai nufin kudu. Manufarsa ita ce gano mafi ƙarshen kudancin nahiyar Afirka da buɗe hanyar teku zuwa Tekun Indiya. Hanyar kewayawa ta gargajiya ita ce tafiya kudu tare da gabar tekun Afirka, amma Dias ya fahimci iyakokin wannan hanyar. A watan Janairu na 1488, ya fuskanci wani babban hadari, yana mai fuskantar yanayi mara tsammani inda aka tura jiragensa nesa da gabar teku zuwa tsakiyar Tekun Atlantika. Wannan hadari ba kawai bala'i ne na halitta ba, amma ya samar da wani muhimmin juyi a cikin dabarun kewayawarsa. Bayan ya yi ta shawagi na kwanaki da yawa a cikin hadari, ya canza hanyarsa zuwa gabas ta amfani da iska, kuma a ƙarshe ya yi nasarar wucewa ta ƙarshen kudancin nahiyar Afirka don shiga Tekun Indiya. Wannan wani sabon bincike ne, yana tabbatar da cewa hanya mafi inganci don kewayawa kudancin Afirka ita ce wucewa ta cikin babban teku mai nisa yamma da gabar tekun Afirka. Don haka, ya cimma babban aikin tarihi na zama Turai na farko da ya kewaya mafi ƙarshen kudancin Afirka kuma ya buɗe hanyar teku zuwa Tekun Indiya.

A watan Fabrairu na 1488, Dias da tawagarsa sun isa ƙarshen kudancin nahiyar Afirka kuma suka sanya masa suna 'Cabo das Tormentas' (Tudun Hadari) saboda manyan raƙuman ruwa da hadari. Duk da wannan bincike na tarihi, tafiyarsa ba ta yi sauƙi ba. Ma'aikatan jirgin, waɗanda suka gaji da doguwar tafiya da matsanancin wahala, sun ƙi ci gaba da tafiya gabas kuma sun buƙaci a koma baya. Dias ya fuskanci matsalolin gaskiya na raguwar ɗabi'a a tsakanin ma'aikatansa da ƙarancin kayan abinci, kuma a ƙarshe dole ne ya yanke shawarar komawa baya ba tare da ci gaba da tafiya gabas ba. A kan hanyarsa ta dawowa, ya sake duba tudun da ya wuce a baya, yana mai fahimtar muhimmancinsa, kuma bayan ya koma Portugal, Sarki João II ya sake masa suna 'Cabo da Boa Esperança' (Tudun Fata Mai Kyau), yana nuna cewa yana riƙe da fatan isa Indiya. Tafiyar Dias, ko da yake bai kammala hanyar zuwa Indiya kai tsaye ba, ta ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci don shawo kan ɗaya daga cikin manyan ƙalubalen Zamanin Bincike ta hanyar tabbatar da cewa yana yiwuwa a kewaya kudancin Afirka kuma a shiga Tekun Indiya.

Binciken Bartolomeu Dias ya buɗe yiwuwar sabbin hanyoyin kasuwanci na teku da ke haɗa Turai da Asiya. Bincikensa ya samar da mahimman ilimi da gogewa ga nasarar Vasco da Gama na gaba wajen buɗe hanyar zuwa Indiya, wanda ya canza yanayin kasuwancin duniya kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga faɗaɗawar mulkin mallaka na Turai. Dias da kansa ya mutu a shekara ta 1500, ya kama shi a cikin hadari kusa da Tudun Fata Mai Kyau, wanda ya gano, yayin da yake shiga cikin jirgin ruwa na Pedro Álvares Cabral da ke zuwa Brazil, amma sunansa za a tuna da shi har abada a matsayin majagaba na Zamanin Bincike. A yau, jaruntakarsa da ruhun bincike suna nuna ci gaba da ƙalubalen ɗan adam zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba, kuma ana ɗauke shi a matsayin mutumin da ya faɗaɗa iyakokin ɗan adam tare da sauran manyan masu bincike irin su Columbus da Magellan.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Bartolomeu Dias ya kasance mai kewayawa da mai bincike na Portugal a karni na 15, wanda shine na farko da ya kewaya mafi ƙarshen kudancin Afirka.
key_achievements: Gano Tudun Fata Mai Kyau na Afirka na farko da tafiyar dawowa
Tabbatar da ingancin hanyar kudu ta Tekun Atlantika
Ba da gudummawa ga buɗe hanyar kasuwanci ta teku tsakanin Turai da Asiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya zama tushe mai mahimmanci ga Vasco da Gama wajen buɗe hanyar Asiya.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, Turai tana cikin wani lokaci na binciken kimiyya mai ƙarfi a cikin raƙuman ruwa na Haskakawa, amma a lokaci guda, wata inuwa mai duhu ta mamaye ta da annoba masu kisa kamar kyanda, waɗanda suka yi sanadiyar rayukan mutane marasa adadi. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Edward Jenner (1749-1823), wani likita kuma masanin kimiyya ɗan Birtaniya, ya buɗe sabon fage a fannin rigakafin cututtuka ta hanyar samar da rigakafin kyanda, wanda ke ɗaya daga cikin manyan binciken likitanci a tarihin ɗan adam. An haife shi a ranar 17 ga Mayu, 1749, a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Jenner ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga duniyar halitta tun yana yaro. Ya sami ilimin likitanci a matsayin almajirin John Hunter, wani shahararren likitan tiyata kuma masanin ilimin jikin mutum a London, kuma koyarwar Hunter, "Kada ka yi tunani, amma ka gwada," ta yi tasiri sosai a kan bincikensa na rayuwa. Jenner ya koma garinsu kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin likita mai zaman kansa, amma bai yi watsi da karatunsa na tarihin halitta ba, yana nuna zurfin ilimi musamman a fannin ilimin tsuntsaye. A wannan lokacin, basirarsa ta lura da kuma ruhinsa na bincike marar yankewa sun zama tushen wani babban bincike wanda daga baya zai ceci bil'adama.

A lokacin da Jenner ke aiki, kyanda tana ɗaya daga cikin manyan barazana ga bil'adama, cuta mai ban tsoro wacce ke barin tabo mai tsanani da makanta har ma ga waɗanda suka tsira. Hanyar rigakafin kyanda tilo a lokacin ita ce variolation, wata hanya ce ta shigar da ruwan guba daga mai cutar kyanda zuwa ga mutum mai lafiya don haifar da ɗan rashin lafiya mai sauƙi kuma ta haka ne a sami rigakafi. Amma, variolation ta kasance mai cike da cece-kuce saboda haɗarin cewa wanda aka yi wa allurar zai iya kamuwa da kyanda da mutuwa ko kuma ya yaɗa ta ga wasu. Yayin da yake kula da marasa lafiya a matsayin likita mai zaman kansa, Jenner ya lura da wata tatsuniya cewa mata masu shayarwa (milkmaids) waɗanda suka kamu da cutar saniya (cowpox) ba sa kamuwa da kyanda. Cutar saniya cuta ce mai sauƙi da ke faruwa a cikin shanu, kuma ko da ta yadu ga mutane, tana haifar da ɗan kurji a hannu kuma ba ta da haɗari. Jenner ya ji a cikin zuciyarsa cewa wannan tatsuniya ba kawai camfi ba ce, amma tana iya samun tushen kimiyya, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a cikin bincikensa na rayuwa. Sha'awa mai tsanani ta kama shi don bayyana dangantakar da ke tsakanin cutar saniya da kyanda da kuma samar da ingantacciyar hanyar rigakafi ta amfani da cutar saniya.

Jenner ya tsara wani gwaji mai hankali don tabbatar da hasashensa. A ranar 14 ga Mayu, 1796, ya yi wa James Phipps, wani yaro ɗan shekara takwas, allurar ruwan guba da aka ɗauka daga kurjin Sarah Nelmes, wacce ke da cutar saniya. Phipps ya warke bayan ɗan alamun cutar saniya mai sauƙi. Bayan 'yan makonni, a ranar 1 ga Yuli, Jenner ya yi wa Phipps allurar ruwan guba daga mai cutar kyanda, amma abin mamaki, Phipps bai kamu da kyanda ba. Wannan gwaji ya zama hujja mai mahimmanci da ta tabbatar da hasashensa cewa cutar saniya tana ba da rigakafi ga kyanda. Jenner ya sanya wa wannan sabuwar hanyar rigakafi suna 'rigakafi' (vaccine), wanda aka samo daga kalmar Latin 'vacca' ma'ana saniya. A shekara ta 1798, ya buga wata takarda mai taken "Bincike kan Dalilai da Tasirin Variolae Vaccinae," wanda ke ɗauke da sakamakon bincikensa. Da farko, likitoci da jama'a da yawa sun kalli ikirarin nasa da shakku ko izgili. Zarge-zargen camfi da adawa ta ɗabi'a da addini ma sun yi yawa. Duk da haka, Jenner bai karaya ba, ya ci gaba da tabbatar da ikirarin nasa ta hanyar ƙarin bincike da shaidun asibiti, kuma a ƙarshe, hanyar allurar rigakafinsa ta fara samun karbuwa a duniya.

Hanyar allurar rigakafi ta Edward Jenner ana ɗaukarta ɗaya daga cikin ci gaban likitanci mafi juyin juya hali a tarihin ɗan adam. Bincikensa ya yadu a duniya, ya ceci rayuka marasa adadi kuma ya kafa tushen rigakafin annoba. Ko bayan mutuwarsa, allurar rigakafi ta ci gaba da haɓaka, kuma a shekara ta 1980, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta sanar a hukumance cewa an kawar da kyanda gaba ɗaya daga doron ƙasa. Wannan wani muhimmin al'amari ne da ya nuna ikon ɗan adam na shawo kan cututtuka ta hanyar ilimin kimiyya da haɗin gwiwa. Ana kiransa 'Uban Ilimin Rigakafi,' kuma nasarorinsa sun zaburar da masana kimiyya na baya kamar Louis Pasteur a binciken rigakafi, wanda ya kai ga samar da rigakafi ga cututtuka daban-daban. Har yau, rigakafi wani muhimmin sashi ne na lafiyar jama'a a duniya, kuma gadon Jenner yana da tasiri sosai ga lafiyar ɗan adam da rayuwarsa. Ruhinsa yana jagorantar hanyar ɗan adam a yaƙin da ake yi da cututtuka kuma ana tunawa da shi tare da nasarorin masu gabatarwa kamar John Snow, wanda ya ba da gudummawa ga lafiyar jama'a ta hanyar binciken kwalara.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Edward Jenner likita ne kuma masanin kimiyya ɗan Birtaniya na ƙarni na 18, wanda ya samar da rigakafin kyanda na farko a tarihin ɗan adam, ya buɗe sabon zamani na rigakafin cututtuka.
key_achievements: Samarwa da yaɗa rigakafin kyanda
Yin allurar rigakafi ta farko ga James Phipps
Kafa tushen ilimin rigakafi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Hanyar allurar rigakafinsa ta ceci rayuka marasa adadi a duniya, ta ba da gudummawa ga kawar da kyanda, kuma ta zama ginshiƙin ilimin rigakafi na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson (an haife ta a shekara ta 1830), wata tauraruwa mai haske a sararin samaniyar waƙoƙin Amurka ta tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, wadda a lokacin rayuwarta ta kasance kamar wata sirri mai ɓoye, amma bayan mutuwarta, haskenta ya bayyana, ya kuma haskaka tarihi da tasiri mai girma a duniyar adabi. A shekarar 1830, lokacin da wannan baiwar Allah ta zo duniya, ƙasar Amurka tana cikin wani guguwar sauye-sauye na zamantakewa da al'adu, kamar yadda ruwa ke gudu a cikin kogi. Masana'antu na bunƙasa kamar bishiya mai 'ya'ya, motsin farfaɗo da addini kuma yana ta yaɗuwa kamar wutar daji, yayin da yankin New England ke riƙe da al'adun Puritan masu tsauri, kuma ra'ayoyin Transcendentalism na fitowa fili kamar fitowar alfijir. An haife Dickinson a cikin wani gida mai arziki da tasiri a Amherst, Massachusetts, inda tun tana ƙarama ta nuna alamun hazaka da sha'awar ilimi mai zurfi, tare da zuciya mai saurin fahimtar abubuwa. Ta sami ilimi a Amherst Academy da Mount Holyoke Female Seminary, inda ta nutsu cikin zurfin tunani da karatu, kamar yadda mai bincike ke nutsuwa cikin tekun ilimi. Musamman ma abubuwan da ta samu a lokacin makarantar tauhidi sun zama wani muhimmin ginshiƙi da ya jefa tambayoyin addini da falsafa a cikin duniyar waƙoƙinta, kuma sun zama tushen da ta fara binciken sirrin yanayi da asalin wanzuwar ɗan adam. Daga wannan lokacin ne ta fara binciken nata harshen waƙa na musamman, tana gina wata daula ta ciki mai cike da sirri da hikima.

Babban fasalin da ya yi fice a rayuwar Dickinson shine rayuwar keɓewa da ta ci gaba da zurfafa, kamar yadda ruwa ke zurfafa a cikin kogi. Daga shekarun 1860s, ta rage hulɗa da jama'a sosai, tana ciyar da yawancin lokacinta a cikin gida, kamar wata sarauniya a cikin fadarta, har ma tana guje wa haɗuwa da baƙi. Wannan keɓewa ba wai kawai ware kai bane, a'a, zaɓi ne mai hikima don nisantar hayaniyar duniya ta waje, don ta mai da hankali ga ciki da kuma wahayin waƙoƙinta, kamar yadda mai bincike ke neman lu'u-lu'u a cikin teku. Ta rubuta waƙoƙi masu yawa a wannan lokacin, kamar yadda taurari ke cika sararin sama, amma a lokacin rayuwarta, kusan guda 10 ne kawai aka buga ba tare da sunanta ba, kuma yawancin ayyukanta sun kasance a ɓoye, ba su ga hasken duniya ba. Waƙoƙinta sun ɗauki tsari na musamman wanda ya karya al'adun adabi na lokacin, kamar yadda sabon kogi ke buɗe sabuwar hanya. Gajerun layuka, waƙoƙi marasa tsari, amfani da manyan haruffa na musamman, da kuma yawan amfani da dash (—) sun haɗu don samar da nata harshen waƙa na musamman, wanda aka fi sani da "harshen oval," wanda ya zama kamar wata alama ta musamman. An yaba masa a matsayin "harshe na musamman kuma mai siffar oval don bayyana abin da zai yiwu amma ba a cimma ba tukuna," kuma ya kasance wani yunƙuri mai jarumtaka na karya tsarin adabi na gargajiya, kamar yadda mai fasaha ke karya dokokin zane. Tana binciken batutuwa masu zurfi kamar mutuwa, rashin mutuwa, yanayi, rai, soyayya, da zafi, kamar yadda mai hikima ke binciken sirrin rayuwa, ta yi tambaya game da ma'anar sararin samaniya da wanzuwar ɗan adam a nata hanyar ta musamman.

A lokacin rayuwarta, Dickinson ta sha wahala mai girma saboda waƙoƙinta ba su sami karɓuwa sosai daga jama'a ba, kamar yadda fitila ke haskawa a cikin duhu, amma sha'awarta ta rubutu ba ta taɓa raguwa ba, tana ci gaba da ƙonewa kamar wuta mai tsarki. Ta yi musayar wasiƙu da wasu 'yan abokai, tana raba waƙoƙinta kamar yadda mai arziki ke raba dukiya, kuma musamman ma hulɗarta da mai sukar adabi Thomas Wentworth Higginson ta yi tasiri mai muhimmanci a duniyar waƙoƙinta, kamar yadda ruwa ke shayar da ƙasa. Higginson ya yaba da basirarta kuma ya ƙarfafa ta, kamar yadda mai lambu ke yaba da furen da ya shuka, amma a lokaci guda ya shawarce ta cewa tsarin waƙoƙinta na musamman zai yi wuya a karɓa a kasuwar bugawa ta lokacin, don haka ya nuna halin ko-in-kula game da bugawa, kamar yadda mai tsoro ke guje wa haɗari. Duk da wannan martani, Dickinson ba ta canza imaninta na waƙa ba, kamar yadda dutse ba ya canza wuri, kuma ba ta daina binciken duniyar ciki da gwaje-gwajen harshe ba, tana ci gaba da tafiya a kan hanyarta ta musamman. Ta sami goyon baya na tunani daga danginta, musamman ma daga 'yar uwarta Lavinia, wadda ta kasance mata kamar ginshiƙi, kuma duk da matsalolin lafiya, musamman ma matsalolin ido, waɗanda suka sa ta rayu cikin keɓewa, nutsuwarta ga rubutun waƙa ta ƙara zurfafa, kamar yadda ruwa ke zurfafa a cikin rami. Waƙoƙinta sun kasance sakamakon keɓewa da tunani mai zurfi, kuma sun kasance tarihin gwagwarmaya ta kadaici don neman gaskiyar harshe, ba tare da girgiza ta da kimantawar waje ko salon zamani ba, kamar yadda mai bincike ke neman taska mai ɓoye.

Gaskiyar gadon adabi na Emily Dickinson ya fara bayyana ga duniya ne bayan mutuwarta a shekara ta 1886, kamar yadda hasken rana ke bayyana bayan duhu. Bayan mutuwarta, 'yar uwarta Lavinia ta gano rubuce-rubucen waƙoƙi masu yawa a gida, kamar yadda aka gano taska mai ɓoye, kuma a lokacin ne waƙoƙin Dickinson suka fara ganin haske, suna haskaka duniya. Lavinia, tare da taimakon Thomas Wentworth Higginson da Mabel Loomis Todd, waɗanda suka zama mataimaka masu aminci, ta fara buga tarin waƙoƙi daga shekara ta 1890. Farkon bugu sun haifar da cece-kuce mai zafi, saboda sun gyara nahawu da alamomin rubutu na Dickinson na musamman don taimakawa jama'a su fahimta, kamar yadda ake gyara zane mai kyau. Amma a shekara ta 1955, lokacin da Thomas H. Johnson ya buga cikakken tarin waƙoƙi kusan ba tare da gyara ba, bisa ga rubuce-rubucen Dickinson, darajarta ta gaskiya da asalin ta fara sake kimantawa, kamar yadda ake gano lu'u-lu'u mai daraja. A yau, an gane Dickinson a matsayin majagaba na waƙoƙin zamani na karni na 20, kuma waƙoƙinta suna ba da saƙo mai wuce lokaci wajen binciken tambayoyin zurfi na wanzuwar ɗan adam da kyawun yanayi, kamar yadda hasken rana ke haskaka duniya. Harshenta na musamman da tsarin ta sun ba da ilhami ga mawakan baya, kamar yadda ruwa ke ba da rayuwa ga bishiyoyi, kuma ana ɗaukar ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan ginshiƙai biyu na adabin Amurka na karni na 19 tare da Walt Whitman, kuma har yanzu ana ci gaba da bincike a kanta sosai, kamar yadda ake binciken sirrin tarihi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Emily Dickinson, wata mawaƙiya ce ta Amurka a ƙarni na 19, wadda ta gina duniyar waƙoƙi ta musamman kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a adabin zamani.
key_achievements: Rubutun waƙoƙi na musamman a cikin keɓewa a lokacin rayuwarta
Gano da buga rubuce-rubucen waƙoƙi masu yawa bayan mutuwarta
Sake kimantawa a matsayin majagaba na waƙoƙin zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Harshenta na musamman da batutuwa masu zurfi suna ba da ilhami mai zurfi ga adabin zamani, wanda ya wuce lokaci.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarshen ƙarni na 18 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 19, Spain ta shiga wani lokaci mai cike da rudani, inda tunanin wayewa ya yi karo da ragowar tsohuwar tsarin mulki, kuma inuwar yaƙe-yaƙen Napoleon ta mamaye ƙasar. A cikin wannan guguwar tarihi, **Francisco José de Goya y Lucientes, wani shahararren mai zane na Romanticism kuma mai buga zane-zane daga Spain, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1746, ya kasance babban mai fasaha wanda ya nuna sauye-sauyen zamaninsa a cikin ayyukansa.** An haife shi a Fuendetodos, wani ƙaramin gari a yankin Aragon, ya sami horon fasaha na farko a Zaragoza, sannan ya koma Madrid inda ya fara aikinsa a matsayin mai zane na zane-zanen tapestry a masana'antar Royal Tapestry. A wancan lokacin, fadar sarautar Spain tana ƙarƙashin mulkin daular Bourbon, amma har yanzu akwai camfi da al'adun gargajiya masu zurfi a cikin al'umma, kuma Goya yana shirin gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman ta hanyar lura da waɗannan sabanin zamanin da idanu masu kaifi. Ayyukansa na farko sun nuna yanayin haske da fara'a na salon Rococo, amma sannu a hankali sun fara canzawa zuwa zurfin kallo wanda ke fuskantar gaskiya. 

Babban canji a rayuwar Goya ya zo a shekara ta 1793. Bayan ya kamu da wata mummunar cuta, ya rasa ji gaba ɗaya, kuma wannan ya canza yadda yake sadarwa da duniya, wanda hakan ya sa duniyar fasaharsa ta zurfafa cikin tunaninsa na ciki. A cikin keɓewar da aka yanke masa daga hayaniyar waje, ya fara mai da hankali sosai kan duhun ɗan adam da kuma rashin adalci na al'umma. A wannan lokacin, ya sami shahara a matsayin babban mai zane na fadar Sarki Charles IV na Spain, amma a lokaci guda, ya fara samar da ayyuka masu sukar zamantakewa. Musamman ma, jerin zane-zanen da aka buga a shekara ta 1799, **'Los Caprichos,' sun yi izgili da camfi, jahilci, cin hanci da rashawa, da kuma wautar ɗan adam a cikin al'ummar Spain ta wancan lokacin, wanda ya nuna cikakken hankalinsa mai kaifi na sukar zamantakewa da sabbin hanyoyin bayyanawa.** Waɗannan ayyukan sun ƙunshi fahimtar gaskiya mai sanyi fiye da koyarwar ɗabi'a ta gargajiya, wanda ya haifar da babban girgiza a cikin al'ummar wancan lokacin kuma ya buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a fannin fasahar Goya. 

Mamayar Napoleon a Spain da kuma yaƙin Peninsula (1808-1814) sun zama wata sabuwar jarabawa ga Goya kuma tushen wahayi na fasaha. Ya shaida mummunan ta'addancin yaƙi da zaluncin da ɗan adam zai iya aikatawa kai tsaye, wanda hakan ya jefa shi cikin zurfin yanke kauna, kuma ya nuna wannan gaba ɗaya a cikin ayyukansa. **'Los desastres de la guerra' (Masifu na Yaƙi) jerin zane-zane ne guda 82 waɗanda suka nuna mummunan bala'in yaƙi, wahala, da kuma lalacewar ɗan adam a fili, kuma ana ɗaukarsu ɗaya daga cikin mafi ƙarfin ayyukan fasahar yaƙi da yaƙi a tarihi.** Waɗannan ayyukan sun cire jaruntakar yaƙi kuma sun fallasa tsoro da rashin ɗan adam da ke ɓoye a bayansa, wanda ya nuna ƙarfin hali na fasahar Goya da ruhin zamaninsa. A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, ya keɓe kansa a 'Gidan Kurame' a wajen Madrid, inda ya zana jerin **'Pinturas negras' (Zane-zanen Baƙaƙe) kai tsaye a kan bangon gidan, yana bayyana zurfin tunani game da hauka na ɗan adam, yanke kauna, da mutuwa.** Waɗannan ayyukan, tare da launuka masu duhu da ƙarfi da kuma siffofi masu ban mamaki, sun bayyana duniyar ciki ta Goya a fili, kuma sun nuna kololuwar wahalar fasaharsa da gwagwarmayarsa. A cikin yanayin siyasa mara tabbas, ya gudu zuwa Bordeaux, Faransa a shekara ta 1824, kuma ya ci gaba da binciken sabbin fasahohi kamar lithography har zuwa rasuwarsa a can. 

Francisco Goya ana kiransa 'Babban Tsohon Mai Fasaha na Ƙarshe kuma Mai Zane na Zamani na Farko,' kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin fasahar Yamma. Ayyukansa sun haɗa da kyawun Rococo zuwa sha'awar Romanticism, da kuma abubuwan da suka fara na Realism da Expressionism, wanda ya ba da wahayi ga ra'ayoyi daban-daban na fasaha a ƙarni na 19 da na 20. A matsayinsa na mai zane na fadar sarauta, ya rubuta hotunan masu mulki na wancan lokacin da sanyi, yayin da kuma ya fallasa mummunan bala'in yaƙi da duhun al'umma ba tare da ɓoyewa ba, yana faɗaɗa rawar zamantakewa ta fasaha. Fasaharsa, wacce ta sassaƙa sha'awa da tsoro masu zurfi a cikin ɗan adam, da kuma wahalar zamaninsa a kan zane da faranti, har yanzu tana isar da saƙo mai ƙarfi a yau kuma tana ba mu zurfin tunani. Ayyukansa ba kawai sun rubuta tarihi ba ne, amma kuma suna gabatar da tambayoyi na duniya game da ɗan adam, kuma suna kasancewa muhimmin gado na ɗan adam tare da ayyukan wasu manyan masu fasaha kamar Édouard Manet da Pablo Picasso, waɗanda suka ɗaukaka gaskiyar zamantakewa zuwa matsayin fasaha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Francisco Goya wani shahararren mai zane na Romanticism kuma mai buga zane-zane daga Spain a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 19, wanda ayyukansa suka nuna sauye-sauyen zamaninsa kuma suka yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin fasahar Yamma.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Babban Mai Zane na Fadar Sarautar Spain
Ya samar da zane-zanen sukar zamantakewa 'Los Caprichos'
Jerin 'Masifu na Yaƙi' waɗanda suka nuna bala'in yaƙi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun bincika duhun ɗan adam da kuma duhun al'umma, wanda ya faɗaɗa hanyoyin fasahar zamani.

parsed.narrative:
George Eliot (an haife ta a 1819) marubuciya ce kuma mai ilimi mai wakiltar zamanin Victoria a Ingila, wacce ta bincika zurfin gaskiyar yanayin ɗan adam a cikin tsauraran al'adun zamantakewa da kuma lokacin canje-canje masu sauri. Karni na 19 a Ingila lokaci ne na hargitsi na addini da tunani na falsafa, tare da canje-canje a tsarin zamantakewa saboda juyin juya halin masana'antu. Sunanta na asali, Mary Ann Evans, an haife ta a ranar 22 ga Nuwamba, 1819, a yankin karkara na Warwickshire. Tun tana ƙarama, ta nuna basira ta musamman, kuma ban da ilimin yau da kullun, ta sami ilimi mai yawa ta hanyar koyar da kanta. Musamman ma, tana da sha'awar addini da falsafa sosai, kuma wannan ya yi tasiri sosai ga ra'ayinta na duniya da kuma yadda ta tsara jigogin adabinta. A lokacin kuruciyarta, ta nutsu cikin imani na bishara, amma a hankali ta rabu da koyarwar addini na gargajiya ta hanyar tunani mai ma'ana da basira mai mahimmanci, ta kafa nata ra'ayin ɗabi'a da falsafa. Wannan tafiya ta ilimi ta zama tushen rikice-rikicen ciki da binciken ɗabi'a da haruffa a cikin ayyukanta ke fuskanta.

Bayan ta koma London, Mary Ann Evans ta shiga cikin tarurrukan masu ilimi masu ci gaba na lokacin, ta faɗaɗa musayar ilimi, kuma ta gina suna a matsayin mai fassara da mai sukar adabi, tana aiki a matsayin mataimakiyar edita na shahararriyar mujallar sukar adabi, The Westminster Review. A wannan lokacin ne wani muhimmin canji ya faru a rayuwarta: dangantakarta da George Henry Lewes, wani masanin falsafa kuma mai sukar adabi wanda ya riga ya yi aure. Idan aka yi la'akari da tsauraran ka'idojin ɗabi'a na al'ummar lokacin, rayuwa tare da mutumin da ya yi aure ba tare da aure ba zaɓi ne mai ban mamaki wanda ya buƙaci jurewa zargi mai yawa na zamantakewa da keɓewa. Duk da cewa ta yi yaƙi da waɗannan ra'ayoyin zamantakewa, ta kafa zurfin alaƙa ta ilimi da ta motsin rai tare da Lewes, kuma wannan ya ba ta babban kwarin gwiwa ga ayyukanta na rubuce-rubuce. A cikin 1857, ta fara amfani da sunan namiji 'George Eliot' lokacin da ta buga littafinta na farko, Adam Bede. Wannan zaɓi ne na dabara don guje wa ra'ayoyin zamantakewa game da marubuta mata da kuma hana rayuwarta ta sirri shafar kimar ayyukanta.

A ƙarƙashin sunan George Eliot, ta buɗe sabon babi a cikin adabin zamanin Victoria. Ayyukanta sun wuce ba da labari kawai, suna nuna halaye na majagaba na Realism na Psychological, wanda ke bincika zurfin rikitarwa na tunanin ɗan adam da matsalolin ɗabi'a. Wannan fasaha ce ta adabi wacce ke kwatanta duniyar ciki da motsin haruffa a hankali, tana taimaka wa masu karatu su fahimci zurfin motsin zuciyar su da tsarin tunaninsu. Tun daga farkon ayyukanta kamar The Mill on the Floss da Silas Marner, ta nuna rayuwar al'ummomin karkara, makomar mutum, da kuma haruffa masu fama a ƙarƙashin matsin lamba na zamantakewa. Musamman ma, Middlemarch, wanda aka buga tsakanin 1871 da 1872, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin babban aikinta, yana kwatanta da kyau rikitarwa na al'ummar zamanin Victoria da kuma nau'ikan sha'awar ɗan adam ta hanyar haruffa daban-daban a cikin wani gari na lardi. Lewes ya kasance babban mai goyon bayanta kuma mai sukar ta, kuma mutuwarsa a 1878 ta haifar mata da baƙin ciki mai zurfi da jin hasara. Duk da haka, ba ta daina rubutu ba bayan mutuwar Lewes, kuma ta ci gaba da ayyukanta na ilimi, gami da shirya rubuce-rubucensa na bayan mutuwa.

George Eliot ta mutu a ranar 22 ga Disamba, 1880, amma gadonta na adabi yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai ƙarfi har zuwa yau. A matsayinta na marubuciya mace, ta fuskanci ƙuntatawa na zamantakewa da ra'ayoyi, amma ta nuna hikima ta hanyar amfani da sunan namiji don tabbatar da cewa an kimanta ayyukanta kawai bisa ga darajar adabi. Littattafanta sun ƙunshi zurfin tunani game da alhakin ɗabi'a na ɗan adam, ikon tausayawa, da kuma tasirin zaɓin mutum ga al'umma, kuma wannan yana ci gaba da yin tasiri ga masu karatu a duk lokuta. Musamman ma, Middlemarch ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin muhimmin mataki a cikin littattafan zamani, kuma zurfin fahimtarsa da tsarin sa mai kyau sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga marubuta da masu sukar adabi da yawa. George Eliot ta wuce mai ba da labari kawai; ta kasance babbar mai tunani wacce ta bincika rikitarwa na yanayin ɗan adam kuma ta bincika yanayin ɗabi'a na al'umma. Ayyukanta sun bincika yanayin ɗan adam da al'umma ta wata hanya daban da Charles Dickens ko Jane Austen na zamaninta, suna kammala nau'ikan adabin zamanin Victoria.

fact_box.one_line_summary: George Eliot marubuciya ce ta zamanin Victoria a Ingila, wacce ta fara Realism na Psychological kuma ta bincika zurfin yanayin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Bugawa littattafai a ƙarƙashin sunan namiji
Rubuta littafin 'Middlemarch'
Fara adabin Realism na Psychological
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta sun ba da fahimta game da zurfin tunanin ɗan adam da al'umma, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga littattafan zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Henry Hudson, mai bincike kuma mai tukin jirgin ruwa na Ingila wanda ya yi aiki a farkon karni na 17, mutum ne mai muhimmanci a zamanin Babban Bincike, lokacin da sha'awar Turai ga tekuna marasa iyaka ta kai kololuwa. A lokacin, manyan kasashen Turai suna neman sabbin hanyoyin ruwa ta hanyar Tekun Atlantika da kuma ta Arewa, wato Hanyar Arewa maso Gabas da Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma, don samun damar shiga arzikin Asiya. An yi imanin cewa Hudson an haife shi a London kuma ya koyi tukin jirgin ruwa a cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, amma akwai 'yan rubuce-rubuce game da farkon rayuwarsa. A shekara ta 1607, tare da tallafin Kamfanin Muscovy, ya fara tafiyarsa ta farko don gano hanyar Arewa zuwa Asiya ta hanyar Tekun Arctic. A wannan tafiya, ya bincika gabar tekun gabashin Greenland da tsibirin Svalbard, inda ya fuskanci shingen kankara na Tekun Arctic, amma ruhin bincikensa bai karye ba. Don haka, ya shiga cikin kalubalen bil'adama na neman sabuwar hanyar ruwa da za ta hada Turai da Asiya, inda ya fara matakin farko na rubuta sunansa a tarihi.

Binciken Henry Hudson ya kai ga wani muhimmin sauyi a tafiyarsa ta uku a shekara ta 1609, wanda Kamfanin Dutch East India ya ba shi umarni. Da farko ya tashi don neman Hanyar Arewa maso Gabas, amma lokacin da kankara mai tsanani ta Arewa ta toshe shi, ya juya zuwa yamma da karfin hali kuma ya fara binciken gabar tekun Arewacin Amurka. A cikin wannan tsari, ya shiga abin da ake kira New York Bay a yau kuma ya gano kuma ya bincika wani babban kogi mai tsawo zuwa arewa. Daga baya aka sanya wa wannan kogi suna 'Hudson River' don girmama shi, kuma an gane darajarsa a matsayin muhimmiyar hanyar ruwa da ke hada Tekun Atlantika zuwa cikin Arewacin Amurka. Kogin Hudson ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa mulkin mallaka na 'New Netherland' da kuma kafa cibiyar kasuwancin gashin dabbobi a Arewacin Amurka. Ko da yake ba hanyar kai tsaye ba ce zuwa Asiya da yake nema, an rubuta wannan bincike a matsayin wani muhimmin nasara da ya fadada fahimtar Turawa game da yanayin kasa na Arewacin Amurka kuma ya samar da sabbin damammakin kasuwanci.

Tafiyar Hudson ta karshe kuma mafi ban tausayi ta fara ne a shekara ta 1610, tare da tallafin 'yan kasuwar Ingila. A wannan karon ma, ya ci gaba da tafiya zuwa yamma tare da gabar tekun arewacin Arewacin Amurka don neman Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma. A wannan tafiya, ya gano kuma ya bincika abin da ake kira 'Hudson Strait' da 'Hudson Bay' a yau. Amma lokacin da wani hunturu mai tsanani ya zo ba zato ba tsammani, jirginsa ya makale a cikin kankara, kuma ma'aikatan jirgin sun fara shan wahala daga karancin abinci, sanyi, da kuma rashin gamsuwa da binciken da ba ya karewa. Rikici ya yi zurfi a cikin jirgin a lokacin dogon hunturu, kuma a karshe, a watan Yuni 1611, ma'aikatan jirgin sun yi tawaye. Ma'aikatan jirgin da suka jagoranci tawayen sun sanya Hudson, dansa karami, da kuma wasu ma'aikatan jirgin da suka yi masa biyayya a cikin wani karamin jirgin ruwa kuma suka bar su a cikin Hudson Bay mai cike da kankara. Ba a sake ganin su ba, kuma an yi imanin cewa Hudson ya gamu da karshe mai ban tausayi a cikin tekun da ba a sani ba. Mutuwarsa ta kasance wani lamari da ya nuna karara raunin bil'adama da tsananin yanayi da ke boye a bayan daukakar bincike.

Duk da karshen Henry Hudson mai ban tausayi, bincikensa ya bar gado mai girma a tarihin bil'adama. Kogin Hudson, Hudson Bay, da Hudson Strait da ya gano kuma ya bincika suna rike da sunansa har zuwa yau kuma sun zama muhimmin bangare na yanayin kasa na Arewacin Amurka. Musamman ma, Kogin Hudson ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ci gaban birnin New York da farkon tarihin Amurka, kuma Hudson Bay ya zama muhimmin ma'aunin yanayin kasa don fahimtar babban yankin Kanada. Bincikensa ya fadada ilimin Turawa game da yanayin kasa na Arewacin Amurka sosai, kuma ya samar da muhimmin tushe ga Netherlands da Ingila don kafa mulkin mallaka da kuma hanyoyin kasuwanci a wannan yanki. Ko da yake Hudson bai gano cikakkiyar hanyar Arewa da yake so ba, ana tuna shi a matsayin alamar jajircewar bil'adama da ruhin bincike zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba. Labarinsa yana tunatar da mu game da kalubale da takaicin sauran masu bincike na zamaninsa da suka yi kokarin gano hanyar Arewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Henry Hudson, mai bincike na Ingila na farkon karni na 17, ya bincika manyan hanyoyin ruwa na Arewacin Amurka kuma ya yi kokarin gano hanyar Arewa.
key_achievements: Bincike da sanya suna ga Kogin Hudson
Gano Hudson Bay da Hudson Strait
Kokarin gano Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya yi tasiri sosai ga fahimtar yanayin kasa na Arewacin Amurka da kuma kafa mulkin mallaka na Turai.

parsed.narrative:
A kan raƙuman ruwa masu shuɗi na Tekun Aegean, a bakin tekun Girka na da can inda ƙura mai launin toka ke yawo, a cikin ragowar zamanin zinariya inda kukan jarumai da raɗaɗin alloli suka haɗu, wani rai ya farka. Yana bin gaskiyar da ke ɓoye a bayan mayafin makanta, zai zana farin ciki da baƙin ciki na rayuwar ɗan adam da goga mara ganuwa. Wata sha'awa mai zafi ta ƙone zuciyarsa don sanya naman tatsuniyoyi a kan kwarangwal na gaskiya mai wuya, da kuma siffanta zafin rayuwa zuwa waƙa ta har abada. Wata hasashe mai haske shi kaɗai a cikin hayaniyar duniya, ita ce ta jagorance shi.

Idanunsa sun sami hanya ko da a cikin duhu mai zurfi. Jinin da ya bazu a ƙarƙashin katangar Troy mai cin wuta, shekaru goma na yawo da Odysseus ya yi, rantsuwar jarumai da cin amanarsu, wani babban zane mai cike da soyayya da ƙiyayya – duk ya saƙa su a cikin shiru. Labaran da ke fitowa daga alƙalaminsa ba rubuce-rubuce kawai ba ne. Kamar harshen wuta da ke tashi daga toka, sun kasance gutsuttsarin bege da aka ɗauko daga zurfin kwaruruka na zafi da yanke kauna. Ya riƙe ƙaddarar halittu masu girman kai kamar alloli a wasu lokuta, kuma masu rauni kamar mutane a wasu lokuta.

Ga dare marasa adadi, hasken taurari ne kawai abokinsa. A kunnuwansa, waƙar iska, nishi na teku, da muryoyin jarumai marasa gogewa sun yi ta yawo. Duniya ba ta gan shi ba, amma ya ga duniya. Ya hango ta cikin inuwar mutane masu rayuwa a cikin lokuta masu cike da tashin hankali, sha'awarsu da tsoronsu da ke ɓoye a cikin zukatansu. Kowace harafi da aka sassaƙa a kan tsohuwar takarda ta tattara dubban shekaru na lokaci da ƙaddarar ɗan adam, ta fara samun rai mai numfashi.

A yau, sunansa ba labari ne da aka manta ba daga wani lokaci mai nisa. Ko a wannan lokacin da muke rayuwa, muryarsa tana ci gaba da amo. Lokacin da muka ɓace kuma muka yi yawo a cikin tafiyar rayuwa mai wahala, muna samun ƙarfin hali daga waƙoƙinsa kuma muna samun ta'aziyya a cikin kaɗaici. Duk farin ciki da baƙin ciki, ɗaukaka da bala'i da aka fuskanta a cikin sunan ɗan adam suna rayuwa har abada a cikin waƙoƙinsa na almara, suna girgiza da farkar da zurfin rayuwarmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban mawaƙin Girka na da wanda, yana bin gaskiya a bayan mayafin makanta, ya siffanta Yaƙin Troy da labaran jarumai zuwa waƙoƙin da ba za su mutu ba.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar bala'i da waƙoƙin almara na Yaƙin Troy
Rera waƙar tafiyar Odysseus mai wahala ta komawa gida
Siffanta farin ciki da baƙin ciki na rayuwar ɗan adam zuwa waƙoƙi na har abada
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa na almara sun wuce lokaci, suna ɗauke da farin ciki da baƙin ciki na ɗan adam, kuma suna ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai ga ɗan adam har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Jane Austen (1775-1817) marubuciya ce ta Birtaniya wacce ta yi zurfin bincike mai kaifi a kan al'ummar Birtaniya a ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19. An haife ta a ranar 16 ga Disamba, 1775, a Steventon, Hampshire, a matsayin ɗa na bakwai ga George Austen, wani limamin coci, da Cassandra Leigh Austen. A wancan lokacin, Birtaniya tana da tsarin aji mai tsauri, kuma musamman ga mata, aure wata hanya ce mai mahimmanci don tantance matsayin zamantakewa da kwanciyar hankali na tattalin arziki. Jane Austen ta girma a cikin wannan yanayi na zamani, inda ta sami damar lura da kyau da al'adun zamantakewa masu laushi da munafunci tsakanin matsakaicin aji da manyan aji. Iliminta ya fi faruwa a gida, kuma ta haɓaka ƙauna mai zurfi ga karatu da rubutu. Wannan ya yi tasiri mai mahimmanci wajen samar da duniyar ayyukanta a nan gaba. Tun tana yarinya, ta fara nuna basirar adabinta ta hanyar jin daɗin wasan kwaikwayo tare da iyalinta da rubuta rubuce-rubuce masu ban dariya. Abubuwan da ta samu a wannan lokacin sun zama tushen halayen da ke bayyana a cikin littattafanta da kuma cikakken bayanin zamantakewa.

Basirar adabin Jane Austen ta fito fili tun tana budurwa, amma akwai ƙuntatawa da yawa ga marubuta mata a wancan lokacin. Ta fara rubuta littattafai tun tana ƙarshen shekarunta na samartaka, kuma an fi karanta ayyukanta na farko a tsakanin iyalinta. Ayyukanta suna da halin magance rayuwar mata na matsakaicin aji da manyan aji na Birtaniya a karni na 18 tare da kallo mai laushi da salon rubutu mai ban dariya. Musamman a lokacin da aure, dukiya, da matsayin zamantakewa ke tantance makomar mata, ta kama da kaifi rikice-rikicen ciki da matsalolin zamantakewa da mata ke fuskanta. Jarumai a cikin littattafan Jane Austen galibi suna fama tsakanin soyayya da gaskiya, suna nuna yadda suke neman 'yancinsu a kan tsammanin zamantakewa. Wannan ra'ayin jigo ya kasance mai ci gaba sosai a cikin yanayin zamantakewa mai ra'ayin mazan jiya na wancan lokacin. Ta nuna da kyau girman kai da son zuciya na ɗan adam da ke ɓoye a bayan al'ummar da ke da alama mai natsuwa, da kuma hadaddiyar hulɗa tsakanin hankali da motsin rai. Wannan yana nuna cewa ayyukanta suna ɗauke da saƙon sukar zamantakewa mai zurfi fiye da littattafan soyayya kawai.

Jane Austen ta kammala littattafai shida a lokacin rayuwarta, amma shahararta a matsayin marubuciya ta fara haskawa ne bayan mutuwarta. Littafinta na farko da aka buga, *Sense and Sensibility*, an buga shi ba tare da sunanta ba a cikin 1811, sannan *Pride and Prejudice* (1813), *Mansfield Park* (1814), da *Emma* (1815) sun biyo baya. An buga waɗannan ayyukan duka ba tare da sunanta ba, wanda ke nuna ƙuntatawar zamantakewa da marubuta mata ke fuskanta a wancan lokacin. Ta ba da gudummawa ga rayuwar iyalinta da kuɗin da ta samu daga ayyukanta, amma ba ta da wadata ta fuskar tattalin arziki. Bayan da iyalinta suka koma Bath a 1801, ta fuskanci wahala wajen rubutu na ɗan lokaci, amma ta sami damar sadaukar da kanta ga rubutu lokacin da suka sake komawa Chawton, Hampshire, a 1809. A wannan lokacin ne manyan ayyukanta suka fito. Duk da cewa lafiyarta ta tabarbare sosai a ƙarshen rayuwarta, ta nuna himma wajen kammala *Persuasion* da *Northanger Abbey*. Ta yi tunani mai zurfi game da yadda ayyukanta za su yi tasiri ga masu karatu na zamani, kuma ta ci gaba da neman cikakkiyar adabi.

Jane Austen ta rasu a ranar 18 ga Yuli, 1817, a Winchester, tana da shekaru 41. Bayan mutuwarta, an buga ayyukanta da ba a kammala ba, *Persuasion* da *Northanger Abbey*, a ƙarshen 1817, kuma a wannan lokacin ne ɗan'uwanta, Henry Austen, ya bayyana ainihin marubuciyar. Ayyukanta, waɗanda suka sami ɗan shahara a lokacin rayuwarta, an sake kimanta su a cikin karni na 20 kuma sun sami soyayya a duk duniya. Musamman, *Pride and Prejudice* da *Sense and Sensibility* an daidaita su zuwa fina-finai da shirye-shiryen talabijin sau da yawa, inda suka zama gumaka na al'adun gargajiya. Littattafan Jane Austen suna bincika ainihin motsin zuciyar ɗan adam da dangantakar zamantakewa fiye da lokaci, suna ba da zurfin fahimta da tausayi ga masu karatu har zuwa yau. Ta yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin adabin Birtaniya ta hanyar cikakken bayanin halayen mutane da kuma sukar zamantakewa mai kaifi, kuma an yaba mata da kafa tushen littattafan soyayya na zamani. Ayyukanta suna da alaƙa da ra'ayin sukar zamantakewa na wasu marubuta mata kamar 'yan'uwan Brontë da George Eliot na zamanin Victoria, suna tabbatar da darajar adabi wacce ta wuce lokaci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jane Austen marubuciya ce ta Birtaniya a ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19, wacce ta bayyana rayuwar mata na matsakaicin aji da manyan aji da kyau da kuma ban dariya.
key_achievements: Rubuta littattafai shida, ciki har da *Pride and Prejudice*
Cikakken bayanin rayuwar mata na matsakaicin aji da manyan aji na Birtaniya
Kafa salon adabi mai ban dariya da sukar zamantakewa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta suna magance batutuwan halayen ɗan adam na duniya waɗanda suka wuce lokaci, kuma an sake haifar da su a cikin fina-finai da shirye-shiryen talabijin da yawa, suna ci gaba da samun soyayya har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
A farkon karni na 19, lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu da igiyar canjin zamantakewa suka mamaye al'ummar Birtaniya, John Stuart Mill (1806-1873) ya bar wata alama mai zurfi a tarihin tunani a matsayin fitaccen masanin falsafa, masanin tattalin arzikin siyasa, kuma jami'in gwamnati na Birtaniya. An haife shi a London a shekara ta 1806, kuma mahaifinsa, James Mill, ya kasance fitaccen masanin falsafa kuma almajirin Jeremy Bentham, wanda ya kafa ra'ayin amfani (utilitarianism). Mill bai halarci makarantar gargajiya ba, amma ya girma a ƙarƙashin tsauraran ilimi da tsari na mahaifinsa. Tun yana ɗan shekara uku ya fara koyon Girkanci, kuma yana ɗan shekara takwas ya ƙware a Latin, inda ya sami ilimi mai yawa game da tarihi na da, dabaru, da tattalin arzikin siyasa tun yana ƙarami. Yarintarsa ta cika da bincike na ilimi mai kaɗaici maimakon hulɗa da takwarorinsa, wanda ya ba shi basira ta musamman amma kuma ya haifar da rikice-rikice na ciki mai zurfi. Wannan ilimi na farko ya zama tushen ci gabansa zuwa ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu tunani na zamaninsa, amma kuma ya jefa inuwar rashin ci gaban tunani.

Yana ɗan shekara ashirin, a shekara ta 1826, Mill ya fuskanci wani mummunan rikicin tunani. Ya sha wahala daga wani wofi mai zurfi, inda ya gane cewa tunanin amfani da tarin ilimi da aka koya masa tun yana yaro ba zai iya ba shi ma'anar rayuwa da farin ciki ba. Utilitarianism, falsafar ɗabi'a da siyasa da ke neman 'mafi girman farin ciki ga mafi yawan mutane', Mill ya yi nazari a kai tare da inganta shi zuwa utilitarianism mai inganci. Wannan rikici ya sa ya fahimci mahimmancin ji da tunani, kuma ya sami waraka ta tunani ta hanyar waƙoƙin William Wordsworth da Samuel Taylor Coleridge. Ya fahimci cewa farin ciki na ɗan adam ba kawai ƙaruwar adadin jin daɗi ba ne, amma yana fitowa ne daga babban gamsuwa ta tunani da ci gaban mutum. A wannan lokacin ne ya sadu da Harriet Taylor Mill, abokiyar tunaninsa kuma wacce daga baya ta zama matarsa, wacce ta yi tasiri sosai a kan ra'ayoyinsa, musamman game da haƙƙin mata da gyaran zamantakewa. Hulɗarsa da Harriet ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a canjin tunaninsa, indanda ta jagoranci utilitarianism ɗinsa zuwa ga hanya mai wadata da ɗan adam.

Mill ya yi aiki a Kamfanin East India sama da shekaru 30 a matsayin jami'in gwamnati, yana haɗa ayyukan gudanarwa da rubuce-rubuce na falsafa. Littafinsa mafi shahara, "On Liberty," wanda aka buga a 1859, wani littafi ne na gargajiya wanda ya kare 'yancin mutum kuma ya jaddada buƙatar kare yankin mutum daga tsoma bakin gwamnati ko al'umma. A cikin wannan littafi, ya gabatar da Ka'idar Cutarwa (Harm Principle), wanda ke cewa "ayyukan mutum ya kamata su kasance masu 'yanci matuƙar ba su cutar da wasu ba," wanda ya zama tushen ginshiƙi na tunanin 'yanci na zamani. A 1861, ya tsara falsafar ɗabi'arsa a cikin "Utilitarianism," kuma a 1869, ya buga "The Subjection of Women," wanda shine sakamakon haɗin gwiwarsa da Harriet Taylor Mill, inda ya yi kira da ƙarfi ga daidaiton siyasa, zamantakewa, da tattalin arziki ga mata. A matsayinsa na majagaba na motsin neman 'yancin mata, ya yi aiki a matsayin ɗan majalisa daga 1865 zuwa 1868, yana gabatar da dokar 'yancin mata, don haka ya yi ƙoƙari ya tabbatar da imaninsa a cikin siyasa ta gaske. Ra'ayoyinsa masu ci gaba sun haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar lokacin, kuma duk da fuskantar suka da adawa mai yawa, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba, ya riƙe imaninsa da ƙarfi.

John Stuart Mill ya mutu a Avignon, Faransa, a shekara ta 1873, amma tunaninsa ya canza yanayin tunani na al'ummar Yamma har abada. Littafinsa "On Liberty" ya kasance muhimmiyar hujja mai ƙarfi don kare 'yancin faɗar albarkacin baki, 'yancin tunani, da cin gashin kai na mutum, kuma har yau ana ambato shi a matsayin babban rubutu lokacin da ake tattauna ka'idodin asali na al'ummomin dimokuraɗiyya. "The Subjection of Women" ya zama ginshiƙi na motsin 'yancin mata, yana ba da tushen ka'ida ga gwagwarmayar neman daidaiton jinsi, kuma utilitarianism ɗinsa ya faɗaɗa falsafar ɗabi'a fiye da jin daɗi kawai, yana mai da hankali kan mutuncin ɗan adam da ci gaban mutum. Tunanin Mill ya yi tasiri sosai a kan ci gaban 'yanci na zamani, haƙƙin ɗan adam, da dimokuraɗiyya, kuma fahimtarsa har yau tana zama muhimmiyar jagora wajen neman daidaito tsakanin haƙƙin mutum da ci gaban zamantakewa. Sadaukarwarsa ga 'yanci da adalci ana kwatanta ta da ayyukan masu tunani irin su Alexis de Tocqueville, waɗanda suka bincika ƙalubalen dimokuraɗiyya a zamaninsu, kuma yana nuna hanyar da al'ummar zamani ya kamata ta bi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: John Stuart Mill masanin falsafa ne kuma masanin tattalin arziki na Birtaniya a karni na 19, wanda ya kafa ra'ayoyin 'yanci da haƙƙin mata.
key_achievements: Rubuta 'On Liberty' wanda ya kare 'yancin mutum
Ya yi kira da ƙarfi ga 'yancin mata na zaɓe da daidaito
Ya inganta utilitarianism ta fuskar inganci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai a kan ci gaban 'yanci na zamani, haƙƙin ɗan adam, da dimokuraɗiyya, kuma har yau ana tattauna shi.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin guguwar hargitsi inda wutar juyin juya hali ta mamaye Paris, ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka inda tsoffin al'adun sarauta da sabbin kiran 'yanci suka haɗu, wata mace tana goge muryarta. A ƙarshen tsohuwar alkalami mai gashin tsuntsu, akwai hawayen waɗanda aka zalunta, kuma haruffan da aka rubuta a hankali sun yi zafi da ƙarfin niyyar yanke sarƙoƙin da ke daure su. Za ta bayyana wa duniya wahalar ɗan adam ta asali da aka manta na ɗan lokaci a ƙarƙashin hasken fitilu masu kyau na mataki, da kukan rayuka da aka ɗaure. Zuciyarta ta kasance mai ƙarfi kamar tsohuwar katanga, amma a cikinta, sha'awar da ba ta yankewa ga manufa mai nisa tana ci gaba da motsawa.

Rubuce-rubucenta, waɗanda suka fara a wani ɗan ƙaramin ɗakin aiki a gefen gari, sun yi nisa da kyawun manyan fadoji. Amma a cikinsu akwai nauyin gaskiya da ke wakiltar yunwar ciki da kuma zukatan da aka murƙushe na mazaunan Paris. Bayan murnar taron jama'a da suka taru a ƙarƙashin tutoci, da kuma dare masu cike da damuwa inda takobin baƙin mahara ke walƙiya, ita kaɗai ta zauna a gaban tebur, tana rubuta kukan waɗanda suka yi shiru. Tsakanin manufa mai girma da kuma mummunan gaskiya, a gaban kaddarori masu karo da juna, kadaicinta ya gudana kamar kogin dare mai zurfi.

A ƙarƙashin manyan sunaye na 'Yanci, Daidaito, da 'Yan Uwan Juna, ba za ta iya jurewa wani sarƙa da ke ɗaure ƙafafun mata ba. Domin zafin juyin juya hali bai huce ba, gwagwarmayar rushe tsoffin ganuwar nuna bambanci ta zama mafi tsanani. Sanarwarta, wadda aka rubuta da jan tawada, ta haifar da guguwa mai ƙarfi, tana sanya kasancewar matan da aka manta a cikin tunanin duniya. Tsakanin fushin da ke tafasa da bege marar yankewa, da kuma yiwuwar samun nasara mai haske, ita kaɗai ta ci gaba da gwagwarmaya mai kadaici.

Ko da yake ganuwar dutse mai sanyi na kurkuku ta kewaye numfashinta na ƙarshe, wutar da ta kunna ba ta taɓa mutuwa ba. Muryarta, wadda ta yi kira a kan zalunci da rashin adalci, tana ci gaba da yin amo a cikin zukatan dukkan rayuka da aka zalunta a duk tsawon zamani. Har zuwa wannan lokacin, a cikin zukatan mutane da yawa waɗanda ke yin kira da ƙarfin hali a kan nuna bambanci da rashin daidaito, tana ci gaba da rayuwa, tana haskakawa a matsayin fitila mai haskaka hanyar zuwa ga 'yancin ɗan adam na gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata mace da ta wakilci waɗanda aka zalunta da kuma haƙƙin mata da alkalami a lokacin juyin juya hali a Paris, an ɗaure ta amma ta ci gaba da haskakawa har abada a matsayin wutar 'yanci.
key_achievements: Wakilcin gaskiyar mazaunan Paris da aka zalunta
Sanar da sanarwa da ta sanya kasancewar mata a cikin tunanin duniya
Gwagwarmayar rubuce-rubuce don 'yanci da daidaito
fact_box.legacy_statement: Muryarta da ta yi kira a kan zalunci da rashin adalci tana ci gaba da rayuwa a matsayin fitila ga dukkan rayuka da aka zalunta a duk tsawon zamani.

parsed.narrative:
A kan titunan Roma masu ƙura, a lokacin da numfashin ƙarshe na wayewar Hellenanci ke raguwa, ƙarƙashin zafin rana na Masar, inda iskar hamada mai bushewa ta ratsa, a cikin baƙon yare a baƙon ƙasa, ruhin Plotinus ya rabu kuma ya zama mai kaifi. A cikin rudani inda hikimar Girka ta dā mai dusashewa da duhun gabas mai ban mamaki suka haɗu, ya ji wata ƙishirwa mai tsanani ga tushen wanzuwa. Hayaniyar duniya ta rufe kunnuwansa, sha'awoyi marasa tushe sun ruɗe tunaninsa, amma bai tsaya ba. A cikin zurfin shiru, yana bin sautin zuciyarsa kawai, ya fara tafiya mai zafi zuwa ga gaskiya ta har abada.

Takunsa ya nufi titunan Roma masu cunkoso, babban birnin daular mai girma. Ko a wurin da masana falsafa da malamai da yawa suka taru, Plotinus ya kasance shi kaɗai. Wurin banza da ke ɓoye a bayan kyakkyawan jawabi, da rashin amfanin mutane masu bin iko da daraja sun bayyana a idanunsa. Ya kasance tare da masu neman ilimi, amma bai sami zaman lafiya na gaskiya a cikin muhawararsu ba. Maimakon haka, ya zurfafa cikin damuwa yayin da yake jin nishi na azaba da kukan rayuka masu zalunci da ke yaɗuwa a ko'ina cikin daular. Ya fahimci cewa duk wata wahala a duniya ta samo asali ne daga rashin jituwa ta asali, kuma ya ci gaba da bincikensa na kadaici don neman mafita.

Wata rana, yayin da faɗuwar rana mai launin zinariya ke shafa tsaunukan Roma, Plotinus a ƙarshe ya haye bakin kofa na wayewa. Haɗuwa da 'Ɗaya' (The One), wata halitta mai cikakkiyar iko da ta wuce tunani da magana, wadda ba za a taɓa kaiwa gare ta ba ta hanyar jawabi ko muhawara. Wannan farin ciki ne mai ban sha'awa, amma kuma zurfin kadaici ne wanda ba za a iya bayyanawa ba. Ya ga tsarin sararin samaniya mai girma inda komai ke gudana daga Ɗaya kuma ya koma ga Ɗaya. Amma ko a wannan lokacin farin ciki, inuwar duniya ta kasance mai zurfi, kuma kukan rayuka da ke cikin jahilci bai taɓa tsayawa ba. Ya zauna a duniya, yana ɗaukar nauyin raba wannan ilimi mai tsarki.

Zaren tunani da ya saƙa da alƙalami ko da baki har yau yana kewaye da mu a matsayin haske mara mutuwa. Bayan manufofin Plato, yana bincika zurfin sufanci, ya bar alama mai dorewa a cikin babban rafi na falsafar Yamma. ‘Ɗaya’ nasa yana ci gaba da fassara da faɗaɗawa ta hanyar sufanci, Neoplatonism, har zuwa Renaissance da falsafar zamani, yana amsa tambayoyin ɗan adam na dā game da ma'anar wanzuwa. Zurfin fahimtarsa da ke cikin shirunsa ya wuce lokaci, har yanzu yana jagorantar rayuka masu ɓacewa zuwa ga hasken gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Plotinus masanin falsafa ne na Neoplatonism wanda ya haɗa tunanin Girka na dā da na Gabas, ya kuma bincika tushen wanzuwa ta hanyar haɗuwa da 'Ɗaya'.
key_achievements: Kaiwa ga matsayin haɗuwa da Ɗaya (The One)
Kafa tsarin falsafar Neoplatonism
Fahimtar tushen wanzuwa da tsarin sararin samaniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafarsa ta 'Ɗaya' ta yi tasiri sosai a kan falsafar Yamma gabaɗaya, kuma har abada tana amsa tambayoyin ɗan adam game da ma'anar wanzuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Roald Amundsen (an haife shi a shekara ta 1872) wani shahararren mai binciken yankin sanyi ne ɗan ƙasar Norway, wanda ya wakilci 'Zamanin Jarumai' a farkon ƙarni na 20, lokacin da sha'awar ɗan adam ga yankunan da ba a bincika ba ta kai kololuwa. An haife shi a Borge, Norway, ɗan mai jirgin ruwa kuma kyaftin, ya girma a cikin yanayi mai tsanani, wanda ya haɓaka ruhin kasada a cikinsa. Mahaifiyarsa tana son ya zama likita, amma Amundsen ya fara mafarkin binciken yankin sanyi bayan ya ji labarin nasarar Fridtjof Nansen na ketare Greenland da jirgin Fram. Mai binciken yankin sanyi shi ne wanda ke binciken yanayi mai tsanani na yankunan sanyi na duniya, wato Kutubun Arewa da Kutubun Kudu, yana ba da gudummawa ga gano wurare da faɗaɗa ilimin kimiyya. Ya ɗan yi karatu a fannin likitanci, amma a ƙarshe ya zaɓi hanyar bincike, wanda shine ainihin sha'awarsa. Wannan ya zo daidai da sha'awar duniya da ba a sani ba wacce ta mamaye Turai a lokacin, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci ga Amundsen don jagorantar tafiyar ɗan adam don faɗaɗa hangen nesa.

Babban juyin juya halin farko na Amundsen a matsayin mai bincike shine nasarar ketare Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma daga 1903 zuwa 1906. Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma hanya ce ta teku da ke haɗa Tekun Atlantika da Tekun Pasifik ta arewacin Nahiyar Arewacin Amurka, hanya ce mai wuya da yawancin masu bincike suka yi ƙoƙarin buɗewa amma suka kasa tsawon ƙarnuka. Amundsen ya sami shahara a duniya ta hanyar jagorantar ƙaramin jirginsa, Gjøa, don kammala wannan hanya mai wahala a karon farko. Wannan nasara ta tabbatar da ƙwarewarsa a fannin kewayawa da kuma iyawarsa ta daidaitawa da yanayi mai tsanani. Bayan haka, burinsa ya koma ga cin nasara a Kutubun Arewa, amma bayan Robert Peary ya sanar da isa Kutubun Arewa a 1909, Amundsen ya canza burinsa da ƙarfin hali zuwa cin nasara a Kutubun Kudu. Wannan ya haifar da gasa mara izini tare da mai binciken Birtaniya Robert Falcon Scott, yana nuna farkon wani muhimmin rikici wanda aka rubuta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mafi ban mamaki a tarihin ɗan adam.

Tafiyar Amundsen don cin nasara a Kutubun Kudu ta kasance haɗin gwiwar tsari mai kyau da sabbin hanyoyin. Ko da yake ya fara tafiya bayan Scott, ya yi amfani da dabarun da suka dace da yanayi mai tsanani, kamar amfani da sled ɗin karnuka da ski (hanyoyin tafiye-tafiye na gargajiya na Inuit) da kuma kafa wuraren ajiyar kayayyaki yadda ya kamata. Bayan barin Norway a 1910 da kafa sansani a Ross Ice Shelf a Antarctica, ya fara tafiyar ƙarshe don isa Kutubun Kudu tare da abokan tafiya huɗu a ranar 19 ga Oktoba, 1911. A cikin sanyi mai tsanani wanda ke sauka zuwa digiri da yawa a ƙasa da sifili, guguwar dusar ƙanƙara marar tabbas, da kuma hamadar ƙanƙara marar iyaka, sun jimre da wahala da gwagwarmaya mai tsanani. A ƙarshe, a ranar 14 ga Disamba, 1911, Amundsen da tawagarsa sun cimma nasarar zama na farko a tarihin ɗan adam da suka isa Kutubun Kudu. Wannan ya kasance kusan wata ɗaya kafin balaguron Scott, nasara ce da aka samu ta hanyar shiri mai kyau da jagoranci nagari na Amundsen. Daga baya, a 1926, ya zama mutum na farko da ya ci nasara a duka kutubai biyu ta hanyar tashi sama da Kutubun Arewa da jirgin sama na Norge.

Rayuwar Roald Amundsen ta kasance alama ce ta ci gaba da ƙalubale da ruhin bincike. Ya kawo sabbin abubuwa ba kawai ga gano wurare ba har ma ga dabarun rayuwa da dabarun bincike a cikin yanayi mai tsanani. Musamman ma, ingantaccen amfani da sled ɗin karnuka da ski, da kuma tsarin samar da kayayyaki mai kyau, sun zama ma'auni ga duk balaguron yankin sanyi na gaba. Nasarorinsa sun nuna ƙarfin hali da hikimar da ake buƙata don ɗan adam ya bincika abin da ba a sani ba kuma ya shawo kan iyakoki, yana ba da gudummawa sosai ga zurfafa fahimtar kimiyya game da yankunan sanyi. A 1928, ya ɓace a cikin bala'i yayin da yake ƙoƙarin ceto mai binciken Italiya Umberto Nobile a lokacin balaguron Kutubun Arewa, amma sunansa ya kasance a rubuce har abada kamar tauraro mai haske a tarihin binciken yankin sanyi. Nasarorinsa, tare da labarun sauran manyan masu bincike na zamaninsa kamar Robert Scott da Ernest Shackleton, suna nuna ruhin ƙalubale na ɗan adam kuma suna ci gaba da zaburar da mutane da yawa a yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Roald Amundsen wani mai binciken yankin sanyi ne ɗan ƙasar Norway a farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya bar manyan nasarori ciki har da na farko da ya isa Kutubun Kudu.
key_achievements: Nasarar ketare Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma a karon farko (1903-1906)
Na farko da ya isa Kutubun Kudu (14 ga Disamba, 1911)
Jirgin sama na farko a kan Kutubun Arewa (1926)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhinsa na bincike da sabbin hanyoyinsa sun buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a binciken yankin sanyi kuma sun zaburar da niyyar ɗan adam na ƙalubale.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin filayen arewacin New York masu zafi da ƙura, inda raɗaɗin sabon motsin kawar da bauta ya haɗu da sanarwar addinin Puritan mai tsanani, an ƙirƙira wani ruhi. Ba a cikin tukunyar daukakar yaƙi ba, amma a cikin nutsuwa, duk da haka ba ƙasa da tsananin guguwar ka'idojin gida da tsammanin al'umma ba. Kamshin sabon man shanu da raɗaɗin rigunan siliki sun zama farkon sautin waƙa ga wata zuciya da ke farkawa ga rashin jituwa da ke tsakanin manyan manufofin sabuwar jamhuriya da sarƙoƙi masu shake rabin al'ummar. A cikin babban amma mai takurawa ɗakin karatu na doka na mahaifinta, matashiyar Elizabeth ta ji alamun farko na tawaye. Wannan wani zato ne cewa rashin gamsuwa mai shiru da ke tafasa zai haifar da kalubale mai kama da girgizar ƙasa wanda zai girgiza tushen iko.

Iska ta Seneca Falls ta yi kauri da koke-koken mata marasa adadi, ta zama wata ƙungiyar mawaƙa ta shiru da ke jiran murya mai ƙarfin hali don ba da siffa da sauti ga wahalarsu. Elizabeth, zuciyarta guguwa ce ta fushi mai adalci da ciwo mara yankewa na rashin adalcin da ta gani, ta tsaya a gabansu. Ba a matsayin mai roƙo ba, amma a matsayin manzo. Nauyin ƙarnuka na bauta ya danne ta, yana jin kamar wani ƙarfi na zahiri da ke ƙoƙarin murkushe sabon ƙarfin hali da ke fitowa a cikin zuciyarta. Duk da haka, yayin da idanunta suka kalli teku na fuskokin masu jira, kowannensu an zana shi da sanannen haɗin gajiya da fatan da ke fitowa. Wani babban ƙuduri ya tabbata a cikinta, wani haske mai haske ya ratsa cikin hazo na yanayin zamantakewa.

Bayan shekaru, sautin kukan ƙararta ya yi ta yawo a cikin al'ummar da ke fama da lamirinta. Wutar da ta kunna ta bazu daga ɗakunan zane-zane masu raɗaɗi zuwa ɗakunan lacca masu cunkoso, kowace kalma wani dutse ne da aka sanya a hankali yana cire ginin dokar ubangida. Zagi, raini, zarge-zargen buri na rashin mata – duk waɗannan iska ce mai tsanani kawai ga jirgin ruwa da aka tura ta hanyar manufa mara yankewa. Ta ratsa cikin faɗin ƙasar Amurka. A matsayin jarumi mai kaɗaici da ke ɗauke da hankali da imani mara girgiza, muryarta, wani lokaci kamar rafi mai laushi, wani lokaci kamar ruwa mai tsanani, ta ɗauki iri na juyin juya hali wanda ke alkawarin ba zubar da jini ba, amma babban canji na ruhin ɗan adam da matsayinsa na gaskiya a duniya.

Yanzu, ko da yake tawada a kan sanarwarta ta daɗe da bushewa, ruhin kiran Elizabeth Cady Stanton mai zafi har yanzu yana tafe ta cikin jijiyoyin ci gaba, wani rafi mai dagewa yana kalubalantar yanayin da ake ciki. Akwatin zaɓe, wanda a da yake kamar ruɗi mai haske a nesa, yanzu yana tsaye a matsayin hujja mai ma'ana na gwagwarmayarta mara girgiza. Hannun da aka ba su ikon zaɓe ne ke motsa maɓallansa saboda juriya da ƙwarewarta. Gadonta ba kawai an zana shi a cikin littattafan tarihi ba, yana numfashi a cikin rayuwar kowace mace da ta ɗaga muryarta, a cikin kowane mataki da aka ɗauka zuwa daidaito, yana ƙonewa a matsayin garwashi na har abada, yana tunatar da mu cewa neman 'yanci na gaskiya labari ne mai ɗorewa, wanda aka haɗa shi har abada a cikin masana'antar burin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai gabatarwa a cikin motsin zaɓen mata, ta sadaukar da rayuwarta don ci gaban haƙƙin mata a kan takunkumin al'umma.
key_achievements: Jagoranci Taron Seneca Falls, taron farko na haƙƙin mata.
Ta kunna wutar motsin zaɓen mata a Amurka.
Ta kare haƙƙin mata ta hanyar yawon shakatawa na lacca a duk faɗin ƙasar.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta shimfiɗa harsashin samun zaɓen mata kuma ta zama garwashi na har abada don ci gaba da gwagwarmayar daidaito.

parsed.narrative:
Henrik Ibsen (an haife shi a shekara ta 1828) babban marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ne, darakta, kuma mawaki wanda ya kafa ginshiƙin wasan kwaikwayo na zamani a tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, a cikin canje-canjen zamantakewa masu tashe-tashen hankali na Norway. An haife shi a Skien, kudancin Norway a shekara ta 1828, ɗan wani attajiri ne, amma yarintarsa ta kasance cike da matsalolin tattalin arziki sakamakon faɗuwar arzikin iyalinsa ba zato ba tsammani. Lokacin da mahaifinsa ya yi fatara yana ɗan shekara 8, iyalin suka shiga cikin talauci, wanda ya bar Ibsen ɗan ƙarami da rauni mai zurfi kuma ya ba shi basira mai kaifi game da munafuncin al'umma da saɓanin aji. Ya bar makaranta yana ɗan shekara 15 don ya yi aiki a matsayin mai koyon aikin magani don samun abin rayuwa, kuma a cikin wannan yanayi na kaɗaici, ya ci gaba da haɓaka sha'awarsa ta adabi. A shekara ta 1850, ya koma Christiania (yanzu Oslo) don shirya shiga jami'a, kuma a lokaci guda, ya fara nuna basirarsa ta adabi ta hanyar buga wasan kwaikwayo na farko. Abubuwan da ya samu a wannan lokacin sun yi tasiri sosai a kan ayyukansa na gaba, inda suka zama tushen duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman wacce ke bincika zurfin tunanin ɗan adam da rashin adalcin al'umma.

Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman sauye-sauye a rayuwar Ibsen shi ne lokacin da ya bar Norway a shekara ta 1864 don fara gudun hijira na son rai na tsawon shekaru 27 a sassa daban-daban na Turai, ciki har da Italiya da Jamus. Wannan tafiya ce da ya yi don neman 'yancin fasaha da kuma wahayi na kirkira, tare da zurfin takaici game da al'ummar Norway da siyasar ta. A farkon gudun hijirarsa, ya sami shahara ta hanyar wasannin kwaikwayo na almara da soyayya kamar “Brand” (1866) da “Peer Gynt” (1867), amma a hankali ya juya zuwa sabon nau'in wasan kwaikwayo, Social Realism, wanda ke sukar gaskiyar al'ummar Turai a lokacin. Social Realism yana nufin wani salo na adabi wanda ke nuna matsalolin al'umma da tunanin ɗan adam yadda suke, wani lokaci ma a fili har ya zama abin damuwa. A wannan lokacin, ya karya al'adun wasan kwaikwayo na gargajiya, yana mai da hankali kan fallasa munafuncin al'umma da lalacewar ɗabi'a ta hanyar amfani da harshe na yau da kullun da halaye na gaske. Wannan canji ya sa ayyukansa suka zama kayan aiki mai ƙarfi wanda ke haifar da muhawara ta zamantakewa da tunani, fiye da nishaɗi kawai.

A lokacin gudun hijirarsa, Ibsen ya fitar da manyan ayyukansa, inda ya sami shahara a duniya. Musamman, “A Doll's House,” wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1879, ya yi magana kan gano kai na mata da 'yantar da su daga takunkumin zamantakewa, wanda ya haifar da babban girgiza ga al'ummar lokacin. Wannan aikin ya haifar da muhawara mai zafi ta hanyar yin tambayoyi masu zurfi game da tsarin aure na gargajiya da rawar mata, kuma ya haifar da cece-kuce a duk faɗin Turai. “Ghosts” (1881), wanda aka buga bayan haka, ya karya haramcin zamantakewa ta hanyar magance batutuwa masu tsattsauran ra'ayi kamar cututtukan gado, lalata, da munafuncin ɗabi'a, kuma ya fuskanci kakkausar suka daga masu sukar ra'ayin mazan jiya. Duk da haka, Ibsen bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba saboda wannan suka, kuma ta hanyar “An Enemy of the People” (1882), ya bincika zurfin rikici tsakanin mutum mai faɗin gaskiya da ra'ayin jama'a masu son kai, yana mai tabbatar da imaninsa na fasaha. Ayyukansa sun soki munafuncin ɗabi'a da ƙa'idodin al'ummar lokacin kai tsaye, kuma sun ci gaba da kira ga 'yancin ɗan adam da ƙarfin hali don neman gaskiya.

A shekara ta 1891, bayan ya kawo ƙarshen dogon lokacin gudun hijirarsa kuma ya koma Norway, Ibsen ya riga ya zama babban marubuci na duniya. Ayyukansa na baya sun nuna halin alama da na tunani, suna bincika zurfin tunanin ɗan adam, sun bambanta da salon Social Realism na farko. “Hedda Gabler” (1890) da “The Master Builder” (1892) sune manyan ayyuka na wannan lokacin, waɗanda suka nuna sha'awar ɗan adam, takaici, da kuma kaɗaicin wanzuwa da kyau. Henrik Ibsen, wanda ya rasu a shekara ta 1906 yana ɗan shekara 78, ana kiransa “Uban Wasan Kwaikwayo na Zamani” kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin wasan kwaikwayo. Ayyukansa sun wuce lokaci, suna ba da zurfin tunani game da yanayin ɗan adam da matsalolin zamantakewa, kuma har yau ana ci gaba da yin su da bincika su a fadin duniya. Salon rubutun wasan kwaikwayo na kirkire-kirkire da ruhin sukar zamantakewa sun yi tasiri sosai ga marubuta na zamani kamar August Strindberg na Sweden da Anton Chekhov na Rasha, kuma tare da su, ya faɗaɗa iyakokin wasan kwaikwayo na zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Henrik Ibsen marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ne na Norway na ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya fara Social Realism kuma ana kiransa uban wasan kwaikwayo na zamani.
key_achievements: Majagaba na wasan kwaikwayo na Social Realism
Ya buga ayyuka masu muhimmanci kamar 'A Doll's House'
Ya faɗaɗa iyakokin wasan kwaikwayo na zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun wuce lokaci, suna ba da zurfin tunani game da yanayin ɗan adam da matsalolin zamantakewa.

parsed.narrative:
Publius Virgil Maro (70 K.H.I. – 19 K.H.I.) ya kasance babban mawaki kuma marubuci na tsohuwar Roma, wanda ya yi fice a zamanin Augustus, lokacin daular Roma ta kai kololuwar zinariya, inda ya kirkiro kashin bayan adabin Roma. An haife shi a ranar 15 ga Oktoba, 70 K.H.I., ya shaida wani muhimmin sauyi na tarihi daga zamanin Jamhuriyar Roma mai cike da rudani zuwa zamanin Daular. Wannan lokaci, wanda rikicin yakin basasa da neman sabon tsari suka yi kaka-gida, ya kasance lokacin da Romawa ke matukar bukatar sabon labari da zai sake tabbatar musu da asalin kasarsu da daukakarsu. Virgil ya kasance a shirye don amsa wannan kiran na zamani, don tattara tatsuniyar kafa Roma da kuma manufofin jaruntaka. Babban aikinsa, **babban labarin kasa na Roma, *Aeneid***, wani babban labari ne da ke ba da labarin yadda jarumin Troy, Aeneas, ya kafa Roma, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen tatsuniyar asalin Roma da kuma karfafa girman kan Romawa. Wannan aiki ya wuce matsayin adabi kawai, ya zama ginshikin ruhaniya na Daular Roma.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Virgil shi ne yadda ya nutsa cikin kirkirar *Aeneid*. A lokacin, Roma tana murmurewa daga rudanin bayan kisan Julius Caesar kuma tana ci gaba zuwa zaman lafiya da wadata a karkashin mulkin Sarki Augustus. Augustus, yayin da yake bude sabon zamani ga Roma, ya gane cewa ana bukatar wani karfi mai karfi na al'adu don tabbatar da halaccin daular da kuma karfafa ruhin hadin kai a tsakanin 'yan kasar Roma. A cikin wannan bukata ta zamani, an dora wa Virgil babban aikin rubuta wani babban labari da zai yabi babban tarihin Roma tare da nuna makomarta.
