Ya sanya Aeneas, jarumin yakin Troy, a matsayin wanda ya kafa Roma, yana mai nuna makomar Roma ta hanyar tafiyarsa ta shawo kan matsaloli da kuma zama a sabuwar kasa, bisa ga nufin alloli. Wannan babban aiki ya kasance babban nauyi ga Virgil kuma a lokaci guda, dama ce ta samun shahara ta har abada.

Rubuta *Aeneid* ya kasance dogon gwagwarmaya mai kadaici ga Virgil. Ya sadaukar da kusan shekaru 10 ga wannan babban aiki, yana kokarin hada tarihin Roma, tatsuniyoyi, da tunanin falsafa don gina labari mai zurfi. A cikin aikin, Aeneas yana gwagwarmaya tsakanin sha'awar kansa da kuma nauyin kasa, yana fuskantar bala'in rasa masoyansa, amma duk da haka ya mika wuya ga kaddara don kammala babban aikin kafa Roma. Ta hanyar wannan tafiya ta jarumi, Virgil ya jaddada muhimmancin halayen kirki da Romawa ya kamata su yi koyi da su: 'pietas' (ibada da nauyi) da 'fatum' (kaddara). Ya ci gaba da gyarawa da gyara aikin don inganta shi, kuma ya mutu a Megara a shekara ta 19 K.H.I. bayan ya kamu da rashin lafiya yayin tafiya a Girka da Asiya Karama. Kafin mutuwarsa, ya yi wasiyya cewa a kona *Aeneid*, wanda yake ganin bai kammala ba, amma bisa umarnin Sarki Augustus, abokansa sun tattara ayyukansa kuma suka buga su, ta haka ne wannan babban labari ya ga hasken duniya.

Bayan mutuwar Virgil, *Aeneid* ya zama littafi mai muhimmanci a duk faɗin Daular Roma, kuma an girmama shi a matsayin 'Mawakin Tsarki na Roma', yana da tasiri mai girma a kan adabin Yammacin duniya. An dauki aikinsa a matsayin kololuwar adabin Latin, kuma ya zama tushen wahayi ga marubuta da masana da yawa a zamanin Tsakiya da Renaissance. Musamman ma, babban mawakin Italiya na karni na 14, Dante Alighieri, ya girmama ikon adabin Virgil da zurfin ruhaniyarsa ta hanyar sanya shi a matsayin jagora kuma mai hikima a cikin Jahannama da Limbo a cikin babban aikinsa, *The Divine Comedy*. Har zuwa yau, ana karanta *Aeneid* na Virgil a matsayin kashin bayan adabin gargajiya, kuma ya kasance muhimmin aiki don fahimtar tushen wayewar Yammacin duniya. Babban labarinsa ya wuce tatsuniyar kafa kasa kawai, yana gabatar da tambayoyi na duniya game da makomar mutum, nauyi, da sadaukarwa, yana ba da wahayi maras lokaci. Wannan kokari na kafa asalin kasa ta hanyar labarin kasa za a iya kwatanta shi da yadda Homer ya ba da wahayi ga tsoffin Girkawa ta hanyar tatsuniyoyin Girka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Publius Virgil Maro ya kasance mawaki kuma marubuci na tsohuwar Roma, wanda aka girmama shi a matsayin mawakin tsarki na Roma saboda rubuta babban labarin kasa na Roma, *Aeneid*.
key_achievements: Rubuta babban labarin kasa na Roma, *Aeneid*
Mawaki mai wakiltar zamanin zinariya na adabin tsohuwar Roma
Ya bayyana a matsayin jagora zuwa lahira a cikin *The Divine Comedy* na Dante
fact_box.legacy_statement: Babban labarinsa ya zama tushen adabin Yammacin duniya, yana ba da wahayi ga marubuta da masu tunani marasa adadi.

parsed.narrative:
A ƙarƙashin zafin rana na kudancin Faransa, a kan ƙasar da ke cike da ƙamshin giya mai daɗi na Bordeaux da jajayen tubali na Toulouse, akwai wata yarinya da ba ta san iskar duniya mai tsanani ba tukuna. An ƙaddara ta gaji manyan filaye na Aquitaine, zuciyarta tana bugawa da girman kai na sarauta da kuma sha'awar daji a lokaci guda. Ranta, wanda aka goge a tsakanin alkalami, takobi, da waƙoƙin kayan kiɗa, ya shiga ɗakin kwana na Sarkin Faransa tun tana ɗan shekara goma sha biyar, ta shiga cikin wani babban guguwar kaddara. Rayuwarta, wacce ta bunƙasa a ƙarƙashin rana mai zafi, ba kamar iskar sanyi ta Champagne ba, ta kasance mai ban sha'awa kamar fure ɗaya, amma ƙayoyinta ma sun kasance masu kaifi sosai.

Ko da manyan ganuwar Paris, ko kuma tafiye-tafiye masu wahala na Yaƙin Salibiyya ba su iya ɗaure babban ruhinta ba. Fiye da shekaru goma na rayuwa a matsayin sarauniya sun wuce a banza, kuma kadaici da cin amana da aka ji a ƙasar waje sun kasance a cikin zuciyarta kamar duwatsu masu sanyi. Zaɓin saki mai tsattsauran ra'ayi ya kasance 'yanci, barin kursiyin da ke raguwa don komawa tushenta, wato Aquitaine. Aurenta na biyu da wani mai ƙarfin hali daga Anjou ya kasance sabon tsalle zuwa ga kambin Ingila, amma shin ta ji cewa shi ma farkon wani ƙuntatawa ne? A lokacin da tutar gidan Zaki Ja ta tashi sama, idanunta sun ƙunshi baƙin ciki na baya da buri na gaba a lokaci guda.

Lokaci ya kasance mai zalunci, kuma iko ya kasance mai haɗama. Sarauniyar Ingila, uwar sarakuna da yawa, amma a tsakanin cin amana na mijinta da tawayen 'ya'yanta, ta zama tsuntsu da aka kama a cikin ganuwar dutse mai sanyi. Shekaru goma sha shida masu tsawo, me ta yi tunani yayin da take kallon hasken rana mai shuɗewa bayan sandunan? Shin kuka ne don 'yancin da aka rasa, ko kuma ƙarfin hali ne da ke shirya wuta don sake kunnawa? A ƙarshe, lokacin da kursiyin ya canza kuma ta sake bayyana a duniya a ƙarƙashin sunan Sarkin Zaki, ta tsufa amma ta nuna kasancewa mai ƙarfi sosai. Duk da jikinta mai rauni, hotonta, tana gyara masarautar da Yaƙin Salibiyya ya tarwatsa kuma tana tafiya Turai don fansar ɗanta, ya kasance kamar allahiya marar mutuwa daga tatsuniyoyi.

Tsawon shekaru 82, ta rayu da ƙarfi fiye da kowa a zamaninta. Ta yi tafiye-tafiye tsakanin kursiyai, ta mallaki nahiyoyi, kuma ta gina tare da rushe masarautu. Sunanta, Eleanor na Aquitaine, ya kasance ba kawai rikodin tarihi ba, amma waƙar yabo ta har abada ga nufin mace, hikima, da kuma ruhun yaƙi marar yankewa wanda ya wuce iyakokin jinsinta. A yau, ko da a cikin duniya inda manyan masarautu suka faɗi kuma an kafa sabbin tsare-tsare, labarin wata mace da ba ta taɓa rasa muryarta ba a tsakiyar iko har yanzu yana ratsa zukatanmu sosai, yana rayuwa kuma yana numfashi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarauniyar Aquitaine kuma Sarauniyar Faransa da Ingila, mace mai ƙarfi wacce ta ƙirƙiri iko da kaddara a cikin lokaci mai cike da rudani.
key_achievements: Ta gaji kuma ta mallaki manyan filaye na Aquitaine
Ta yi sarauta a matsayin Sarauniyar Faransa da Ingila
Mai mulkin riƙo ga ɗanta Richard na Farko da sake gina masarauta
fact_box.legacy_statement: An tuna da ita a matsayin wata siffa da ta yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Turai tare da nufinta da hikimarta, ta wuce iyakokin mata, kuma har yau tana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa sosai.

parsed.narrative:
A cikin zuciyar daji inda tsoffin alloli ke raɗa, inda ƙurar ƙasa ja ke rawa da iska, a ƙasar da nauyin kambin wucin gadi da kishi mai guba suka haɗu, aka ƙarfafa wata rayuwa. Yarima da aka haifa, Sundiata Keita. Ƙafafunsa sun yi rauni kamar reshe da ya karye a cikin ƙura, amma zuciyarsa ta yi zafi kamar lafa mai tafasa. Rana ta faɗi ba tare da damuwa ba a bayan sararin sama, kuma babban inuwar masarautar ta danne Sundiata ɗan yaro. Kallon sanyin uwar-uwa, da dariyar raini na 'yan'uwansa sun yi ta yawo a kunnuwansa na yaro. Kujerar mulki ta yi nisa, tana haskawa kamar tauraro mai nisa, amma ƙasar da ke ƙarƙashin ƙafafunsa ta riga ta fara fashewa. Wulakancin gudun hijira, hawayen mahaifiyarsa, da yunwa da kaɗaici sun yi ta goge ruhinsa na matashi.

A kan hanyar gudun hijira mai cike da baƙin ciki, ya ji kukan kabilun da aka tattake kamar iri da suka warwatse. A wata ƙasa baƙuwa inda macizai ke naɗe, kuma kunama ke lanƙwasa baya, ya kunna wutar bege yayin da raɓar dare mai sanyi ke sauka a kansa. Yunwa ta sa ƙasusuwansa suka yi tsirara, amma ruhinsa ya ƙara kaifi. Duk lokacin da ya ketare bakin kofa na wata kabila baƙuwa, ya fuskanci raini da taka tsantsan, amma a cikin idanunsa akwai wutar da ba ta mutuwa. Ya ga daular da aka yayyage da farcen dabbobin daji, kuma ya ji kukan baƙin ciki na al'ummar da suka warwatse. Yayin da yake goge takobin ramuwar gayya, ya yi alƙawarin sake gina wata masarauta mai haske ta hanyar tattara guntayen da suka warwatse.

Kafafun kaddara sun juya, sun juya, a ƙarshe sawunsa ya taka ƙasar mahaifarsa. Tsoffin takalmansa sun tsufa, amma kafadunsa sun miƙe, kuma muryarsa tana da ƙarar tsawa. Jaruman da suka warwatse sun taru a ƙarƙashin tutarsa. Sojojin da yunwa ta addaba sun ga bege a idanunsa, kuma mutanen da aka zalunta sun ji 'yanci a muryarsa. Tutar jini tana shawagi, ya ci gaba ba tare da tsoro ba don dawo da mulkin da ya ɓace. Sarkin Soso mai girman kai Taranta ya faɗi a gaban ƙarfinsa mai zafi, a ƙarshe ƙasar Mandinka da ta warwatse ta fara haɗuwa wuri guda. Ƙafafunsa masu gurgunta ba su zama rauni ba. Ya zama alamar ƙarfin hali da ba za a iya karya ba wanda ya tashi daga wahala.

Yanzu ba sarki kawai ba ne. Mai kafa Babban Daular Mali, Sundiata Keita. Hannunsa ya haɗa ƙasashe masu warwatse wuri guda, kuma hikimarsa ta ba da tsari ga daular. Jerin ayarin 'yan kasuwa da ke ratsa hamada sun tabbatar da arzikin daular, kuma raɗaɗin 'yan kasuwa masu hikima ya haifar da sabon ilimi. Ya yi mulki da adalci ba zalunci ba, da haɗin kai ba rarrabuwa ba. Gadonsa ba kawai launin zinariya ba ne. Ya kasance kukan ruhohi masu 'yanci, kuma iri na bege da aka shuka a cikin waɗanda aka zalunta. Har yanzu muna jin babban ƙarfin ruhin ɗan adam wanda ke mai da abin da ba zai yiwu ba zuwa mai yiwuwa, ta hanyar sunansa da ba za a manta ba, a cikin burbushin daular da ya kafa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Labarin Sundiata Keita, wanda ya fuskanci wahalhalu da gudun hijira tun yana yaro, amma ya haɗa kabilun Mandinka kuma ya gina Babban Daular Mali.
key_achievements: Shawo kan wahalhalu da gudun hijira tun yana yaro
Haɗa kabilun Mandinka da suka warwatse
Kafa Babban Daular Mali da kafa tsari
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kasance alamar haɗin kai wanda ya shuka 'yanci da bege, kuma ya nuna girman ruhin ɗan adam wanda ya mai da abin da ba zai yiwu ba zuwa mai yiwuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Farkon karni na 18 a Turai lokaci ne mai cike da rudani, inda tsohuwar darajar daular Habsburg ke raguwa, kuma rashin magajin namiji ya haifar da damuwa. Sarki Charles VI na Daular Roman Mai Tsarki, don tabbatar da ci gaban daularsa, ya fitar da Dokar Pragmatic a shekara ta 1713, wanda ya ba mata damar gado, mataki ne mai ban mamaki. A cikin wannan yanayi, **Maria Theresa (1717-1780)** an haife ta a Vienna a ranar 13 ga Mayu, 1717, a matsayin mace mai mulki daya tilo a Masarautar Habsburg kuma Archduchess na Austria. Tun tana karama, ta nuna hazaka da halin jajircewa, amma da farko an ba ta ilimi da ya fi mayar da hankali kan rawar da za ta taka a matsayin mata don ci gaban gidan Habsburg, maimakon a matsayin mai mulki kai tsaye. Duk da haka, kaddara ta dora mata babban nauyi na gaba na daular, kuma a hankali ta fara fahimtar rawar da za ta taka a cikin rikitarwa na gadon siyasar gidan Habsburg da kuma yanayin siyasar kasa da kasa da ke cike da muradun manyan kasashen Turai. Haihuwarta ba wai haihuwar gimbiya ce kawai ba, a'a, farkon wani sabon zamani ne ga daular Habsburg.

A shekara ta 1740, mutuwar mahaifinta Charles VI ba zato ba tsammani ta kawo babban sauyi a rayuwar Maria Theresa da kuma daular Habsburg. Tana da shekaru ashirin da uku kacal, ta hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Archduchess na Austria kuma Sarauniyar Hungary da Bohemia, amma manyan kasashen Turai da yawa, wadanda ba su amince da Dokar Pragmatic ba, sun musanta hakkin gadonta kuma sun nuna burinsu na mamayewa. Musamman, Frederick II na Prussia, jim kadan bayan hawansa gadon sarauta, ya mamaye yankin Silesia mai albarka, wanda ya haifar da Yakin Gadon Sarautar Austria (1740-1748). Sauran kasashe kamar Bavaria, Faransa, Saxony, da Spain sun shiga yakin don raba yankunan Habsburg, wanda ya jefa daular cikin hadarin rugujewa. A shekara ta 1741, Maria Theresa, tana rike da danta karami, ta yi kira da hawaye ga manyan mutanen Hungary, inda ta sami amincinsu, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin sauyi a yakin. Ko da yake ta sha wahalar rasa Silesia ga Prussia a wannan yakin, ta kare muhimman yankunan daular Habsburg kuma ta nuna karfinta na mulki ga duniya.

Kwarewar mai tsanani na Yakin Gadon Sarauta ya ba Maria Theresa darasi mai zurfi, kuma ta tashi daga ciwon shan kashi don fara manyan gyare-gyare don sake gina da kuma karfafa daular. Ta hanyar gyare-gyaren soja, ta kafa Kwalejin Soja ta Theresian kuma ta karfafa sojojin dindindin; ta hanyar gyare-gyaren gudanarwa, ta inganta tsarin mulki na tsakiya kuma ta kafa Majalisar Jiha don gina ingantaccen tsarin mulki. Bugu da kari, ta tabbatar da kudaden shiga ta hanyar gyare-gyaren kudi kuma ta inganta ci gaban tattalin arziki; ta kuma yi kokari a fannin gyare-gyaren ilimi, inda ta kafa jami'o'i da yawa ciki har da Jami'ar Likitanci ta Vienna kuma ta karfafa binciken kimiyya. Yakin Shekaru Bakwai (1756-1763), wanda ya barke a shekara ta 1756, burinta ne na dawo da Silesia, amma a karshe ya fuskanci tsayin daka daga Prussia kuma ya kare da gazawa. A rayuwarta ta sirri, ta auri Francis Stephen na Lorraine kuma ta haifi 'ya'ya 16; bayan mutuwar mijinta Francis I a shekara ta 1765, ta fara mulkin hadin gwiwa tare da babban danta Joseph II kuma ba ta daina kokarin tabbatar da zaman lafiya da ci gaban daular ba. Gyare-gyarenta sun zama ginshikin da ya canza Masarautar Habsburg zuwa kasa ta zamani.

Mulkin Maria Theresa ya kasance lokaci mai mahimmanci wanda ya canza Masarautar Habsburg daga kasa mai tsarin feudal na zamanin da zuwa kasa ta zamani mai tsarin mulki na tsakiya. A matsayinta na mai mulkin kama-karya mai wayewa, ta aiwatar da manyan gyare-gyare a fadin kasar, ciki har da soja, gudanarwa, kudi, da ilimi, don karfafa karfin daular da kuma kafa tushe mai karfi don gaba. Ko da yake ta sha wahalar rasa Silesia, ta kare hadin kan yankin daular Habsburg kuma ta karfafa matsayinta a matsayin babbar kasa a Turai. Daga cikin 'ya'yanta 16, akwai Joseph II da Leopold II, wadanda suka zama Sarakunan Daular Roman Mai Tsarki, da kuma Marie Antoinette, Sarauniyar Faransa, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga zuriyar sarauta a Turai. Ruhun gyare-gyare na Maria Theresa da jagorancinta mai karfi sun yi tasiri sosai ga sarakunan Habsburg na gaba, kuma har yanzu suna da zurfin tasiri a kan samuwar asalin Austria da gadon al'adunta a yau. Ayyukanta ana kwatanta su da mulkin sauran sarakunan kama-karya masu wayewa na zamaninta, kamar Catherine II na Rasha ko Frederick II na Prussia, kuma suna zama muhimmin ma'auni don fahimtar canje-canje a Turai a karni na 18.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Maria Theresa ita ce mace mai mulki daya tilo a Masarautar Habsburg a karni na 18, wacce ta zamantar da daular ta hanyar manyan gyare-gyare.
key_achievements: Cin nasara a Yakin Gadon Sarautar Austria
Manyan gyare-gyare a fannin soja, gudanarwa, ilimi, da sauransu
Kafa ginshikin zamantar da Masarautar Habsburg
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gyare-gyarenta sun yi tasiri sosai ga kafa asalin Austria da ci gaban kasa ta zamani.

parsed.narrative:
Boudica (an haife ta kusan shekara ta 30 AD) sarauniya ce kuma jagorar sojoji na kabilar Iceni a tsohuwar Biritaniya, wadda ke karkashin mulkin Daular Roma a tsakiyar karni na 1. Ta jagoranci wata babbar tawaye ga Roma a shekara ta 60 ko 61 AD. A lokacin, Biritaniya tana cikin tsarin zama lardin Daular Roma bayan mamayar Sarkin sarakuna Claudius a shekara ta 43 AD, kuma yawancin kabilun asali sun mika wuya ko sun kulla kawance da karfin sojan Roma mai girma. Kabilar Iceni na ɗaya daga cikin kabilun da suka fara kulla kawance da Roma kuma suka ji daɗin wani matakin cin gashin kai. Boudica matar Sarki Prasutagus ce na kabilar Iceni, kuma ta gaji jinin sarauta, tana da matsayi mai ƙarfi da tasiri a cikin kabilar. Rayuwarta ta fara ne a tsakiyar wani lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali inda burin Roma na faɗaɗa mulki ya yi karo da sha'awar 'yanci na 'yan asalin Biritaniya. An girmama ta saboda halinta mai ƙarfi da jaruntaka, kuma daga baya ta zama alamar ruhin juriya marar yankewa ga zaluncin Roma.

Mutuwar Prasutagus ta zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya kawo karshen zaman lafiya tsakanin kabilar Iceni da Daular Roma. Wasiyyarsa ta yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye 'yancin kai na kabilar ta hanyar raba mulkin tsakanin Sarkin sarakuna na Roma da 'ya'yansa mata biyu, amma Roma ta yi watsi da wannan kuma ta yi ƙoƙarin haɗa kan yankin Iceni gaba ɗaya. Jami'an Roma sun kwace dukiyar Iceni, sun yi wa Sarauniya Boudica bulala a bainar jama'a, kuma sun yi wa 'ya'yanta mata biyu fyade, wanda hakan ya zama wani mummunan aiki. Wannan tsananin cin mutunci da zalunci ya haifar da fushi mai zurfi da sha'awar ramuwar gayya a zuciyar Boudica, kuma ta yanke shawarar yakar zaluncin Roma. Ba wai kawai kabilar Iceni ba, har ma da sauran kabilun Biritaniya kamar Trinovantes, waɗanda ba su gamsu da mulkin Roma ba, sun fara taruwa a ƙarƙashin tutar Boudica, wanda hakan ya nuna farkon wani babban motsi na juriya ga Daular Roma. Boudica ta yi kira ga mutanenta da su yi gwagwarmaya don dawo da 'yancinsu da mutuncinsu, kuma ta zama jagorar wata ƙungiyar sojoji mai ƙarfi da za ta yi yaƙi da zaluncin Roma.

Kabilun Biritaniya da suka haɗu sun fara wata babbar tawaye ga Daular Roma a kusan shekara ta 60 ko 61 AD, a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Boudica. Sun kai hari kuma sun ƙone Camulodunum (yanzu Colchester), babban birnin Roma na farko, sun kashe 'yan ƙasar Roma, kuma sun rushe ikon alama na Roma. Bayan haka, Biritaniya sun lalata Londinium (yanzu London) da Verulamium (yanzu St Albans), waɗanda su ne cibiyoyin kasuwanci a lokacin, suna mai lalata manyan sansanonin Roma. A cikin wannan tsari, Romawa da yawa da Biritaniya masu haɗin gwiwa da Roma sun rasa rayukansu, kuma sojojin Boudica sun matsa wa sojojin Roma da ƙarfi. Duk da haka, Gwamnan Biritaniya na lokacin, Gaius Suetonius Paulinus, ya dawo daga Gaul kuma ya sake shirya rundunonin Roma masu ƙarfi, kuma ya yi yaƙi na ƙarshe da manyan sojojin Boudica a wani wuri mai mahimmanci. Duk da yawan su, Biritaniya sun sha mummunan kashi saboda dabarun sojan Roma da makamansu, kuma a wannan yaƙin, tawayen Boudica ya ci tura. Bayan shan kashi, an ce Boudica ta ƙi a kama ta a matsayin fursuna kuma ta sha guba ko kuma ta mutu daga rashin lafiya.

Ko da yake tawayen Boudica ya ci tura a gaban ƙarfin sojan Daular Roma, juriyarta mai jaruntaka ta yi tasiri sosai ga yadda Roma ke mulkin Biritaniya. Roma daga baya ta sake nazarin manufofinta game da Biritaniya kuma ta gabatar da tsarin mulki mai laushi. Duk da shan kashi, an tuna da Boudica tsawon ƙarnuka a matsayin jarumar ƙasa ta Biritaniya kuma alamar gwagwarmaya don adalci da 'yanci. Labarinta yana wakiltar ruhin juriya marar yankewa ga zalunci, kuma musamman a zamanin Victoria, an sake haskaka ta a matsayin jagorar mata mai ƙarfi, wadda aka kwatanta da Sarauniya Elizabeth I da Sarauniya Victoria, waɗanda su ne sarakunan alama na Daular Biritaniya. Har zuwa yau, Boudica tana rayuwa a cikin adabi, fasaha, da al'adun gargajiya a matsayin jigon sha'awar 'yanci da ruhin juriya. Ruhinta marar yankewa alama ce ta juriya ga zalunci, kuma ana tuna ta tare da mutanen da suka yi sha'awar 'yanci a wasu lokuta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Boudica sarauniya ce ta kabilar Iceni a tsohuwar Biritaniya a tsakiyar karni na 1, wadda ta jagoranci wata babbar tawaye ga Daular Roma.
key_achievements: Jagorancin wata babbar tawaye ga Daular Roma
Lalata garuruwan Roma kamar Camulodunum da Londinium
Girmamawa a matsayin jarumar ƙasa ta Biritaniya da alamar juriya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta har zuwa yau a matsayin jarumar ƙasa ta Biritaniya kuma alamar gwagwarmaya don adalci da 'yanci.

parsed.narrative:
Zheng Yi Sao (鄭一嫂, an haife ta a kusan 1775) shugabar 'yan fashin teku ce ta kasar Sin ta almara wacce ta mamaye tekun Kudancin China a farkon karni na 19. An san ainihin sunanta Shi Yang (石陽), kuma an haife ta a lokacin daular Qing mai cike da rudani, lokacin da rayuwar jama'a ke cikin kunci saboda cin hanci da rashawa na jami'ai da kuma mamayar kasashen Yamma. A wancan lokacin, yankin gabar tekun Guangdong ya cika da ayyukan fashin teku don rayuwa, tare da kananan kungiyoyin 'yan fashin teku da yawa da ke haifar da rudani. Zheng Yi Sao ta girma a cikin talauci kuma ta yi aiki a gidan karuwai a Guangdong, sannan ta shiga duniyar fashin teku a shekara ta 1801 lokacin da ta auri Zheng Yi (鄭一), shugaban Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag (紅旗艦隊), wacce ita ce babbar kungiyar 'yan fashin teku a lokacin. Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag ta yi aiki a tekun Kudancin China, tana kwashe jiragen kasuwanci da kauyukan gabar teku, kuma wani lokaci tana fuskantar sojojin gwamnati, inda ta tara dukiya da iko mai yawa. Zheng Yi Sao ta bunkasa zurfin fahimtar yadda ake gudanar da kungiyar 'yan fashin teku da dabarun ta a karkashin inuwar mijinta. Tun daga wannan lokacin ne basirarta ta musamman da halinta mai karfi suka fara fitowa fili.

Babban sauyi a rayuwar Zheng Yi Sao ya zo ne a shekara ta 1807, lokacin da mijinta Zheng Yi ya mutu a wani hatsari ba zato ba tsammani a gabar tekun Vietnam. Mutuwar mijinta ba zato ba tsammani ta haifar da babbar matsala ga Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag. Babban hadin gwiwar 'yan fashin teku ya fara nuna alamun rabuwa zuwa bangarori daban-daban, wanda hakan zai iya haifar da rugujewar kungiyar. Amma Zheng Yi Sao ta mai da wannan matsala zuwa dama don kafa jagorancinta. Ta kulla kawance mai dabara da Zhang Baozai (張保仔), wanda shine dan riko na mijinta kuma mataimaki mai basira, kuma ta hanyar wannan kawance, ta hau kan kujerar babbar shugabar Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag. Ta fara jagorantar 'yan fashin teku ba kawai a matsayin magajiyar mijinta ba, amma a matsayin shugaba mai iko da kwarjini na kanta. Zheng Yi Sao ta kafa dokoki da ka'idoji masu tsauri a cikin rundunar don sarrafa fashin teku da tashin hankali na 'yan fashin teku, kuma ta mai da hankali kan karfafa hadin kan kungiyar. Wadannan matakan sun zama ginshikin da ya sa Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag ta zama babbar rundunar teku, ba kawai kungiyar 'yan fashin teku ba.

A karkashin jagorancin Zheng Yi Sao, Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag ta kai kololuwar ikonta. Ta jagoranci kimanin jiragen ruwa 1,800 da 'yan fashin teku 80,000, inda ta mamaye tekun Kudancin China. Dokokin 'yan fashin teku da ta kafa sun kasance masu tsauri sosai, sun hada da raba ganima daidai, girmama mata fursunoni, da kuma hukunci mai tsanani ga rashin biyayya ga umarni. Godiya ga wannan kiyaye tsari, Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag ta iya ci gaba da samun karfin yaki mai girma, kuma ta yi nasara a kan sojojin ruwa na Qing da kuma rundunonin kasashen Yamma kamar Portugal da Birtaniya a lokuta da yawa. Musamman a shekara ta 1809, ta samu babbar nasara a kan hadin gwiwar rundunonin Qing da Portugal, inda ta nuna karfinta. Amma saboda ci gaba da matsin lamba daga gwamnatin Qing da kuma karuwar shigar kasashen Yamma, Zheng Yi Sao ta fara neman mafita mai ma'ana maimakon ci gaba da fuskantar su na dogon lokaci. A shekara ta 1810, ta amince da shawarar afuwa da gwamnatin Qing ta bayar, inda ta nuna bajintar tattaunawa mai ban mamaki. Ta samu yarjejeniyar da ba a taba gani ba, inda ita da 'yan fashin teku suka sami afuwa ga dukkan laifukansu, ba a kwace musu dukiya ba, har ma an ba wa wasu 'yan fashin teku damar shiga cikin sojojin gwamnati.

Bayan tattaunawa mai nasara, an rubuta Zheng Yi Sao a tarihi a matsayin shugabar 'yan fashin teku daya tilo da ta yi ritaya daga aikin fashin teku cikin lumana. Bayan ritayarta, ta yi sauran rayuwarta tana gudanar da gidan caca a lardin Guangdong, kuma ta mutu a shekara ta 1844 tana da shekaru 69. Rayuwarta shaida ce mai karfi na yadda mace za ta iya jagorantar babbar kungiya da kuma yin amfani da iko a cikin al'ummar da maza suka mamaye a wancan lokacin. Zheng Yi Sao ba kawai 'yar fashin teku ba ce, ana kallonta a matsayin mai tsara dabaru, mai tattaunawa, kuma mai jagoranci mai karfi. Labarinta ya zama abin koyi ga littattafai, fina-finai, wasan kwaikwayo, da wasannin bidiyo da yawa, kuma har yau ana ci gaba da fada. Musamman ruhun ta mai karfi da jagorancin ta da ya wuce zamani ana sake haskaka ta a matsayin alamar jagorancin mata a cikin al'ummar zamani. Labarinta ana ci gaba da fassara shi ta hanyoyi daban-daban, ana kwatanta shi da rayuwar sauran 'yan fashin teku na zamaninta ko kuma shugabannin mata da suka rayu a lokacin da ke cike da rudani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Zheng Yi Sao shugabar 'yan fashin teku ce ta kasar Sin a farkon karni na 19 a lokacin daular Qing, wacce ta jagoranci babbar rundunar 'yan fashin teku a tekun Kudancin China kuma ta yi yaki da sojojin gwamnati.
key_achievements: Ta yi aiki a matsayin babbar shugabar Rundunar Jiragen Ruwa ta Red Flag a tekun Kudancin China.
Ta jagoranci jiragen ruwa 1,800 da 'yan fashin teku 80,000, inda ta nuna karfinta.
Ta yi nasara a kan sojojin gwamnatin Qing da kuma sojojin kasashen Yamma.
Ta yi ritaya daga aikin fashin teku cikin lumana bayan tattaunawa mai nasara.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin shugabar 'yan fashin teku mace mafi nasara a tarihi, kuma ta ci gaba da zama abin koyi ga jagorancin mata da ruhun da ba ya karyawa har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Askia Mohammad I (Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr al-Turi, 1443-1538) shi ne sarki na farko na daular Askia kuma babban mai cin nasara wanda ya jagoranci Daular Songhai ta Yammacin Afirka zuwa ga wadata daga ƙarshen karni na 15 zuwa farkon karni na 16. Yammacin Afirka a tsakiyar karni na 15, lokacin da aka haife shi, yana fuskantar canje-canje masu ban sha'awa, inda al'adu daban-daban da hanyoyin kasuwanci suka haɗu a kewayen hamadar Sahara mai fadi da kuma kwari mai albarka na kogin Neja. Ko da yake Daular Songhai ta riga ta yi tasiri sosai, hawan Askia Mohammad ya buɗe sabon babi a tarihin Yammacin Afirka, yana jagorantar daular zuwa girman da ba a taba gani ba da wadata. Ya yi mulki daga 1493 zuwa 1528, kuma an kira shi 'Askia Mai Girma', wanda ke nuna girman nasarorinsa. Sunansa na asali shi ne Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr al-Turi, kuma a yaren Songhai na zamani ana kiransa Mammar Kassey. Wannan lokaci ne da wayewar Musulunci ta yi zurfi a Yammacin Afirka, kuma ilimi da kasuwanci suna gudana sosai. Askia Mohammad yana da hangen nesa na fitar da cikakken damar daular a cikin wannan yanayin na tarihi.

Askia Mohammad ya kafa daular Askia ta hanyar tabbatar da mulkinsa a kan Daular Songhai a shekara ta 1493. Babban juyin juya hali a farkon mulkinsa shi ne fadada yankin daular sosai da kuma karfafa cikin gida. Ya yi niyyar gina daula mafi girma a tarihin Yammacin Afirka, kuma don cimma wannan, ya mai da hankali kan karfafa karfin soja da kafa ingantattun tsarin gudanarwa. A lokacin da mulkinsa ya kai kololuwa, Daular Songhai ta mallaki yankuna masu fadi, har zuwa Kano, yankin jihohin Hausa a arewacin Najeriya a yau, da kuma yawancin yankunan gabas da ke karkashin Daular Songhai. Wannan fadada yankin ya wuce cin nasara kawai; aiki ne mai rikitarwa na haɗa kan al'adu da kabilu daban-daban a cikin daular da kuma kafa tushe mai dorewa don mulki. Ya yi amfani da Shari'a, dokar Musulunci, a matsayin ka'idar mulki don kafa tsarin zamantakewa, kuma ya yi ƙoƙari ya daidaita rayuwar jama'a ta hanyar amfani da tsarin dokoki guda ɗaya a duk faɗin daular. Waɗannan manufofin sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka haɗin kai na daular da kuma karfafa ikonsa.

Mulkin Askia Mohammad ya kasance lokacin ci gaban wayewa wanda ya wuce fadada yankin kawai. Ya fuskanci gwaji da kalubale masu yawa yayin da yake aiwatar da manufofi daban-daban don wadatar daular. Musamman ma, ya mai da hankali kan fadada kasuwanci da Turai da Asiya cikin sauri don ci gaban tattalin arziki. Ya sake tsara hanyoyin kasuwanci na Trans-Sahara, kuma ya bunkasa manyan birane kamar Timbuktu da Jenne zuwa cibiyoyin kasuwanci da ilimi, wanda ya kawo arziki mai yawa ga daular. Wannan farfadowar kasuwanci ba kawai ya karfafa kudaden daular ba ne, har ma ya zama wata dama ta inganta mu'amala da kasashen waje. Bugu da kari, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen kafa Musulunci a matsayin wani muhimmin bangare na daular da kuma karfafa ilimin Musulunci da ilimi. Ya kafa makarantu da jami'o'in Musulunci da yawa a birane daban-daban, ciki har da Timbuktu, don horar da masana da tallafawa binciken ilimi. Wannan ya sanya Daular Songhai ta zama cibiyar ilimin Musulunci a Yammacin Afirka, inda masana da dalibai da yawa suka taru. Waɗannan kokarinsa sun zama muhimmiyar mataki don haɓaka matakin al'adu da ilimi na daular.

Mulkin Askia Mohammad I ya kawo zamanin zinariya ga Daular Songhai, kuma gadonsa ya bar alama mai dorewa a tarihin Yammacin Afirka. Ya gina tsarin gudanarwa don mulkin yankuna masu fadi yadda ya kamata, kuma ya yi ƙoƙari ya samar da al'umma mai adalci bisa ga dokar Musulunci. A karkashin jagorancinsa, Daular Songhai ta cimma zaman lafiya na siyasa, wadata ta tattalin arziki, da ci gaban al'adu da ilimi a lokaci guda. Musamman ma, karfafa ilimin Musulunci da kafa cibiyoyin ilimi suna ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a tarihin ilimi na Yammacin Afirka har zuwa yau. Ko da yake mulkinsa ya ƙare a 1528, kuma bayan mutuwarsa a 1538, Daular Songhai ta fara raguwa a hankali, tushen daular da ya gina da kuma gadon al'adunsa sun dore na dogon lokaci. Askia Mohammad I ana tunawa da shi ba kawai a matsayin mai cin nasara ba, har ma a matsayin babban mai gyara da mai gina wayewa. Salon mulkinsa da hangen nesansa na gina daula ana kwatanta su da nasarorin wasu manyan sarakunan Musulunci kamar Mansa Musa na Yammacin Afirka da Saladin na Masar, suna samar da muhimmin babi a tarihin Afirka tare da gadonsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Askia Mohammad I ya kasance mai mulkin Daular Songhai a ƙarshen karni na 15, wanda ya gina daula mafi girma a tarihin Yammacin Afirka kuma ya bunƙasa al'adun Musulunci.
key_achievements: Ya fadada Daular Songhai zuwa daula mafi girma a Yammacin Afirka
Ya fadada kasuwanci da Turai da Asiya cikin sauri
Ya kafa makarantu da yawa don karfafa ilimin Musulunci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa ya kawo zamanin zinariya ga Daular Songhai, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a ci gaban siyasa, tattalin arziki, da al'adu na Yammacin Afirka.

parsed.narrative:
Abu Rayhan Muhammad ibn Ahmad Al-Biruni (an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 973) wani masanin kimiyya ne kuma mai ilimi mai yawa daga Khwarazm na Iran a zamanin zinare na Musulunci, wanda ya bayar da gudunmawa mai girma a fannoni da dama kamar ilmin taurari, lissafi, ilmin kasa, likitanci, tarihi, da kuma ilmin addinan kwatance. A karshen karni na 10, lokacin da aka haife shi, yankin Asiya ta Tsakiya ya kasance lokacin da wayewar Musulunci ta kai kololuwarta kuma binciken ilimi ya yi fice. Khwarazm, wanda ke kudancin Tekun Aral, ya kasance wani muhimmin wuri mai mahimmanci inda wayewar Gabas da Yamma suka hadu, kamar wata tukunyar narkewa ta ilimi inda al'adu da ra'ayoyi daban-daban suka hade. A cikin wannan yanayi, Al-Biruni tun yana karami ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga ilimi da kuma baiwa ta musamman. Ya sami ilimi daga manyan masana na zamaninsa a garinsu na Kath, kuma ya fara nuna bajinta musamman a fannin ilmin taurari da lissafi. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance cike da kishirwa ta ilimi duk da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa, kuma wannan ya zama tushen nasarorin ilimi da ya samu a nan gaba. Baya ga samun ilimi kawai, ya kafa nasa tsarin ilimi na musamman, inda yake yin tambayoyi game da ka'idojin da aka riga aka kafa kuma yana binciken gaskiya ta hanyar lura kai tsaye da gwaje-gwaje.

Daya daga cikin muhimman sauye-sauye a tafiyar ilimi ta Al-Biruni shine abin da ya faru a kusan shekara ta 1017, lokacin da Sultan Mahmud na daular Ghaznavid ya sa aka mayar da shi Ghazni. Ya yi aiki a matsayin masanin kimiyya a fadar Sultan kuma ya sami damar raka shi a balaguron Indiya, wanda ya zama wata dama ta fadada duniyar iliminsa zuwa sabon fanni na Indiya. Ya zauna a Indiya tsawon shekaru, ya koyi harshen Sanskrit kuma ya yi nazari mai zurfi kan littattafan Hindu, falsafa, kimiyya, da tsarin zamantakewa. A cikin wannan tsari, ya rubuta littafinsa na farko mai suna 『Tahqiq ma li l-Hind』, wanda ya yi nazari kan al'adun Indiya da addinai ta hanyar da ba ta nuna son kai ba kuma a tsari, daga mahangar waje. An yaba masa da cewa ya kafa tushen **Indology**, wanda hakan ya sa aka kira shi 'mahaifin Indology'. Bugu da kari, ya gabatar da nasa tsarin nazari na musamman don kwatanta da nazarin addinai da al'adu daban-daban, wanda ya sa aka ba shi taken 'mahaifin ilmin addinan kwatance'. Wadannan bincikensa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen zurfafa fahimtar wayewar Indiya a duniyar Musulunci a lokacin.

Baya ga zurfin bincikensa a Indiya, Al-Biruni ya bar manyan nasarori a fannin kimiyya. Ana kiransa mahaifin **geodesy na zamani**, wato ilmin auna girman da siffar duniya. Al-Biruni ya kirkiro wata hanya ta musamman don lissafin da'irar duniya daidai gwargwado ta amfani da trigonometry. Har ila yau, a fannin ilmin taurari, ya tattauna yiwuwar juyawar duniya, kuma ya nuna hangen nesa wanda ya yi hasashen tunanin Copernican, kamar yadda ya lura da motsin rana da wata daidai gwargwado kuma ya tsara jadawalin taurari. A fannin lissafi, ya bunkasa trigonometry; a fannin ilmin ma'adanai, ya auna kuma ya rarraba nau'ikan ma'adanai daban-daban; kuma a fannin ilmin magunguna, ya rubuta tasirin ganyen magani, don haka ya ba da gudummawa ga tarin ilimi mai amfani. Wadannan bincikensa ba kawai ka'idoji ba ne, amma sun nuna kololuwar tsarin ilimi na zamaninsa, kasancewar an gina su ne akan lura daidai, gwaje-gwaje, da kuma lissafin lissafi. Ya yada dimbin iliminsa da sakamakon bincikensa ga tsararraki masu zuwa ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa masu yawa, kuma ayyukansa sun zama muhimman bayanai ga masana a duniyar Musulunci da Turai tsawon karnoni.

Al-Biruni ya rasu a kusan shekara ta 1048, amma gadonsa na ilimi ya wuce zamani kuma yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi har zuwa yau. Baya ga tarin ilimi kawai, ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa tsarin kimiyya wanda ke jaddada tunani mai zurfi da kuma shaidar gwaji. Littattafansa suna wakiltar nasarorin ilimi na wayewar Musulunci ta tsakiya, kuma sun taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin gada mai muhimmanci don musayar ilimi tsakanin Gabas da Yamma. Musamman ma, manyan nasarorin da ya samu a fannin ilmin addinan kwatance, Indology, geodesy, da anthropology sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen ilimi na zamani. Ana kuma kiransa 'masanin ilmin dan Adam na farko', saboda halinsa na kokarin lura da rubuta al'adu da al'ummomi ba tare da nuna son kai ba. Rayuwa da nasarorin Al-Biruni sun kasance wani muhimmin tarihi a tarihin ilimin dan Adam, tare da sauran manyan masana na zamanin zinare na Musulunci, kamar Ibn Sina da Al-Khwarizmi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Biruni wani masanin kimiyya ne mai ilimi mai yawa daga Khwarazm a zamanin zinare na Musulunci, wanda ya kafa tushen Indology, geodesy, da ilmin addinan kwatance.
key_achievements: An kira shi mahaifin Indology
Ya auna da'irar duniya daidai gwargwado
Ya kafa tushen ilmin addinan kwatance
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa mai zurfi da tsarin gwaji sun yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban kimiyya da ilimin dan Adam na zamani.

parsed.narrative:
William Harvey likita ne, masanin ilimin halittar jiki (anatomist), kuma masanin ilimin aikin jiki (physiologist) na Ingila wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1578. An haife shi a Folkestone, Kent, a lokacin da Turai ke fuskantar sauye-sauye na ilimi, a ƙarshen Renaissance da farkon juyin juya halin kimiyya. Ko da yake koyarwar Galen, likitan Girka na da, har yanzu tana da rinjaye, sabbin ra'ayoyi sun fara fitowa don kalubalantar ka'idojin da aka saba. Harvey ya sami ilimin farko a King's School, Canterbury, sannan ya yi karatu a Gonville da Caius College, Jami'ar Cambridge. Amma abin da ya fi tasiri ga ci gaban iliminsa shi ne karatunsa a Jami'ar Padua mai daraja a Italiya. Wannan wuri cibiya ce ta ilimin likitanci da binciken ilimin halittar jiki, inda Harvey ya koyi fasahohin binciken jiki masu inganci da kuma lura da bawuloli na jijiyoyin jini a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Hieronymus Fabricius, majagaba a fannin ilimin halittar jiki. Wannan lokaci ya kafa tushen ilimi don hangen nesansa na juyin juya hali game da jikin ɗan adam.

A wancan lokacin, likitocin sun yi imani da ka'idar Galen, likitan Girka na da, fiye da shekaru 1,400, wato cewa jini yana samuwa a hanta kuma yana ƙarewa a kowane sashi na jiki, kuma jini yana gudana ta cikin zuciya ta hanyar ramuka marasa ganuwa. Amma William Harvey ya fara shakkar wannan ra'ayi na gargajiya. Yayin da yake aiki a matsayin likita a Asibitin St Bartholomew da ke London, yana kula da marasa lafiya da yawa, kuma a matsayin malamin ilimin halittar jiki a Royal College of Physicians, ya sadaukar da kansa ga lura kai tsaye da gwaje-gwaje ta hanyar binciken jikin ɗan adam da na dabbobi. Harvey ya yi nazarin zukatan dabbobi, kuma ya maimaita gwaje-gwaje na ɗaure jijiyoyin jini (ligation experiments), yana nazarin yadda jini ke gudana ta hanyar adadi. A cikin wannan tsari, ya gane cewa zuciya ba kawai gabobin da ke dumama jini ba ce, amma tana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tura jini zuwa dukkan sassan jiki kamar famfo mai ƙarfi. Wannan wani juyin juya hali ne, cewa jini ba a samar da shi a hanta kuma a cinye shi ba, amma yana zagayawa cikin jiki duka daga zuciya, kuma shi ne na farko da ya bayyana dalla-dalla yadda zuciya ke tura jini zuwa kwakwalwa da sauran sassan jiki.

A shekara ta 1628, William Harvey ya buga littafinsa mai tarihi, 'Exercitatio Anatomica de Motu Cordis et Sanguinis in Animalibus' (Game da motsin zuciya da jini a cikin dabbobi), wanda ke ɗauke da sakamakon bincikensa mai ban mamaki. Wannan littafi ya bayyana dalla-dalla kuma a kimiyance ka'idar 'zagayawar jini a cikin jiki duka', wato yadda jini ke fita daga zuciya ta jijiyoyin jini (arteries) zuwa dukkan sassan jiki, sannan ya dawo zuwa zuciya ta jijiyoyin jini (veins). Da'awarsa ta haifar da babban girgiza a tsakanin likitocin da suka yi imani da ka'idar Galen, kuma ya fuskanci shakku da suka daga abokan aikinsa likitoci da yawa. Wasu sun zarge shi da cewa shi 'mai zagayawa' (circulator), wato mai zamba, kuma sun yi ƙoƙarin ɓata masa suna. Amma Harvey bai girgiza ba. A matsayinsa na likitan sarakuna James I da Charles I, ya sami kariya daga masarauta kuma ya ci gaba da bincikensa, yana kare da'awarsa ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje marasa yankewa da hujjoji masu ma'ana. Ko da yake ya fuskanci ƙalubalen rasa wasu daga cikin kayan bincikensa saboda Yaƙin Basasa na Ingila, ƙoƙarinsa marar yankewa da tsaurin kimiyya sun yi nasarar bayyana hasken gaskiya a ƙarshe.

Ka'idar zagayawar jini ta William Harvey ta canza fahimtar ilimin aikin jiki na ɗan adam sosai, kuma ta zama ɗaya daga cikin muhimman tushe na likitancin zamani. Bincikensa ya bayyana cewa zuciya ita ce cibiyar da ke zagayawa da jini, kuma ta sake fasalta ayyukan jijiyoyin jini (arteries) da jijiyoyin jini (veins), wanda ya kawo ci gaba mai juyin juya hali a fannin ilimin halittar jiki da ilimin aikin jiki. Ko da yake bai lura da kasancewar jijiyoyin jini masu laushi (capillaries) kai tsaye ba (wanda Marcello Malpighi ya gano daga baya), ra'ayinsa na tsarin zagayawa da aka rufe ya kafa muhimmancin hanyoyin kimiyya kamar gwaji, lura, da nazarin adadi a binciken likitanci. Ayyukan Harvey sun wuce gano likitanci kawai, sun zama alamar ruhin kimiyya na zamani wanda ke kalubalantar ikon makafi da kuma ba da muhimmanci ga shaidar gwaji. Hanyar kimiyya ta Harvey ta yi daidai da falsafar empiricism da Francis Bacon ya gabatar a lokacin, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyya na zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William Harvey likita ne kuma masanin ilimin aikin jiki na Ingila a karni na 17, wanda ya fara gano ka'idar zagayawar jini.
key_achievements: Gano ka'idar zagayawar jini a cikin jiki duka
Tabbatar da aikin famfo na zuciya a kimiyance
Rubuta littafin 'Exercitatio Anatomica de Motu Cordis et Sanguinis in Animalibus'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gano-ganonsa sun kafa tushen likitancin zamani kuma sun tabbatar da muhimmancin hanyoyin kimiyya.

parsed.narrative:
Joseph Priestley (1733-1804) ya kasance masanin falsafar halitta, masanin kimiyya, masanin tauhidi, kuma masanin siyasa na Burtaniya a karni na 18, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai girma a fannoni daban-daban a cikin guguwar ilimi ta zamanin Haskakawa. An haife shi a Yorkshire a shekara ta 1733, ya girma a cikin iyalin Calvinist, amma a hankali ya karkata zuwa tauhidin Unitarian, inda ya zama fasto marar bin doka. A wancan lokacin, al'ummar Burtaniya na fuskantar karuwar binciken kimiyya da sha'awar 'yancin addini, tare da farkon juyin juya halin masana'antu. Priestley ya yi aiki a matsayin malami a Kwalejin Warrington, inda ya yi nazarin fannoni daban-daban ciki har da ilimin harshe, tarihi, da falsafa, yana nuna sha'awa ta musamman ga kimiyyar halitta. Bincikensa na farko ya fara ne da nazarin abubuwan lantarki, wanda ya zama muhimmin mataki ga aikinsa na gaba a fannin binciken iskar gas. Bai tsaya kawai a matsayin malamin addini ba, amma ya nemi ya rushe iyakokin al'ummar masu ilimi na zamani kuma ya buɗe sabbin sararin ilimi. Wannan tushe ya zama tushen ra'ayoyinsa masu tsattsauran ra'ayi a kimiyya, addini, da siyasa.

Mafi muhimmancin juyin juya hali a rayuwar Joseph Priestley ya zo ne lokacin da ya fara bincike mai zurfi kan iskar gas ('airs'). A ranar 1 ga Agusta, 1774, ya yi nasarar ware wata sabuwar iska ta hanyar dumama mercuric oxide. Wannan iska tana da ikon tallafawa konewa sosai da kuma inganta numfashin dabbobi, kuma Priestley ya kira ta 'iska mai cire phlogiston' (dephlogisticated air). Wannan shine gano sinadarin da muke kira 'oxygen' a yanzu, wanda ake la'akari da shi ɗaya daga cikin mahimman abubuwan da aka gano a tarihin kimiyya. Gano oxygen ya zama wani haske mai haskaka duhun ka'idar phlogiston da ke mamaye a lokacin, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga kafa kimiyyar zamani ta Antoine Lavoisier. Baya ga oxygen, ya ware kuma ya bayyana halayen wasu iskar gas da yawa, ciki har da carbon dioxide (gano hanyar yin ruwan soda), nitrous oxide, ammonia, da hydrogen chloride, don haka ya taka rawar gani a kimiyyar iskar gas. Waɗannan nasarorin kimiyya sun ɗaga shi zuwa matsayin manyan masana kimiyya na zamaninsa.

Duk da haka, ra'ayoyin addini da siyasa masu tsattsauran ra'ayi na Joseph Priestley sun jefa shi cikin wani kogi na gwagwarmaya. A matsayinsa na Unitarian, ya ƙi koyarwar Triniti kuma ya yi kira ga haƙurin addini, yana goyon bayan juyin juya halin Faransa da kuma ba da shawarar gyaran siyasa a Burtaniya. Waɗannan ra'ayoyin sun fuskanci adawa mai ƙarfi a cikin al'ummar Burtaniya masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a lokacin. Musamman ma, an yi amfani da halartarsa a wani liyafar tunawa da juyin juya halin Faransa a shekara ta 1791 a matsayin hujja, inda aka yi tarzoma a Birmingham, wanda ya kai ga lalata gidansa, dakin gwaje-gwajensa, da cocinsa. Wannan lamari an san shi da 'Tarzomar Priestley' kuma ya haifar da babbar barna, inda aka rasa duk kayan bincikensa da kayan aiki. Ko da a cikin guguwar tsanantawa da keɓewar jama'a, bai taɓa yin kasa a gwiwa ba a cikin imaninsa, amma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1794, ya yi hijira zuwa Amurka don neman 'yancin addini da siyasa. Da ya zauna a Northumberland, Pennsylvania, ya ci gaba da gwagwarmayar ilimi a duk tsawon rayuwarsa, yana gudanar da binciken kimiyya da rubuce-rubucen tauhidi.

Joseph Priestley ana tunawa da shi a matsayin ginshiƙin da ya kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani ta hanyar gano oxygen. Bincikensa na iskar gas ya kawo juyin juya hali a fahimtar konewa da numfashi kuma ya zama fitila mai haskaka hanyar masana kimiyya marasa adadi na gaba. Haka kuma, ya kasance mai tunani na farko wanda ya yi kira ga haƙurin addini da 'yancin ɗan adam, yana ƙoƙarin cimma manufofin zamanin Haskakawa. Tauhidinsa na Unitarian yana ci gaba da tasiri ga waɗanda ke neman 'yancin addini da imani mai ma'ana a yau. Rayuwar Priestley ta kasance alama ce ta sha'awar ci gaban kimiyya da gyaran zamantakewa marar yankewa, wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da nasarorin masu tunani na zamanin Haskakawa na lokacinsa, kamar Benjamin Franklin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Joseph Priestley masanin kimiyya ne kuma masanin tauhidi na Burtaniya a karni na 18, wanda ya gano oxygen kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban kimiyyar iskar gas.
key_achievements: Gano Oxygen (iska mai cire phlogiston)
Gano hanyar yin ruwan soda da binciken iskar gas
Kira ga haƙurin addini da gyaran siyasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gano oxygen da ya yi ya kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani, kuma ra'ayoyinsa na 'yancin addini suna ci gaba da tasiri har zuwa yau.

parsed.narrative:
Karl Linnaeus (1707-1778) shahararren masanin ilimin tsirrai kuma likita ne na Sweden a karni na 18, wanda ya kafa tushen rarraba halittu, kuma ana kiransa 'uban ilimin tsirrai na zamani'. An haife shi a ranar 23 ga Mayu, 1707, a Råshult, Småland, Sweden, ya sami tasiri daga mahaifinsa, Nils Linnaeus, wanda limami ne kuma mai sha'awar ilimin tsirrai, tun yana yaro ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga yanayi, musamman tsirrai. A lokacin, Turai tana cikin lokacin da sha'awar binciken yanayi ke ƙaruwa tare da zuwan Zamanin Haskakawa, amma babu wani tsarin da aka haɗa don rarraba da sanya suna ga halittu, wanda ya haifar da rudani mai zurfi. A cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, Linnaeus ya haɓaka sha'awar fahimtar tsarin yanayi da kuma ba kowane halitta suna bayyananne, wanda ya zama babban dalilin manyan nasarorinsa na gaba. Ya yi karatun likitanci a Jami'ar Lund da Jami'ar Uppsala, tare da gudanar da bincike kan ilimin tsirrai, kuma a ƙarƙashin jagorancin malaminsa, Olof Rudbeck the Younger, ya haɓaka nasa ra'ayoyin na musamman game da rarraba tsirrai.

Wani muhimmin juyi a tafiyar ilimin Linnaeus shine balaguron bincike zuwa yankin Lapland na arewacin Sweden a 1732. A cikin wannan yanayi mai tsanani, ya tattara kuma ya lura da tsirrai da dabbobi masu yawa da kansa, kuma ya fahimci yadda tsarin rarraba da ake da shi yake da rauni da kuma rashin tabbas. Wannan kwarewa ta ƙara tabbatar masa da buƙatar sabon tsarin da zai iya rarraba halittu a fili da kuma a hankali. Ya kirkiro 'tsarin rarraba jima'i' wanda ya dogara ne akan halayen gabobin haihuwa na tsirrai (stamens da pistils), kuma ya gabatar da 'binomial nomenclature' (tsarin suna biyu) wanda ke ba da sunan Latin mai sassa biyu (genus da species) ga kowane nau'in halitta. Tsarin sunaye biyu ya zama kayan aiki mai juyin juya hali wanda ya ba masana kimiyya damar sadarwa game da halittu da aka samu a yankuna daban-daban ba tare da rudani ba, ta hanyar ba da damar sanya suna ga nau'in halittu a duniya baki ɗaya. A wannan lokacin, babban tsarin yadda za a tsara dukkan rayuwa a cikin yanayi yana fitowa a cikin zuciyarsa, kamar wani babban zane mai ban mamaki.

A 1735, Linnaeus ya tafi Netherlands, inda ya buga bugu na farko na littafinsa mai tarihi, Systema Naturae. Wannan littafin ne ya fara gabatar da tsarin sunaye biyu da tsarin rarraba matakai (kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, species) ga duniya, kuma ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar kimiyya a lokacin. Daga baya, ya ci gaba da buga littattafai kamar Fundamenta Botanica (1736) da Genera Plantarum (1737), yana inganta ka'idodinsa da hanyoyinsa na rarraba halittu. Bayan ya dawo Sweden a 1738, da farko ya yi aiki a matsayin likita, amma a 1741, ya zama farfesa na likitanci a Jami'ar Uppsala, kuma a shekara mai zuwa, ya koma matsayin farfesa na ilimin tsirrai, inda ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga koyarwa da bincike. Ya mai da lambun tsirrai na Uppsala cibiyar binciken ilimin tsirrai ta duniya, kuma ya horar da ɗalibai da yawa, yana yada ra'ayoyinsa na rarraba halittu. Kokarinsa marar yankewa da nasarorin kimiyya sun kai shi ga samun daraja ta zama mai daraja daga Sarkin Sweden a 1761, inda ya sami sunan 'Karl Linnaeus'.

Tsarin sunaye biyu da tsarin rarraba matakai da Karl Linnaeus ya kafa ana ɗaukarsu ɗaya daga cikin muhimman sabbin abubuwa a tarihin ilimin halittu. Tsarin nasa ya samar da tushe mai mahimmanci ga masana ilimin halittu a duniya don fahimtar da kuma bincika bambancin rayuwa a tsari, kuma har yau ana amfani da shi a matsayin tushen ilimin rarraba halittu na zamani. Godiya ga nasarorinsa, mun sami damar fahimtar matsayin kowane halitta a cikin yanayi mai rikitarwa a fili, da kuma bincika dangantakar da ke tsakaninsu. Linnaeus, fiye da mai rarraba halittu kawai, ya faɗaɗa hangen nesa na ɗan adam a matsayin babban masanin kimiyya wanda ya bayyana tsarin yanayi. Gadonsa ya zama muhimmin tushe ga masana kimiyyar halittu na gaba kamar Charles Darwin don fahimtar bambancin rayuwa da haɓaka ka'idar juyin halitta, wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da nasarorin wasu manyan masu bincike ko masana kimiyya na zamaninsa, waɗanda suka haskaka hanyar ilimi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Karl Linnaeus masanin ilimin tsirrai ne na Sweden a karni na 18 wanda ya kafa tushen rarraba halittu.
key_achievements: Kafa tsarin sunaye biyu (binomial nomenclature)
Kafa tsarin rarraba halittu na matakai (hierarchical classification)
Bugawa Systema Naturae
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin rarraba halittunsa ya zama tushen ilimin halittu na zamani kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga fahimtar tsarin rayuwa.

parsed.narrative:
Lise Meitner (an haife ta a 1878) wata masaniyar kimiyyar nukiliya ce 'yar ƙasar Austriya kuma 'yar ƙasar Sweden, kuma wata majagaba ce a fannin kimiyya wacce ta ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga gano fission nukiliya. An haife ta a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 a Vienna, babban birnin daular Austro-Hungary, a matsayin 'yar ta uku a cikin iyalin Yahudawa. A lokacin da damar samun ilimi mai zurfi ga mata ke da iyaka, ta haɓaka sha'awa mai zurfi ga ilimi. Tun tana ƙarama, ta nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin lissafi da kimiyya, amma ta fuskanci gaskiyar cewa ko shiga makarantar gymnasium ma yana da wahala. Duk da haka, ba ta karaya ba, ta kammala karatunta a makarantar masu zaman kansu kuma ta cancanci shiga Jami'ar Vienna, inda ta karanta Physics a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Ludwig Boltzmann a 1901. A shekara ta 1906, ta sami digirin digirgir na Physics a Jami'ar Vienna, ta zama mace ta biyu da ta yi hakan, kuma ta fara buɗe hanyar ilimi. Daga baya, ta koma Berlin kuma ta faɗaɗa fagen bincikenta ta hanyar halartar laccocin Max Planck, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin mataki da ya kai ga babban bincikenta a nan gaba.

A shekara ta 1907, Lise Meitner ta fara haɗin gwiwar bincike mai mahimmanci tare da masanin kimiyya Otto Hahn a Berlin. A lokacin, mata ba za su iya riƙe muƙamai na hukuma a Cibiyar Kaiser Wilhelm ba, don haka ta fara bincikenta a cikin ɗakin aikin katako na ginshiki, kuma ba ta karaya ba duk da ƙuntatawa da yawa. Meitner da Hahn sun yi gagarumar gudummawa a fannin radioactivity, musamman ma a shekara ta 1917, sun sami shahara a duniya ta hanyar gano isotope na sabon sinadarin rediyoaktif, protactinium. Binciken su ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen zurfafa fahimtar tsarin da canjin nukiliyar atom. A tsakiyar shekarun 1930, sun yi gwaje-gwaje, waɗanda binciken Fermi ya zaburar da su, don ƙirƙirar sabbin abubuwa na transuranic ta hanyar harba neutrons a uranium. A cikin wannan tsari, sun fuskanci sakamako marar tsammani, wanda shine farkon wani abu da zai kai ga ɗaya daga cikin mahimman binciken kimiyya a tarihin ɗan adam: fission nukiliya. Fission nukiliya yana nufin al'amarin da babban nukiliyar atom ke rabuwa zuwa nukiliya biyu ko fiye da ƙananan nukiliya, yana fitar da makamashi mai yawa.

Duk da haka, iskar Nazi mai ƙarfi da ta mamaye Turai a ƙarshen shekarun 1930 ta girgiza rayuwar Meitner gaba ɗaya. Kasancewarta 'yar asalin Yahudawa, ta ji barazanar rayuwarta lokacin da aka haɗa Austria da Jamus (Anschluss) a 1938, kuma a ƙarshe ta tilasta mata ta gudu zuwa Sweden. Ko da bayan gudun hijira, ta ci gaba da bincikenta ta hanyar musayar wasiƙu da Otto Hahn. A ƙarshen 1938, Hahn da Fritz Strassmann sun sami sakamako mai ban mamaki na gwaji cewa barium yana samuwa lokacin da aka harba neutrons a uranium, amma ba su iya fassara ma'anar daidai ba. Da ta sami labarin wannan a Sweden, Meitner, tare da ɗan yayanta Otto Robert Frisch, sun bayyana a ka'idar cewa wannan al'amari shine rabuwar nukiliyar uranium, wato fission nukiliya. Ta yi amfani da ka'idar daidaiton taro-makamashi ta Einstein (E=mc²) don lissafin makamashi mai yawa da aka saki a lokacin fission nukiliya, kuma tare da Frisch, sun fara amfani da kalmar 'fission nukiliya'. Wannan muhimmiyar fahimtar ka'idar ta buɗe kofa ga ɗan adam don shiga zamanin makamashin nukiliya.

Fassarar ka'idar fission nukiliya ta Lise Meitner wata nasara ce da za a tuna da ita a tarihin kimiyya, amma abin takaici an cire ta daga darajar samun lambar yabo ta Nobel a Chemistry. Lokacin da Otto Hahn ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel shi kaɗai a 1944, gudummawar Meitner ba a gane ta yadda ya kamata ba na dogon lokaci. Duk da haka, gudummawar kimiyyar ta ba ta taɓa raguwa ba. Gano fission nukiliya ya haifar da ci gaban bam ɗin atom, yana kawo babban ƙarfin halaka ga ɗan adam, amma Meitner ta ƙi shiga cikin ci gaban makaman nukiliya, tana mai jaddada alhakin ɗabi'a na masanin kimiyya. Ta goyi bayan amfani da makamashin nukiliya cikin lumana a duk rayuwarta, kuma ta sadaukar da kanta ga binciken kimiyya har zuwa rasuwarta a 1968 tana da shekaru 89. Sinadarin mai lamba 109, 'Meitnerium', wanda aka sanya mata suna, ya kasance alama ce ta har abada don girmama nasarorin ta. Rayuwa da nasarorin Lise Meitner suna ba da muhimmiyar mahallin don fahimtar gwagwarmaya da nasarorin masana kimiyya mata na zamani kamar Marie Curie da Irène Joliot-Curie.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Lise Meitner wata masaniyar kimiyyar nukiliya ce 'yar Austriya kuma 'yar Sweden a farkon da tsakiyar ƙarni na 20, wacce ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gano fission nukiliya.
key_achievements: Fassarar ka'idar al'amarin fission nukiliya
Haɗin gwiwar bincike kan abubuwan rediyoaktif tare da Otto Hahn
Gano isotope na protactinium
fact_box.legacy_statement: Binciken ta na fission nukiliya ya buɗe kofa ga zamanin nukiliya kuma ya bar muhimman tambayoyi game da ɗabi'ar kimiyya.

parsed.narrative:
Amalie Emmy Noether (1882-1935) wata fitacciyar masaniyar lissafi ce 'yar Jamus a farkon karni na 20, wacce ta kafa harsashin ilimin lissafi na abstract algebra kuma ta tabbatar da Ka'idar Noether, wacce ta bayyana muhimman ka'idojin kimiyyar lissafi, ta bar tarihi mai dorewa a fagen kimiyya. An haife ta a shekara ta 1882 a Erlangen, Jamus, 'yar fitaccen masanin lissafi Max Noether, ta nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin lissafi tun tana karama, duk da cewa damar ilimi ga mata tana da iyaka sosai a wancan lokacin. Da farko ta sami takardar shaidar malamar harshe, amma ba ta iya barin sha'awarta ga lissafi ba, ta ci gaba da karatunta ta hanyar halartar laccoci a Jami'ar Erlangen ba tare da izini ba. Ta sami digirinta na uku a shekara ta 1907, amma ta fuskanci matsaloli da yawa wajen samun matsayin farfesa na yau da kullun saboda kasancewarta mace. Daya daga cikin manyan nasarorinta, abstract algebra, yana nazarin tsarin gabaɗaya na lambobi da ayyuka, yana bincika ainihin tsarin algebraic ta hanyar ra'ayoyi kamar groups, rings, da fields. Haka kuma, Ka'idar Noether tana bayyana dangantakar asali tsakanin symmetry da dokokin kiyayewa a kimiyyar lissafi, tana tabbatar da cewa idan wani tsarin kimiyyar lissafi yana da symmetry, akwai adadi mai kiyayewa da ya dace.

Ko da bayan samun digirinta na uku, Emmy Noether ta ci gaba da bincikenta ba tare da biya ba a Jami'ar Erlangen na tsawon shekaru. A shekara ta 1915, fitattun masana lissafi David Hilbert da Hermann Weyl daga Jami'ar Göttingen, wacce a lokacin ita ce cibiyar lissafi ta duniya, sun gane hazakarta kuma suka gayyace ta zuwa Göttingen. Duk da haka, har ma a Göttingen, ta fuskanci matsaloli a cikin tsarin habilitation (cancantar zama farfesa) saboda kasancewarta mace. Hilbert ya yi mata goyon baya sosai, yana mai cewa, “Mu jami'a ce, ba gidan wanka ba. Jinsin mai neman ba zai iya zama dalilin adawa da cancantar ta ba.” Duk da wannan goyon baya, ta yi lacca a karkashin sunan Hilbert ko ta gudanar da bincike a matsayin mara izini na wani lokaci. Wannan lokacin ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci a gare ta don bunkasa ra'ayoyinta na lissafi na asali yayin da take hulɗa da manyan masana lissafi na zamaninta.

Bayan matsaloli da yawa, a shekara ta 1919, Emmy Noether a karshe ta sami habilitation dinta a Jami'ar Göttingen kuma an nada ta a matsayin malama mara albashi (Privatdozent). Daga baya, a shekara ta 1922, ta sami matsayin “nichtbeamteter ausserordentlicher Professor” (farfesa na musamman wanda ba ma'aikacin gwamnati ba), amma har yanzu ba ta sami kulawa ko isasshen albashi na cikakken farfesa ba. Duk da haka, nasarorinta na ilimi sun kasance masu ban mamaki. Ta kafa kuma ta bunkasa muhimman ra'ayoyi na abstract algebra, ciki har da ka'idar ring, field, da algebra, kuma ra'ayin 'Noetherian ring' musamman ana daukarsa a matsayin muhimmiyar nasara a ilimin algebra na zamani. Bincikenta ba wai kawai ya haifar da ci gaban ka'idoji ba ne, har ma ya horar da dalibai da yawa, inda ya kafa 'Makarantar Noether' kuma ya bude sabbin hanyoyi a binciken algebra. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 1933, tare da hawan gwamnatin Nazi, an kore ta daga matsayinta na farfesa saboda kasancewarta Bayahudiya, wanda ya kawo babban wahala ga rayuwarta da ayyukanta na ilimi. A karshe, ta bar kasarta kuma ta nemi mafaka a Amurka.

Bayan ta yi hijira zuwa Amurka, Emmy Noether ta yi aiki a matsayin farfesa a Kwalejin Bryn Mawr a Pennsylvania kuma ta yi lacca a Cibiyar Nazarin Ci gaba a Princeton. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 1935, saboda matsaloli daga tiyata, ta rasu ba zato ba tsammani tana da shekaru 53, wanda ya kawo karshen tafiyarta ta ilimi mai ban mamaki. Albert Einstein ya yaba mata sosai a matsayin “mafi muhimmancin hazakar lissafi mai kirkira tun farkon ilimi mai zurfi ga mata,” kuma aikinta ya yi tasiri sosai a ilimin lissafi na zamani da kimiyyar lissafi na ka'idoji, musamman ka'idar filin quantum da ka'idar dangantaka ta gabaɗaya. Ka'idar Noether har yanzu ana amfani da ita a yau a matsayin kayan aiki mai mahimmanci don fahimtar muhimman symmetries da dokokin kiyayewa na sararin samaniya, kuma sunanta ya kasance alama ce ta tsaurin lissafi da fahimta. Rayuwarta da nasarorinta, kamar Marie Curie, suna tunatar da mu gwagwarmaya da gadon sauran masana kimiyya mata waɗanda suka sami nasarar ilimi duk da nuna bambanci na zamantakewa na zamaninsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Amalie Emmy Noether wata masaniyar lissafi ce 'yar Jamus a farkon karni na 20, wacce ta kafa harsashin ilimin abstract algebra kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a kimiyyar lissafi ta hanyar Ka'idar Noether.
key_achievements: Kafa muhimman ka'idojin abstract algebra
Bayyana dokokin symmetry-kiyayewa da Ka'idar Noether
Ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ka'idar ring, field, da algebra
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta sun kafa harsashin ilimin lissafi na zamani da kimiyyar lissafi, kuma ana tunawa da ita a matsayin alamar masana kimiyya mata.

parsed.narrative:
Alexander von Humboldt (1769-1859) ya kasance babban masanin kimiyyar halitta kuma mai bincike na zamanin wayewa, wanda ya fadada iyakokin kimiyyar zamani ta hanyar neman cikakkiyar fahimtar duniyar halitta. An haife shi a ranar 14 ga Satumba, 1769, a Berlin, babban birnin Masarautar Prussia, a matsayin ɗa na biyu ga wata dangi mai arziki, ya nuna sha'awar halitta tun yana yaro. Sabanin ɗan'uwansa, Wilhelm von Humboldt, wanda ya yi fice a fannin ilimin ɗan adam, Alexander ya zurfafa cikin kimiyyar halitta kamar ilimin ma'adanai, ilimin tsirrai, da ilimin ƙasa. Ya yi karatun kuɗi a Jami'ar Frankfurt (Oder), amma ya gina harsashin binciken kimiyya ta hanyar koyon ilimin jikin mutum da ilimin halittar jiki daga Johann Friedrich Blumenbach a Jami'ar Göttingen, da kuma ilimin ƙasa daga Abraham Gottlob Werner a Makarantar Ma'adinai ta Freiberg. A wannan lokacin, ya fara samar da wani ra'ayi na musamman na fahimtar halitta ba a matsayin abubuwa daban-daban ba, amma a matsayin wata babbar halitta mai alaƙa da juna. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta cika da sha'awar zuwa duniyar da ba a sani ba, wanda ya wuce iyakokin ilimi na Turai.

Mafi mahimmancin juyawa a rayuwar Humboldt shine balaguron bincike na nahiyar Amurka ta Spain, wanda ya gudana daga 1799 zuwa 1804. Bayan dogon shiri da kuma takaici saboda rikice-rikicen siyasa, a ƙarshe ya sami izini daga gwamnatin Spain kuma ya tafi sabuwar duniya tare da masanin ilimin tsirrai na Faransa, Aimé Bonpland. Wannan babban balaguron bincike na shekaru biyar ya zama filin tabbatarwa da haɓaka ra'ayinsa na haɗin kai game da halitta. Sun bincika Kogin Orinoco, sun tabbatar da haɗinsa da Kogin Amazon, kuma sun ratsa tsaunukan Andes, inda suka hau Dutsen Chimborazo, wanda a lokacin aka san shi a matsayin dutse mafi tsayi a duniya, don rubuta canje-canjen ciyayi dangane da tsayi. Humboldt ya auna kuma ya tattara bayanai daidai daga fannoni daban-daban kamar tsirrai, dabbobi, ilimin ƙasa, yanayi, da filin maganadisu, kuma ya bar rubuce-rubuce game da al'adun asali da al'ummomi. Ta hanyar wannan balaguron, ya sami zurfin fahimta game da yadda abubuwan halitta ke shafar juna da kuma yadda suke samar da tsarin duniya, wanda ya zama harsashin manyan rubuce-rubucensa na gaba.

Bayan ya dawo Turai, Humboldt ya shafe fiye da shekaru 20 a Paris daga 1804, yana mai da hankali kan tsara da buga manyan bayanan balaguron bincikensa. A wannan lokacin, ya haɗa kai da masana da yawa don kammala littafinsa mai juzu'i 30, mai suna 「Voyage aux régions équinoxiales du Nouveau Continent」. Wannan aikin ya wuce rahoton balaguro kawai, ya kafa harsashin fannin ilimi na **Ilimin Tsirrai na Kasa (Phytogeography)**, wato nazarin rarraba tsirrai dangane da yanayi da abubuwan yanki. Bugu da ƙari, ya ba da gudummawa mai girma ga ci gaban ilimin yanayi ta hanyar gabatar da ra'ayin **Isotherm**, wato layin da ba a gani ba wanda ke haɗa wurare masu zafi iri ɗaya. Babban aikinsa na ƙarshen rayuwarsa shine 「Kosmos」. Wannan littafi ya kasance wani gagarumin yunƙuri na haɗa dukkan abubuwan zahiri da halittu masu rai na sararin samaniya zuwa wani abu guda ɗaya, yana isar da ilimin kimiyya ga jama'a tare da ƙarfafa girmamawa ga halitta. Ta hanyar wannan aikin, Humboldt ya bincika kyawun halitta da tsari a kimiyance, yayin da kuma ya motsa sha'awar ilimi na ɗan adam.

Ayyukan Alexander von Humboldt sun yi tasiri sosai ga masana kimiyya na gaba. Charles Darwin ya sami kwarin gwiwa ta hanyar karanta rubuce-rubucensa a lokacin tafiyarsa ta Beagle, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga masu kare muhalli kamar John Muir. Ya kasance majagaba na **Tunanin Muhalli (Ecological Thinking)**, wanda ke neman fahimtar halitta ba a matsayin tarin abubuwa daban-daban ba, amma a matsayin wani babban tsarin da ke da alaƙa da juna. Ya kafa harsashin motsin kare muhalli na zamani ta hanyar gargadi na farko game da tasirin ayyukan ɗan adam ga muhalli. Sunansa ya kasance a cikin wurare da yawa da sunayen halittu kamar tsaunuka, raƙuman ruwa, da nau'ikan tsirrai a Kudancin Amurka, wanda ke nuna alamun bincikensa da bincikensa mai zurfi. A yau, muna neman mafita ga sauyin yanayi da rikicin bambancin halittu a kan ra'ayin haɗin kai da Humboldt ya gabatar. Kamar yadda ɗan'uwansa, Wilhelm von Humboldt, ya bar gadon ilimin ɗan adam ta hanyar harshe da gyaran ilimi, Alexander ya fadada iyakokin ilimi na ɗan adam a fannin kimiyyar halitta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alexander von Humboldt masanin halitta ne kuma mai bincike na Prussia na ƙarni na 18-19, wanda ya kafa harsashin ilimin tsirrai na ƙasa da tunanin muhalli.
key_achievements: Jagorancin babban balaguron kimiyya a Kudancin Amurka
Kafa ilimin tsirrai na ƙasa da ra'ayin isotherm
Rubuta littafin 'Kosmos' mai haɗin kai game da halitta
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayinsa na haɗin kai game da halitta ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban ilimin muhalli na zamani, kimiyyar muhalli, da ilimin ƙasa.

parsed.narrative:
A shekarar 1546, yayin da iska mai sanyi ke kadawa ta tsakanin gidajen katako masu tsatsa na Knutstorp, a bakin tekun arewa mai cike da tashin hankali, wani rai mai daraja ya zo duniya a karkashin sararin samaniyar Denmark mai shuɗi. Ya girma yana sauraron shiru mai nauyi na taurari, kuma tun yana yaro, ya kasance mai sha'awar girman eclipse na rana, wani inuwa mai ban tsoro da ke ratsa sararin samaniya da daddare. Wannan farin ciki ne na ɗan lokaci, amma ya zama iri na sha'awar bincike wanda ba zai taɓa mutuwa ba. Idanunsa sun yi marmarin zurfin sararin samaniya marar iyaka, fiye da rigingimun duniya marasa ma'ana, kuma ya yi ƙoƙari ya fassara harshen taurari. A tsoffin jami'o'in Copenhagen da Leipzig, ya sha ilimin tsoffin zamanai, amma taurarin da aka zana a kan tsoffin taswirorin Aristotle da Ptolemy ba su gamsar da ƙishirwarsa ba. Nan da nan ya gane cewa gaskiya ba ta kulle a cikin littattafai ba.

Makomarsa ta kai kololuwa lokacin da ya kafa wata babbar niyya mai ƙarfi a kan wani ɗan ƙaramin yanki na ƙasa mai suna tsibirin Ven. A shekarar 1576, a wurin da goyon bayan zinariya na Sarkin Denmark ya kai, wani gini mai ban mamaki mai suna 'Uraniborg' ya yi inuwa, yana tashi zuwa sama. Ba kawai gidan nazarin taurari ba ne. Wannan wata babbar na'ura ce da hannun mutum ya ƙirƙira don kama rawanin taurari, kuma manyan sextants da ingantattun quadrants sun kasance sha'awarsa ta yaga labulen dare. Yana ci gaba da rubuta matsayin dubban taurari da duniyoyi sama da shekaru 20, ya tara wani babban dutsen bayanai wanda ya zarce duk ilimin da ya gabata. Niyarsa, tana haskakawa ita kaɗai a cikin duhun dare, ta kasance kamar walƙiya mai haske da ke sanar da haihuwar sabuwar tauraruwa.

Amma hanyar bincike mai girma zuwa sama koyaushe tana da wahala. A shekarar 1566, takobin wani mummunan faɗa da ya fara da wata matsala ta lissafi marar ma'ana ya ɗauke masa hancinsa mai laushi. Tabon ba rauni ne kawai ba. Ya jefa inuwa mai zurfi a cikin zuciyarsa, kuma hancin roba da aka yi da azurfa da tagulla ya ƙara masa nauyin gaskiya mai sanyi. Wani lokaci dole ne ya ɓoye a bayan abin rufe fuska, amma a cikin zurfin ransa, wata wuta mai ƙarfi ta ci gaba da ci. A ƙarƙashin hasken taurari da ke zubowa kowane dare, har ma ya yi amfani da wahalarsa a matsayin kuzari don fahimtar dokokin sararin samaniya. Sabon ilimin taurari da aka haifa daga hannunsa ya kasance sanarwa mai girma da ke sanar da farkon sabon zamani, yana haifar da fashewa a cikin tsohon tsari.

Tsibirinsa na Ven yanzu yana da shiru kamar lokaci ya tsaya, amma gadon Tycho Brahe har yanzu yana raye. Kallonsa mai juriya da ya yi yana ƙirga taurari duk dare, har yanzu yana cikin idanun masana kimiyya da yawa waɗanda ke binciken sararin samaniya ta hanyar ruwan tabarau mai sanyi na na'urar hangen nesa. Ruhunsa marar yankewa na neman gaskiya ta hanyar lura da gwaji kawai, ba tare da gamsuwa da ilimin tsoffin zamanai ba, yana nuna sha'awar ɗan adam ta har abada don fahimtar duniya, kuma yana haskakawa kamar tauraro a cikin zukatanmu duka waɗanda ke kallon sararin samaniya da daddare. Sunansa ba kawai shafi ɗaya na tarihi ba ne, amma za a rubuta shi har abada a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin taurarin haske na basirar ɗan adam da ke ci gaba da ci gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin taurari ɗan Denmark na ƙarni na 16 wanda ya kafa gidan nazarin taurari na Uraniborg a tsibirin Ven kuma ya yi lura daidai tsawon shekaru 20, yana kafa tushen sabon ilimin taurari.
key_achievements: Kafa gidan nazarin taurari na Uraniborg a tsibirin Ven
Tara bayanai masu yawa na lura da taurari sama da shekaru 20
Kafa sabon ilimin taurari bisa ga lura
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa tushen juyin juya halin kimiyya tare da lura daidai da ruhun gwaji, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa na har abada ga binciken sararin samaniya na ɗan adam.

parsed.narrative:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu ya mamaye Turai kuma fahimtar ɗan adam game da yanayi ke canzawa, John Muir (an haife shi a 1838), ɗan asalin Scotland ne, masanin yanayi ɗan Amurka, marubuci, masanin falsafar muhalli, kuma ɗaya daga cikin masu fafutukar farko na kiyaye daji a Amurka. An haife shi a Dunbar, Scotland a 1838, tun yana yaro, ya girma a cikin yanayin daji da gabar teku na ƙasarsa, yana haɓaka ƙauna mai zurfi ga yanayi. A shekara ta 1849, iyalinsa suka ƙaura zuwa Wisconsin, Amurka, don neman rayuwa mafi kyau, kuma Muir ya shafe lokacin samartakarsa a can, yana aikin gona mai wahala da kuma koyarwar addini mai tsauri. Duk da haka, ya cika sha'awarsa ta ilimi ta hanyar karatu da ƙirƙira a lokacin da ya samu, kuma musamman ma ya burge shi da kyawun yanayi yayin da yake bincika dazuzzuka da filayen da ke kewaye. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya samu tun yana yaro sun zama tushen sha'awarsa ta fahimta da kare yanayi a nan gaba. Bai iyakance kansa ga kallon yanayi kawai ba, amma ya haɓaka fahimtar da ke zurfafa cikin ainihin darajar yanayi.

A lokacin da John Muir ya zama saurayi, ya halarci Jami'ar Wisconsin na ɗan lokaci, inda ya sami ilimin kimiyya da injiniyanci, amma ya fi ba da muhimmanci ga binciken yanayi da kansa fiye da ilimin gargajiya. Wani muhimmin canji a rayuwarsa ya zo a shekara ta 1867. Yayin da yake aiki a wani masana'antar kera keken dawakai a Indianapolis, ya sami mummunan haɗari inda wani kayan aiki ya soke masa ido, kusan ya rasa ganinsa. A cikin kwanaki na duhu, ya yi tunani mai zurfi game da rayuwarsa da makomarsa. Wannan haɗarin ya zama wata dama a gare shi ya gane ainihin darajar rayuwa tare da yanayi, ba rayuwar neman nasarar abin duniya ba. Bayan ya dawo da ganinsa, Muir ya yanke shawarar barin masana'antu kuma ya sadaukar da sauran rayuwarsa don bincike da nazarin yanayi. Nan da nan ya fara tafiya mai nisa mai suna “Tafiyar Mil Dubu zuwa Tekun Mexico,” inda ya fuskanci kuma ya rubuta game da daji na Kudancin Amurka. Wannan tafiya ita ce matakin farko da ya ɗauka don fara haɗuwa mai zurfi da yanayi.

Bayan ya kammala tafiyarsa zuwa Tekun Mexico, John Muir ya nufi California, kuma ya zauna a can, musamman ma ya burge shi da girman kwarin Yosemite. Ya shafe shekaru yana binciken Yosemite da tsaunukan Sierra Nevada, yana haɓaka nasa ka'idar ilimin ƙasa cewa glaciers ne suka samar da kwaruruka, wanda ya saba wa ka'idodin da aka fi yarda da su a lokacin. Muir bai iyakance kansa ga binciken yanayi kawai ba, amma ya sami imani mai ƙarfi cewa dole ne a kiyaye kyawun daji da ke lalacewa. Ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa, ya sanar da jama'a game da abubuwan al'ajabi na yanayi kuma ya jaddada buƙatar kiyaye yanayi. A shekara ta 1892, ya kafa Sierra Club, ɗaya daga cikin manyan ƙungiyoyin kare muhalli na farko a Amurka, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kare yankunan daji da faɗaɗa tsarin wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa. Ƙoƙarinsa ya yi tasiri sosai wajen sanya Yosemite National Park da Sequoia National Park, kuma ta hanyar mu'amalarsa da Shugaba Theodore Roosevelt, ya yi tasiri sosai ga manufofin muhalli na Amurka. Ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya da waɗanda ke goyon bayan ci gaban albarkatun ƙasa, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa don kare tsarkakar yanayi.

An kira John Muir “John na Duwatsu” ko “Uban Wuraren Shakatawa na Ƙasa,” kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mutum a cikin motsin kare muhalli na Amurka. Rubuce-rubucensa da falsafarsa har yau suna ci gaba da zaburar da masu fafutukar kare muhalli da masoya yanayi da yawa, kuma shawarwarinsa na farko game da kiyaye daji sun zama muhimmin tushe ga muhallin zamani. Sierra Club, wanda ya kafa tare da wasu, har yanzu yana aiki a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin ƙungiyoyin kare muhalli mafi tasiri a Amurka, yana ci gaba da gadonsa. Sakamakon ƙoƙarin Muir mai sadaukarwa, an sami damar kiyaye wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa da yankunan daji da yawa, kamar Yosemite da Sequoia, daga barazanar lalacewa. Ya wuce 'kiyayewa' (conservation), wanda ke nufin sarrafa yanayi bisa ga bukatun ɗan adam, kuma ya kafa ra'ayin 'kiyaye daji' (wilderness preservation), wanda ke gane da kuma kare ainihin darajar yanayi da kansa, yana ba da sabon hangen nesa game da dangantakar yanayi da ɗan adam. Wannan tunaninsa ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban motsin kare yanayi na Amurka ta hanyoyi daban-daban, tare da mutane irin su Gifford Pinchot, masanin gandun daji na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: John Muir masanin yanayi ne ɗan Amurka haifaffen Scotland na ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga kafa tsarin wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa na Amurka da kuma motsin kiyaye daji.
key_achievements: Kafa da gudanar da Sierra Club tare da wasu
Gudummawa ga sanya wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa kamar Yosemite
Kafa da yaɗa falsafar kiyaye daji
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa na farko game da kiyaye daji da ƙoƙarinsa sun zama ginshiƙin motsin kare muhalli na zamani, kuma gadonsa yana ci gaba ta hanyar wuraren shakatawa na ƙasa da yankunan kiyaye yanayi da yawa.

parsed.narrative:
Alfred Russel Wallace (an haife shi a shekara ta 1823) fitaccen masanin halittu ne, mai bincike, masanin kasa, masanin dan Adam, kuma masanin ilimin halittu na Ingila a karni na 19. Shekarar 1823, lokacin da aka haife shi, lokaci ne da juyin juya halin masana'antu ke mamaye Turai kuma binciken kimiyya ke ci gaba da bunkasa, amma fahimtar asalin rayuwa da bambancinta har yanzu yana cikin ra'ayin tauhidi. An haife shi a Monmouthshire, Wales, daya daga cikin yara shida, Wallace ya girma a cikin yanayi mara kyau, kuma bayan ya yi karatu na dan lokaci a makarantar London, dole ya daina karatu yana da shekaru 14. Ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin mai aikin auna kasa ga dan uwansa, inda ya samu ilimi mai amfani a fannin ilimin kasa da ilimin tsirrai. Daga baya, ya yi aiki a matsayin malami a makarantar Leicester, inda ya bunkasa sha'awar ilimin halittu ta hanyar koyar da kansa. Musamman ma, ya fara gane mamakin bambancin halittu ta hanyar tattara kwari, wanda ya zama tushen manyan bincikensa da gano abubuwa a nan gaba. A wannan lokacin, ya karanta littattafan fitattun masana halittu na zamaninsa, yana mai burin warware asirin rayuwa.

Sha'awar ilimi ta matashin Wallace ta kai shi ga duniyar da ba a sani ba. A shekara ta 1848, ya fara wani balaguro mai cike da jarumtaka zuwa Kwarin Amazon tare da abokin aikinsa masanin halittu Henry Walter Bates. Manufar wannan balaguron ita ce tattara samfuran dabbobi da tsirrai na Kudancin Amurka, waɗanda ba a san su sosai a Turai ba a lokacin, da kuma nazarin tsarin bambancin halittu don gano alamun asalin jinsuna. A cikin shekaru hudu na binciken Amazon, Wallace ya gano kuma ya tattara sabbin jinsuna masu yawa, kuma ya yi tafiye-tafiye masu yawa tare da kogin, yana lura da yadda halittu ke yaduwa daga mahangar kasa. Amma a shekara ta 1852, yayin da yake komawa gida, jirgin ruwansa ya kama da wuta, kuma ya fuskanci bala'in rasa yawancin samfuransa masu yawa da muhimman bayanai da ya tattara tsawon shekaru masu wahala. Wannan babban asara ya ba shi babban takaici, amma a lokaci guda ya kara karfafa ruhin bincikensa. Duk da wannan gwaji, ya wallafa littattafai biyu bisa ga kwarewarsa a Amazon, yana raba iliminsa ga duniya.

Duk da kwarewarsa mai ban tausayi a Amazon, Wallace bai rasa sha'awar bincike da nazari ba. A shekara ta 1854, ya sake tafiya zuwa Tsibirin Malay na Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya, inda ya fara wani balaguro mai girma na shekaru takwas. A wannan lokacin, ya tattara fiye da samfura 125,000 kuma ya gano sabbin jinsuna masu yawa, kuma musamman ya lura da lamarin da ke nuna bambancin yaduwar halittu a kowane tsibiri. Ya kafa ra'ayin **Layin Wallace (Wallace Line)**, wanda shine layin iyakar biogeographical tsakanin Asiya da Ostiraliya, wanda ya kasance muhimmin bincike da ke nuna yadda dabbobi ke rabuwa da kuma juyin halitta ta hanyar shingayen kasa. Yayin da yake fama da zazzabin cizon sauro a Tsibirin Malay, ya samu kwarin gwiwa daga ka'idar yawan jama'a ta Thomas Malthus kuma ya gane ra'ayin juyin halitta ta hanyar zaɓi na halitta da kansa. A shekara ta 1858, ya aika da takardar da ke dauke da ka'idarsa, wato 'Ternate Essay', ga Charles Darwin, wanda ya zama dalilin da ya sa Darwin ya gaggauta buga ka'idar juyin halittarsa. A wannan shekarar, an gabatar da takardar Wallace tare da rubutun Darwin da ba a buga ba a Linnean Society of London, wanda ya samar da wani juyi mai juyin juya hali a fahimtar rayuwa ta ɗan adam.

Alfred Russel Wallace ana tunawa da shi ba kawai a matsayin mai gano ka'idar zaɓi na halitta tare ba, har ma a matsayin majagaba a fannin biogeography da kuma masanin kimiyya wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a fannoni daban-daban. Ya gudanar da bincike na farko kan lamarin **launin gargadi (warning coloration)** da **koyarwa (mimicry)**, yana ba da gudummawa wajen bayyana rikitarwa na mu'amalar halittu. Bugu da kari, ban da binciken kimiyya, ya kuma nuna sha'awa ga batutuwan zamantakewa daban-daban kamar adalci na zamantakewa, mallakar kasa ta gwamnati, da ruhiyyanci, kuma ya kare imaninsa da karfi. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, an sake kimanta ayyukan Wallace, kuma musamman gudummawarsa a fannin biogeography ana gane shi a matsayin muhimmin tushen ilimi har yau. Ko da yake sunansa ya kan rufe ta shaharar Charles Darwin, bincikensa na kansa da fahimtarsa sun kasance muhimmin abu ga ci gaban ka'idar juyin halitta, kuma ya kasance misali ne na alama da ke nuna bambancin da kuma 'yancin kai na binciken kimiyya. Rayuwarsa da ayyukansa, tare da na Charles Darwin, wani babban masanin halittu na zamaninsa, sun kasance abin tarihi mai haske har abada a tafiyar ilimi ta ɗan adam don bincika asirin rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alfred Russel Wallace masanin halittu ne na Ingila na karni na 19 wanda ya tsara ka'idar zaɓi na halitta da kansa, ba tare da Charles Darwin ba.
key_achievements: Gano ka'idar juyin halitta ta hanyar zaɓi na halitta tare
Binciken Tsibirin Malay da kafa Layin Wallace
Majagaba a fannin biogeography da binciken launin gargadi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa na kansa ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban ka'idar juyin halitta kuma ya kafa tushen biogeography.

parsed.narrative:
Pierre Curie (1859-1906) ya kasance fitaccen masanin kimiyyar lissafi da sinadarai na Faransa wanda ya yi aiki a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, kuma majagaba ne a fannin ilimin lu'ulu'u (crystallography) da maganadisu (magnetism). Ilimin lu'ulu'u wani fanni ne da ke nazarin tsari da halayen abubuwa masu lu'ulu'u, yayin da maganadisu ke magana kan yadda abubuwa ke nuna halayen maganadisu. An haife shi a Paris a cikin iyali masu ilimi, ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin lissafi da kimiyyar lissafi tun yana ƙarami, kuma ya sami digirinsa na farko a kimiyyar lissafi daga Jami'ar Sorbonne yana da shekaru 18. Farkon aikinsa ya kasance mai zaman kansa, musamman haɗin gwiwarsa da ɗan'uwansa, Jacques Curie. A shekara ta 1880, 'yan'uwan biyu sun gano abin da ake kira piezoelectricity tare. Wannan al'amari ne inda wasu abubuwa ke samar da cajin lantarki lokacin da aka yi musu matsin lamba, kuma wannan ya kafa muhimmin tushe ga Pierre Curie don bincika ainihin halayen abubuwa. A wannan lokacin, ya kafa sunansa a matsayin mai gwaji mai daidaito da kirkire-kirkire, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa a zamanin da aka yi ta samun sabbin bincike na kimiyya.

Rayuwar Pierre Curie da bincikensa sun sami gagarumin canji a shekara ta 1894 lokacin da ya sadu da wata matashiyar masaniyar kimiyya 'yar Poland, Marie Skłodowska. A lokacin, Marie tana ci gaba da karatunta a Faransa, kuma su biyun sun yi saurin kusantar juna saboda sha'awar kimiyya da ruhin bincike da suke da shi. Sun yi aure a shekara mai zuwa, 1895, kuma sun zama ba kawai ma'aurata ba, har ma manyan abokan haɗin gwiwa waɗanda za a tuna da su har abada a tarihin kimiyyar ɗan adam. Pierre ya ɗan dakatar da bincikensa na ilimin lu'ulu'u da maganadisu, waɗanda su ne manyan fannoni na bincikensa a lokacin, kuma ya shiga binciken Henri Becquerel game da radiation na uranium, wanda Marie ke sha'awar. Radioactivity wani al'amari ne inda ƙwayoyin atom marasa ƙarfi ke fitar da kuzari kuma su canza zuwa wasu abubuwa, kuma a lokacin, sabon fanni ne da ba a san shi ba. Pierre ya ba da gudummawa wajen haɓaka ingantattun kayan aikin aunawa da ake buƙata don binciken Marie, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gano ainihin wannan sabon al'amari. Haɗin gwiwarsu ya kasance farkon wani babban tafiya na bincike, yana karya iyakokin kimiyya na gargajiya da bincika sabbin abubuwa na zahiri.

Binciken ma'auratan Curie game da radioactivity ya kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje da gwagwarmaya marasa misaltuwa. Sun shafe sa'o'i marasa adadi a cikin wani tsohon sito da aka gyara a makarantar kimiyya da fasaha ta Paris, wanda ya zama dakin gwaje-gwajensu.
